from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson"

SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("payment_id", StringType()),
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("record_type", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amount_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("exchange_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("rate_date", StringType()),
    StructField("day", StringType()),
    StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_payments")
def raw_payments():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw_payments")

    cur = F.upper(F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code"))
    amt = F.coalesce("amount", "value")
    rate_val = F.coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate")
    ts_str = F.coalesce("occurred_at", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "created_at")

    ts = F.to_timestamp(ts_str)
    # UTC calendar day independent of session timezone (epoch seconds -> UTC day)
    utc_date = F.date_from_unix_date(
        F.floor(F.unix_timestamp(ts) / F.lit(86400)).cast("int")
    )
    rate_day = F.coalesce(F.to_date("date"), F.to_date("rate_date"), F.to_date("day"))

    base = df.select(
        cur.alias("cur"),
        amt.alias("amt"),
        rate_val.alias("rate_val"),
        utc_date.alias("pay_date"),
        F.coalesce(rate_day, utc_date).alias("obs_date"),
    )

    # authoritative rate per currency/day (median -> ignores a few wrong quotes)
    daily = (
        base.where(F.col("rate_val").isNotNull() & F.col("cur").isNotNull() & F.col("obs_date").isNotNull())
        .groupBy("cur", "obs_date")
        .agg(F.expr("percentile_approx(rate_val, 0.5)").alias("day_rate"))
        .withColumnRenamed("obs_date", "dt")
    )

    # per-currency fallback so recognized value is never dropped for a missing day
    cur_rate = (
        base.where(F.col("rate_val").isNotNull() & F.col("cur").isNotNull())
        .groupBy("cur")
        .agg(F.expr("percentile_approx(rate_val, 0.5)").alias("cur_rate"))
    )

    pay = (
        base.where(F.col("amt").isNotNull() & F.col("cur").isNotNull() & F.col("pay_date").isNotNull())
        .select("cur", F.col("pay_date").alias("dt"), "amt")
    )

    joined = pay.join(daily, ["cur", "dt"], "left").join(cur_rate, ["cur"], "left")

    usd_rate = F.when(F.col("cur") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(
        F.coalesce("day_rate", "cur_rate")
    )

    recognized = (
        joined.withColumn("usd_rate", usd_rate)
        .where(F.col("usd_rate").isNotNull())  # unknown currencies set aside
        .withColumn("usd_amt", F.col("amt") * F.col("usd_rate"))
    )

    result = (
        recognized.groupBy("dt")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amt").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("dt").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), "usd_total")
    )
    return result

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"

# Superset schema: whatever the messy feed actually emits binds here; the rest are null.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amt", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("payment_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("cur", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("payment_date", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_per_unit", DoubleType()),
    StructField("exchange_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("conversion_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("record_type", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("rate_date", StringType()),
])


def _exprs():
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("amt"), F.col("value"), F.col("payment_amount"))
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("cur"), F.col("currency_code")))
    occ = F.coalesce(F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"),
                     F.col("timestamp"), F.col("created_at"), F.col("payment_date"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd"),
                      F.col("usd_per_unit"), F.col("exchange_rate"), F.col("conversion_rate"))
    rdate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("date"), occ)
    return amt, ccy, occ, rate, rdate


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_src")
def payments_src():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_src")
    amt, ccy, occ, rate, rdate = _exprs()

    # UTC calendar day: first 10 chars of the ISO string (feed is UTC-stamped)
    p_date = F.to_date(F.substring(occ, 1, 10))
    k_date = F.to_date(F.substring(rdate, 1, 10))

    payments = (df.select(amt.alias("p_amt"), ccy.alias("p_ccy"),
                          p_date.alias("p_date"), rate.alias("p_rate"))
                  .where(F.col("p_amt").isNotNull()))

    # Rate lookup keyed on (currency, day) — dedup to one rate per key.
    rates = (df.select(ccy.alias("k_ccy"), k_date.alias("k_date"), rate.alias("k_rate"))
               .where(F.col("k_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("k_ccy").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("k_date").isNotNull())
               .groupBy("k_ccy", "k_date").agg(F.max("k_rate").alias("k_rate")))

    joined = payments.join(
        rates,
        (F.col("p_ccy") == F.col("k_ccy")) & (F.col("p_date") == F.col("k_date")),
        "left",
    )

    eff = F.coalesce(F.col("p_rate"), F.col("k_rate"),
                     F.when(F.col("p_ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)))

    out = (joined.withColumn("eff_rate", eff)
                 .where(F.col("eff_rate").isNotNull())          # set aside unrecognized currencies
                 .withColumn("usd", F.col("p_amt") * F.col("eff_rate"))
                 .groupBy(F.col("p_date").alias("settlement_date"))
                 .agg(F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total")))

    return out.select("settlement_date", "usd_total")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed31415.ndjson"

# Explicit schema (superset) -> no inference, no forced analysis at dry-run/run.
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("value", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("occurred_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("as_of", T.StringType()),
])


def _utc_day(col):
    # Extract the UTC calendar day textually from an ISO string; no session tz.
    return F.to_date(F.regexp_extract(col.cast("string"), r"(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})", 1))


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_events")
def raw_events():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    cur = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy")))
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"))
    rt = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("fx_rate"))
    ts = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
                    F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("event_time"))
    rdate = F.coalesce(F.col("date"), F.col("as_of"))
    return df.select(
        cur.alias("cur"),
        amt.alias("amt"),
        rt.alias("rt"),
        _utc_day(ts).alias("pay_date"),
        _utc_day(rdate).alias("rate_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("raw_events")
    return (df
            .where(F.col("amt").isNull()
                   & F.col("rt").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("cur").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull())
            .groupBy("cur", "rate_date")
            .agg(F.max("rt").alias("rt")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_clean")
def payments_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("raw_events")
    return (df
            .where(F.col("amt").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("cur").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("pay_date").isNotNull())
            .select("cur", "amt", "pay_date"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_clean")
    r = spark.read.table("fx_rates")
    joined = p.join(r, (p["cur"] == r["cur"]) & (p["pay_date"] == r["rate_date"]), "left")
    eff = F.when(p["cur"] == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(r["rt"])
    recognized = (joined
                  .withColumn("eff_rate", eff)
                  .where(F.col("eff_rate").isNotNull())      # unrecognized ccy set aside
                  .withColumn("usd_value", p["amt"] * F.col("eff_rate")))
    return (recognized
            .groupBy(p["pay_date"].alias("settlement_date"))
            .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed14142.ndjson"

_STR = ["payment_id", "id", "currency", "currency_code", "ccy",
        "occurred_at", "ts", "event_time", "timestamp", "created_at",
        "paid_at", "datetime", "time",
        "date", "rate_date", "day", "as_of",
        "type", "kind", "record_type", "event"]
_NUM = ["amount", "value", "payment_amount", "amount_usd", "usd_amount",
        "rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "usd_per_unit"]

SCHEMA = StructType(
    [StructField(n, StringType(), True) for n in _STR] +
    [StructField(n, DoubleType(), True) for n in _NUM]
)

_AMT = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"), F.col("payment_amount"))
_CUR = F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("currency_code"), F.col("ccy"))
_PTS = F.coalesce(F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"),
                  F.col("timestamp"), F.col("created_at"), F.col("paid_at"),
                  F.col("datetime"), F.col("time"))
_RATE = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd"),
                   F.col("usd_per_unit"))
_RDATE_STR = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("date"), F.col("day"),
                        F.col("as_of"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("ts"))

# UTC calendar day from an ISO-8601 (Z) timestamp string: first 10 chars.
def _utc_day(col):
    return F.to_date(F.substring(col, 1, 10))


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw")
def raw():
    # Explicit schema => no inference => lazy/unresolved plan (no analysis action).
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA_PATH)


def _payments(df):
    return (df.where(_AMT.isNotNull())
              .select(F.upper(_CUR).alias("currency"),
                      _AMT.cast("double").alias("amount"),
                      _utc_day(_PTS).alias("settlement_date")))


def _rates(df):
    # Canonical daily rate: rate-bearing rows without a payment amount.
    r = (df.where(_AMT.isNull() & _RATE.isNotNull())
           .select(F.upper(_CUR).alias("currency"),
                   _utc_day(_RDATE_STR).alias("settlement_date"),
                   _RATE.cast("double").alias("rate")))
    return r.groupBy("currency", "settlement_date").agg(F.avg("rate").alias("rate"))


def _converted(df):
    pay = _payments(df)
    rates = _rates(df)
    j = pay.join(rates, ["currency", "settlement_date"], "left")
    factor = F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("rate"))
    return j.withColumn("factor", factor)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw")
    conv = _converted(df).where(F.col("factor").isNotNull())
    return (conv.withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("factor"))
                .groupBy("settlement_date")
                .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                .select("settlement_date", "usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="unrecognized_payments")
def unrecognized_payments():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw")
    conv = _converted(df).where(F.col("factor").isNull())
    return conv.select("settlement_date", "currency", "amount")

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"
)
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/p9_enrich_join__A__seed42/enriched_totals.parquet"
)


def pick(cols, *cands):
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    for cand in cands:
        for c in cols:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def clean_num(colname):
    # strip currency symbols / commas / stray chars, keep digits, dot, minus
    s = F.regexp_replace(F.col(colname).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.when(s == "", None).otherwise(s).cast("double")


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("ERROR")

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_OUTPUT

    raw = spark.read.json(inp)
    cols = raw.columns

    mid = pick(cols, "merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant")
    rev = pick(cols, "revenue", "amount", "total", "price", "value")
    oid = pick(cols, "order_id", "orderid")

    # ---- Build the ORDERS side (the grain we must preserve) --------------
    # Every input row that represents an order must survive.
    rev_col = clean_num(rev) if rev else F.lit(0.0)
    order_key = F.col(oid) if oid else F.monotonically_increasing_id()

    if mid:
        orders = raw.select(
            order_key.alias("_order_key"),
            F.col(mid).cast("string").alias("_mid"),
            rev_col.alias("_rev"),
        )
    else:
        orders = raw.select(
            order_key.alias("_order_key"),
            F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("_mid"),
            rev_col.alias("_rev"),
        )

    # ---- Build the merchant DIRECTORY (attributes) ----------------------
    # Attribute columns = everything that is not the id/revenue/order fields.
    used = {c for c in (mid, rev, oid) if c}
    attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c not in used]

    enriched = orders
    if mid and attr_cols:
        # Directory rows are those that actually carry merchant attributes.
        not_null = None
        for c in attr_cols:
            cond = F.col(c).isNotNull()
            not_null = cond if not_null is None else (not_null | cond)

        directory = (
            raw.select(
                F.col(mid).cast("string").alias("_mid"),
                *[F.col(c).alias("attr_" + c) for c in attr_cols],
            )
            .where(F.col("_mid").isNotNull() & (not_null))
            # dedupe so a merchant contributes at most ONE row (no fan-out
            # that would inflate the enriched total)
            .dropDuplicates(["_mid"])
        )

        # LEFT join on a list key -> single coalesced "_mid", no ambiguity,
        # and every order survives even if its merchant is not in directory.
        enriched = orders.join(directory, ["_mid"], "left")

    # register the enriched detail as a temp view (attributes attached,
    # all orders preserved)
    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_orders")

    # ---- GOLD: enriched_totals(revenue) ---------------------------------
    totals = enriched.agg(
        F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("_rev"), F.lit(0.0))).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    )
    totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    # sanity: enriched total must tie to raw source total
    raw_total = orders.agg(
        F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("_rev"), F.lit(0.0))).alias("t")
    ).collect()[0]["t"]
    enr_total = totals.collect()[0]["revenue"]
    print("raw_total=%s enriched_total=%s" % (raw_total, enr_total))

    totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import DoubleType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"


def find_col(cols, cands):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    return None


def clean_num(colname):
    # Strip currency symbols/commas/spaces, cast to double, null -> 0.0 (stable & idempotent)
    stripped = F.regexp_replace(F.col(colname).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.coalesce(F.when(stripped == "", None).otherwise(stripped).cast(DoubleType()), F.lit(0.0))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    rev_col = find_col(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "order_amount", "order_total",
                              "total", "price", "gross", "sales"])
    oid_col = find_col(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order"])
    mid_col = find_col(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant", "seller_id", "store_id"])
    mattr_col = find_col([c for c in cols if c not in (rev_col, oid_col, mid_col)],
                         ["merchant_name", "name", "category", "merchant_category",
                          "segment", "tier", "attributes", "region", "country"])

    # --- Separate order rows from directory-only rows ---------------------------
    # An order row is any row carrying revenue (or an order id).
    order_pred = F.lit(False)
    if rev_col:
        order_pred = order_pred | F.col(rev_col).isNotNull()
    if oid_col:
        order_pred = order_pred | F.col(oid_col).isNotNull()
    if not (rev_col or oid_col):
        order_pred = F.lit(True)

    orders = raw.filter(order_pred)

    # Revenue as clean numeric
    if rev_col:
        orders = orders.withColumn("revenue", clean_num(rev_col))
    else:
        orders = orders.withColumn("revenue", F.lit(0.0))

    # De-duplicate orders on their business key so reprocessing is stable
    if oid_col:
        orders = orders.dropDuplicates([oid_col])

    # --- Build the merchant directory (unique keys => no fan-out) ----------------
    merchants = None
    if mid_col and mattr_col:
        merchants = (
            raw.filter((F.col(rev_col).isNull() if rev_col else F.lit(True)) &
                       F.col(mattr_col).isNotNull() &
                       F.col(mid_col).isNotNull())
               .select(F.col(mid_col).alias("_dir_mid"),
                       F.col(mattr_col).alias("_dir_attr"))
               .dropDuplicates(["_dir_mid"])
        )
        if merchants.head(1) == []:
            merchants = None  # no directory rows embedded; nothing to join

    # --- Enrichment via LEFT join: every order survives -------------------------
    if merchants is not None and mid_col:
        enriched = orders.join(
            merchants,
            orders[mid_col] == merchants["_dir_mid"],
            how="left",
        )
        # merchants whose id isn't in the directory yet keep NULL attributes but survive
        enriched = enriched.withColumn(
            "merchant_attr",
            F.coalesce(F.col("_dir_attr"), F.lit("UNKNOWN"))
        )
    else:
        enriched = orders.withColumn("merchant_attr", F.lit("UNKNOWN"))

    # --- Enriched total ties to source (sum over surviving orders) --------------
    enriched_totals = enriched.agg(
        F.coalesce(F.sum("revenue"), F.lit(0.0)).cast(DoubleType()).alias("revenue")
    )

    # Sanity guardrail: enriched must equal raw source total (no drops, no fan-out)
    source_total = orders.agg(F.coalesce(F.sum("revenue"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("t")).collect()[0]["t"]
    enr_total = enriched_totals.collect()[0]["revenue"]
    if abs((source_total or 0.0) - (enr_total or 0.0)) > 1e-6:
        raise RuntimeError(
            f"Enriched total {enr_total} does not tie to source {source_total}"
        )

    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet("enriched_totals.parquet")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T


FALLBACK_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"
FALLBACK_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/p9_enrich_join__A__seed2718/enriched_totals.parquet"


def pick_col(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    # substring match
    for cand in candidates:
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc:
                return orig
    return None


def clean_revenue(col):
    # strip currency symbols / commas / whitespace, keep sign + digits + dot
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(F.col(col).cast("string"), r"[^0-9\.\-]", "")
    cleaned = F.when(cleaned == "", None).otherwise(cleaned)
    return cleaned.cast(T.DoubleType())


def main():
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_INPUT)
    output_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_OUTPUT)
    output_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")  # remote/table-backed runs

    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    # ---- 1. Read messy orders (NDJSON) ----
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    order_id_col = pick_col(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id"])
    merchant_id_col = pick_col(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant"])
    revenue_col = pick_col(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "gross", "value", "total", "price"])

    if revenue_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate a revenue-like column in {cols}")

    # ---- 2. Normalize / clean orders (deterministic, idempotent) ----
    orders = raw.withColumn("_revenue", clean_revenue(revenue_col))

    if merchant_id_col is not None:
        orders = orders.withColumn(
            "_merchant_id", F.col(merchant_id_col).cast("string")
        )
    else:
        orders = orders.withColumn("_merchant_id", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    if order_id_col is not None:
        orders = orders.withColumn("_order_id", F.col(order_id_col).cast("string"))
        # Deterministic dedup by order_id so reprocessing is stable.
        w = Window.partitionBy("_order_id").orderBy(
            F.col("_revenue").asc_nulls_last(), F.col("_merchant_id").asc_nulls_last()
        )
        orders = (
            orders.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
            .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
            .drop("_rn")
        )

    orders = orders.persist()

    # ---- 3. Build merchant directory from records carrying merchant attributes ----
    # Attribute columns are anything merchant-ish besides the id.
    attr_candidates = [
        c for c in cols
        if any(k in c.lower() for k in ["name", "category", "tier", "region", "attr", "segment"])
    ]

    directory = None
    if merchant_id_col is not None and attr_candidates:
        dir_cols = [merchant_id_col] + attr_candidates
        directory = (
            raw.select(*[F.col(c) for c in dir_cols])
            .withColumn("_merchant_id", F.col(merchant_id_col).cast("string"))
            .where(F.col("_merchant_id").isNotNull())
        )
        # Keep only rows that actually have at least one attribute populated.
        attr_present = F.lit(False)
        for a in attr_candidates:
            attr_present = attr_present | F.col(a).isNotNull()
        directory = directory.where(attr_present)
        # Deterministic one row per merchant.
        dw = Window.partitionBy("_merchant_id").orderBy(
            *[F.col(a).asc_nulls_last() for a in attr_candidates]
        )
        directory = (
            directory.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(dw))
            .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
            .drop("_rn", merchant_id_col)
        )

    # ---- 4. Enrich via LEFT join so EVERY order survives ----
    if directory is not None:
        enriched = orders.join(F.broadcast(directory), on="_merchant_id", how="left")
    else:
        enriched = orders

    # ---- 5. Aggregate to the contract: enriched_totals(revenue) ----
    # sum() ignores nulls identically on raw and enriched, so the enriched
    # total ties to the source total (left join drops nothing).
    enriched_totals = enriched.agg(
        F.coalesce(F.sum(F.col("_revenue")), F.lit(0.0)).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    )

    # Sanity: raw source total (same cleaning) for the operator log.
    raw_total = orders.agg(
        F.coalesce(F.sum(F.col("_revenue")), F.lit(0.0)).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    ).collect()[0]["revenue"]
    enr_total = enriched_totals.collect()[0]["revenue"]
    print(f"[p9_enrich_join] raw_total={raw_total} enriched_total={enr_total} "
          f"orders={orders.count()} enriched_rows={enriched.count()}")

    enriched_totals = enriched_totals.persist()

    # ---- 6. Register temp view with the exact contract name ----
    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    # ---- 7. Materialize GOLD output ----
    if output_table:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)
    else:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(output_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()

    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F


def pick(cols, cands):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for c in cols:
        cl = c.lower()
        for cand in cands:
            if cand in cl:
                return c
    return None


def clean_money(col):
    # Robustly coerce messy revenue (strings, currency symbols, commas, nulls)
    # to a numeric value. Missing/garbage -> 0.0 so raw and enriched totals
    # are computed on an identical, deterministic basis.
    s = F.regexp_replace(col.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    num = F.when(s == F.lit(""), F.lit(None)).otherwise(s.cast("double"))
    return F.coalesce(num, F.lit(0.0))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    default_input = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed3141.ndjson"
    )
    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---- Read raw orders ---------------------------------------------------
    orders = spark.read.json(in_path)
    cols = orders.columns
    print("INPUT SCHEMA:", cols, file=sys.stderr)

    rev_col = pick(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "total", "gross", "price", "sales", "value"])
    mer_col = pick(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant", "seller_id", "sellerid", "seller"])

    if rev_col is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Could not locate a revenue column in: %s" % cols)

    orders = orders.withColumn("_revenue", clean_money(F.col(rev_col)))

    # ---- Raw (source) total -----------------------------------------------
    raw_total = orders.agg(F.sum("_revenue").alias("t")).collect()[0]["t"] or 0.0

    # ---- Enrich: attach merchant attributes via LEFT join -----------------
    # The bug: an inner join drops orders whose merchant isn't in the
    # directory yet (the newly onboarded merchant). A LEFT OUTER join keeps
    # every order, so the enriched total ties back to source.
    if mer_col is not None:
        attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c != rev_col]
        # Build a merchant directory (distinct merchant + attributes).
        directory = (
            orders.select([mer_col] + [c for c in attr_cols if c != mer_col])
            .dropDuplicates([mer_col])
        )
        # Emulate a directory that may lag behind onboarding: even if the
        # directory is incomplete, the left join guarantees survival.
        dir_keys = directory.select(mer_col).withColumnRenamed(mer_col, "_dir_key")
        enriched = orders.join(
            dir_keys,
            orders[mer_col] == dir_keys["_dir_key"],
            how="left",
        )
    else:
        enriched = orders

    enriched_total = enriched.agg(F.sum("_revenue").alias("t")).collect()[0]["t"] or 0.0

    print("RAW TOTAL:", raw_total, file=sys.stderr)
    print("ENRICHED TOTAL:", enriched_total, file=sys.stderr)

    # Consistency check: enrichment must not lose revenue.
    if abs(enriched_total - raw_total) > 1e-6:
        raise RuntimeError(
            "Enriched total %s does not tie to raw total %s"
            % (enriched_total, raw_total)
        )

    # ---- GOLD output: enriched_totals(revenue) ----------------------------
    result = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(float(enriched_total),)], schema="revenue double"
    )
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    if out_path:
        result.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output location provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH/TABLE).")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# pipeline.py
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed5772.ndjson"
)


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(in_path)
    cols = df.columns

    # Identify the merchant key and the revenue measure from the messy schema.
    mkey = _pick(cols, [
        "merchant_id", "merchantId", "merchant_key", "merchantKey", "merchant",
    ])
    rev = _pick(cols, [
        "revenue", "amount", "order_total", "orderTotal", "total",
        "value", "price", "gross_revenue",
    ])
    if rev is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not locate a revenue column in input: %s" % cols)

    # Robust numeric parse of a possibly-messy revenue field (strings, symbols, nulls).
    rev_expr = F.coalesce(
        F.regexp_replace(F.col(rev).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "").cast("double"),
        F.lit(0.0),
    ).alias("__rev")

    if mkey is None:
        # No merchant grain to join on: enriched total == source total.
        enriched = df.select(rev_expr)
    else:
        # Candidate merchant attribute columns (present on the same source rows).
        attr_candidates = [
            "merchant_name", "name", "merchant_category", "category",
            "merchant_region", "region", "segment", "tier",
            "country", "merchant_status", "status", "onboarded_at",
        ]
        attr_cols = [c for c in attr_candidates if c in cols and c != mkey]

        # Build a de-duplicated merchant directory. Rename EVERY column so it
        # cannot collide with the orders side -> removes AMBIGUOUS_REFERENCE.
        dir_select = [F.col(mkey).alias("__dir_key")] + [
            F.col(c).alias("dir_" + c) for c in attr_cols
        ]
        directory = (
            df.select(*dir_select)
              .where(F.col("__dir_key").isNotNull())
              .dropDuplicates(["__dir_key"])  # guarantee no fan-out
        )

        orders = df.alias("o")

        # LEFT join so EVERY order survives, including merchants not yet in the
        # directory (their dir_* attributes are simply null).
        joined = orders.join(
            F.broadcast(directory),
            F.col("o." + mkey) == F.col("__dir_key"),
            "left",
        )

        # Reference the revenue explicitly from the orders alias -> unambiguous.
        enriched = joined.select(
            F.coalesce(
                F.regexp_replace(F.col("o." + rev).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "").cast("double"),
                F.lit(0.0),
            ).alias("__rev")
        )

    # Contract: enriched_totals(revenue) — single-row total that ties to source.
    result = enriched.agg(F.sum("__rev").alias("revenue"))

    # Register the contract-named temp view in this SparkSession.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output location provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH / AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE)")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed8675.ndjson"
)


def get_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def pick_col(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


def norm_revenue(col):
    # robustly coerce string/currency/whitespace revenue to double; null -> 0
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(F.trim(col.cast("string")), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.coalesce(F.when(cleaned == "", None).otherwise(cleaned).cast("double"),
                      F.lit(0.0))


def main():
    spark = get_spark()

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    output_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    output_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    rev_col = pick_col(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "order_revenue", "order_amount",
                              "total", "gross_revenue", "gross", "price"])
    mer_col = pick_col(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant", "mid",
                              "seller_id", "store_id"])
    type_col = pick_col(cols, ["type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type", "record"])
    order_id_col = pick_col(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "event_id"])

    # ---- Identify order records vs merchant-directory records ----------------
    if type_col is not None:
        t = F.lower(F.col(type_col).cast("string"))
        is_order = t.rlike("order") | t.rlike("txn") | t.rlike("event")
        is_merch = t.rlike("merch") | t.rlike("seller") | t.rlike("store") | t.rlike("dir")
        orders = raw.filter(is_order)
        merch_records = raw.filter(is_merch)
        if orders.rdd.isEmpty():
            orders = raw.filter(~is_merch) if is_merch is not None else raw
    elif rev_col is not None:
        # order rows are the ones carrying revenue; pure directory rows have none
        orders = raw.filter(F.col(rev_col).isNotNull())
        merch_records = raw.filter(F.col(rev_col).isNull())
    else:
        orders = raw
        merch_records = raw.limit(0)

    if orders.rdd.isEmpty():
        orders = raw  # fall back: treat everything as orders

    # ---- Normalize order revenue --------------------------------------------
    if rev_col is not None:
        orders = orders.withColumn("_revenue", norm_revenue(F.col(rev_col)))
    else:
        orders = orders.withColumn("_revenue", F.lit(0.0))

    # ---- Build merchant directory (attributes), deduped on key --------------
    attr_candidates = [c for c in cols
                       if c != mer_col and (
                           "merchant" in c.lower()
                           or c.lower() in ("category", "name", "tier", "region",
                                            "segment", "country", "attributes"))]

    if mer_col is not None:
        # prefer explicit directory records; else derive from order-carried attrs
        source = merch_records if not merch_records.rdd.isEmpty() else orders
        dim_cols = [mer_col] + attr_candidates
        dim_cols = [c for c in dim_cols if c in source.columns]
        merchant_dim = (
            source.select(*dim_cols)
            .filter(F.col(mer_col).isNotNull())
            # keep rows that actually carry attributes when possible
        )
        if attr_candidates:
            not_null_any = None
            for c in attr_candidates:
                if c in source.columns:
                    cond = F.col(c).isNotNull()
                    not_null_any = cond if not_null_any is None else (not_null_any | cond)
            if not_null_any is not None:
                with_attrs = merchant_dim.filter(not_null_any)
                if not with_attrs.rdd.isEmpty():
                    merchant_dim = with_attrs
        # DEDUP on merchant key to prevent join fan-out inflating revenue
        merchant_dim = merchant_dim.dropDuplicates([mer_col])

        # rename attribute columns to avoid clashes with order columns
        for c in attr_candidates:
            if c in merchant_dim.columns and c in orders.columns:
                merchant_dim = merchant_dim.withColumnRenamed(c, "m_" + c)

        # ---- LEFT JOIN: every order survives, including unknown merchants ----
        enriched = orders.join(merchant_dim, on=mer_col, how="left")
    else:
        enriched = orders

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_orders")

    # ---- Contract output: enriched_totals(revenue) tied to source -----------
    enriched_totals = enriched.select(
        F.coalesce(F.sum("_revenue"), F.lit(0.0)).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    )
    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    # sanity: enriched total must tie to raw source total
    raw_total = orders.select(
        F.coalesce(F.sum("_revenue"), F.lit(0.0)).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    ).collect()[0]["revenue"]
    enr_total = enriched_totals.collect()[0]["revenue"]
    print("raw_total=%s enriched_total=%s tie=%s"
          % (raw_total, enr_total, abs(raw_total - enr_total) < 1e-6))

    # ---- Write GOLD ----------------------------------------------------------
    if output_path:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(output_path)
    elif output_table:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)
    else:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "enriched_totals.parquet")
        )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
p9_enrich_join — attach merchant attributes to orders without losing rows.

Bug: enrichment used an inner join, so orders whose merchant_id is not yet in
the merchant directory (the newly onboarded merchant) were silently dropped,
pushing the enriched revenue total below the raw total.

Fix:
  * LEFT join orders -> merchant directory so every order survives (merchant
    attributes are simply NULL when the merchant isn't in the directory yet).
  * Deduplicate the merchant directory on the join key so a merchant appearing
    more than once can't fan out order rows and inflate the total.
  * Clean revenue deterministically so reprocessing the same input is stable.

Result: enriched revenue total ties back to the raw source total.
"""

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed9001.ndjson"
)


def get_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in cols:
            return cand
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def clean_num(colname):
    """Robustly coerce a possibly-messy revenue value to double."""
    s = F.trim(F.col(colname).cast("string"))
    s = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.when((s.isNull()) | (s == "") | (s == "-") | (s == "."), F.lit(None)) \
            .otherwise(s.cast("double"))


def main():
    spark = get_spark()
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(in_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    merchant_col = pick(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantId", "merchant", "merchant_key", "mid"])
    revenue_col  = pick(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "order_total", "total",
                               "order_revenue", "gross", "price", "value"])
    order_col    = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "order"])
    type_col     = pick(cols, ["type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type", "event", "rec_type"])

    if revenue_col is None:
        # No revenue field at all: nothing to sum meaningfully — emit 0.0.
        orders = raw.limit(0).withColumn("__rev", F.lit(0.0))
    else:
        base = raw.withColumn("__rev", clean_num(revenue_col))
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Separate order rows from merchant-directory rows.
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        if type_col is not None:
            t = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(type_col).cast("string")))
            orders = base.filter(t.rlike(r"order"))
            merchants_src = base.filter(t.rlike(r"merchant") & (~t.rlike(r"order")))
            if orders.rdd.isEmpty():  # discriminator didn't match; treat rev-bearing rows as orders
                orders = base.filter(F.col("__rev").isNotNull())
                merchants_src = base.filter(F.col("__rev").isNull())
        else:
            # No discriminator: rows carrying revenue are orders; the rest are
            # (potential) merchant attribute rows.
            orders = base.filter(F.col("__rev").isNotNull())
            merchants_src = base.filter(F.col("__rev").isNull())

    orders = orders.withColumn("revenue", F.coalesce(F.col("__rev"), F.lit(0.0)))

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Enrichment via LEFT join (every order survives) + dedup directory.
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    if merchant_col is not None and revenue_col is not None:
        attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c not in (revenue_col,) and c != merchant_col]
        # keep merchant key + attributes, one row per merchant (deterministic dedup)
        merchants = (
            merchants_src
            .filter(F.col(merchant_col).isNotNull())
            .select([merchant_col] + attr_cols)
            .dropDuplicates([merchant_col])
        )
        enriched = orders.join(merchants, on=merchant_col, how="left")
    else:
        enriched = orders

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_orders")

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    # GOLD contract: enriched_totals(revenue) — one row, ties to raw source.
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    enriched_totals = enriched.agg(
        F.coalesce(F.sum(F.col("revenue")), F.lit(0.0)).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    )
    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    # Sanity: enriched total must equal raw orders total (no drops, no fan-out).
    raw_total = orders.agg(F.coalesce(F.sum("revenue"), F.lit(0.0))).collect()[0][0]
    enr_total = enriched_totals.collect()[0]["revenue"]
    print(f"[check] raw_orders_total={raw_total} enriched_total={enr_total}")

    result = enriched_totals.coalesce(1)
    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "enriched_totals.parquet")
        )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

# strip anything that isn't a numeric character so messy currency strings parse
CURRENCY_RE = r"[^0-9eE+\-\.]"
DEFAULT_INPUT = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                 ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed11235.ndjson")


def pick(cols, cands):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for x in cands:
        if x in low:
            return low[x]
    return None


def main():
    spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("p9_enrich_join").getOrCreate()
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    print("INPUT:", in_path)

    df = spark.read.json(in_path)
    df.printSchema()
    cols = df.columns

    rev_col = pick(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "total", "gross", "sales",
                          "order_revenue", "value"])
    mid_col = pick(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant", "mid",
                          "merchant_key", "seller_id"])
    oid_col = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order"])
    if rev_col is None:
        raise ValueError("no revenue column found in %s" % cols)

    # --- deterministic, messy-tolerant revenue parse (applied ONCE) ---
    rev_str = F.trim(F.regexp_replace(F.col(rev_col).cast("string"), CURRENCY_RE, ""))
    rev_clean = F.when(rev_str == "", None).otherwise(rev_str.cast("double"))
    df = df.withColumn("_rev", rev_clean)

    if mid_col:
        df = df.withColumn("_mid", F.trim(F.col(mid_col).cast("string")))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_mid", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    # Orders = records that carry a revenue value (the source of truth for the total).
    orders = df.filter(F.col("_rev").isNotNull())
    # Directory rows = merchant-attribute records (have a merchant id, no revenue).
    directory = df.filter(F.col("_rev").isNull() & F.col("_mid").isNotNull())

    attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c not in {rev_col, oid_col, mid_col}]
    have_dir = attr_cols and directory.limit(1).count() > 0

    if have_dir:
        dim = directory.select(["_mid"] + attr_cols)
        # De-duplicate the merchant dimension so a duplicate key cannot fan-out
        # order rows and inflate the enriched total.
        w = Window.partitionBy("_mid").orderBy(F.lit(1))
        dim = dim.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
        for c in attr_cols:
            dim = dim.withColumnRenamed(c, "m_" + c)
        # LEFT join => every order survives, including merchants not yet in the directory.
        enriched = orders.join(dim, on="_mid", how="left")
    else:
        enriched = orders

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_orders")

    # Source total (all order records).
    raw_val = orders.agg(F.coalesce(F.sum("_rev"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("revenue")).first()["revenue"]
    print("RAW_TOTAL:", raw_val)

    # Enriched total: left join + deduped dim guarantees one row per order => ties to source.
    enr_total = enriched.agg(F.coalesce(F.sum("_rev"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("revenue"))
    enr_val = enr_total.first()["revenue"]
    print("ENRICHED_TOTAL:", enr_val)

    enriched_totals = enr_total.select(F.col("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue"))
    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("WROTE PARQUET:", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print("WROTE TABLE:", out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("no output location (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH / AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE)")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed27182.ndjson"


def pick(lower_map, names):
    for n in names:
        if n in lower_map:
            return lower_map[n]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p9_enrich_join").getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    df = spark.read.json(input_path)

    # ---- profile ----
    print("=== INPUT SCHEMA ===")
    df.printSchema()
    print("=== TOTAL RECORDS:", df.count(), "===")

    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    rev = pick(lower, ["revenue", "amount", "order_amount", "order_revenue",
                       "total", "order_total", "price", "value"])
    mid = pick(lower, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant", "mid",
                       "seller_id", "sellerid"])
    oid = pick(lower, ["order_id", "orderid", "oid", "id", "order"])
    typ = pick(lower, ["type", "record_type", "kind", "record", "event_type"])

    print("Detected -> revenue:", rev, "merchant:", mid, "order:", oid, "type:", typ)

    if rev is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not detect a revenue column in input.")

    # ---- clean revenue robustly (strings like '$1,234.50', ' 12.0 ', etc.) ----
    rev_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.col(rev).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    rev_num = F.when(rev_clean == "", None).otherwise(rev_clean).cast("double")

    # normalize merchant key so int/string mismatches don't break the join
    mid_key = None
    if mid is not None:
        mid_key = F.trim(F.col(mid).cast("string"))

    # ---- separate orders from directory (merchant) records ----
    # An order is a record that carries revenue and/or an order id.
    if oid is not None:
        orders = df.filter(F.col(oid).isNotNull() | F.col(rev).isNotNull())
    else:
        orders = df.filter(F.col(rev).isNotNull())

    if typ is not None:
        vals = [r[0] for r in df.select(typ).distinct().limit(50).collect() if r[0] is not None]
        print("Distinct type values:", vals)
        order_like = [v for v in vals if "order" in str(v).lower()]
        merch_like = [v for v in vals if "merch" in str(v).lower() or "seller" in str(v).lower()]
        if order_like:
            orders = df.filter(F.col(typ).isin(order_like))
        merchants_src = df.filter(F.col(typ).isin(merch_like)) if merch_like else df
    else:
        # directory records: have a merchant id but are NOT orders
        if mid is not None and oid is not None:
            merchants_src = df.filter(F.col(mid).isNotNull() & F.col(oid).isNull())
        else:
            merchants_src = df

    raw_total = orders.select(F.sum(rev_num).alias("t")).collect()[0]["t"] or 0.0
    print("=== RAW ORDER TOTAL:", raw_total, "===")
    print("=== ORDER COUNT:", orders.count(), "===")

    # ---- build a de-duplicated merchant directory (one row per merchant) ----
    if mid is not None:
        attr_cols = [c for c in df.columns
                     if c not in {rev, oid} and c.lower() != (typ.lower() if typ else "")]
        # keep merchant key + whatever attributes exist, one row per merchant
        dim = (
            merchants_src
            .filter(mid_key.isNotNull() & (mid_key != ""))
            .withColumn("_mkey", mid_key)
            .select(["_mkey"] + [c for c in attr_cols if c != mid])
            .dropDuplicates(["_mkey"])
        )
        print("=== MERCHANT DIRECTORY ROWS:", dim.count(), "===")

        enriched = (
            orders
            .withColumn("_mkey", mid_key)
            .withColumn("_rev", rev_num)
            .join(F.broadcast(dim), on="_mkey", how="left")  # left join: no order dropped
        )
    else:
        enriched = orders.withColumn("_rev", rev_num)

    enriched_count = enriched.count()
    print("=== ENRICHED COUNT (must equal order count):", enriched_count, "===")

    result = enriched.agg(F.sum("_rev").alias("revenue"))

    # register contract temp view in this SparkSession
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    enriched_total = result.collect()[0]["revenue"] or 0.0
    print("=== ENRICHED TOTAL:", enriched_total, "===")
    print("=== TIES TO SOURCE:", abs(enriched_total - raw_total) < 1e-6, "===")

    # ---- write GOLD output ----
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "enriched_totals.parquet")
        )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed31415.ndjson"


def get_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .master(os.environ.get("SPARK_MASTER", "local[*]"))
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def clean_num(col):
    # tolerate "$1,234.50", numeric, or plain strings
    return F.regexp_replace(col.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "").cast("double")


def main():
    spark = get_spark()
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    raw = spark.read.json(inp)
    cols = raw.columns

    rev_col = pick(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "order_total", "total", "value", "price", "gross"])
    mkey = pick(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantId", "merchant", "merchant_key", "mid"])
    order_id = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "order"])

    if rev_col is None:
        raise ValueError("No revenue-like column found in input: %s" % cols)

    # Normalize revenue once.
    base = raw.withColumn("_rev", clean_num(F.col(rev_col)))

    # --- Split records: orders (have revenue) vs merchant-directory rows (no revenue) ---
    orders = base.filter(F.col("_rev").isNotNull())

    # Attribute columns that are NOT order/revenue fields -> merchant directory payload.
    attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c not in {rev_col, order_id}]

    directory = None
    if mkey is not None:
        dir_rows = base.filter(F.col("_rev").isNull() & F.col(mkey).isNotNull())
        # Only build a directory table if such rows actually exist in this feed.
        if dir_rows.limit(1).count() > 0:
            sel = [F.col(mkey).alias("_mk")] + [
                F.col(c).alias("dir_" + c) for c in attr_cols if c != mkey
            ]
            directory = dir_rows.select(*sel).dropDuplicates(["_mk"])

    # --- Enrich: LEFT join so EVERY order survives (incl. unknown/new merchants) ---
    if directory is not None and mkey is not None:
        enriched = orders.join(
            directory,
            orders[mkey] == directory["_mk"],
            how="left",
        )
    else:
        # No separate directory rows in the feed: orders already carry their
        # attributes, or the merchant simply isn't known yet. Either way, no
        # order is dropped.
        enriched = orders

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_orders")

    # --- Contract output: enriched_totals(revenue) ---
    # Left join can never drop rows, and the deduped directory can never
    # duplicate them, so this ties exactly back to the raw source total.
    totals = enriched.agg(F.sum("_rev").alias("revenue")).select(
        F.col("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue")
    )

    totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output location provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH / AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE)")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed16180.ndjson"


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    return None


def clean_num(col):
    s = F.col(col).cast("string")
    s = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.when((s == "") | s.isNull(), None).otherwise(s).cast("double")


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p9_enrich_join").getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = df.columns
    print("PROFILE columns:", cols)

    rev_col = pick(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "order_total", "total",
                          "gross_revenue", "gross", "price", "sales"])
    mid_col = pick(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "mid", "merchant",
                          "seller_id", "sellerid"])
    oid_col = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order"])
    attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c.lower() in (
        "merchant_name", "name", "category", "merchant_category",
        "segment", "region", "tier", "attributes", "merchant_attributes"
    )]

    print("PROFILE picked:", dict(rev_col=rev_col, mid_col=mid_col,
                                  oid_col=oid_col, attr_cols=attr_cols))

    if rev_col is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Could not locate a revenue column in the feed")
    if mid_col is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Could not locate a merchant id column in the feed")

    rev_clean = clean_num(rev_col)

    # A row is an ORDER if it carries revenue (or an order id).
    has_revenue = rev_clean.isNotNull()
    has_oid = F.lit(False) if oid_col is None else F.col(oid_col).isNotNull()
    is_order = has_revenue | has_oid

    # A row is a MERCHANT DIRECTORY entry if it carries merchant attributes,
    # has a merchant id, and is NOT an order.
    if attr_cols:
        attr_present = F.lit(False)
        for c in attr_cols:
            attr_present = attr_present | F.col(c).isNotNull()
    else:
        attr_present = F.lit(False)
    is_dir = (~is_order) & attr_present & F.col(mid_col).isNotNull()

    orders = (
        df.filter(is_order)
          .withColumn("revenue", F.coalesce(rev_clean, F.lit(0.0)))
          .withColumn("_mid", F.col(mid_col).cast("string"))
    )

    # Source (raw) total — the number the enriched total must tie to.
    raw_total = orders.agg(F.sum("revenue").alias("t")).collect()[0]["t"] or 0.0

    directory = df.filter(is_dir).withColumn("_mid", F.col(mid_col).cast("string"))

    # Deduplicate directory on merchant id to prevent join fan-out inflating totals.
    dir_cols = [c for c in attr_cols] if attr_cols else []
    if directory.take(1):
        agg_exprs = [F.first(c, ignorenulls=True).alias(c + "_dir") for c in dir_cols]
        directory_dedup = (
            directory.groupBy("_mid").agg(*agg_exprs) if agg_exprs
            else directory.select("_mid").dropDuplicates(["_mid"])
        )
    else:
        # No separate directory rows detected: build an empty dedup directory
        # so the LEFT JOIN still runs and every order survives.
        directory_dedup = orders.select("_mid").limit(0)

    # LEFT JOIN so every order survives (including merchants not yet in directory).
    enriched = orders.join(directory_dedup, on="_mid", how="left")

    enriched_total = enriched.agg(F.sum("revenue").alias("t")).collect()[0]["t"] or 0.0
    surviving = enriched.count()
    order_ct = orders.count()

    print(f"PROFILE raw_total={raw_total} enriched_total={enriched_total} "
          f"orders={order_ct} enriched_rows={surviving}")

    assert surviving == order_ct, "orders were dropped/duplicated during enrichment"
    assert abs(enriched_total - raw_total) < 1e-6, "enriched total does not tie to source"

    enriched_totals = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(float(enriched_total),)], schema="revenue double"
    )
    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output location provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import DoubleType, StructType, StructField

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed14142.ndjson"
FALLBACK_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/p9_enrich_join__A__seed14142/enriched_totals.parquet"


def get_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p9_enrich_join")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def pick(cols, candidates):
    """Return the actual column name matching one of the candidate lowercase names."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    # loose contains-match fallback
    for cand in candidates:
        for lc, orig in lower.items():
            if cand in lc:
                return orig
    return None


def parse_number(colname):
    """Robustly coerce a possibly-string / currency-formatted value to double."""
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9eE.\-+]", "")
    cleaned = F.when((cleaned == "") | (cleaned.isNull()), None).otherwise(cleaned)
    return cleaned.cast(DoubleType())


def norm_key(colname):
    return F.lower(F.trim(F.col(colname).cast("string")))


def main():
    spark = get_spark()
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if not out_path and not out_table:
        out_path = FALLBACK_OUTPUT

    # ---- Read raw ----
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns
    print("PROFILE schema:", raw.schema.simpleString())
    print("PROFILE columns:", cols)
    print("PROFILE row_count:", raw.count())

    order_id_col = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "oid", "order"])
    merch_col = pick(cols, ["merchant_id", "merchantid", "merchant", "mid", "seller_id", "sellerid"])
    rev_col = pick(cols, ["revenue", "amount", "order_total", "ordertotal", "total",
                          "gross", "price", "value", "gross_amount", "net_amount"])
    type_col = pick(cols, ["record_type", "recordtype", "type", "event_type", "eventtype", "kind"])

    print("PROFILE detected -> order_id:", order_id_col,
          "| merchant:", merch_col, "| revenue:", rev_col, "| type:", type_col)

    if rev_col is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not detect a revenue-bearing column in input: %s" % cols)

    # ---- Split order records vs merchant-directory records ----
    # Strategy: prefer an explicit type discriminator; otherwise treat rows that carry
    # revenue (or an order id) as orders, and rows with a merchant id but no revenue/order
    # id as directory rows.
    df = raw

    if type_col is not None:
        t = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(type_col).cast("string")))
        orders = df.filter(t.rlike("order") | (~t.rlike("merchant") & F.col(rev_col).isNotNull()))
        merchants_src = df.filter(t.rlike("merchant"))
    else:
        if order_id_col is not None:
            orders = df.filter(F.col(order_id_col).isNotNull() | F.col(rev_col).isNotNull())
            merchants_src = df.filter(
                F.col(order_id_col).isNull() & F.col(rev_col).isNull()
            ) if merch_col is not None else spark.createDataFrame([], StructType([]))
        else:
            orders = df.filter(F.col(rev_col).isNotNull())
            merchants_src = df.filter(F.col(rev_col).isNull()) if merch_col is not None \
                else spark.createDataFrame([], StructType([]))

    orders = orders.withColumn("_revenue", parse_number(rev_col))
    if merch_col is not None:
        orders = orders.withColumn("_mkey", norm_key(merch_col))
    else:
        orders = orders.withColumn("_mkey", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    orders_count = orders.count()
    print("PROFILE orders_count:", orders_count)

    # ---- Build merchant directory (attributes) ----
    directory = None
    if merch_col is not None:
        merch_rows = merchants_src.count() if merchants_src is not None else 0
        print("PROFILE directory_merchant_rows:", merch_rows)
        if merch_rows > 0:
            # attribute columns = everything except detected structural fields
            attr_cols = [c for c in merchants_src.columns
                         if c not in {order_id_col, rev_col, type_col} and c is not None]
            directory = (
                merchants_src
                .withColumn("_mkey", norm_key(merch_col))
                .filter(F.col("_mkey").isNotNull())
                .select(["_mkey"] + [c for c in attr_cols if c != merch_col])
                .dropDuplicates(["_mkey"])
            )

    # ---- Enrichment: LEFT JOIN so NO order is dropped, even for unknown merchants ----
    if directory is not None:
        enriched = orders.join(directory, on="_mkey", how="left")
    else:
        enriched = orders  # nothing to attach; every order already survives

    enriched_count = enriched.count()
    print("PROFILE enriched_count:", enriched_count)
    assert enriched_count == orders_count, (
        "Enrichment must not drop orders: %d -> %d" % (orders_count, enriched_count)
    )

    # ---- Contract table: enriched_totals(revenue) ----
    # Total ties to source because left join preserves every order's revenue.
    enriched_totals = enriched.agg(
        F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("_revenue"), F.lit(0.0))).cast(DoubleType()).alias("revenue")
    )

    # Sanity: raw total (same parse) must equal enriched total.
    raw_total = orders.agg(
        F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("_revenue"), F.lit(0.0))).cast(DoubleType()).alias("revenue")
    ).collect()[0]["revenue"]
    enr_total = enriched_totals.collect()[0]["revenue"]
    print("PROFILE raw_total:", raw_total, "| enriched_total:", enr_total)
    assert (raw_total is None and enr_total is None) or abs((raw_total or 0.0) - (enr_total or 0.0)) < 1e-6, \
        "Enriched total must tie to source total"

    enriched_totals = enriched_totals.select(F.col("revenue").cast(DoubleType()).alias("revenue"))
    enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

    # ---- Write GOLD (idempotent overwrite) ----
    if out_path:
        enriched_totals.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("WROTE parquet ->", out_path)
    else:
        enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print("WROTE table ->", out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

# Name-tolerant read: explicit schema => absent fields are null (never UNRESOLVED_COLUMN).
REV_CANDS = ["revenue", "amount", "order_total", "total", "gross", "gross_revenue",
             "net", "net_revenue", "price", "value", "sales", "order_amount", "amt"]
MID_CANDS = ["merchant_id", "merchantId", "merchant", "mid", "merchant_key"]
OID_CANDS = ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "oid"]
NAME_CANDS = ["merchant_name", "merchantName", "name"]

_ALL = REV_CANDS + MID_CANDS + OID_CANDS + NAME_CANDS
SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(c, StringType(), True) for c in _ALL])


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_orders")
def raw_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    rev = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in REV_CANDS])
    mid = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in MID_CANDS])
    oid = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in OID_CANDS])
    # Defensive numeric parse for messy revenue ("$1,200.50", " 30 ", etc.)
    rev_clean = F.regexp_replace(rev, "[^0-9.\\-]", "").cast("double")
    return df.select(
        oid.alias("order_id"),
        mid.alias("merchant_id"),
        F.coalesce(rev_clean, F.lit(0.0)).alias("revenue"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="merchant_directory")
def merchant_directory():
    # Distinct merchant keys => left join is 1:1 and cannot fan out / inflate totals.
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (
        spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw_orders")
        .select("merchant_id")
        .where(F.col("merchant_id").isNotNull())
        .distinct()
        .withColumn("in_directory", F.lit(True))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_orders")
def enriched_orders():
    # LEFT join: every order survives, including merchants not yet in the directory.
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    orders = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw_orders")
    directory = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.merchant_directory")
    return orders.join(directory, on="merchant_id", how="left").withColumn(
        "in_directory", F.coalesce(F.col("in_directory"), F.lit(False))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_totals")
def enriched_totals():
    # Revenue is preserved through the left join, so this ties to the raw source.
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (
        spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.enriched_orders")
        .agg(F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("revenue"), F.lit(0.0))).alias("revenue"))
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed11235.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schema: any field absent in the data reads as NULL rather
# than raising UNRESOLVED_COLUMN. All read as string so messy revenue tokens
# (currency symbols, thousands separators, numeric-as-string) survive parsing.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("merchant_id", StringType()),
    StructField("merchantId", StringType()),
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("revenue", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("order_amount", StringType()),
    StructField("order_total", StringType()),
    StructField("gross", StringType()),
    StructField("total", StringType()),
    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("value", StringType()),
    StructField("merchant_name", StringType()),
    StructField("name", StringType()),
    StructField("merchant_category", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
])

_MID = F.coalesce(F.col("merchant_id"), F.col("merchantId"))
_NAME = F.coalesce(F.col("merchant_name"), F.col("name"))
_CAT = F.coalesce(F.col("merchant_category"), F.col("category"))
_RAW_REV = F.coalesce(
    F.col("revenue"), F.col("amount"), F.col("order_amount"),
    F.col("order_total"), F.col("gross"), F.col("total"),
    F.col("price"), F.col("value"),
)


def _clean_rev(rawcol):
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(rawcol.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.when(F.length(cleaned) > 0, cleaned.cast("double")).otherwise(
        F.lit(None).cast("double")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders")
def orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)
    # An order event is any record carrying a revenue-bearing field.
    return (
        df.where(_RAW_REV.isNotNull())
        .select(
            F.col("order_id"),
            _MID.alias("merchant_id"),
            _clean_rev(_RAW_REV).alias("order_revenue"),
        )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="merchant_directory")
def merchant_directory():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)
    # Directory = merchant-attribute events. A newly onboarded merchant that only
    # emits orders simply won't appear here (that is the whole scenario).
    return (
        df.where(_NAME.isNotNull())
        .select(
            _MID.alias("merchant_id"),
            _NAME.alias("merchant_name"),
            _CAT.alias("merchant_category"),
        )
        .dropDuplicates(["merchant_id"])
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_orders")
def enriched_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    o = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders")
    m = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.merchant_directory")
    # LEFT join: every order survives even when its merchant is not yet in the
    # directory. Directory is deduped on merchant_id so there is no fan-out,
    # which guarantees the enriched revenue total ties back to the raw total.
    return o.join(m, on="merchant_id", how="left")


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_totals")
def enriched_totals():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.enriched_orders")
    return e.agg(F.sum("order_revenue").alias("revenue"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed27182.ndjson")

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_orders")
def raw_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    v = F.col("value")

    order_id = F.coalesce(
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.order_id"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.orderId"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.id"),
    )
    merchant_id = F.coalesce(
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchant_id"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchantId"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchant.id"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchant"),
    )
    merchant_name = F.coalesce(
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchant_name"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchantName"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.merchant.name"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.name"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.category"),
    )
    revenue_raw = F.coalesce(
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.revenue"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.amount"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.total"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.price"),
    )
    # strip currency symbols / thousands separators, keep digits, dot, minus
    revenue = F.regexp_replace(revenue_raw, "[^0-9.\\-]", "").cast("double")

    return (
        SparkSession.active()
        .read.text(DATA)
        .select(
            order_id.alias("order_id"),
            merchant_id.alias("merchant_id"),
            merchant_name.alias("src_merchant_name"),
            revenue.alias("revenue"),
        )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="merchant_directory")
def merchant_directory():
    o = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "raw_orders")
    # directory = merchants we actually know attributes for
    return (
