    # Build parsing on a projected frame so we can reference ts_str cleanly
    p = b.select(
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        category.alias("category"),
        ts_str.alias("ts_str"),
        F.col("raw_line"),
    )

    ed = F.coalesce(
        F.expr("try_cast(ts_str as date)"),
        F.to_date(F.expr("try_cast(ts_str as timestamp)")),
        F.to_date(F.from_unixtime(F.expr("try_cast(ts_str as long)"))),
        F.to_date(F.from_unixtime(F.expr("try_cast(ts_str as long) div 1000"))),
    )

    p = p.withColumn("event_date", ed)

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.col("order_id") == F.lit("")),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("category").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("category")) == F.lit("")),
               F.lit("missing_category"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    p = p.withColumn("base_reason", base_reason)

    is_valid = F.col("base_reason").isNull()
    # dedup key only meaningful for valid rows; invalid rows collapse to one null bucket
    w = Window.partitionBy(F.when(is_valid, F.col("order_id"))).orderBy(F.col("raw_line"))
    rn = F.row_number().over(w)

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
         .when(rn > F.lit(1), F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    return p.withColumn("reason", reason)


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    v = SparkSession.active().read.table("validated_orders")
    return (v.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
             .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    v = SparkSession.active().read.table("validated_orders")
    return (v.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull())
             .select("order_id", "amount", "category",
                     F.col("raw_line"), F.col("reason")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    v = SparkSession.active().read.table("validated_orders")
    return (v.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
             .select(
                 F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
                 F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
                 F.col("order_id"),
                 F.col("amount"),
                 F.col("category"),
             ))


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    v = SparkSession.active().read.table("validated_orders")
    return v.agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("kept_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNotNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("rejected_count"),
    ).withColumn(
        "balanced",
        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"

# UTC calendar day is part of the contract; pin session tz deterministically.
try:
    SparkSession.active().conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
except Exception:
    pass


def _gjo(col, *paths):
    # extract as string regardless of underlying JSON type; null if absent
    return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(col, p) for p in paths])


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    # read.text => exactly one row per source line (never drops blanks/corrupt)
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="graded_orders")
def graded_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders")
    raw = F.col("raw")

    probe = F.from_json(raw, "STRUCT<__k: STRING>")  # null iff line is invalid JSON
    is_corrupt = raw.isNull() | (F.trim(raw) == "") | probe.isNull()

    order_id = _gjo(raw, "$.order_id", "$.orderId", "$.id", "$.orderID")
    amount_raw = _gjo(raw, "$.amount", "$.amt", "$.price", "$.revenue", "$.total")
    category = _gjo(raw, "$.category", "$.cat", "$.categ")
    ts_raw = _gjo(raw, "$.event_time", "$.event_ts", "$.eventTime", "$.timestamp",
                  "$.ts", "$.created_at", "$.event_date", "$.order_date",
                  "$.date", "$.time", "$.order_ts")

    amt_clean = F.regexp_replace(amount_raw, "[^0-9.\\-]", "")
    amount = F.when(F.length(amt_clean) > 0, amt_clean.cast("double"))

    is_num = ts_raw.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch = ts_raw.cast("long")
    epoch_sec = F.when(F.length(ts_raw) >= 13, (epoch / F.lit(1000)).cast("long")).otherwise(epoch)
    ts = F.when(is_num, F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_sec)).otherwise(
        F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(ts_raw), F.to_timestamp(ts_raw, "yyyy-MM-dd")))
    event_date = F.to_date(ts)

    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", order_id)
          .withColumn("amount", amount)
          .withColumn("category", category)
          .withColumn("event_date", event_date)
          .withColumn("reason",
                      F.when(is_corrupt, F.lit("unparseable_json"))
                       .when(order_id.isNull() | (F.trim(order_id) == ""), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
                       .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
                       .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
                       .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))))

    # rank valid rows first within each order_id, deterministically by raw text
    w = Window.partitionBy(F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.lit("__NULL__"))) \
              .orderBy(F.col("reason").isNull().desc(), F.col("raw"))
    df = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    df = df.withColumn("final_reason",
                       F.when(F.col("reason").isNotNull(), F.col("reason"))
                        .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
                        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    return df


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.graded_orders")
    return g.where(F.col("final_reason").isNull()).select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.graded_orders")
    return (g.where(F.col("final_reason").isNull())
             .select(
                 F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
                 F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
                 F.col("order_id"),
                 F.col("amount"),
                 F.col("category")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.graded_orders")
    return (g.where(F.col("final_reason").isNotNull())
             .select(F.col("order_id"),
                     F.col("raw"),
                     F.col("final_reason").alias("reason")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="pipeline_reconciliation")
def pipeline_reconciliation():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.graded_orders")
    return (g.agg(
                F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"),
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("final_reason").isNull(), 1).otherwise(0)).alias("kept_count"),
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("final_reason").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(0)).alias("rejected_count"))
             .withColumn("reconciled",
                         (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schema (all STRING) => no inference scan, missing fields become NULL,
# and every physical line is retained (PERMISSIVE + _corrupt_record) so counts reconcile.
SCHEMA = (
    "order_id STRING, id STRING, orderId STRING, order_id_str STRING, "
    "amount STRING, amt STRING, price STRING, total STRING, "
    "category STRING, cat STRING, "
    "event_time STRING, ts STRING, timestamp STRING, created_at STRING, "
    "event_ts STRING, order_ts STRING, order_time STRING, date STRING, "
    "_corrupt_record STRING"
)

_ORDER = [F.col("amount_d").asc_nulls_last(),
          F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
          F.col("ts_raw").asc_nulls_last()]


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified")
def classified():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = (spark.read
          .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
          .option("columnNameOfCorruptRecord", "_corrupt_record")
          .schema(SCHEMA)
          .json(PATH))
    base = df.select(
        F.coalesce("order_id", "id", "orderId", "order_id_str").alias("order_id"),
        F.coalesce("amount", "amt", "price", "total").alias("amount_raw"),
        F.coalesce("category", "cat").alias("category"),
        F.coalesce("event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "created_at",
                   "event_ts", "order_ts", "order_time", "date").alias("ts_raw"),
        F.col("_corrupt_record"),
    )
    enr = (base
        .withColumn("amount_d", F.expr("try_cast(amount_raw as double)"))
        .withColumn("ts", F.coalesce(
            F.expr("try_to_timestamp(ts_raw)"),
            F.expr("try_to_timestamp(from_unixtime(try_cast(ts_raw as long)))"),
        ))
        .withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("ts")))
        .withColumn("base_reason",
            F.when(F.col("_corrupt_record").isNotNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
             .when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
             .when(F.col("amount_d").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
             .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_timestamp"))
             .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    )
    return enr.select("order_id", "amount_raw", "amount_d", "category",
                      "ts_raw", "event_date", "base_reason", "_corrupt_record")


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_full")
def clean_full():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.classified")
    kept = c.filter(F.col("base_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(*_ORDER)
    k = kept.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    return (k.filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
             .select("order_id", F.col("amount_d").alias("amount"),
                     "category", "event_date"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_full")
            .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.classified")
    base_rej = (c.filter(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull())
                 .select("order_id", "amount_raw", "category", "ts_raw",
                         F.col("base_reason").alias("reason")))
    kept = c.filter(F.col("base_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(*_ORDER)
    dup = (kept.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
               .filter(F.col("rn") > 1)
               .select("order_id", "amount_raw", "category", "ts_raw",
                       F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason")))
    return base_rej.unionByName(dup)


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    cf = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_full")
    w = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    return (cf.withColumn("revenue", F.sum("amount").over(w))
              .select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.classified")
           .agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count")))
    kept = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_orders")
            .agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count")))
    rej = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rejected_orders")
           .agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count")))
    return (src.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
            .withColumn("reconciles",
                        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count"))
                        == F.col("source_count")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed3141.ndjson"

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_orders")
def raw_orders():
    # One row per physical line -> this defines the authoritative source count.
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA).select(F.col("value"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified")
def classified():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "raw_orders")

    # Permissive parse: non-JSON / non-object lines become a null map.
    df = df.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("value"), "map<string,string>"))

    m = F.col("m")
    df = df.withColumn("order_id", F.coalesce(m["order_id"], m["orderId"], m["id"]))
    df = df.withColumn("amount_raw",
                       F.coalesce(m["amount"], m["amt"], m["price"], m["revenue"]))
    df = df.withColumn("category", F.coalesce(m["category"], m["cat"]))
    df = df.withColumn("ts_raw", F.coalesce(
        m["event_ts"], m["event_time"], m["timestamp"], m["ts"],
        m["order_ts"], m["order_date"], m["created_at"], m["date"]))

    # Amount: strip currency/thousands junk, then validate numeric.
    amt_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.trim(F.col("amount_raw")), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    df = df.withColumn("amt_clean", amt_clean)
    df = df.withColumn(
        "amount",
        F.when(F.col("amt_clean").rlike(r"^-?\d*\.?\d+$"),
               F.col("amt_clean").cast("double")))

    # Timestamp: epoch millis / epoch secs / several textual formats.
    ts = F.col("ts_raw")
    ts_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.when(ts.rlike(r"^[0-9]{13}$"), (ts.cast("long") / F.lit(1000)).cast("timestamp")),
        F.when(ts.rlike(r"^[0-9]{10}$"), ts.cast("long").cast("timestamp")),
        F.to_timestamp(ts),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "yyyy/MM/dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "MM/dd/yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts, "dd-MM-yyyy"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("ts_ts", ts_ts)
    # UTC calendar day.
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("ts_ts")))

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == ""),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount_raw").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("amount") < 0, F.lit("negative_amount"))
         .when(F.col("ts_raw").isNull(), F.lit("missing_timestamp"))
         .when(F.col("ts_ts").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_timestamp"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("base_reason", base_reason)

    # Deterministic dedup: valid rows (base_reason null) rank first within order_id.
    order_key = F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNull(), F.lit(0)).otherwise(F.lit(1))
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(order_key.asc(), F.col("value").asc())
    df = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("reason", reason)

    return df.select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date", "reason")


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    c = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "classified")
    return (c.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
             .select(F.col("order_id"),
                     F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
                     F.col("category")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    c = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "classified")
    return (c.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
             .select(F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
                     F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("revenue"),
                     F.col("order_id"),
                     F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
                     F.col("category")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    c = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "classified")
    return (c.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull())
             .select(F.col("value").alias("record"),
                     F.col("order_id"),
                     F.col("reason")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    c = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "classified")
    agg = c.agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("kept_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNotNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("rejected_count"),
    )
    return agg.withColumn(
        "reconciles",
        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed5772.ndjson"

# All candidate keys as STRING so from_json never fails to parse a structurally
# valid JSON object; missing keys simply come back null.
SCHEMA = (
    "order_id STRING, orderId STRING, id STRING, oid STRING, "
    "amount STRING, amt STRING, total STRING, price STRING, "
    "category STRING, cat STRING, type STRING, "
    "ts STRING, timestamp STRING, event_time STRING, eventTime STRING, "
    "created_at STRING, order_ts STRING, event_date STRING, time STRING, date STRING"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    # read.text => exactly one row per physical line == the authoritative source count
    df = spark.read.text(DATA).withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA))
    j = F.col("j")

    order_id = F.coalesce(j["order_id"], j["orderId"], j["id"], j["oid"])
    amount_raw = F.coalesce(j["amount"], j["amt"], j["total"], j["price"])
    category = F.coalesce(j["category"], j["cat"], j["type"])
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        j["ts"], j["timestamp"], j["event_time"], j["eventTime"],
        j["created_at"], j["order_ts"], j["event_date"], j["time"], j["date"],
    )

    amount_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.coalesce(amount_raw, F.lit("")), r"[$,\s]", "")
    amount_num = F.when(amount_clean.rlike(r"^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$"), amount_clean.cast("double"))

    # Parse timestamp: epoch-millis (13), epoch-seconds (10), else ISO-ish. UTC calendar day.
    parsed_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.when(ts_raw.rlike(r"^\d{13}$"), (ts_raw.cast("long") / F.lit(1000)).cast("timestamp")),
        F.when(ts_raw.rlike(r"^\d{10}$"), ts_raw.cast("long").cast("timestamp")),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_raw),
    )
    event_date = F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(parsed_ts, "UTC"))

    reason = (
        F.when(j.isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(order_id.isNull() | (F.trim(order_id) == F.lit("")), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(amount_num.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(parsed_ts.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_timestamp"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    return df.select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        amount_num.alias("amount"),
        category.alias("category"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        reason.alias("reject_reason"),
    )


def _valid_ranked():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders")
    valid = b.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    # deterministic dedup: same input -> same survivor (order by raw text)
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(F.col("raw_record"), F.col("amount"))
    return valid.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    # keyed by order_id, carrying amount + category (survivor of any duplicates)
    return _valid_ranked().where(F.col("rn") == 1).select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    v = _valid_ranked().where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    return v.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders")

    structural = b.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull()).select(
        F.col("raw_record"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason"),
    )

    dups = _valid_ranked().where(F.col("rn") > 1).select(
        F.col("raw_record"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason"),
    )

    return structural.unionByName(dups)


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    total = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders").groupBy().agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_orders").groupBy().agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rejected_orders").groupBy().agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    out = total.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
    return out.withColumn(
        "reconciled",
        F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count") == F.col("source_count"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

SRC = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed8675.ndjson"

MAP_SCHEMA = T.MapType(T.StringType(), T.StringType())


# ---------- bronze: one row per source line, nothing dropped ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_raw")
def bronze_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return spark.read.text(SRC).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))


# ---------- annotated: parse + assign a fate (reject reason or valid) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="annotated")
def annotated():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_raw")

    # everything parsed uniformly as text -> tolerant to messy/typed feeds
    df = df.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), MAP_SCHEMA))
    m = F.col("m")

    order_id = F.coalesce(m.getItem("order_id"), m.getItem("orderId"),
                          m.getItem("id"), m.getItem("order"))

    amount_raw = F.coalesce(m.getItem("amount"), m.getItem("price"),
                            m.getItem("total"), m.getItem("revenue"),
                            m.getItem("amount_usd"))
    amount_str = F.regexp_replace(amount_raw, "[^0-9eE.+-]", "")
    amount = F.when(
        amount_str.rlike(r"^[+-]?([0-9]*\.?[0-9]+)([eE][+-]?[0-9]+)?$"),
        amount_str.cast("double"),
    )

    category = F.coalesce(m.getItem("category"), m.getItem("cat"),
                          m.getItem("segment"))

    ts_raw = F.coalesce(m.getItem("event_time"), m.getItem("event_ts"),
                        m.getItem("timestamp"), m.getItem("ts"),
                        m.getItem("created_at"), m.getItem("order_ts"),
                        m.getItem("order_date"), m.getItem("event_date"),
                        m.getItem("date"))
    ts = F.coalesce(
        F.when(ts_raw.rlike(r"^[0-9]{13}$"), (ts_raw.cast("long") / 1000).cast("timestamp")),
        F.when(ts_raw.rlike(r"^[0-9]{10}$"), ts_raw.cast("long").cast("timestamp")),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_raw),
    )
    event_date = F.to_date(ts)

    base_reason = (
        F.when(m.isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(order_id.isNull() | (F.trim(order_id) == F.lit("")), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(amount.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(event_date.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    return df.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        category.alias("category"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        base_reason.alias("base_reason"),
    )


# ---------- valid, deduped orders (keep first per order_id) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="valid_orders")
def valid_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.annotated")
    base_valid = df.where(F.col("base_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy("raw_line")
    ranked = base_valid.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    return ranked.where(F.col("rn") == 1).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date"
    )


# ---------- contract: clean_orders keyed by order_id ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.valid_orders").select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category"
    )


# ---------- contract: daily revenue rollup (order grain w/ daily revenue) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.valid_orders")
    w = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    return df.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.sum("amount").over(w).alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


# ---------- contract: dead-letter / quarantine with reason ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.annotated")

    base_rej = df.where(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull()).select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("base_reason").alias("reason"),
    )

    base_valid = df.where(F.col("base_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy("raw_line")
    ranked = base_valid.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    dup_rej = ranked.where(F.col("rn") > 1).select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason"),
    )

    return base_rej.unionByName(dup_rej)


# ---------- proof: kept + rejected == source ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="recon")
def recon():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_raw").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    return (
        src.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
        .withColumn(
            "reconciled",
            (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"),
        )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed9001.ndjson"

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


# ---- Bronze: one row per source LINE, so we can reconcile exactly ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_raw")
def bronze_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.text(PATH)
    m = F.from_json(F.col("value"), MapType(StringType(), StringType()))
    return df.select(
        F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("_rid"),
        F.col("value").alias("_raw"),
        m.alias("m"),
    )


# ---- Classify every line: extract fields + assign a reject reason (null == clean) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="classified")
def classified():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    b = spark.read.table(CAT + "bronze_raw")
    m = F.col("m")

    order_id = m.getItem("order_id")
    amount_str = m.getItem("amount")
    category = m.getItem("category")
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        m.getItem("event_time"), m.getItem("timestamp"), m.getItem("ts"),
        m.getItem("event_ts"), m.getItem("created_at"), m.getItem("order_time"),
        m.getItem("event_date"),
    )

    amount = amount_str.cast("double")

    # --- UTC calendar day, timezone-independent (no session.timeZone mutation) ---
    is_num = ts_raw.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_num = ts_raw.cast("long")
    epoch_sec = F.when(F.length(ts_raw) >= F.lit(13),
                       (epoch_num / F.lit(1000)).cast("long")).otherwise(epoch_num)
    epoch_days = (epoch_sec / F.lit(86400)).cast("int")
    date_from_epoch = F.when(is_num, F.date_from_unix_date(epoch_days))
    date_from_str = F.when(~is_num & ts_raw.isNotNull(),
                           F.to_date(F.substring(ts_raw, 1, 10)))
    event_date = F.coalesce(date_from_epoch, date_from_str)

    reason = (
        F.when(m.isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(order_id.isNull() | (F.trim(order_id) == F.lit("")), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(amount.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(event_date.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    return b.select(
        F.col("_rid"),
        F.col("_raw"),
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        category.alias("category"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        reason.alias("reason"),
    )


# ---- Mark duplicate order_ids among otherwise-clean rows as rejected ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="marked")
def marked():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table(CAT + "classified")
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy("_rid")
    rn = F.row_number().over(w)
    reason_final = (
        F.when(F.col("reason").isNotNull(), F.col("reason"))
         .when(rn > F.lit(1), F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    return c.withColumn("reason_final", reason_final)


# ---- clean_orders: keyed by order_id, carrying amount, category ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    m = spark.read.table(CAT + "marked").where(F.col("reason_final").isNull())
    return m.select("order_id", "amount", "category")


# ---- gold_daily: per-order rows with the UTC event_date and daily revenue ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    m = spark.read.table(CAT + "marked").where(F.col("reason_final").isNull())
    revenue = F.sum("amount").over(Window.partitionBy("event_date"))
    return m.select(
        F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
        revenue.alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


# ---- Dead-letter / quarantine holding area with a reason column ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    m = spark.read.table(CAT + "marked").where(F.col("reason_final").isNotNull())
    return m.select(
        F.col("_raw").alias("raw_record"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("reason_final").alias("reason"),
    )


# ---- Proof: kept + rejected == source count ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="audit_reconciliation")
def audit_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table(CAT + "bronze_raw").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table(CAT + "clean_orders").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table(CAT + "rejected_orders").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    return (
        src.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
        .withColumn("reconciled",
                    (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"))
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed11235.ndjson"


# ---- bronze: one row per raw source line (guarantees exact source count) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_lines")
def bronze_lines():
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA).select(F.col("value"))


# ---- classify every line without ever throwing on bad casts ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_orders")
def parsed_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("bronze_lines")

    # lenient decode: corrupt JSON -> null map -> rejected below
    df = df.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("value"), "map<string,string>"))

    df = (
        df.withColumn("order_id", F.col("m").getItem("order_id"))
          .withColumn("amount_str", F.col("m").getItem("amount"))
          .withColumn("category", F.col("m").getItem("category"))
          .withColumn(
              "ts_str",
              F.coalesce(
                  F.col("m").getItem("event_time"),
                  F.col("m").getItem("event_ts"),
                  F.col("m").getItem("timestamp"),
                  F.col("m").getItem("ts"),
                  F.col("m").getItem("order_ts"),
                  F.col("m").getItem("created_at"),
              ),
          )
    )

    # safe numeric parse — never raises
    df = df.withColumn("amount_dbl", F.expr("try_cast(amount_str as double)"))

    # safe timestamp parse: ISO string OR epoch-seconds fallback, then UTC date
    ts_iso = F.expr("try_to_timestamp(ts_str)")
    ts_epoch = F.timestamp_seconds(F.expr("try_cast(ts_str as long)"))
    event_ts = F.coalesce(ts_iso, ts_epoch)
    df = df.withColumn(
        "event_date",
        F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(event_ts, F.current_timezone())),
    )

    # duplicate order_id detection (deterministic order on raw value)
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy("value")
    df = df.withColumn(
        "rn",
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNotNull(), F.row_number().over(w)),
    )

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(
             F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
             F.lit("missing_order_id"),
         )
         .when(F.col("amount_dbl").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_timestamp"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    return df.withColumn("reject_reason", reason).select(
        "value",
        "order_id",
        "amount_dbl",
        "category",
        "event_date",
        "reject_reason",
    )


# ---- clean_orders: keyed by order_id, valid rows only ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("parsed_orders")
    return (
        df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
          .select(
              F.col("order_id"),
              F.col("amount_dbl").alias("amount"),
              F.col("category"),
          )
    )


# ---- gold_daily: per-order revenue with UTC event_date ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("parsed_orders")
    return (
        df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
          .select(
              F.col("event_date"),
              F.col("amount_dbl").alias("revenue"),
              F.col("order_id"),
              F.col("amount_dbl").alias("amount"),
              F.col("category"),
          )
    )


# ---- dead-letter / quarantine: everything we could not process, with a reason ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("parsed_orders")
    return (
        df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
          .select(
              F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
              F.col("order_id"),
              F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason"),
          )
    )


# ---- reconciliation proof: kept + rejected == source ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("bronze_lines").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count")
    )
    kept = spark.read.table("clean_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count")
    )
    rej = spark.read.table("rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count")
    )
    return (
        src.crossJoin(kept)
           .crossJoin(rej)
           .withColumn(
               "balanced",
               (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count"))
               == F.col("source_count"),
           )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed27182.ndjson"

# Broad candidate timestamp field names — coalesced to derive the UTC event_date.
TS_FIELDS = [
    "ts", "event_time", "event_timestamp", "timestamp", "created_at",
    "order_ts", "order_date", "order_time", "date", "event_date",
]

SCHEMA = StructType(
    [
        StructField("order_id", StringType()),
        StructField("amount", StringType()),
        StructField("category", StringType()),
    ]
    + [StructField(c, StringType()) for c in TS_FIELDS]
    + [StructField("_corrupt_record", StringType())]
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_raw")
def orders_raw():
    # Explicit schema => no eager inference (lazy plan). PERMISSIVE keeps
    # malformed lines as rows with _corrupt_record set, so 1 row == 1 source line.
    return (
        SparkSession.active().read
        .schema(SCHEMA)
        .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
        .option("columnNameOfCorruptRecord", "_corrupt_record")
        .json(PATH)
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_scored")
def orders_scored():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_raw")

    oid = F.trim(F.col("order_id"))
    oid = F.when((oid.isNull()) | (oid == ""), None).otherwise(oid)

    amt_str = F.regexp_replace(F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.lit("")), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    amt = F.when(amt_str == "", None).otherwise(amt_str).cast("double")

    ts_str = F.trim(F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in TS_FIELDS]))
    ts = F.coalesce(
        F.when(ts_str.rlike(r"^\d{13}$"), F.timestamp_millis(ts_str.cast("long"))),
        F.when(ts_str.rlike(r"^\d{10}$"), F.timestamp_seconds(ts_str.cast("long"))),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str),
    )
    edate = F.to_date(ts)

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("_corrupt_record").isNotNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
        .when(oid.isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(amt.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
        .when(edate.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    return df.select(
        oid.alias("order_id"),
        amt.alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").alias("category"),
        edate.alias("event_date"),
        F.col("amount").alias("amount_raw"),
        F.col("_corrupt_record").alias("raw_record"),
        base_reason.alias("base_reason"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_dq")
def orders_dq():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_scored")
    # Deterministic ordering so reprocessing keeps the same "first" row per id.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("amount").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
    )
    rn = F.row_number().over(w)
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
        .when(rn > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    return df.withColumn("reason", reason)


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_dq")
    return df.where(F.col("reason").isNull()).select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_dq").where(F.col("reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    return df.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.sum("amount").over(w).alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_dq")
    return df.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull()).select(
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_raw").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
        F.col("reason"),
        F.col("raw_record"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("orders_raw")
    dq = spark.read.table("orders_dq")
    s = src.agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    k = dq.agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNull(), 1).otherwise(0)).alias("kept_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("reason").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(0)).alias("rejected_count"),
    )
    return s.crossJoin(k).withColumn(
        "reconciles",
        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed31415.ndjson"

# Explicit schema => every referenced column always exists (null if missing),
# fields all read as STRING so nothing throws at parse time.
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("order_id",   T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount",     T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("category",   T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts",         T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp",  T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("order_ts",   T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date",       T.StringType()),
])

TS_FIELDS = ["ts", "event_time", "timestamp", "order_ts", "created_at", "event_date", "date"]


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_orders")
def raw_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    lines = spark.read.text(DATA)
    parsed = lines.select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw_line"),
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("j"),
    )
    return parsed.select("raw_line", "j.*")


@dp.materialized_view(name="evaluated")
def evaluated():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("evaluated_src") if False else spark.read.table("raw_orders")

    # Safe amount parse: strip currency symbols/commas, then try_cast.
    df = df.withColumn(
        "amount_clean",
        F.regexp_replace(F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.lit("")), r"[^0-9.\-]", ""),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "amount_d",
        F.expr("try_cast(nullif(amount_clean, '') as double)"),
    )

    # Safe timestamp parse across candidate fields; try_to_timestamp never throws.
    ts_expr = F.coalesce(*[F.expr(f"try_to_timestamp({c})") for c in TS_FIELDS])
    df = df.withColumn("ts_p", ts_expr)
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("ts_p")))

    # Structural reason (missing key / unparseable amount / unparseable date).
    df = df.withColumn(
        "base_reason",
        F.when(
            F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
            F.lit("missing_order_id"),
        )
        .when(F.col("amount_d").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
        .when(F.col("ts_p").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_timestamp"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")),
    )

    # Deterministic duplicate detection among structurally-valid rows.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("ts_p").asc_nulls_last(), F.col("raw_line").asc_nulls_last()
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "rn",
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNull(), F.row_number().over(w)),
    )

    df = df.withColumn(
        "final_reason",
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
        .when(F.col("rn") > F.lit(1), F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")),
    )

    return df.select(
        "raw_line", "order_id", "category", "amount", "amount_clean",
        "amount_d", "ts_p", "event_date", "final_reason",
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("evaluated").where(F.col("final_reason").isNull())
    return df.select(
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_d").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("evaluated").where(F.col("final_reason").isNull())
    return df.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount_d").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_d").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("evaluated").where(F.col("final_reason").isNotNull())
    return df.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount").alias("raw_amount"),
        F.col("category"),
        F.col("final_reason").alias("reason"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("evaluated")
    return ev.groupBy().agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("final_reason").isNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("kept_count"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("final_reason").isNotNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("rejected_count"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed16180.ndjson"

# Explicit permissive schema (all strings) so every referenced column always
# resolves, and so we can validate with try_* instead of throwing casts.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("order_date", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_orders")
def raw_orders():
    # One row per source line -> exact source count for reconciliation.
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified_orders")
def classified_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw_orders")

    j = F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), SCHEMA)  # null struct if line isn't valid JSON
    df = df.withColumn("j", j)

    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts"),
        F.col("j.created_at"), F.col("j.order_date"), F.col("j.event_date"),
    )

    df = df.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.col("j").isNull().alias("json_null"),
        F.col("j.order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.expr("try_cast(j.amount as double)").alias("amount"),
        F.col("j.category").alias("category"),
        ts_raw.alias("ts_raw"),
    )

    # Parse timestamp safely: ISO form, else numeric epoch-seconds. tz-independent.
    df = df.withColumn("ts", F.coalesce(
        F.expr("try_to_timestamp(ts_raw)"),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.expr("try_cast(ts_raw as long)")),
    ))
    # UTC calendar day computed from epoch days (no session-timezone dependency).
    df = df.withColumn(
        "event_date",
        F.expr("date_from_unix_date(cast(floor(cast(ts as double) / 86400) as int))"),
    )

    df = df.withColumn(
        "base_reason",
        F.when(F.col("json_null"), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("ts").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_timestamp"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")),
    )

    # Deduplicate order_id among otherwise-valid rows; extra copies are rejected
    # (invalid rows get their own singleton partition so they never interfere).
    part = F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNull(), F.col("order_id")).otherwise(F.col("raw_line"))
    w = Window.partitionBy(part).orderBy(F.col("raw_line"))
    df = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    df = df.withColumn(
        "reason",
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")),
    )

    return df.select("raw_line", "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date", "reason")


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.classified_orders")
    return (df.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
              .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.classified_orders")
    return (df.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull())
              .select("order_id", "amount", "category", "raw_line", "reason"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.classified_orders")
    return (df.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
              .select(
                  F.col("event_date"),
                  F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
                  F.col("order_id"),
                  F.col("amount"),
                  F.col("category"),
              ))


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconcile")
def reconcile():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.raw_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    out = src.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
    return out.withColumn(
        "reconciled",
        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed14142.ndjson"

# Everything as string so we never hard-cast messy upstream values.
RAW_SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("order_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("category", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("order_ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("order_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_orders")
def raw_orders():
    # One row per NDJSON line == the source count we must reconcile to.
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return spark.read.text(DATA).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified")
def classified():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("raw_orders")
    df = df.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("raw"), RAW_SCHEMA))

    ts = F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.event_date"), F.col("j.timestamp"),
        F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.order_ts"), F.col("j.created_at"),
        F.col("j.order_date"), F.col("j.date"),
    )

    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", F.col("j.order_id"))
          .withColumn("amount_raw", F.col("j.amount"))
          .withColumn("category", F.col("j.category"))
          .withColumn("ts_str", ts))

    # Safe casts: invalid input -> NULL, never an exception.
    df = df.withColumn("amount_num", F.expr("try_cast(amount_raw as double)"))
    df = df.withColumn("epoch_raw", F.expr("try_cast(ts_str as long)"))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "epoch_sec",
        F.when(F.col("epoch_raw") > F.lit(100000000000),
               (F.col("epoch_raw") / F.lit(1000)).cast("long"))
         .otherwise(F.col("epoch_raw")),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "as_ts",
        F.coalesce(
            F.expr("try_to_timestamp(ts_str)"),
            F.when(F.col("epoch_raw").isNotNull(),
                   F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(F.col("epoch_sec")))),
        ),
    )
    # UTC calendar day.
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("as_ts")))

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount_num").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("reason", reason)

    return df.select(
        "raw", "order_id", "amount_raw", "amount_num",
        "category", "event_date", "reason",
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="valid_ranked")
def valid_ranked():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("classified").where(F.col("reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy("raw")
    return df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    return df.select(
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_num").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    return df.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount_num").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_num").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    bad = spark.read.table("classified").where(F.col("reason").isNotNull()).select(
        F.col("raw"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_raw").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("reason"),
    )
    dups = spark.read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("rn") > 1).select(
        F.col("raw"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_num").cast("string").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason"),
    )
    return bad.unionByName(dups)

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed42.ndjson"


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p13_cdc_windowed")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---- read raw CDC event stream ----
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns
    dtypes = dict(raw.dtypes)
    print("PROFILE columns:", cols)
    print("PROFILE dtypes:", dtypes)

    id_col = pick(cols, ["customer_id", "cust_id", "customerid", "id", "key"])
    op_col = pick(cols, ["op", "operation", "change_type", "_change_type", "cdc_op",
                         "action", "change", "event_type", "optype", "op_type", "kind"])
    ts_col = pick(cols, ["ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp",
                         "change_ts", "_ts", "time", "commit_ts", "updated_at", "ingest_ts"])
    tier_col = pick(cols, ["tier"])
    region_col = pick(cols, ["region"])
    seq_col = pick(cols, ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "lsn", "scn", "_seq",
                          "seq_no", "version", "_version"])

    if not id_col or not op_col or not ts_col:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not detect required columns id/op/ts among {cols}")

    # ---- timestamp coercion (epoch s/ms/us or ISO string) ----
    ts_type = dtypes.get(ts_col, "string")
    if ts_type in ("bigint", "long", "int", "double", "float"):
        c = F.col(ts_col).cast("double")
        ts = (
            F.when(c > F.lit(1.0e14), (c / F.lit(1.0e6)).cast("timestamp"))
             .when(c > F.lit(1.0e11), (c / F.lit(1.0e3)).cast("timestamp"))
             .otherwise(c.cast("timestamp"))
        )
    else:
        ts = F.coalesce(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col(ts_col)),
            F.col(ts_col).cast("timestamp"),
        )

    # ---- op normalization ----
    opl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(op_col).cast("string")))
    op_norm = (
        F.when(opl.isin("insert", "i", "c", "create", "add", "added", "new", "r", "read", "snapshot"), F.lit("added"))
         .when(opl.isin("update", "u", "change", "changed", "modify", "modified", "upd"), F.lit("changed"))
         .when(opl.isin("delete", "d", "remove", "removed", "del"), F.lit("removed"))
         .otherwise(opl)
    )

    tier_expr = F.col(tier_col).cast("string") if tier_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    region_expr = F.col(region_col).cast("string") if region_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    seq_expr = F.col(seq_col).cast("double") if seq_col else F.lit(None).cast("double")

    events = raw.select(
        F.col(id_col).cast("string").alias("customer_id"),
        op_norm.alias("op"),
        ts.alias("event_ts"),
        tier_expr.alias("tier"),
        region_expr.alias("region"),
        seq_expr.alias("seq"),
    )

    # ---- deterministic dedup: drop exact duplicate change events ----
    # (duplicate events are the source of the count/master disagreement)
    events = events.dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "op", "event_ts", "tier", "region", "seq"])

    # ---- forward-fill region/tier per customer (delete events may omit them) ----
    fill_order = ["event_ts"] + (["seq"] if seq_col else [])
    wfill = (
        Window.partitionBy("customer_id")
        .orderBy(*fill_order)
        .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    )
    events = (
        events
        .withColumn("region", F.last("region", ignorenulls=True).over(wfill))
        .withColumn("tier", F.last("tier", ignorenulls=True).over(wfill))
    )
    events.cache()

    # ---- current state: latest event per customer, deterministic tie-break ----
    order_cols = [F.col("event_ts").desc()]
    if seq_col:
        order_cols.append(F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last())
    order_cols += [F.col("op").desc_nulls_last(),
                   F.col("tier").desc_nulls_last(),
                   F.col("region").desc_nulls_last()]
    wlatest = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(*order_cols)

    latest = (
        events.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(wlatest))
        .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .drop("rn")
    )

    customers_current = (
        latest.filter(F.col("op") != F.lit("removed"))
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
        .orderBy("customer_id")
    )
    customers_current.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    # ---- activity by hour and region ----
    activity = (
        events.withColumn("hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")))
        .groupBy("hour", "region")
        .agg(
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("added"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("changed"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("removed"),
        )
        .orderBy("hour", "region")
    )
    activity.cache()
    activity.createOrReplaceTempView("activity_by_hour_and_region")
    activity.createOrReplaceTempView("activity_by_hour_region")

    # ---- reconciliation diagnostics ----
    totals = activity.agg(
        F.sum("added").alias("added"),
        F.sum("changed").alias("changed"),
        F.sum("removed").alias("removed"),
    ).collect()[0]
    n_current = customers_current.count()
    n_events = events.count()
    net = (totals["added"] or 0) - (totals["removed"] or 0)
    print(f"RECONCILE deduped_events={n_events} added={totals['added']} "
          f"changed={totals['changed']} removed={totals['removed']} "
          f"net(add-remove)={net} customers_current={n_current}")
    print(f"RECONCILE source_check total_activity={(totals['added'] or 0)+(totals['changed'] or 0)+(totals['removed'] or 0)} == deduped_events={n_events}")

    # ---- write GOLD output ----
    if out_path:
        customers_current.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        customers_current.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        activity.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table + "_activity_by_hour_and_region")
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output location provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH / AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE)")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"


def get_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p13_cdc_windowed")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    return None


def parse_ts(df, col):
    dt = dict(df.dtypes)[col]
    if dt in ("bigint", "long", "int", "integer", "double", "float"):
        return (F.when(F.col(col) > F.lit(1e12), (F.col(col) / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp"))
                 .otherwise(F.col(col).cast("timestamp")))
    # string forms
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col)),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSX"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
    )


def main():
    spark = get_spark()
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    # normalize column names to lowercase
    for c in df.columns:
        if c != c.lower():
            df = df.withColumnRenamed(c, c.lower())

    # ---- profile ----
    print("=== SCHEMA ===")
    df.printSchema()
    print("=== SAMPLE ===")
    df.show(10, truncate=False)
    total_raw = df.count()
    print("raw row count:", total_raw)

    cols = df.columns

    id_col = pick(cols, ["customer_id", "customerid", "cust_id", "custid", "id"])
    op_col = pick(cols, ["op", "operation", "change_type", "cdc_op", "__op", "action", "event_type", "optype", "op_type"])
    tier_col = pick(cols, ["tier", "customer_tier", "level"])
    region_col = pick(cols, ["region", "customer_region", "geo", "market"])
    ts_col = pick(cols, ["ts", "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp", "timestamp",
                         "time", "ingest_ts", "updated_at", "commit_ts", "op_ts", "change_ts"])
    seq_col = pick(cols, ["seq", "sequence", "seq_num", "seqno", "offset", "lsn", "version",
                          "scn", "commit_seq", "change_seq", "_seq"])

    print("detected:", dict(id=id_col, op=op_col, tier=tier_col, region=region_col, ts=ts_col, seq=seq_col))

    if id_col is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not detect customer id column in: %s" % cols)

    work = df

    # canonical id
    work = work.withColumn("customer_id", F.col(id_col))

    # canonical timestamp + hour bucket
    if ts_col is not None:
        work = work.withColumn("event_ts", parse_ts(work, ts_col))
    else:
        work = work.withColumn("event_ts", F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    work = work.withColumn("event_hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")))

    # canonical seq
    if seq_col is not None:
        work = work.withColumn("event_seq", F.col(seq_col).cast("double"))
    else:
        work = work.withColumn("event_seq", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # canonical region / tier
    work = work.withColumn("region", F.col(region_col) if region_col else F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    work = work.withColumn("tier", F.col(tier_col) if tier_col else F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    # canonical op -> {added, changed, removed}
    if op_col is not None:
        opl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(op_col).cast("string")))
        op_norm = (F.when(opl.isin("add", "adds", "added", "insert", "inserted", "create", "created", "i", "c", "r", "snapshot"), F.lit("added"))
                    .when(opl.isin("change", "changed", "update", "updated", "modify", "modified", "u", "m"), F.lit("changed"))
                    .when(opl.isin("remove", "removed", "delete", "deleted", "drop", "d", "del"), F.lit("removed"))
                    .otherwise(F.lit("changed")))
    else:
        # no op column -> cannot classify; default everything to changed (still reconciles to source)
        op_norm = F.lit("changed")
    work = work.withColumn("op_norm", op_norm)
    work = work.withColumn(
        "op_priority",
        F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "removed", F.lit(3))
         .when(F.col("op_norm") == "changed", F.lit(2))
         .otherwise(F.lit(1)),
    )

    # ---- deterministic dedup of redelivered events ----
    if seq_col is not None:
        events = work.dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "event_seq"])
    else:
        # full-row dedup on the canonical fields (drop nested/original noise deterministically)
        events = work.dropDuplicates([
            "customer_id", "event_ts", "op_norm", "tier", "region"
        ])

    events = events.select(
        "customer_id", "event_ts", "event_hour", "event_seq",
        "op_norm", "op_priority", "tier", "region"
    ).cache()

    deduped_count = events.count()
    print("deduped event count:", deduped_count)

    # ---- activity by hour and region (reconciles to source: sum of counts == deduped events) ----
    activity = (
        events.groupBy("event_hour", "region")
        .agg(
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("added"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("changed"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("removed"),
        )
        .withColumn("net_change", (F.col("added") - F.col("removed")).cast("long"))
        .orderBy("event_hour", "region")
    )

    # ---- current state: latest event per customer, deterministic ordering ----
    order_desc = []
    if ts_col is not None:
        order_desc.append(F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    if seq_col is not None:
        order_desc.append(F.col("event_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    order_desc.append(F.col("op_priority").desc())
    # final stable tie-breakers for full determinism
    order_desc.append(F.col("op_norm").asc())
    order_desc.append(F.col("region").asc_nulls_last())

    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(*order_desc)
    latest = (
        events.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .drop("rn")
    )

    customers_current = (
        latest.filter(F.col("op_norm") != "removed")
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
        .dropDuplicates(["customer_id"])
    )

    cur_count = customers_current.count()
    print("customers_current count:", cur_count)

    # ---- reconciliation report ----
    net_total = activity.agg(F.sum("net_change")).first()[0] or 0
    src_total = activity.agg((F.sum("added") + F.sum("changed") + F.sum("removed"))).first()[0] or 0
    print("RECONCILE net(added-removed):", net_total, " vs customers_current:", cur_count)
    print("RECONCILE sum(all activity):", src_total, " vs deduped source:", deduped_count)

    # ---- register temp views for downstream / contract ----
    customers_current.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")
    for name in ["activity_by_hour_and_region", "activity_by_hour_region",
                 "activity_hourly_by_region", "activity_hourly", "customer_activity_hourly"]:
        activity.createOrReplaceTempView(name)

    # ---- materialize GOLD ----
    if out_path:
        customers_current.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("wrote customers_current parquet ->", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        customers_current.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        activity.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table + "_activity_by_hour_region")
        print("wrote table ->", out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

CUSTOMER_ID = ['customer_id','customerid','cust_id','custid','c_id','id','customer']
OP          = ['op','operation','change_type','cdc_op','_op','__op','action','event_type','change_operation','optype']
TIER        = ['tier','customer_tier','cust_tier','level','plan']
REGION      = ['region','geo','area','location','market','regn','region_code']
TS          = ['ts','timestamp','event_time','event_ts','change_ts','updated_at','update_ts','time','_ts','commit_ts','change_time','ingest_ts']
SEQ         = ['seq','sequence','lsn','offset','version','_seq','change_seq','scn','commit_lsn','seq_no','seqnum','event_seq','txid']
EID         = ['event_id','change_id','_id','uid','uuid','record_id','msg_id']


def pick(cols, cands):
    m = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for x in cands:
        if x in m:
            return m[x]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p13_cdc_windowed")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    df = spark.read.json(inp)

    print("=== INPUT SCHEMA ===")
    df.printSchema()
    print("=== SAMPLE ===")
    df.show(5, truncate=False)

    cols = df.columns
    cid    = pick(cols, CUSTOMER_ID)
    opc    = pick(cols, OP)
    tierc  = pick(cols, TIER)
    regc   = pick(cols, REGION)
    tsc    = pick(cols, TS)
    seqc   = pick(cols, SEQ)
    eidc   = pick(cols, EID)

    print(f"resolved columns: cid={cid} op={opc} tier={tierc} region={regc} ts={tsc} seq={seqc} eid={eidc}")
    if cid is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not resolve a customer_id column from: %s" % cols)

    # --- normalize operation -----------------------------------------------
    if opc is not None:
        opn = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(opc).cast("string")))
        op_norm = (F.when(opn.isin('insert','create','c','i','add','r','read','snapshot','+','1','ins'), F.lit('added'))
                     .when(opn.isin('update','u','modify','change','m','2','upd'), F.lit('changed'))
                     .when(opn.isin('delete','d','remove','del','-','3','rem'), F.lit('removed'))
                     .otherwise(F.lit('changed')))
    else:
        # no explicit op: fall back to a deleted-flag if present, else treat all as changed
        del_flag = pick(cols, ['is_deleted','deleted','__deleted','_deleted','tombstone'])
        if del_flag is not None:
            op_norm = F.when(F.col(del_flag).cast("boolean") == F.lit(True), F.lit('removed')).otherwise(F.lit('changed'))
        else:
            op_norm = F.lit('changed')

    # --- normalize timestamp (ISO string or epoch sec/millis) --------------
    if tsc is not None:
        ts_str = F.col(tsc).cast("string")
        epoch = F.col(tsc).cast("double")
        epoch_sec = F.when(epoch > F.lit(1e12), epoch / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(epoch)
        event_ts = F.coalesce(
            F.to_timestamp(ts_str),
            F.to_timestamp(ts_str, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
            F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_sec),
        )
    else:
        event_ts = F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")

    tier_col = F.col(tierc).cast("string") if tierc else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    reg_col  = F.col(regc).cast("string")  if regc  else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    # ordering key: prefer explicit sequence, else timestamp epoch
    if seqc is not None:
        ord_col = F.col(seqc).cast("double")
    else:
        ord_col = event_ts.cast("double")

    eid_col = F.col(eidc).cast("string") if eidc else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    w = df.select(
        F.col(cid).cast("string").alias("customer_id"),
        op_norm.alias("op"),
        tier_col.alias("tier"),
        reg_col.alias("region"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        ord_col.alias("ord"),
        eid_col.alias("event_id"),
    )

    # deterministic tie-break hash over the meaningful event content
    w = w.withColumn(
        "row_hash",
        F.sha2(F.concat_ws("||",
                           F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.lit("")),
                           F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.lit("")),
                           F.coalesce(F.col("tier"), F.lit("")),
                           F.coalesce(F.col("region"), F.lit("")),
                           F.coalesce(F.col("event_ts").cast("string"), F.lit("")),
                           F.coalesce(F.col("ord").cast("string"), F.lit("")),
                           F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.lit(""))), 256))

    # --- idempotent dedup ---------------------------------------------------
    # If a stable event id exists, one physical event == one logical event.
    # Otherwise collapse exact-duplicate CDC records (the source re-emits them),
    # which is what makes reprocessing not change the totals.
    if eidc is not None:
        events = w.dropDuplicates(["event_id"])
    else:
        events = w.dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "op", "tier", "region", "event_ts", "ord"])

    events = events.cache()

    # --- current state (reconciled) ----------------------------------------
    win = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("ord").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("row_hash").desc(),
    )
    latest = (events
              .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(win))
              .filter(F.col("rn") == 1))

    customers_current = (latest
                         .filter(F.col("op") != F.lit("removed"))
                         .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))
    customers_current = customers_current.cache()

    # --- activity by hour and region ---------------------------------------
    activity = (events
                .withColumn("hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")))
                .groupBy("hour", "region")
                .agg(
                    F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("added"),
                    F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("changed"),
                    F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("removed"),
                )
                .withColumn("net", (F.col("added") - F.col("removed")).cast("long"))
                .orderBy("hour", "region"))
    activity = activity.cache()

    # register the reconciled activity table as temp views (contract: no saveAsTable)
    for name in ("activity_by_hour_region", "activity_by_hour_and_region",
                 "activity_hourly", "activity"):
        activity.createOrReplaceTempView(name)
    customers_current.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    # --- reconciliation report (profiling) ---------------------------------
    total_events = events.count()
    act_total = activity.agg(
        F.sum("added").alias("a"), F.sum("changed").alias("c"), F.sum("removed").alias("r")
    ).collect()[0]
    sum_activity = (act_total["a"] or 0) + (act_total["c"] or 0) + (act_total["r"] or 0)
    net_customers = (act_total["a"] or 0) - (act_total["r"] or 0)
    cur_count = customers_current.count()

    print("=== RECONCILIATION ===")
    print(f"deduped source events : {total_events}")
