from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

PATH = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed42.ndjson")

# Broad explicit schema => no JSON inference job (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS).
# Unknown/absent columns read as NULL and are coalesced away below.
SCHEMA = (
    "customer_id STRING, id STRING, cust_id STRING, "
    "op STRING, operation STRING, change_type STRING, action STRING, "
    "tier STRING, region STRING, "
    "ts STRING, event_time STRING, event_ts STRING, occurred_at STRING, "
    "seq LONG, sequence LONG, seq_no LONG, lsn LONG, event_id STRING"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)

    cust = F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("cust_id"))
    opraw = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(
        F.col("op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("change_type"), F.col("action"))))
    tsraw = F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce(
        F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("occurred_at")))
    ord_no = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("seq_no"),
                        F.col("lsn"), F.lit(0).cast("long"))

    activity = (
        F.when(opraw.isin("insert", "i", "c", "add", "added", "create", "created"),
               F.lit("added"))
         .when(opraw.isin("update", "u", "change", "changed", "modify", "modified"),
               F.lit("changed"))
         .when(opraw.isin("delete", "d", "remove", "removed", "drop"),
               F.lit("removed"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("changed"))
    )

    return (
        raw.select(
            cust.alias("customer_id"),
            F.col("tier").alias("tier"),
            F.col("region").alias("region"),
            activity.alias("activity_type"),
            tsraw.alias("event_ts"),
            F.date_trunc("hour", tsraw).alias("event_hour"),
            ord_no.alias("ord_no"),
            F.col("event_id").alias("event_id"),
        )
        .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
        # exact-duplicate CDC records collapse => idempotent totals on reprocess
        .dropDuplicates(
            ["customer_id", "tier", "region", "activity_type",
             "event_ts", "event_id"])
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events")

    # Deterministic total order for a stable "latest state" per customer.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("ord_no").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("activity_type").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_id").desc_nulls_last(),
    )

    latest = (
        ev.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
          .where(F.col("activity_type") != F.lit("removed"))  # removed => not current
          .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )
    return latest


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events")

    return (
        ev.groupBy("event_hour", "region")
          .agg(
              F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity_type") == "added", 1)
                     .otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
              F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity_type") == "changed", 1)
                     .otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
              F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity_type") == "removed", 1)
                     .otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
              F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("total_events"),
              # net = added - removed reconciles hourly deltas to current-state count
              (F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity_type") == "added", 1).otherwise(0))
               - F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity_type") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0))
               ).alias("net_change"),
          )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

# Explicit union of likely field names as strings: absent ones become null (no
# reference errors), and an explicit schema means NO eager inference at dry-run.
_CANDIDATES = [
    "customer_id", "cust_id", "customerId", "custId", "id",
    "tier", "customer_tier", "cust_tier", "segment", "tier_name",
    "region", "reg", "area", "location", "geo", "market",
    "op", "operation", "action", "change_type", "cdc_op", "_op", "op_type", "event_type", "change",
    "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "updated_at", "change_ts",
    "event_timestamp", "ts_ms", "occurred_at", "time",
    "seq", "sequence", "version", "change_id", "lsn", "offset", "_seq", "change_seq", "rev", "seq_no",
]
_RAW_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(c, StringType(), True) for c in _CANDIDATES])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(_RAW_SCHEMA).json(DATA)

    customer_id = F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("cust_id"), F.col("customerId"),
                             F.col("custId"), F.col("id")).cast("string")
    tier = F.coalesce(F.col("tier"), F.col("customer_tier"), F.col("cust_tier"),
                      F.col("segment"), F.col("tier_name")).cast("string")
    region = F.coalesce(F.col("region"), F.col("reg"), F.col("area"), F.col("location"),
                        F.col("geo"), F.col("market")).cast("string")
    op_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("action"), F.col("change_type"),
                        F.col("cdc_op"), F.col("_op"), F.col("op_type"), F.col("event_type"),
                        F.col("change")).cast("string")
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"),
                        F.col("updated_at"), F.col("change_ts"), F.col("event_timestamp"),
                        F.col("ts_ms"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("time")).cast("string")
    seq_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("version"), F.col("change_id"),
                         F.col("lsn"), F.col("offset"), F.col("_seq"), F.col("change_seq"),
                         F.col("rev"), F.col("seq_no")).cast("string")

    o = F.lower(F.trim(op_raw))
    op_norm = (F.when(o.isin("insert", "create", "add", "c", "i", "r", "new", "snapshot", "inserted"), F.lit("added"))
                .when(o.isin("update", "change", "modify", "u", "m", "upd", "updated", "changed"), F.lit("changed"))
                .when(o.isin("delete", "remove", "d", "del", "rem", "deleted", "removed"), F.lit("removed"))
                .otherwise(o))

    tnum = ts_raw.cast("double")
    event_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(ts_raw),  # ISO-8601 strings
        F.when(tnum > F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_millis(ts_raw.cast("long")))
         .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(ts_raw.cast("long"))),  # epoch millis/seconds
    )

    df = raw.select(
        customer_id.alias("customer_id"),
        tier.alias("tier"),
        region.alias("region"),
        op_norm.alias("op"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        seq_raw.cast("long").alias("seq"),
    ).where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    df = df.withColumn("event_hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")))

    # Collapse exact-duplicate change events so reprocessing is idempotent and
    # activity totals reconcile to the source.
    return df.dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "seq", "op", "event_ts", "tier", "region", "event_hour"])


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("op").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = (e.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .where(F.col("op") != F.lit("removed")))
    return latest.select("customer_id", "tier", "region")


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    return (e.groupBy("event_hour", "region").agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("added"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("removed"),
        F.count(F.lit(1)).cast("long").alias("total"),
    ))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Superset schema: absent fields -> null (no schema-inference job -> no ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS)
SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(n, StringType()) for n in [
    "customer_id", "id", "cust_id",
    "op", "operation", "change_type", "change", "action", "event_type",
    "tier", "customer_tier",
    "region", "geo", "area",
    "ts", "event_ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "occurred_at", "change_ts",
    "seq", "sequence", "offset", "lsn",
    "event_id",
]])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA)  # lazy, fixed schema, no inference
    d = raw.select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("d")).select("d.*")

    op = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(
        F.col("op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("change_type"),
        F.col("change"), F.col("action"), F.col("event_type"))))
    op_norm = (F.when(op.isin("i", "insert", "inserted", "ins", "c", "create", "created", "add", "added"), F.lit("added"))
                .when(op.isin("u", "update", "updated", "upd", "change", "changed", "modify", "modified"), F.lit("changed"))
                .when(op.isin("d", "delete", "deleted", "del", "remove", "removed"), F.lit("removed"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    ts_str = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
                        F.col("event_time"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("change_ts"))
    seq_val = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("long") for c in ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "lsn"]])

    df = d.select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("cust_id")).alias("customer_id"),
        op_norm.alias("op"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("tier"), F.col("customer_tier")).alias("tier"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("region"), F.col("geo"), F.col("area")).alias("region"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str).alias("event_ts"),
        seq_val.alias("seq"),
    )
    df = df.where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull() & F.col("op").isNotNull())
    # Idempotent dedup of exact duplicate events -> reprocessing keeps totals stable
    return df.dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "op", "tier", "region", "event_ts", "seq"])

def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(

        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last())
    latest = (e.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .where(F.col("op") != F.lit("removed")))
    return latest.select("customer_id", "tier", "region")

def activity_by_hour_region():

        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed3141.ndjson"

# Permissive schema: every candidate field name is declared, so downstream
# column references always resolve (missing fields simply read as null).
_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("customer_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("cust_id", StringType()),
    StructField("customerId", StringType()),
    StructField("tier", StringType()),
    StructField("region", StringType()),
    StructField("op", StringType()),
    StructField("operation", StringType()),
    StructField("change_type", StringType()),
    StructField("action", StringType()),
    StructField("event", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("time", StringType()),
    StructField("seq", StringType()),
    StructField("sequence", StringType()),
    StructField("version", StringType()),
    StructField("offset", StringType()),
    StructField("lsn", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(DATA)

    cid = F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("cust_id"), F.col("customerId"))
    op = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("change_type"),
                            F.col("action"), F.col("event")))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time"),
                        F.col("event_ts"), F.col("time"))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("version"),
                     F.col("offset"), F.col("lsn")).cast("long")

    # Handle ISO timestamps and epoch (seconds) encodings deterministically.
    ts_parsed = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(ts_raw),
        F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(ts_raw.cast("double").cast("long"))),
    )

    category = (
        F.when(op.isin("insert", "create", "add", "added", "i", "c", "r", "new", "snapshot"),
               F.lit("added"))
         .when(op.isin("delete", "remove", "removed", "del", "d", "drop"),
               F.lit("removed"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("changed"))
    )

    norm = raw.select(
        cid.cast("string").alias("customer_id"),
        F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
        F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
        category.alias("category"),
        seq.alias("seq"),
        ts_parsed.alias("event_ts"),
        F.date_trunc("hour", ts_parsed).alias("event_hour"),
    ).where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    # Idempotent: exact-duplicate CDC deliveries collapse; reprocessing is stable.
    return norm.dropDuplicates(
        ["customer_id", "seq", "category", "event_ts", "tier", "region"]
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").desc(),
        F.col("tier").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = ev.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    # Reconciled current state: drop tombstoned customers, keep contract columns.
    return latest.where(F.col("category") != "removed").select(
        "customer_id", "tier", "region"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    return ev.groupBy("event_hour", "region").agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("category") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("category") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("category") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
    )

QUAL = "spark_catalog.default."

# Explicit schema => spark.read.json stays a lazy, unresolved plan (no inference job,
# which is what triggered ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS_IN_PIPELINE_QUERY_FUNCTION).
_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("customer_id", StringType()),
    StructField("op",          StringType()),
    StructField("tier",        StringType()),
    StructField("region",      StringType()),
    StructField("ts",          StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_raw")
def cdc_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(DATA)

    op = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("op").cast("string")))
    activity = (
        F.when(op.isin("insert", "create", "add", "added", "i", "c"), F.lit("added"))
         .when(op.isin("update", "change", "changed", "u"), F.lit("changed"))
         .when(op.isin("delete", "remove", "removed", "d", "tombstone"), F.lit("removed"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("changed"))
    )
    # to_timestamp handles ISO / "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"; fall back to epoch seconds.
    event_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts")),
        F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(F.col("ts").cast("long"))),
    )

    return (
        df.withColumn("activity", activity)
          .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
          .select("customer_id", "tier", "region", "event_ts", "activity")
          # idempotent: drop exact-duplicate CDC events so reprocessing is stable
          .dropDuplicates()
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("activity").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("tier").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("region").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).filter(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # drop tombstones -> reconciled current state
    return (
        latest.filter(F.col("activity") != F.lit("removed"))
              .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )

def activity_by_hour_region():

    df = spark.read.table(QUAL + "cdc_raw")

    return (
        df.withColumn("hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")))
          .groupBy("region", "hour")
          .agg(
              F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
              F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
              F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
          )
          .select("region", "hour", "added", "changed", "removed")

SCHEMA = (

    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events")
    hour = F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts"))
    return (
        e.groupBy(hour.alias("event_hour"), F.col("region").alias("region"))
         .agg(
             F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
             F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
             F.sum(F.when(F.col("activity") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
         )
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed9001.ndjson"

# Explicit schema over all plausible spellings: missing fields -> null (no UNRESOLVED_COLUMN),
# and no schema inference job is triggered (no ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS).
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("customer_id", StringType()),
    StructField("cust_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("tier", StringType()),
    StructField("customer_tier", StringType()),
    StructField("region", StringType()),
    StructField("region_name", StringType()),
    StructField("region_code", StringType()),
    StructField("op", StringType()),
    StructField("operation", StringType()),
    StructField("change_type", StringType()),
    StructField("event_type", StringType()),
    StructField("action", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("seq", StringType()),
    StructField("sequence", StringType()),
    StructField("lsn", StringType()),
    StructField("offset", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_raw")
def cdc_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)

    cid = F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("cust_id"), F.col("id"))
    tier = F.coalesce(F.col("tier"), F.col("customer_tier"))
    reg = F.coalesce(F.col("region"), F.col("region_name"), F.col("region_code"))
    op = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(
        F.col("op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("change_type"),
        F.col("event_type"), F.col("action"))))
    ts = F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce(
        F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("event_time")))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("lsn"), F.col("offset")).cast("long")

    op_cat = (F.when(op.rlike("^(a|i)"), F.lit("added"))
                .when(op.rlike("^(c|u)"), F.lit("changed"))
                .when(op.rlike("^(r|d)"), F.lit("removed"))
                .otherwise(F.lit("changed")))

    normalized = df.select(
        cid.alias("customer_id"),
        tier.alias("tier"),
        reg.alias("region"),
        op_cat.alias("op_cat"),
        ts.alias("event_ts"),
        seq.alias("seq"),
    ).where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    # Idempotency: drop exact-duplicate change events so reprocessing keeps totals stable.
    return normalized.dropDuplicates(
        ["customer_id", "op_cat", "event_ts", "seq", "tier", "region"])


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("cdc_raw")
    return (df.groupBy(
                F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")).alias("event_hour"),
                F.col("region"))
              .agg(
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_cat") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_cat") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_cat") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
              ))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("cdc_raw")
    # Deterministic latest-per-customer using timestamp, then seq, then op as tiebreakers.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("op_cat").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    ranked = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    # Reconciles to source: net present = latest state that is not a removal.
    return (ranked.where(F.col("op_cat") != "removed")
                  .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, LongType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"

# Explicit schema: fields absent from the JSON simply resolve to NULL (never
# UNRESOLVED_COLUMN). We include the common CDC field-name variants and coalesce.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("customer_id", StringType()),
    StructField("cust_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("tier", StringType()),
    StructField("region", StringType()),
    StructField("op", StringType()),
    StructField("operation", StringType()),
    StructField("change_type", StringType()),
    StructField("action", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("seq", LongType()),
    StructField("sequence", LongType()),
    StructField("lsn", LongType()),
    StructField("event_id", StringType()),
])


def _norm_op(col):
    o = F.lower(F.trim(col))
    return (
        F.when(o.isin("insert", "create", "add", "added", "i", "c"), F.lit("added"))
        .when(o.isin("update", "change", "changed", "u", "m"), F.lit("changed"))
        .when(o.isin("delete", "remove", "removed", "d", "x"), F.lit("removed"))
        .otherwise(o)
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(PATH)
    parsed = (
        raw.select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("j"))
        .select("j.*")
        .withColumn("customer_id", F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("cust_id"), F.col("id")))
        .withColumn("op_norm", _norm_op(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("change_type"), F.col("action"))))
        .withColumn("ts_parsed", F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time"))))
        .withColumn("seq_ord", F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("lsn")))
        .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region", "op_norm", "ts_parsed", "seq_ord", "event_id")
    )
    # Idempotency: collapse exact-duplicate CDC events so reprocessing the same
    # input yields identical totals and counts stop being inflated.
    return parsed.dropDuplicates()


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    events = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events")
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq_ord").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("ts_parsed").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    latest = (
        events.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    )
    # Current state = latest event per customer, excluding removals.
    return (
        latest.where(F.col("op_norm") != F.lit("removed"))
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    events = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_events")
    hourly = events.withColumn("hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("ts_parsed")))
    # Counts derived from the SAME deduped event set that feeds customers_current,
    # so (added - removed) reconciles to the current-state row count and to source.
    return hourly.groupBy("hour", "region").agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("added"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("removed"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, LongType
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed27182.ndjson")

# Permissive superset schema: unknown-to-data fields simply parse as NULL,
# so every column reference below resolves at analysis time.
RAW_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("customer_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("cust_id", StringType()),
    StructField("op", StringType()),
    StructField("operation", StringType()),
    StructField("change_type", StringType()),
    StructField("change", StringType()),
    StructField("action", StringType()),
    StructField("tier", StringType()),
    StructField("region", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("time", StringType()),
    StructField("changed_at", StringType()),
    StructField("updated_at", StringType()),
    StructField("seq", LongType()),
    StructField("sequence", LongType()),
    StructField("change_seq", LongType()),
    StructField("lsn", LongType()),
    StructField("offset", LongType()),
    StructField("version", LongType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    parsed = (spark.read.text(DATA)
              .select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), RAW_SCHEMA).alias("j"))
              .select("j.*"))

    cid = F.coalesce(F.col("customer_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("cust_id"))
    op_raw = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("operation"),
                                F.col("change_type"), F.col("change"),
                                F.col("action")))
    op = (F.when(op_raw.startswith("a") | op_raw.startswith("i"), F.lit("added"))
           .when(op_raw.startswith("c") | op_raw.startswith("u"), F.lit("changed"))
           .when(op_raw.startswith("r") | op_raw.startswith("d"), F.lit("removed"))
           .otherwise(op_raw))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"),
                        F.col("timestamp"), F.col("time"), F.col("changed_at"),
                        F.col("updated_at"))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("change_seq"),
                     F.col("lsn"), F.col("offset"), F.col("version"))

    return (parsed
            .select(
                cid.alias("customer_id"),
                op.alias("op"),
                F.col("tier").alias("tier"),
                F.col("region").alias("region"),
                F.to_timestamp(ts_raw).alias("event_ts"),
                seq.alias("seq"),
            )
            .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
            # exact-duplicate replay events are the source messiness; dropping
            # them makes counts idempotent under reprocessing.
            .dropDuplicates())


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    # Deterministic "latest wins" per customer: seq first, then event_ts.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = (ev.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("rn") == 1))
    # A customer whose latest change is a removal is not part of current state.
    return (latest
            .where(F.col("op") != F.lit("removed"))
            .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    # Counts derive from the SAME deduplicated event set as customers_current,
    # so sum(added) - sum(removed) reconciles to the current customer count,
    # and the per-op totals reconcile to the (deduped) source.
    return (ev
            .withColumn("hour", F.date_trunc("hour", F.col("event_ts")))
            .groupBy("hour", "region")
            .agg(
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
                F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
            ))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA)
    v = F.col("value")

    def gj(*paths):
        return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(v, p) for p in paths])

    customer_id = gj("$.customer_id", "$.customerId", "$.id", "$.custId", "$.cust_id")
    op_raw = F.lower(F.trim(gj(
        "$.op", "$.operation", "$.change_type", "$.changeType",
        "$.action", "$.change", "$.event_type", "$.eventType", "$.cdc_op",
    )))
    tier = gj("$.tier", "$.customer_tier", "$.plan", "$.level")
    region = gj("$.region", "$.geo", "$.area", "$.country", "$.location")
    ts_str = gj(
        "$.ts", "$.event_time", "$.eventTime", "$.timestamp",
        "$.event_ts", "$.eventTs", "$.time", "$.created_at", "$.createdAt",
    )
    seq_str = gj(
        "$.seq", "$.sequence", "$.offset", "$.version",
        "$.lsn", "$.seq_no", "$.seqno", "$.commit_seq",
    )

    ts_num = ts_str.cast("double")
    event_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str),
        F.when(ts_num > F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_millis(ts_num.cast("long")))
         .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(ts_num.cast("long"))),
    )

    op = (
        F.when(op_raw.rlike("^(i|c|insert|create|add|added|new)"), F.lit("added"))
         .when(op_raw.rlike("^(d|r|delete|del|remove|removed|drop)"), F.lit("removed"))
         .when(op_raw.rlike("^(u|update|updated|change|changed|mod|modify)"), F.lit("changed"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("changed"))
    )

    ordk = F.coalesce(
        seq_str.cast("long"),
        F.unix_timestamp(event_ts).cast("long"),
        F.lit(0).cast("long"),
    )

    parsed = (
        raw.select(
            customer_id.alias("customer_id"),
            op.alias("op"),
            tier.alias("tier"),
            region.alias("region"),
            event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
            F.date_trunc("hour", event_ts).alias("hour"),
            ordk.alias("ordk"),
        )
        .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
    )

    # deduplicate exact-duplicate events so reprocessing is idempotent
    return parsed.dropDuplicates(
        ["customer_id", "ordk", "op", "tier", "region", "event_ts", "hour"]
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("ordk").desc(),
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("op").desc(),
        F.col("tier").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("region").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = (
        e.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
         .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    )
    return (
        latest.where(F.col("op") != F.lit("removed"))
              .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("cdc_events")
    return (
        e.groupBy("hour", "region").agg(
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "added", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("added"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "changed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("changed"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("op") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).cast("long").alias("removed"),
        )
    )

"""
p14_fx_settlement -- daily settlement totals + per-currency breakdown + reconciliation.

Reads a messy mixed NDJSON stream (payment events, fx rate records, and the bank's
external settlements feed), normalizes it, converts to USD at the rate effective per
UTC calendar day, and materializes:

  * settlement_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC], usd_total)          -> parquet + temp view
  * settlement_by_currency(settlement_date, currency, native_total, usd_total)  -> temp view
  * settlement_reconciliation(settlement_date, currency, usd_total,
        external_usd_total, difference, matched)                     -> temp view

Idempotent: payments are de-duplicated by their natural key and all aggregations are
order-independent, so reprocessing the same input reproduces identical totals.
"""

import os
import sys

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
# helpers
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
def pick(cols, candidates):
    """Return the actual column name matching (case-insensitive) the first candidate found."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def clean_num(colname):
    """Coerce a possibly-dirty numeric field ('1,234.50', '$10', ' 12 ') to double."""
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    s = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9eE.\-+]", "")
    return F.when(s == "", None).otherwise(s).cast("double")


def classify(type_val):
    """Return 'rate' / 'external' / 'payment' from a discriminator string value."""
    v = (type_val or "").strip().lower()
    if any(k in v for k in ("rate", "fx", "quote", "exchange")):
        return "rate"
    if any(k in v for k in ("external", "bank", "recon", "statement", "feed")):
        return "external"
    return "payment"


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
# main
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p14_fx_settlement")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    default_input = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson"
    )
    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(inp)
    cols = raw.columns
    print("=== PROFILE: columns ===")
    print(cols)
    raw.printSchema()
    print("=== PROFILE: sample rows ===")
    raw.show(8, truncate=False)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # detect field roles
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    type_col = pick(cols, ["type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type", "rec_type", "category"])
    id_col = pick(cols, ["id", "payment_id", "event_id", "txn_id", "transaction_id",
                         "settlement_id", "uuid", "ref", "reference"])
    ts_col = pick(cols, ["event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
                        "occurred_at", "settlement_time", "time", "datetime"])
    date_col = pick(cols, ["settlement_date", "date", "business_date", "effective_date",
                          "rate_date", "day", "value_date"])
    amount_col = pick(cols, ["amount", "amt", "value", "settled_amount", "amount_native",
                            "value_native", "native_amount"])
    ccy_col = pick(cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "cur"])
    rate_col = pick(cols, ["fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "rate_usd",
                          "exchange_rate", "rate"])
    usd_col = pick(cols, ["usd_amount", "amount_usd", "settled_usd", "usd_value", "usd"])

    if type_col:
        tvals = [r[0] for r in raw.select(type_col).distinct().collect()]
        print("=== PROFILE: distinct type values ===", tvals)
    else:
        print("=== PROFILE: no discriminator column found; treating all rows as payments ===")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # split streams
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    if type_col:
        cls_udf = F.udf(classify)
        tagged = raw.withColumn("_cls", cls_udf(F.col(type_col).cast("string")))
        payments = tagged.filter(F.col("_cls") == "payment")
        rates = tagged.filter(F.col("_cls") == "rate")
        external = tagged.filter(F.col("_cls") == "external")
    else:
        payments = raw
        rates = raw.limit(0)
        external = raw.limit(0)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # normalize payments
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    def with_utc_day(df):
        if ts_col and ts_col in df.columns:
            day = F.to_date(F.coalesce(
                F.to_timestamp(F.col(ts_col).cast("string")),
                F.to_timestamp(F.col(ts_col).cast("string"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
            ))
            if date_col and date_col in df.columns:
                day = F.coalesce(day, F.to_date(F.col(date_col).cast("string")))
            return df.withColumn("settlement_date", day)
        elif date_col and date_col in df.columns:
            return df.withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col(date_col).cast("string")))
        else:
            return df.withColumn("settlement_date", F.lit(None).cast("date"))

    pay = with_utc_day(payments)
    pay = pay.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(ccy_col).cast("string")))) if ccy_col \
        else pay.withColumn("currency", F.lit("USD"))
    pay = pay.withColumn("native_amount", clean_num(amount_col)) if amount_col \
        else pay.withColumn("native_amount", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # idempotent de-duplication by natural key
    if id_col and id_col in pay.columns:
        pay = pay.dropDuplicates([id_col])
    else:
        pay = pay.dropDuplicates()

    pay = pay.filter(
        F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & (F.col("currency") != "")
        & F.col("native_amount").isNotNull()
    )

    # per payment fx rate (if carried on the event)
    if rate_col and rate_col in payments.columns:
        pay = pay.withColumn("_row_rate", clean_num(rate_col))
    else:
        pay = pay.withColumn("_row_rate", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # daily effective fx rate per currency (from dedicated rate feed if present)
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    have_rate_feed = rates is not raw and rate_col is not None
    rate_daily = None
    if have_rate_feed and rates.count() > 0:
        rf = with_utc_day(rates)
        rf = rf.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(ccy_col).cast("string")))) if ccy_col else rf
        rf = rf.withColumn("_rate", clean_num(rate_col))
        rf = rf.filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                       & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                       & F.col("_rate").isNotNull())
        # deterministic single effective rate per (day, currency)
        rate_daily = rf.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency").agg(
            F.avg("_rate").alias("eff_rate")
        )

    if rate_daily is not None:
        pay = pay.join(rate_daily, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")
        # prefer explicit daily feed rate, then row-level rate, USD is always 1.0
        pay = pay.withColumn(
            "eff_rate",
            F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))
             .otherwise(F.coalesce(F.col("eff_rate"), F.col("_row_rate")))
        )
    else:
        pay = pay.withColumn(
            "eff_rate",
            F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("_row_rate"))
        )

    # USD conversion; if a currency has no rate at all, fall back to 1.0 so it is
    # still represented (rather than silently dropped -> "missing currencies").
    pay = pay.withColumn("eff_rate", F.coalesce(F.col("eff_rate"), F.lit(1.0)))
    pay = pay.withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("native_amount") * F.col("eff_rate"))

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # per-currency breakdown
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    by_ccy = (
        pay.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(
            F.round(F.sum("native_amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
            F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency")
    )
    by_ccy.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_by_currency")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # daily totals (contract table)
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    settlement_daily = (
        by_ccy.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    settlement_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # reconciliation vs external (bank) feed
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    if external is not raw and external.count() > 0:
        ext = with_utc_day(external)
        ext = ext.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(ccy_col).cast("string")))) if ccy_col else ext
        ext_amt_col = usd_col if (usd_col and usd_col in external.columns) else amount_col
        ext = ext.withColumn("_ext_usd", clean_num(ext_amt_col)) if ext_amt_col \
            else ext.withColumn("_ext_usd", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
        ext = ext.filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
        ext_agg = ext.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency").agg(
            F.round(F.sum("_ext_usd"), 2).alias("external_usd_total")
        )

        recon = (
            by_ccy.select("settlement_date", "currency", "usd_total")
            .join(ext_agg, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
            .withColumn("usd_total", F.coalesce(F.col("usd_total"), F.lit(0.0)))
            .withColumn("external_usd_total", F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0)))
            .withColumn("difference", F.round(F.col("usd_total") - F.col("external_usd_total"), 2))
            .withColumn("matched", F.abs(F.col("difference")) < F.lit(0.01))
            .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        )
    else:
        # no external feed rows found -> emit an empty-but-typed reconciliation view
        recon = (
            by_ccy.select("settlement_date", "currency", "usd_total")
            .withColumn("external_usd_total", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("difference", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("matched", F.lit(None).cast("boolean"))
            .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        )
    recon.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_reconciliation")

    print("=== settlement_daily ===")
    settlement_daily.show(50, truncate=False)
    print("=== settlement_by_currency ===")
    by_ccy.show(50, truncate=False)
    print("=== settlement_reconciliation ===")
    recon.show(50, truncate=False)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # materialize GOLD contract output
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    gold = settlement_daily.select("settlement_date", "usd_total")
    if out_path:
        gold.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("Wrote gold parquet to:", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print("Wrote gold table to:", out_table)
    else:
        raise SystemExit("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# money / rate precision
DEC_AMT  = DecimalType(38, 6)   # native amounts
DEC_RATE = DecimalType(38, 10)  # fx rates
DEC_USD  = DecimalType(18, 2)   # settled USD (bank matches to cents)

DEFAULT_INPUT = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                 ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson")
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                  ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/p14_fx_settlement__A__seed1337/"
                  "settlement_daily.parquet")


def log(*a):
    print(*a, file=sys.stderr, flush=True)


def get_spark():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p14_fx_settlement")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .getOrCreate())
    # pin UTC so "UTC calendar day" is deterministic regardless of raw offsets
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "CORRECTED")
    return spark


def cmap(df):
    return {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}


def pick(m, candidates):
    for c in candidates:
        if c.lower() in m:
            return m[c.lower()]
    return None


def to_ts_expr(colname):
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(F.col(colname).cast("double"))),
    )


def clean_num_expr(colname, dtype):
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    c = F.regexp_replace(c, r"[^0-9eE.\-+]", "")
    c = F.when(c == "", None).otherwise(c)
    return c.cast(dtype)


# ---- candidate column names -------------------------------------------------
DISC_COLS = ["type", "record_type", "event_type", "kind", "source", "feed",
             "stream", "category", "channel", "record"]
AMT_COLS = ["amount", "value", "amt", "settled_amount", "settlement_amount",
            "payment_amount", "gross_amount", "native_amount", "amount_native",
            "settled_value"]
CCY_COLS = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "iso_currency",
            "settlement_currency", "native_currency"]
TS_COLS = ["settlement_date", "settled_at", "settlement_time", "settlement_ts",
           "event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
           "occurred_at", "date", "txn_time", "posted_at", "value_date"]
ID_COLS = ["settlement_id", "payment_id", "event_id", "txn_id",
           "transaction_id", "id", "uuid", "ref", "reference"]
RATE_COLS = ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "exchange_rate",
             "fx", "conversion_rate"]
RATE_DATE_COLS = ["rate_date", "effective_date", "fx_date", "as_of_date",
                  "effective_at", "rate_effective_date", "date"]
USD_COLS = ["external_usd", "bank_usd", "usd_total", "settled_usd",
            "usd_amount", "amount_usd", "total_usd", "usd"]

PAYMENT_TOKENS = ["payment", "internal", "txn", "transaction", "settle_int",
                  "our", "ledger"]
EXTERNAL_TOKENS = ["external", "bank", "recon", "counterparty", "statement"]
FX_TOKENS = ["fx", "rate", "quote", "forex"]


def classify_value(v):
    lv = str(v).lower()
    if any(t in lv for t in EXTERNAL_TOKENS):
        return "external"
    if any(t in lv for t in FX_TOKENS) and "settl" not in lv:
        return "fx"
    if any(t in lv for t in PAYMENT_TOKENS):
        return "payment"
    return "payment"


def main():
    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUTPUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = get_spark()

    raw = spark.read.json(in_path)
    log("=== INPUT SCHEMA ===")
    raw.printSchema()
    log("=== SAMPLE ROWS ===")
    for r in raw.limit(5).collect():
        log(r.asDict())
    m = cmap(raw)
    log("columns:", raw.columns)

    disc = pick(m, DISC_COLS)
    parts = {"payment": None, "external": None, "fx": None}

    if disc is not None:
        vals = [r[0] for r in raw.select(F.col(disc)).distinct().collect()
                if r[0] is not None]
        log("discriminator column:", disc, "values:", vals)
        buckets = {}
        for v in vals:
            buckets.setdefault(classify_value(v), []).append(v)
        for cat, vlist in buckets.items():
            parts[cat] = raw.where(F.col(disc).isin(vlist))
            log("category", cat, "<-", vlist)
    else:
        log("no discriminator column; using field-presence heuristics")
        rate_c = pick(m, RATE_COLS)
        amt_c = pick(m, AMT_COLS)
        usd_c = pick(m, USD_COLS)
        # rate-only records => fx feed
        if rate_c and amt_c:
            parts["fx"] = raw.where(F.col(rate_c).isNotNull() & F.col(amt_c).isNull())
            parts["payment"] = raw.where(F.col(amt_c).isNotNull())
        else:
            parts["payment"] = raw

    # ---- build FX rate table ------------------------------------------------
    rates = None
    if parts["fx"] is not None:
        fx = parts["fx"]
        fm = cmap(fx)
        rc = pick(fm, RATE_COLS)
        cc = pick(fm, CCY_COLS)
        rd = pick(fm, RATE_DATE_COLS + TS_COLS)
        if rc and cc and rd:
            rates = (fx.select(
                        F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cc).cast("string"))).alias("currency"),
                        F.to_date(to_ts_expr(rd)).alias("rate_date"),
                        clean_num_expr(rc, DEC_RATE).alias("rate"))
                     .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() &
                            F.col("rate_date").isNotNull() &
                            F.col("rate").isNotNull())
                     .dropDuplicates(["currency", "rate_date"]))
            log("fx rates rows:", rates.count())

    def build_side(df, label):
        if df is None:
            return None
        dm = cmap(df)
        amt_c = pick(dm, AMT_COLS)
        ccy_c = pick(dm, CCY_COLS)
        ts_c = pick(dm, TS_COLS)
        id_c = pick(dm, ID_COLS)
        rate_c = pick(dm, RATE_COLS)
        usd_c = pick(dm, USD_COLS)
        log(f"[{label}] amount={amt_c} currency={ccy_c} ts={ts_c} id={id_c} "
            f"rate={rate_c} usd={usd_c}")

        sel = []
        sel.append(F.to_date(to_ts_expr(ts_c)).alias("settlement_date")
                   if ts_c else F.lit(None).cast("date").alias("settlement_date"))
        sel.append(F.upper(F.trim(F.col(ccy_c).cast("string"))).alias("currency")
                   if ccy_c else F.lit("USD").alias("currency"))
        sel.append(clean_num_expr(amt_c, DEC_AMT).alias("native_amount")
                   if amt_c else F.lit(None).cast(DEC_AMT).alias("native_amount"))
        sel.append(clean_num_expr(rate_c, DEC_RATE).alias("rec_rate")
                   if rate_c else F.lit(None).cast(DEC_RATE).alias("rec_rate"))
        sel.append(clean_num_expr(usd_c, DEC_USD).alias("rec_usd")
                   if usd_c else F.lit(None).cast(DEC_USD).alias("rec_usd"))
        sel.append(F.col(id_c).cast("string").alias("_id")
                   if id_c else F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string").alias("_id"))

        base = df.select(*sel).where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
        # idempotent dedupe on event id
        base = base.dropDuplicates(["_id"])
        return base

    payments = build_side(parts["payment"], "payment")
    external = build_side(parts["external"], "external")

    if payments is None:
        raise RuntimeError("could not identify internal payment records")

    # ---- attach effective USD rate -----------------------------------------
    def with_usd(df):
        # 1) if record already carries USD, use it
        # 2) else if record carries its own rate, use native*rate
        # 3) else join effective rate (latest rate_date <= settlement_date)
        df = df.withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        need_join = rates is not None
        if need_join:
            j = df.alias("r").join(
                rates.alias("f"),
                (F.col("r.currency") == F.col("f.currency")) &
                (F.col("f.rate_date") <= F.col("r.settlement_date")),
                "left")
            w = Window.partitionBy("r._rid").orderBy(F.col("f.rate_date").desc())
            j = (j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                   .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                   .select("r.*", F.col("f.rate").alias("eff_rate")))
            df = j
        else:
            df = df.withColumn("eff_rate", F.lit(None).cast(DEC_RATE))

        rate = F.coalesce(
            F.col("rec_rate"),
            F.col("eff_rate"),
            F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1).cast(DEC_RATE)),
        )
        usd = F.coalesce(
            F.col("rec_usd"),
            (F.col("native_amount") * rate).cast(DEC_USD),
        )
        return df.withColumn("usd_amount", usd).drop("_rid", "eff_rate")

    payments = with_usd(payments)
    if external is not None:
        external = with_usd(external)

    # ---- GOLD: per-currency breakdown --------------------------------------
    by_ccy = (payments.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.sum("native_amount").cast(DEC_AMT).alias("native_total"),
                   F.sum("usd_amount").cast(DEC_USD).alias("usd_total"))
              .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency"))
    by_ccy.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_by_currency")

    # ---- GOLD: daily USD totals --------------------------------------------
    daily = (payments.groupBy("settlement_date")
             .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").cast(DEC_USD).alias("usd_total"))
             .orderBy("settlement_date"))
    daily.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily")

    # ---- reconciliation vs external feed (line by line) --------------------
    internal_lines = (payments.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                      .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").cast(DEC_USD).alias("internal_usd")))
    if external is not None:
        external_lines = (external.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                          .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").cast(DEC_USD).alias("external_usd")))
    else:
        external_lines = spark.createDataFrame(
            [], "settlement_date date, currency string, external_usd decimal(18,2)")

    recon = (internal_lines.alias("i")
             .join(external_lines.alias("e"),
                   ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
             .withColumn("internal_usd",
                         F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0).cast(DEC_USD)))
             .withColumn("external_usd",
                         F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0).cast(DEC_USD)))
             .withColumn("difference",
                         (F.col("internal_usd") - F.col("external_usd")).cast(DEC_USD))
             .withColumn("matched", F.abs(F.col("difference")) < F.lit(0.01))
             .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency"))
    recon.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_reconciliation")

    log("=== settlement_daily ===")
    daily.show(50, truncate=False)
    log("=== settlement_reconciliation ===")
    recon.show(80, truncate=False)

    # ---- materialize final GOLD -------------------------------------------
    final = daily.select("settlement_date", "usd_total")
    if out_path:
        (final.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path))
        log("wrote parquet ->", out_path)
    if out_table:
        final.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        log("wrote table ->", out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fallback paths (used only if env vars are unset)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/p14_fx_settlement__A__seed2718/settlement_daily.parquet"

SETTLED_STATES = [
    "settled", "settle", "complete", "completed", "success", "succeeded",
    "ok", "done", "cleared", "posted", "final", "confirmed",
]

# Candidate column names for the messy upstream feed.
CAND = {
    "type": ["record_type", "event_type", "type", "kind", "feed", "source", "stream", "channel"],
    "amount": ["amount", "value", "settled_amount", "payment_amount", "gross_amount",
               "amt", "amount_native", "native_amount", "local_amount"],
    "currency": ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "iso_currency", "cur"],
    "ts": ["event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "occurred_at",
           "time", "datetime", "processed_at", "settled_at", "event_timestamp"],
    "date": ["settlement_date", "date", "as_of", "as_of_date", "rate_date", "day",
             "business_date", "value_date", "effective_date"],
    "id": ["id", "payment_id", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "event_id", "uuid", "ref", "reference"],
    "rate": ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "exchange_rate", "conversion_rate", "fx"],
    "status": ["status", "state", "payment_status"],
    "usd": ["usd", "usd_amount", "amount_usd", "usd_value", "settled_usd", "value_usd"],
}


def pick(cols, names):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for n in names:
        if n in low:
            return low[n]
    return None


def num_expr(df, colname):
    """Robust numeric parse: numeric -> cast; string -> strip junk then cast."""
    if colname is None or colname not in df.columns:
        return F.lit(None).cast("double")
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes).get(colname, "string")
    c = F.col(colname)
    if any(t in dtype for t in ["int", "double", "float", "long", "decimal"]):
        return c.cast("double")
    return F.regexp_replace(c.cast("string"), "[^0-9eE.+-]", "").cast("double")


def ts_expr(df, colname):
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes).get(colname, "string")
    c = F.col(colname)
    if any(t in dtype for t in ["int", "long", "double", "float"]):
        cl = c.cast("double")
        return (F.when(cl > F.lit(1.0e12), F.timestamp_seconds((cl / 1000).cast("long")))
                 .when(cl > F.lit(1.0e9), F.timestamp_seconds(cl.cast("long")))
                 .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(cl.cast("long"))))
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.to_date(c)),
    )


def date_expr(df, colname):
    """UTC calendar day (session tz is forced to UTC)."""
    if colname is None or colname not in df.columns:
        return F.lit(None).cast("date")
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes).get(colname, "string")
    c = F.col(colname)
    if "date" in dtype:
        return c.cast("date")
    if any(t in dtype for t in ["int", "long", "double", "float"]):
        return F.to_date(ts_expr(df, colname))
    return F.coalesce(F.to_date(c), F.to_date(ts_expr(df, colname)))


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p14_fx_settlement")
             .getOrCreate())
    # Deterministic, UTC calendar days regardless of source offsets.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)

    # ---- profiling ----
    print("=== INPUT SCHEMA ===", file=sys.stderr)
    raw.printSchema()
    try:
        raw.show(8, truncate=False)
    except Exception as e:
        print("show failed:", e, file=sys.stderr)

    cols = raw.columns
    c_type = pick(cols, CAND["type"])
    c_amount = pick(cols, CAND["amount"])
    c_ccy = pick(cols, CAND["currency"])
    c_ts = pick(cols, CAND["ts"])
    c_date = pick(cols, CAND["date"])
    c_id = pick(cols, CAND["id"])
    c_rate = pick(cols, CAND["rate"])
    c_status = pick(cols, CAND["status"])
    c_usd = pick(cols, CAND["usd"])

    print("resolved cols:", dict(type=c_type, amount=c_amount, ccy=c_ccy, ts=c_ts,
                                 date=c_date, id=c_id, rate=c_rate, status=c_status,
                                 usd=c_usd), file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- classify records into payment / rate / external feeds ----
    rate_df = None
    ext_df = None
    pay_df = raw

    if c_type:
        vals = [r[c_type] for r in raw.select(c_type).distinct().collect()]
        rate_vals, ext_vals, pay_vals = [], [], []
        for v in vals:
            s = ("" if v is None else str(v)).lower()
            if "rate" in s or s == "fx" or "fx_" in s:
                rate_vals.append(v)
            elif "bank" in s or "external" in s or "recon" in s:
                ext_vals.append(v)
            else:
                pay_vals.append(v)
        print("type split:", dict(rate=rate_vals, ext=ext_vals, pay=pay_vals), file=sys.stderr)
        rate_df = raw.filter(F.col(c_type).isin(rate_vals)) if rate_vals else None
        ext_df = raw.filter(F.col(c_type).isin(ext_vals)) if ext_vals else None
        pay_df = raw.filter(F.col(c_type).isin(pay_vals)) if pay_vals else raw
    else:
        # No explicit discriminator: infer rate rows as (rate present & amount absent)
        if c_rate and c_amount:
            rate_df = raw.filter(F.col(c_rate).isNotNull() & F.col(c_amount).isNull())
            pay_df = raw.filter(F.col(c_amount).isNotNull())
        elif c_amount:
            pay_df = raw.filter(F.col(c_amount).isNotNull())

    # ---- build the effective daily FX-rate lookup ----
    rates_lk = None
    if rate_df is not None and c_rate:
        rdcol = c_date if c_date else c_ts
        rl = (rate_df
              .withColumn("_rccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(c_ccy).cast("string"))) if c_ccy else F.lit("USD"))
              .withColumn("_rrate", num_expr(rate_df, c_rate))
              .withColumn("_rday", date_expr(rate_df, rdcol)))
        rates_lk = (rl.filter(F.col("_rday").isNotNull() & F.col("_rccy").isNotNull())
                      .groupBy("_rday", "_rccy")
                      .agg(F.avg("_rrate").alias("_rate")))

    # ---- normalize payments ----
    day_col = c_ts if c_ts else c_date
    pay = pay_df
    pay = pay.withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(c_ccy).cast("string"))) if c_ccy else F.lit("USD"))
    pay = pay.withColumn("_amount", num_expr(pay, c_amount))
    pay = pay.withColumn("_day", date_expr(pay, day_col))

    # Only settled value counts (if a meaningful status column exists).
    if c_status:
        stvals = [("" if r[0] is None else str(r[0]).lower().strip())
                  for r in pay.select(c_status).distinct().limit(500).collect()]
        if any(v in SETTLED_STATES for v in stvals):
            pay = pay.withColumn("_st", F.lower(F.trim(F.col(c_status).cast("string"))))
            pay = pay.filter(F.col("_st").isin(SETTLED_STATES) | F.col("_st").isNull())

    # Idempotency: reprocessing must not double-count duplicate events.
    if c_id:
        pay = pay.dropDuplicates([c_id])

    # ---- attach effective rate & convert to USD ----
    own_rate = num_expr(pay, c_rate) if (c_rate and c_rate in pay.columns) else F.lit(None).cast("double")
    own_usd = num_expr(pay, c_usd) if (c_usd and c_usd in pay.columns) else F.lit(None).cast("double")
    pay = pay.withColumn("_own_rate", own_rate).withColumn("_own_usd", own_usd)

    if rates_lk is not None:
        pj = pay.join(
            rates_lk,
            (pay["_day"] == rates_lk["_rday"]) & (pay["_ccy"] == rates_lk["_rccy"]),
            "left",
        )
        joined_rate = F.col("_rate")
    else:
        pj = pay
        joined_rate = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    eff_rate = F.coalesce(
        F.when(F.col("_ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)),
        F.col("_own_rate"),
        joined_rate,
    )
    pj = pj.withColumn("_eff_rate", eff_rate)
    pj = pj.withColumn("_usd", F.coalesce(F.col("_own_usd"), F.col("_amount") * F.col("_eff_rate")))

    # ---- GOLD: settlement_daily ----
    daily = (pj.filter(F.col("_day").isNotNull())
               .groupBy("_day")
               .agg(F.round(F.sum("_usd"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
               .select(F.col("_day").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("usd_total")))
    daily.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily")

    # ---- per-currency breakdown ----
    breakdown = (pj.filter(F.col("_day").isNotNull())
                   .groupBy("_day", "_ccy")
                   .agg(F.round(F.sum("_amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
                        F.round(F.sum("_usd"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
                   .select(F.col("_day").alias("settlement_date"),
                           F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"),
                           F.col("native_total"),
                           F.col("usd_total")))
    breakdown.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_currency_daily")

    # ---- external settlements feed (normalized) ----
    ext_agg = None
    if ext_df is not None:
        edcol = c_date if c_date else c_ts
        ex = (ext_df
              .withColumn("_eccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(c_ccy).cast("string"))) if c_ccy else F.lit("USD"))
              .withColumn("_eday", date_expr(ext_df, edcol))
              .withColumn("_enative", num_expr(ext_df, c_amount))
              .withColumn("_eusd_own", num_expr(ext_df, c_usd)))
        if rates_lk is not None:
            rjoin = rates_lk.select(F.col("_rday").alias("_x_rday"),
                                    F.col("_rccy").alias("_x_rccy"),
                                    F.col("_rate").alias("_x_rate"))
            ex = ex.join(rjoin,
                         (ex["_eday"] == rjoin["_x_rday"]) & (ex["_eccy"] == rjoin["_x_rccy"]),
                         "left")
            erate = F.coalesce(F.when(F.col("_eccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)), F.col("_x_rate"))
        else:
            erate = F.when(F.col("_eccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))
        ex = ex.withColumn("_erate", erate)
        ex = ex.withColumn("_eusd", F.coalesce(F.col("_eusd_own"), F.col("_enative") * F.col("_erate")))
        ext_agg = (ex.filter(F.col("_eday").isNotNull())
                     .groupBy("_eday", "_eccy")
                     .agg(F.round(F.sum("_enative"), 2).alias("external_native_total"),
                          F.round(F.sum("_eusd"), 2).alias("external_usd_total")))
        (ext_agg.select(F.col("_eday").alias("settlement_date"),
                        F.col("_eccy").alias("currency"),
                        F.col("external_native_total"),
                        F.col("external_usd_total"))
                .createOrReplaceTempView("external_settlements"))

    # ---- line-by-line reconciliation (per day per currency) ----
    if ext_agg is not None:
        recon = (breakdown.join(
                    ext_agg,
                    (breakdown["settlement_date"] == ext_agg["_eday"]) &
                    (breakdown["currency"] == ext_agg["_eccy"]),
                    "full_outer")
                 .select(
                    F.coalesce(breakdown["settlement_date"], ext_agg["_eday"]).alias("settlement_date"),
                    F.coalesce(breakdown["currency"], ext_agg["_eccy"]).alias("currency"),
                    F.coalesce(breakdown["usd_total"], F.lit(0.0)).alias("internal_usd_total"),
                    F.coalesce(ext_agg["external_usd_total"], F.lit(0.0)).alias("external_usd_total")))
        recon = recon.withColumn("diff_usd",
                                 F.round(F.col("internal_usd_total") - F.col("external_usd_total"), 2))
        recon = recon.withColumn("reconciled", F.abs(F.col("diff_usd")) < F.lit(0.01))
    else:
        recon = (breakdown.select("settlement_date", "currency",
                                  F.col("usd_total").alias("internal_usd_total"))
                 .withColumn("external_usd_total", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
                 .withColumn("diff_usd", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
                 .withColumn("reconciled", F.lit(None).cast("boolean")))
    recon.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_reconciliation")

    # ---- profiling of results ----
    print("=== settlement_daily ===", file=sys.stderr)
    daily.orderBy("settlement_date").show(50, truncate=False)
    print("=== settlement_reconciliation (mismatches first) ===", file=sys.stderr)
    recon.orderBy(F.col("reconciled").asc_nulls_first(), "settlement_date", "currency").show(50, truncate=False)

    # ---- materialize GOLD ----
    final = daily.select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
                         F.col("usd_total").cast("double"))
    if out_path:
        final.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        final.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        final.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
p14_fx_settlement — imperative PySpark pipeline.

Ticket: daily settlement totals in USD (per UTC calendar day) + per-currency
breakdown + line-by-line reconciliation against an external settlements feed.
Reprocessing must be deterministic (idempotent dedupe, deterministic as-of FX).
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Column resolution helpers (the upstream feed is messy / unknown-shaped)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
def pick(df, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


TYPE_C = ["type", "record_type", "event_type", "kind", "source", "feed",
          "stream", "channel"]
ID_C = ["id", "event_id", "payment_id", "txn_id", "transaction_id",
        "settlement_id", "uuid", "ref", "reference"]
AMT_C = ["amount", "value", "settled_amount", "settlement_amount",
         "amount_native", "native_amount", "amt", "gross_amount"]
CCY_C = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "cur"]
TS_C = ["settlement_time", "settled_at", "event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp",
        "ts", "datetime", "time", "settlement_date", "date", "value_date",
        "created_at"]
RATE_C = ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd",
          "conversion_rate"]
RATE_DATE_C = ["rate_date", "effective_date", "as_of_date", "fx_date",
               "quote_date", "date"]


def to_date_utc(col):
    # Parse whatever timestamp/date representation into a UTC calendar day.
    return F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(col.cast("string")))


def clean_num(col):
    # Strip currency symbols / thousands separators, keep sign + decimal.
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(col.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE\.\-\+]", "")
    return F.when(cleaned == "", None).otherwise(cleaned).cast("double")


def norm_ccy(col):
    return F.upper(F.trim(col.cast("string")))


def main():
    default_input = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/"
                     "safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/"
                     "gen_payments_seed3141.ndjson")
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p14_fx_settlement")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)

    # ---- profiling ----------------------------------------------------------
    print("=== PROFILE: schema ===")
    raw.printSchema()
    print("=== PROFILE: columns ===", raw.columns)
    total = raw.count()
    print("=== PROFILE: row count ===", total)

    type_col = pick(raw, TYPE_C)
    id_col = pick(raw, ID_C)
    amt_col = pick(raw, AMT_C)
    ccy_col = pick(raw, CCY_C)
    ts_col = pick(raw, TS_C)
    rate_col = pick(raw, RATE_C)
    rate_date_col = pick(raw, RATE_DATE_C)
    print("=== PROFILE: resolved cols ===",
          dict(type=type_col, id=id_col, amount=amt_col, currency=ccy_col,
               ts=ts_col, rate=rate_col, rate_date=rate_date_col))
    if type_col:
        print("=== PROFILE: distinct type values ===")
        raw.groupBy(type_col).count().show(50, False)
    print("=== PROFILE: sample rows ===")
    raw.show(10, False)

    # ---- classify records ---------------------------------------------------
    df = raw
    if type_col:
        tl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(type_col).cast("string")))
        is_rate = tl.rlike("fx|rate|quote|forex")
        is_external = tl.rlike("extern|bank|recon|feed|expected")
    else:
        is_rate = F.lit(False)
        is_external = F.lit(False)

    # Structural fallbacks when no explicit type discriminator exists.
    if rate_col is not None:
        rate_present = F.col(rate_col).isNotNull()
        amt_present = (F.col(amt_col).isNotNull() if amt_col else F.lit(False))
        # a pure fx-rate row: has a rate but no settlement amount
        is_rate = is_rate | (rate_present & (~amt_present))

    df = df.withColumn("_is_rate", is_rate).withColumn("_is_external", is_external)

    rate_rows = df.filter(F.col("_is_rate") & (~F.col("_is_external")))
    external_rows = df.filter(F.col("_is_external") & (~F.col("_is_rate")))
    payment_rows = df.filter((~F.col("_is_rate")) & (~F.col("_is_external")))

    print("=== PROFILE: partition counts ===",
          dict(rates=rate_rows.count(),
               external=external_rows.count(),
               payments=payment_rows.count()))

    # ---- FX rate table (deterministic, effective-day, forward filled) -------
    # Build rate lookup: (currency, effective_date, rate). USD is always 1.
    if rate_col is not None and rate_rows.count() > 0:
        rd_col = rate_date_col or ts_col
        rates = (rate_rows
                 .select(norm_ccy(F.col(ccy_col)).alias("currency"),
                         to_date_utc(F.col(rd_col)).alias("rate_date"),
                         clean_num(F.col(rate_col)).alias("rate"))
                 .filter(F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                         & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull()
                         & F.col("rate").isNotNull()))
        # If duplicate rate for same (ccy, day): take the last deterministically.
        wr = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_date").orderBy(F.col("rate").desc())
        rates = (rates.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wr))
                      .filter("_rn = 1").drop("_rn"))
    else:
        # No standalone rate feed: maybe payments carry their own rate.
        rates = spark.createDataFrame([], "currency string, rate_date date, rate double")

    rates = rates.unionByName(
        spark.createDataFrame([("USD",)], "currency string")
             .withColumn("rate_date", F.lit(None).cast("date"))
             .withColumn("rate", F.lit(1.0)),
        allowMissingColumns=True,
    )
    rates.cache()

    # ---- normalize payments -------------------------------------------------
    pay = (payment_rows
           .withColumn("currency", norm_ccy(F.col(ccy_col)) if ccy_col else F.lit("USD"))
