    # ---- materialize GOLD ------------------------------------------------
    if out_path:
        (settlement_daily.coalesce(1)
         .write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path))
        print("Wrote GOLD parquet ->", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        (settlement_daily.write.mode("overwrite")
         .format("parquet").saveAsTable(out_table))
        print("Wrote GOLD table ->", out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import DoubleType

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed16180.ndjson"
FALLBACK_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/p14_fx_settlement__A__seed16180/settlement_daily.parquet"


def find_col(cols, candidates):
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for c in cols:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def parse_ts(colname):
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    iso = F.to_timestamp(s)
    num = s.cast("double")
    return (
        F.when(iso.isNotNull(), iso)
        .when(num > F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_millis(num.cast("long")))
        .when(num > F.lit(1e9), F.timestamp_seconds(num.cast("long")))
        .otherwise(iso)
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p14_fx_settlement")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_OUTPUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(in_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    # ---------- PROFILING ----------
    sys.stderr.write("=== SCHEMA ===\n")
    for f in raw.schema.fields:
        sys.stderr.write(f"  {f.name}: {f.dataType.simpleString()}\n")
    sys.stderr.write(f"row_count={raw.count()}\n")

    id_col = find_col(cols, ["event_id", "payment_id", "settlement_id", "txn_id",
                             "transaction_id", "id"])
    ts_col = find_col(cols, ["settled_at", "settlement_time", "event_time", "event_ts",
                             "timestamp", "ts", "settlement_date", "date", "time"])
    amt_col = find_col(cols, ["settled_amount", "settlement_amount", "native_amount",
                              "amount_native", "amount", "value", "amt"])
    ccy_col = find_col(cols, ["currency", "currency_code", "ccy", "curr"])
    rate_col = find_col(cols, ["rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "rate"])
    type_col = find_col(cols, ["record_type", "event_type", "type", "kind", "feed",
                               "source", "record"])
    usd_col = find_col(cols, ["usd_amount", "amount_usd", "settled_usd", "usd_total", "usd"])

    sys.stderr.write(
        f"picked id={id_col} ts={ts_col} amt={amt_col} ccy={ccy_col} "
        f"rate={rate_col} type={type_col} usd={usd_col}\n"
    )
    if type_col:
        sys.stderr.write("=== TYPE VALUES ===\n")
        for r in raw.groupBy(type_col).count().collect():
            sys.stderr.write(f"  {r[type_col]!r}: {r['count']}\n")

    df = raw.withColumn("_ts", parse_ts(ts_col)) if ts_col else raw.withColumn("_ts", F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    df = df.withColumn("_day", F.to_date(F.col("_ts")))
    if ccy_col:
        df = df.withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(ccy_col).cast("string"))))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_ccy", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    df = df.withColumn("_amt", F.col(amt_col).cast(DoubleType())) if amt_col else df.withColumn("_amt", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
    df = df.withColumn("_rate", F.col(rate_col).cast(DoubleType())) if rate_col else df.withColumn("_rate", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
    df = df.withColumn("_usd", F.col(usd_col).cast(DoubleType())) if usd_col else df.withColumn("_usd", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # ---------- CLASSIFY STREAMS ----------
    if type_col:
        tv = F.lower(F.col(type_col).cast("string"))
        is_fx = tv.rlike("fx|rate|exchange|quote")
        is_ext = tv.rlike("ext|bank|recon|statement")
        is_internal = ~(is_fx | is_ext)
    else:
        is_fx = F.col("_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("_amt").isNull()
        is_ext = F.lit(False)
        is_internal = ~is_fx

    # ---------- FX RATES (effective-that-day, forward filled) ----------
    rates = (
        df.filter(is_fx & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull() & F.col("_rate").isNotNull())
        .select(F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"),
                F.col("_day").alias("rate_date"),
                F.col("_rate").alias("rate"))
        .dropna(subset=["currency", "rate_date", "rate"])
        .dropDuplicates(["currency", "rate_date"])
    )

    # ---------- INTERNAL SETTLEMENTS ----------
    internal = df.filter(is_internal & F.col("_day").isNotNull() &
                         F.col("_ccy").isNotNull() & F.col("_amt").isNotNull())
    if id_col:
        internal = internal.dropDuplicates([id_col])

    internal_ccy = (
        internal.groupBy(F.col("_day").alias("settlement_date"),
                         F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"))
        .agg(F.sum("_amt").alias("native_total"))
    )

    # attach effective rate: latest rate_date <= settlement_date
    joined = internal_ccy.join(
        rates,
        (internal_ccy.currency == rates.currency) &
        (rates.rate_date <= internal_ccy.settlement_date),
        "left",
    ).drop(rates.currency)
    w = Window.partitionBy("settlement_date", "currency").orderBy(F.col("rate_date").desc())
    picked = (
        joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn", "rate_date")
    )
    picked = picked.withColumn(
        "eff_rate",
        F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("rate")),
    )
    picked = picked.withColumn(
        "usd_amount",
        F.round(F.col("native_total") * F.col("eff_rate"), 2),
    )

    # ---------- PER-CURRENCY BREAKDOWN ----------
    settlement_by_currency = picked.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency", "native_total", "eff_rate", "usd_amount"
    ).orderBy("settlement_date", "currency")
    settlement_by_currency.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_by_currency")

    # ---------- DAILY TOTALS (CONTRACT) ----------
    settlement_daily = (
        picked.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    settlement_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily")

    # ---------- EXTERNAL FEED + RECONCILIATION ----------
    ext = df.filter(is_ext & F.col("_day").isNotNull() & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull())
    ext_native = (
        ext.groupBy(F.col("_day").alias("settlement_date"),
                    F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"))
        .agg(F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("_amt"), F.lit(0.0))).alias("ext_native_total"),
             F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("_usd"), F.lit(0.0))).alias("ext_usd_reported"))
    )
    # external usd: use reported usd if present, else convert via same eff rate
    ext_join = ext_native.join(
        picked.select("settlement_date", "currency", "eff_rate"),
        ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left",
    )
    ext_join = ext_join.withColumn(
        "external_usd",
        F.round(
            F.when(F.col("ext_usd_reported") != 0.0, F.col("ext_usd_reported"))
            .otherwise(F.col("ext_native_total") *
                       F.coalesce(F.col("eff_rate"),
                                  F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)))),
            2,
        ),
    ).select("settlement_date", "currency", "external_usd")

    internal_usd = picked.select("settlement_date", "currency",
                                 F.col("usd_amount").alias("internal_usd"))

    recon = internal_usd.join(ext_join, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    recon = (
        recon.withColumn("internal_usd", F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0)))
        .withColumn("external_usd", F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0)))
        .withColumn("diff_usd", F.round(F.col("internal_usd") - F.col("external_usd"), 2))
        .withColumn(
            "status",
            F.when(F.abs(F.col("diff_usd")) <= F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
            .when(F.col("internal_usd") == 0.0, F.lit("MISSING_INTERNAL"))
            .when(F.col("external_usd") == 0.0, F.lit("MISSING_EXTERNAL"))
            .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH")),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency")
    )
    recon.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_reconciliation")

    sys.stderr.write("=== settlement_daily ===\n")
    for r in settlement_daily.collect():
        sys.stderr.write(f"  {r['settlement_date']} usd_total={r['usd_total']}\n")
    sys.stderr.write("=== reconciliation status counts ===\n")
    for r in recon.groupBy("status").count().collect():
        sys.stderr.write(f"  {r['status']}: {r['count']}\n")

    # ---------- WRITE GOLD ----------
    final = settlement_daily.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
        F.col("usd_total").cast("double"),
    )
    if os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH") or not out_table:
        final.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    else:
        final.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# pipeline.py
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T, Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed14142.ndjson"


def find_col(columns, candidates):
    low = [c.lower() for c in columns]
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return columns[low.index(cand)]
    for cand in candidates:
        for i, c in enumerate(low):
            if cand in c:
                return columns[i]
    return None


def to_ts(colname):
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    ts_str = F.to_timestamp(c)
    epoch = c.cast("double")
    ts_ep = (F.when(epoch > 1e12, F.from_unixtime(epoch / 1000.0))
              .when(epoch > 1e9, F.from_unixtime(epoch))
              .otherwise(F.lit(None))).cast("timestamp")
    return F.coalesce(ts_str, ts_ep)


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p14_fx_settlement")
             .getOrCreate())
    # Our own session -> pin UTC so calendar-day bucketing is deterministic.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(inp)
    cols = raw.columns
    print("=== PROFILE: input schema ===")
    raw.printSchema()
    print("=== PROFILE: sample rows ===")
    raw.show(15, False)

    # ---- Column discovery -------------------------------------------------
    id_col = find_col(cols, ["event_id", "payment_id", "settlement_id", "txn_id",
                             "transaction_id", "id"])
    amount_col = find_col(cols, ["amount", "settled_amount", "gross_amount",
                                 "value", "amt", "amount_minor", "amount_cents"])
    ccy_col = find_col(cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr",
                              "iso_currency"])
    ts_col_name = find_col(cols, ["settlement_time", "event_time", "event_ts",
                                  "timestamp", "occurred_at", "created_at", "ts",
                                  "time"])
    date_col = find_col(cols, ["settlement_date", "business_date", "value_date",
                               "date"])
    rate_col = find_col(cols, ["fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "usd_rate",
                               "exchange_rate", "rate", "fx"])
    status_col = find_col(cols, ["settlement_status", "status", "state"])
    type_col = find_col(cols, ["record_type", "event_type", "msg_type", "type",
                               "kind", "feed", "source", "stream", "channel"])

    print("DISCOVERED:", dict(id=id_col, amount=amount_col, ccy=ccy_col,
                              ts=ts_col_name, date=date_col, rate=rate_col,
                              status=status_col, type=type_col))

    # ---- Canonical date & amount expressions ------------------------------
    if date_col is not None:
        date_expr = F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.col(date_col).cast("string")),
                               F.to_date(to_ts(date_col)))
    elif ts_col_name is not None:
        date_expr = F.to_date(to_ts(ts_col_name))
    else:
        date_expr = F.lit(None).cast("date")

    if amount_col is not None:
        amt_raw = F.regexp_replace(F.col(amount_col).cast("string"),
                                   r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "").cast("double")
        if any(k in amount_col.lower() for k in ("minor", "cents")):
            amt_expr = amt_raw / 100.0
        else:
            amt_expr = amt_raw
    else:
        amt_expr = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    ccy_expr = (F.upper(F.trim(F.col(ccy_col).cast("string")))
                if ccy_col is not None else F.lit("USD"))
    rate_expr = (F.col(rate_col).cast("double") if rate_col is not None
                 else F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    base = raw
    base = base.withColumn("_date", date_expr)
    base = base.withColumn("_amount", amt_expr)
    base = base.withColumn("_currency", ccy_expr)
    base = base.withColumn("_rate", rate_expr)
    if type_col is not None:
        base = base.withColumn("_type", F.lower(F.trim(F.col(type_col).cast("string"))))
    else:
        base = base.withColumn("_type", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    if id_col is not None:
        base = base.withColumn("_id", F.col(id_col).cast("string"))
    else:
        base = base.withColumn("_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
    if status_col is not None:
        base = base.withColumn("_status", F.lower(F.trim(F.col(status_col).cast("string"))))
    else:
        base = base.withColumn("_status", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    base = base.cache()

    # ---- Classify record types -------------------------------------------
    EXT_KW = ("extern", "bank", "recon", "counterpart", "settlement_feed", "sfeed")
    FX_KW = ("fx", "rate", "quote", "forex", "exchange")

    def kw(colname, words):
        cond = F.lit(False)
        for w in words:
            cond = cond | F.col(colname).contains(w)
        return cond

    has_type = type_col is not None
    if has_type:
        distinct_types = [r["_type"] for r in
                          base.select("_type").distinct().collect() if r["_type"]]
        print("DISTINCT TYPES:", distinct_types)
        is_ext = kw("_type", EXT_KW)
        is_fx = kw("_type", FX_KW) & (~is_ext)
        is_pay = (~is_ext) & (~is_fx)
    else:
        # No discriminator: rows carrying an amount are payments; rate-only
        # rows (amount null but rate present) are treated as FX quotes.
        is_fx = F.col("_amount").isNull() & F.col("_rate").isNotNull()
        is_ext = F.lit(False)
        is_pay = ~is_fx

    payments = base.filter(is_pay & F.col("_amount").isNotNull())
    fx_rows = base.filter(is_fx & F.col("_rate").isNotNull())
    external = base.filter(is_ext)

    print("COUNTS:", dict(payments=payments.count(),
                          fx=fx_rows.count(),
                          external=external.count()))

    # Keep only settled payments if a status field is present and meaningful.
    if status_col is not None:
        settled_vals = ("settled", "settle", "completed", "complete",
                        "success", "posted", "cleared", "done")
        cond = F.lit(False)
        for v in settled_vals:
            cond = cond | (F.col("_status") == v)
        if payments.filter(cond).limit(1).count() > 0:
            payments = payments.filter(cond)
            print("Filtered payments to settled statuses.")

    # ---- Idempotency: dedup on stable id ----------------------------------
    payments = payments.dropDuplicates(["_id"])

    # ---- Resolve FX rate effective that day -------------------------------
    # Gather rate observations (currency, date, rate) from FX feed and any
    # rate carried inline on payments; aggregate deterministically.
    rate_sources = []
    if fx_rows.limit(1).count() > 0:
        rate_sources.append(fx_rows.select(
            F.col("_currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("_date").alias("date"),
            F.col("_rate").alias("rate")).filter(F.col("rate").isNotNull()))
    if rate_col is not None:
        rate_sources.append(payments.select(
            F.col("_currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("_date").alias("date"),
            F.col("_rate").alias("rate")).filter(F.col("rate").isNotNull()))

    if rate_sources:
        all_rates = rate_sources[0]
        for r in rate_sources[1:]:
            all_rates = all_rates.unionByName(r)
        rates_agg = (all_rates.filter(F.col("date").isNotNull())
                     .groupBy("currency", "date")
                     .agg(F.max("rate").alias("rate")))
    else:
        rates_agg = spark.createDataFrame([], T.StructType([
            T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
            T.StructField("date", T.DateType()),
            T.StructField("rate", T.DoubleType())]))

    # Build full (currency x date) grid from payments and fill missing rates
    # forward/backward so currencies without a same-day quote are not dropped.
    currs = payments.select(F.col("_currency").alias("currency")).distinct()
    dates = payments.select(F.col("_date").alias("date")).distinct().filter(
        F.col("date").isNotNull())
    grid = currs.crossJoin(dates)
    grid = grid.join(rates_agg, ["currency", "date"], "left")

    w_back = (Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("date")
              .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow))
    w_fwd = (Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("date")
             .rowsBetween(Window.currentRow, Window.unboundedFollowing))
    rate_grid = (grid
                 .withColumn("rate_ffill", F.last("rate", True).over(w_back))
                 .withColumn("rate_bfill", F.first("rate", True).over(w_fwd))
                 .withColumn("rate_eff", F.coalesce("rate_ffill", "rate_bfill"))
                 .withColumn("rate_eff",
                             F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))
                              .otherwise(F.col("rate_eff")))
                 .select("currency", "date", "rate_eff"))

    # ---- Convert to USD ---------------------------------------------------
    pay = (payments
           .select(F.col("_date").alias("settlement_date"),
                   F.col("_currency").alias("currency"),
                   F.col("_amount").alias("native_amount"))
           .filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()))
    pay = pay.join(rate_grid,
                   (pay.currency == rate_grid.currency) &
                   (pay.settlement_date == rate_grid.date), "left") \
             .drop(rate_grid.currency).drop(rate_grid.date)
    pay = pay.withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("native_amount") * F.col("rate_eff"))

    # ---- Per-currency breakdown (temp view) -------------------------------
    by_currency = (pay.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                   .agg(F.round(F.sum("native_amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
                        F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
                        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("txn_count"))
                   .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency"))
    by_currency.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_by_currency")
    by_currency.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily_by_currency")

    # ---- Daily USD totals (GOLD contract) ---------------------------------
    settlement_daily = (pay.groupBy("settlement_date")
                        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
                        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                                F.col("usd_total"))
                        .orderBy("settlement_date"))
    settlement_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily")

    # ---- Reconciliation vs external feed ----------------------------------
    ext_amount_expr = F.col("_amount")
    ext = (external
           .select(F.col("_date").alias("settlement_date"),
                   F.col("_currency").alias("currency"),
                   ext_amount_expr.alias("ext_amount"))
           .filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()))
    if ext.limit(1).count() > 0:
        ext_agg = (ext.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                   .agg(F.round(F.sum("ext_amount"), 2).alias("external_total")))
    else:
        ext_agg = spark.createDataFrame([], T.StructType([
            T.StructField("settlement_date", T.DateType()),
            T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
            T.StructField("external_total", T.DoubleType())]))

    ours = by_currency.select("settlement_date", "currency",
                              F.col("native_total").alias("our_native_total"),
                              F.col("usd_total").alias("our_usd_total"))

    recon = (ours.join(ext_agg, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
             .withColumn("native_diff",
                         F.round(F.coalesce(F.col("our_native_total"), F.lit(0.0)) -
                                 F.coalesce(F.col("external_total"), F.lit(0.0)), 2))
             .withColumn("recon_status",
                         F.when(F.col("our_native_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_ours"))
                          .when(F.col("external_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_external"))
                          .when(F.abs(F.col("native_diff")) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("matched"))
                          .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))
             .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency"))
    recon.createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_reconciliation")

    print("=== settlement_daily ===")
    settlement_daily.show(50, False)
    print("=== settlement_by_currency ===")
    by_currency.show(50, False)
    print("=== settlement_reconciliation ===")
    recon.show(50, False)

    # ---- Materialize GOLD -------------------------------------------------
    gold = settlement_daily
    if out_path:
        gold.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("Wrote GOLD parquet to", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print("Wrote GOLD table to", out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson"

# Broad schema: every plausible spelling of every field. from_json yields NULL
# for absent keys instead of raising UNRESOLVED_COLUMN, so we never guess wrong.
_SCHEMA = (
    "event_id string, id string, txn_id string, "
    "type string, record_type string, kind string, event_type string, "
    "event_time string, timestamp string, ts string, time string, "
    "date string, settlement_date string, value_date string, "
    "currency string, ccy string, cur string, "
    "amount string, value string, amt string, "
    "amount_usd string, usd_amount string, usd string, usd_value string, "
    "rate string, fx_rate string, usd_rate string, exchange_rate string, "
    "source string, side string, feed string, origin string, "
    "bank_total string, total string, settled_usd string"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_events")
def raw_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return spark.read.text(PATH).select(
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), _SCHEMA).alias("j")
    ).select("j.*")


@dp.materialized_view(name="events_norm")
def events_norm():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("raw_events")

    rec_type = F.lower(F.coalesce(
        F.col("type"), F.col("record_type"), F.col("kind"), F.col("event_type"),
        F.lit("payment")))
    src = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("source"), F.col("side"),
                             F.col("feed"), F.col("origin"), F.lit("")))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("ts"),
                        F.col("time"), F.col("value_date"), F.col("date"),
                        F.col("settlement_date"))
    # UTC calendar day from the ISO prefix (deterministic, tz-independent).
    sdate = F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.substring(ts_raw, 1, 10)), F.to_date(ts_raw))

    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("cur")))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"), F.col("amt")).cast("double")
    amount_usd = F.coalesce(F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("usd_amount"),
                            F.col("usd"), F.col("usd_value"),
                            F.col("settled_usd")).cast("double")
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"),
                      F.col("exchange_rate")).cast("double")
    bank_total = F.coalesce(F.col("bank_total"), F.col("total"),
                            F.col("settled_usd")).cast("double")
    eid = F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("txn_id"))

    is_bank = (rec_type.rlike("bank|settle|external|recon")
               | src.rlike("bank|external"))

    return df.select(
        eid.alias("event_id"),
        rec_type.alias("rec_type"),
        is_bank.alias("is_bank"),
        sdate.alias("settlement_date"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        amount_usd.alias("amount_usd"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        bank_total.alias("bank_total"),
    ).where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())


# Effective FX rate per (day, currency): max is deterministic and idempotent.
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("events_norm")
    return (e.where(F.col("rate").isNotNull())
             .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
             .agg(F.max("rate").alias("rate_eff")))


# Payment lines converted to USD at the day's effective rate.
@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_usd")
def payments_usd():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("events_norm")
    fx = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_rates")
    pay = e.where((~F.col("is_bank")) &
                  (F.col("amount").isNotNull() | F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull()) &
                  F.col("currency").isNotNull())
    j = pay.join(fx, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")
    usd = F.coalesce(
        F.col("amount_usd"),
        F.col("amount") * F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("rate_eff")),
    )
    return j.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency",
        F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("amount"),
        usd.alias("usd_value"),
    ).where(F.col("usd_value").isNotNull())


# Per-currency daily breakdown.
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_usd")
    return (p.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("currency_total"),
                  F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# Contract table: settlement_daily(settlement_date DATE, usd_total).
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_usd")
    return (p.groupBy("settlement_date")
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# External bank settlements feed, aggregated per (day, currency).
@dp.materialized_view(name="bank_settlements")
def bank_settlements():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("events_norm")
    fx = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_rates")
    b = e.where(F.col("is_bank") & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
    j = b.join(fx, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")
    usd = F.coalesce(
        F.col("bank_total"),
        F.col("amount_usd"),
        F.col("amount") * F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("rate_eff")),
    )
    return (j.select("settlement_date", "currency", usd.alias("bank_usd"))
             .where(F.col("bank_usd").isNotNull())
             .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("bank_usd"), 2).alias("bank_usd")))


# Line-by-line reconciliation: full outer join surfaces missing currencies.
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    ours = (SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_by_currency")
            .select("settlement_date", "currency",
                    F.col("usd_total").alias("internal_usd")))
    bank = SparkSession.active().read.table("bank_settlements")
    j = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    internal = F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
    bankv = F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(internal - bankv, 2)
    return j.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency",
        internal.alias("internal_usd"),
        bankv.alias("bank_usd"),
        diff.alias("diff_usd"),
        (F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01)).alias("matched"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Explicit, permissive schema: every column we reference is guaranteed to exist,
# so no UNRESOLVED_COLUMN at dry-run. Fields absent in the feed arrive as null
# and are coalesced away.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("event_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("settlement_date", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("source", StringType()),
    StructField("feed", StringType()),
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("kind", StringType()),
])

EXTERNAL = ["external", "bank", "external_settlements", "bank_feed", "settlements"]


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)
    eid = F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.col("id"))
    rawts = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"))
    # UTC calendar day: parse whatever date/timestamp is present -> DATE
    sdate = F.to_date(F.coalesce(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("date"), rawts))
    ccy = F.upper(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"))))
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate"), F.lit(1.0))
    usd = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("usd"), amt * rate)
    src = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("source"), F.col("feed"),
                             F.col("type"), F.col("kind"), F.lit("internal")))
    out = (df
           .withColumn("eid", eid)
           .withColumn("settlement_date", sdate)
           .withColumn("currency", ccy)
           .withColumn("amount_orig", amt)
           .withColumn("fx_rate", rate)
           .withColumn("usd_value", usd)
           .withColumn("src", src)
           .withColumn("is_external", src.isin(EXTERNAL)))
    return (out.select("eid", "settlement_date", "currency", "amount_orig",
                       "fx_rate", "usd_value", "src", "is_external")
               .where(F.col("eid").isNotNull() & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
               .dropDuplicates(["eid"]))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_raw")
    internal = src.where(~F.col("is_external"))
    return (internal.groupBy("settlement_date")
            .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_raw")
    internal = src.where(~F.col("is_external"))
    return (internal.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
            .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
                 F.round(F.sum("amount_orig"), 2).alias("currency_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_raw")
    internal = (src.where(~F.col("is_external"))
                .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("internal_usd")))
    external = (src.where(F.col("is_external"))
                .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("external_usd")))
    joined = internal.join(external, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    return (joined
            .withColumn("internal_usd", F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0)))
            .withColumn("external_usd", F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0)))
            .withColumn("difference",
                        F.round(F.col("internal_usd") - F.col("external_usd"), 2))
            .withColumn("matched", F.abs(F.col("difference")) < F.lit(0.01)))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schema -> no inference job (no ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS) and every
# candidate column always resolves (no UNRESOLVED_COLUMN). Absent fields = null.
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("event_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("payment_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("settlement_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("txn_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("record_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("source", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("feed", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("curr", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("value", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("amount_usd", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd_amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("rate_to_usd", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("exchange_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("settlement_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("effective_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("as_of_date", T.StringType()),
])


def _raw(spark):
    return spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)


def _common(df):
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("curr")))
    native = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"))
    usd_direct = F.coalesce(F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("usd"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("exchange_rate"))
    sdate = F.coalesce(
        F.to_date(F.col("settlement_date")),
        F.to_date(F.col("date")),
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("event_time"))),
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("event_ts"))),
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("timestamp"))),
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts"))),
    )
    rdate = F.coalesce(
        F.to_date(F.col("effective_date")),
        F.to_date(F.col("rate_date")),
        F.to_date(F.col("as_of_date")),
        sdate,
    )
    tstr = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("event_type"), F.col("record_type"), F.col("type"),
                              F.col("kind"), F.col("source"), F.col("feed"), F.lit("")))
    idv = F.coalesce(F.col("settlement_id"), F.col("payment_id"), F.col("txn_id"),
                     F.col("event_id"), F.col("id"))
    return (df.withColumn("_ccy", ccy)
              .withColumn("_native", native)
              .withColumn("_usd_direct", usd_direct)
              .withColumn("_rate", rate)
              .withColumn("_sdate", sdate)
              .withColumn("_rdate", rdate)
              .withColumn("_type", tstr)
              .withColumn("_id", idv))


def _prep(spark):
    df = _common(_raw(spark))
    is_ext = F.col("_type").rlike("bank|external|extern|recon")
    is_rate = F.col("_type").rlike("rate|fx|quote") & ~is_ext
    return df.withColumn("_is_ext", is_ext).withColumn("_is_rate", is_rate)


def _fx_obs(spark):
    df = _prep(spark)
    from_rate = (df.where(F.col("_is_rate") & F.col("_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull())
                   .select(F.col("_rdate").alias("rate_date"),
                           F.col("_ccy").alias("rccy"),
                           F.col("_rate").alias("rate_val")))
    from_txn = (df.where(~F.col("_is_ext") & F.col("_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull())
                  .select(F.col("_sdate").alias("rate_date"),
                          F.col("_ccy").alias("rccy"),
                          F.col("_rate").alias("rate_val")))
    obs = from_rate.unionByName(from_txn).where(F.col("rate_date").isNotNull())
    return obs.dropDuplicates(["rate_date", "rccy", "rate_val"])


def _rate_for(keys, fx):
    # keys: distinct (settlement_date, currency) -> effective rate (latest on/before day)
    j = keys.alias("b").join(
        fx.alias("r"),
        (F.col("b.currency") == F.col("r.rccy")) & (F.col("r.rate_date") <= F.col("b.settlement_date")),
        "left")
    w = Window.partitionBy("b.settlement_date", "b.currency") \
              .orderBy(F.col("r.rate_date").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("r.rate_val").desc_nulls_last())
    j = j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    rate = F.when(F.col("b.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate_val"))
    return j.select(F.col("b.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
                    F.col("b.currency").alias("currency"),
                    rate.alias("rate"))


def _internal_cc(spark):
    df = _prep(spark)
    ded = (df.where(~F.col("_is_ext") & ~F.col("_is_rate"))
             .withColumn("_key", F.coalesce(
                 F.col("_id"),
                 F.concat_ws("|", F.col("_ccy"),
                             F.col("_native").cast("string"),
                             F.col("_sdate").cast("string"))))
             .dropDuplicates(["_key"]))
    return (ded.where(F.col("_sdate").isNotNull() & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull())
               .groupBy(F.col("_sdate").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"))
               .agg(F.sum("_native").alias("native_total")))


def _external_cc(spark):
    df = _prep(spark)
    ded = (df.where(F.col("_is_ext"))
             .withColumn("_key", F.coalesce(
                 F.col("_id"),
                 F.concat_ws("|", F.col("_ccy"),
                             F.coalesce(F.col("_usd_direct"), F.col("_native")).cast("string"),
                             F.col("_sdate").cast("string"))))
             .dropDuplicates(["_key"]))
    return (ded.where(F.col("_sdate").isNotNull() & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull())
               .groupBy(F.col("_sdate").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"))
               .agg(F.sum("_native").alias("ext_native"),
                    F.sum("_usd_direct").alias("ext_usd_direct")))


def _by_currency_df(spark):
    cc = _internal_cc(spark)
    fx = _fx_obs(spark)
    rates = _rate_for(cc.select("settlement_date", "currency").distinct(), fx)
    return (cc.join(rates, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")
              .withColumn("usd_total", F.round(F.col("native_total") * F.col("rate"), 2))
              .select("settlement_date", "currency", "native_total", "rate", "usd_total"))


def _external_usd_df(spark):
    ec = _external_cc(spark)
    fx = _fx_obs(spark)
    rates = _rate_for(ec.select("settlement_date", "currency").distinct(), fx)
    return (ec.join(rates, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")
              .withColumn("external_usd",
                          F.round(F.coalesce(F.col("ext_usd_direct"),
                                             F.col("ext_native") * F.col("rate")), 2))
              .select("settlement_date", "currency", "external_usd"))


# ---------------- Declared datasets ----------------

@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    return _by_currency_df(SparkSession.active())


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    bc = _by_currency_df(SparkSession.active())
    return (bc.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    internal = _by_currency_df(spark).select(
        "settlement_date", "currency", F.col("usd_total").alias("internal_usd"))
    external = _external_usd_df(spark)
    joined = internal.join(external, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "outer")
    diff = F.round(F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
                   - F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0)), 2)
    status = (F.when(F.col("internal_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_internal"))
               .when(F.col("external_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_external"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("match"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))
    return (joined.withColumn("difference", diff)
                  .withColumn("status", status)
                  .select("settlement_date", "currency",
                          "internal_usd", "external_usd", "difference", "status"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed8675.ndjson"

# Tolerant schema: superset of plausible field names. Missing fields parse as NULL
# (avoids UNRESOLVED_COLUMN on the genuinely messy, uncontrolled upstream feed).
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("record_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("feed", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("source", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("value", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("amt", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("settled_amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency_code", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("exchange_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd_amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd_value", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("settlement_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("day", T.StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_events")
def raw_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (
        spark.read.text(DATA)
        .where(F.length(F.trim(F.col("value"))) > 0)
        .select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("j"))
        .select("j.*")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="normalized_events")
def normalized_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("raw_events")

    rec_type = F.lower(F.coalesce(
        F.col("record_type"), F.col("type"), F.col("kind"),
        F.col("feed"), F.col("source"), F.lit("payment"),
    ))
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("settled_amount"),
                     F.col("value"), F.col("amt"))
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"),
                             F.col("currency_code"), F.lit("USD")))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate"),
                      F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("exchange_rate"))
    ts_norm = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"),
                         F.col("ts"), F.col("time"), F.col("created_at"))

    # UTC calendar day: ISO-8601 with 'Z' -> date is the leading 10 chars.
    date_norm = F.coalesce(
        F.to_date(F.col("settlement_date")),
        F.to_date(F.col("date")),
        F.to_date(F.col("day")),
        F.to_date(F.substring(ts_norm, 1, 10)),
    )

    # Effective USD rate that day: USD is 1.0; else use provided rate.
    eff_rate = F.when(ccy == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(rate)
    usd_value = F.coalesce(
        F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("usd_value"),
        amt * eff_rate,
    )

    is_external = rec_type.rlike("bank|external|recon")

    return (
        e.select(
            date_norm.alias("settlement_date"),
            ccy.alias("currency"),
            amt.alias("orig_amount"),
            eff_rate.alias("fx_rate"),
            usd_value.alias("usd_value"),
            is_external.alias("is_external"),
        )
        .where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
        .where(F.col("usd_value").isNotNull())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    n = spark.read.table("normalized_events").where(~F.col("is_external"))
    return (
        n.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(
            F.round(F.sum("orig_amount"), 2).alias("currency_total"),
            F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
        )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table("settlement_by_currency")
    return (
        c.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    x = spark.read.table("normalized_events").where(F.col("is_external"))
    return (
        x.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("bank_usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ours = (
        spark.read.table("settlement_by_currency")
        .select("settlement_date", "currency",
                F.col("usd_total").alias("our_usd_total"))
    )
    bank = spark.read.table("external_settlements")

    j = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    our_v = F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    bank_v = F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(our_v - bank_v, 2)

    status = (
        F.when(F.col("our_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_ours"))
        .when(F.col("bank_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_bank"))
        .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("matched"))
        .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch"))
    )

    return j.select(
        "settlement_date",
        "currency",
        F.col("our_usd_total"),
        F.col("bank_usd_total"),
        diff.alias("usd_diff"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed9001.ndjson"
CAT = "spark_catalog.default"

# UTC calendar day requirement: force session tz so to_date renders UTC days.
try:
    SparkSession.active().conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
except Exception:
    pass

# All-string superset schema => no inference job, tolerant to numbers-as-strings.
_cols = [
    "type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type",
    "event_id", "id", "payment_id",
    "event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "created_at",
    "amount", "value", "amount_usd", "usd_amount",
    "currency", "ccy", "currency_code",
    "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate", "rate_to_usd",
    "date", "rate_date", "settlement_date", "as_of_date",
]
SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(c, StringType()) for c in _cols])


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_events")
def raw_events():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)

    t = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("type"), F.col("record_type"),
                           F.col("kind"), F.col("event_type"), F.lit("")))
    rec_type = (
        F.when(t.contains("fx") | t.contains("rate"), F.lit("fx"))
         .when(t.contains("bank") | t.contains("external") | t.contains("recon"),
               F.lit("external"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("payment"))
    )

    event_ts = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
                          F.col("event_ts"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("created_at"))
    explicit_date = F.coalesce(F.col("date"), F.col("settlement_date"),
                               F.col("rate_date"), F.col("as_of_date"))
    d = F.coalesce(F.to_date(explicit_date),
                   F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(event_ts)))

    currency = F.upper(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"),
                                         F.col("currency_code"))))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value")).cast("double")
    usd_amount = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd")).cast("double")
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"),
                      F.col("rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd")).cast("double")
    eid = F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("payment_id"))

    return df.select(
        rec_type.alias("rec_type"),
        d.alias("d"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        usd_amount.alias("usd_amount"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        eid.alias("event_id"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_effective")
def fx_rates_effective():
    # one rate per (currency, date); if dupes, deterministic pick (largest rate).
    fx = (SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.raw_events")
          .where((F.col("rec_type") == "fx") & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
                 & F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("d").isNotNull()))
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "d").orderBy(F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())
    return (fx.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .select(F.col("currency").alias("fx_currency"),
                      F.col("d").alias("fx_date"),
                      F.col("rate").alias("fx_rate")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = (spark.read.table(f"{CAT}.raw_events")
           .where((F.col("rec_type") == "payment") & F.col("d").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("currency").isNotNull()))
    agg = (pay.groupBy("d", "currency")
              .agg(F.sum("amount").alias("native_total"),
                   F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_amount_given"))
              .alias("a"))

    fx = spark.read.table(f"{CAT}.fx_rates_effective").alias("r")

    # as-of join: latest fx rate on or before the settlement day
    cand = agg.join(
        fx,
        (F.col("a.currency") == F.col("r.fx_currency")) &
        (F.col("r.fx_date") <= F.col("a.d")),
        "left",
    )
    w = Window.partitionBy("a.d", "a.currency").orderBy(
        F.col("r.fx_date").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("r.fx_rate").desc_nulls_last())
    resolved = (cand.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                    .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    usd_total = F.round(
        F.coalesce(F.col("native_total") * F.col("r.fx_rate"),
                   F.col("usd_amount_given")), 2)

    return resolved.select(
        F.col("a.d").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("a.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.round(F.col("native_total"), 2).alias("currency_total"),
        F.col("r.fx_rate").alias("fx_rate"),
        usd_total.alias("usd_total"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    bc = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.settlement_by_currency")
    return (bc.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
              .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                      "usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    ext = (SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.raw_events")
           .where((F.col("rec_type") == "external") & F.col("d").isNotNull()))
    ext_usd = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount"))
    return (ext.groupBy("d", "currency")
               .agg(F.round(F.sum(ext_usd), 2).alias("external_usd_total"))
               .select(F.col("d").alias("settlement_date"),
                       F.col("currency").alias("currency"),
                       "external_usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ours = spark.read.table(f"{CAT}.settlement_by_currency").alias("o")
    ext = spark.read.table(f"{CAT}.external_settlements").alias("e")

    j = ours.join(
        ext,
        (F.col("o.settlement_date") == F.col("e.settlement_date")) &
        (F.col("o.currency") == F.col("e.currency")),
        "fullouter",
    )
    sdate = F.coalesce(F.col("o.settlement_date"), F.col("e.settlement_date"))
    ccy = F.coalesce(F.col("o.currency"), F.col("e.currency"))
    ours_usd = F.coalesce(F.col("o.usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    ext_usd = F.coalesce(F.col("e.external_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(ours_usd - ext_usd, 2)

    return j.select(
        sdate.cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
        ccy.alias("currency"),
        F.round(ours_usd, 2).alias("usd_total_ours"),
        F.round(ext_usd, 2).alias("usd_total_external"),
        diff.alias("difference"),
        (F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01)).alias("matched"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson"

# Explicit schema -> spark.read.json stays lazy (no inference job / no analysis).
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("type",            T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("payment_id",      T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_ts",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount",          T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("currency",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_date",       T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("usd_rate",        T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("settlement_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("usd_total",       T.DoubleType()),
])

# UTC calendar day from an instant, independent of session timezone (no conf mutation).
# unix_micros() is microseconds since epoch UTC; integer-div by micros/day -> days since epoch.
UTC_DAY = "date_from_unix_date(cast(unix_micros(to_timestamp(event_ts)) div 86400000000 as int))"


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_clean")
def payments_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    pay = df.where(F.col("type") == F.lit("payment"))
    return (
        pay.select(
            F.col("payment_id"),
            F.expr(UTC_DAY).alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
            F.upper(F.col("currency")).alias("currency"),
        )
        .where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    fx = df.where(F.col("type") == F.lit("fx_rate"))
    return fx.select(
        F.to_date(F.col("rate_date")).alias("fx_date"),
        F.upper(F.col("currency")).alias("fx_currency"),
        F.col("usd_rate").cast("double").alias("usd_rate"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    ext = df.where(F.col("type") == F.lit("external_settlement"))
    return ext.select(
        F.to_date(F.col("settlement_date")).alias("settlement_date"),
        F.upper(F.col("currency")).alias("currency"),
        F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("ext_usd_total"),
    )


# Per-currency breakdown: convert native amount at the rate effective that UTC day.
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_clean")
    fx = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates")

    j = pay.join(
        fx,
        (pay["currency"] == fx["fx_currency"]) & (pay["settlement_date"] == fx["fx_date"]),
        "left",
    )
    # USD converts 1:1; otherwise use the day's effective rate.
    eff_rate = F.when(pay["currency"] == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(fx["usd_rate"])
    usd_value = pay["amount"] * eff_rate

    return j.groupBy(
        pay["settlement_date"].alias("settlement_date"),
        pay["currency"].alias("currency"),
    ).agg(
        F.round(F.sum(F.coalesce(usd_value, F.lit(0.0))), 2).alias("usd_total"),
        F.round(F.sum(pay["amount"]), 2).alias("native_total"),
        F.sum(F.when(eff_rate.isNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))).alias("missing_rate_rows"),
    )


# Daily settlement totals (the contract table).
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    bc = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_by_currency")
    return bc.groupBy(F.col("settlement_date")).agg(
        F.round(F.sum(F.col("usd_total")), 2).alias("usd_total")
    )


# Line-by-line reconciliation of our per-currency USD vs the bank's independent feed.
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ours = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_by_currency")
    ext = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.external_settlements")

    o = ours.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").alias("o_date"),
        F.col("currency").alias("o_ccy"),
        F.col("usd_total").alias("our_usd_total"),
    )
    j = o.join(
        ext,
        (o["o_date"] == ext["settlement_date"]) & (o["o_ccy"] == ext["currency"]),
        "full_outer",
    )

    settlement_date = F.coalesce(o["o_date"], ext["settlement_date"])
    currency = F.coalesce(o["o_ccy"], ext["currency"])
    our_amt = F.coalesce(o["our_usd_total"], F.lit(0.0))
    ext_amt = F.coalesce(ext["ext_usd_total"], F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(our_amt - ext_amt, 2)

    status = (
        F.when(o["o_date"].isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_IN_OURS"))
        .when(ext["settlement_date"].isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_IN_EXTERNAL"))
        .when(F.abs(diff) <= F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
        .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH"))
    )

    return j.select(
        settlement_date.alias("settlement_date"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        F.round(our_amt, 2).alias("our_usd_total"),
        F.round(ext_amt, 2).alias("external_usd_total"),
        diff.alias("difference"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

def raw_events():
