        .where(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull())
    )

    # -------------------- point-in-time (as-of) join --------------------
    p = payments_n.alias("p")
    r = fx_n.alias("r")

    cond = (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) & (
        F.col("r.rate_ts") <= F.col("p.event_time")   # never use a future rate
    )

    joined = p.join(r, cond, "left")

    # pick the most recent rate at/ before the payment time; deterministic tie-break
    w = Window.partitionBy("p.payment_id").orderBy(
        F.col("r.rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r.rate").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    picked = (
        joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    # For USD payments (no FX feed needed) apply an identity rate stamped at the
    # payment instant, so foreign value is never lost.
    applied_rate = F.when(F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(
        F.col("r.rate")
    )
    applied_rate_ts = F.when(
        F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.col("p.event_time")
    ).otherwise(F.col("r.rate_ts"))

    enriched = picked.select(
        F.col("p.payment_id").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.foreign_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
        F.col("p.event_time").alias("event_time"),
        applied_rate.alias("applied_rate"),
        applied_rate_ts.alias("rate_ts"),  # as-applied rate timestamp (audit)
    ).withColumn(
        "usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("applied_rate")
    ).withColumn(
        "settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_time"))
    )

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_payments")

    # -------------------- gold: USD per UTC calendar day --------------------
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.where(F.col("usd_amount").isNotNull())
        .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date"))
        .agg(F.sum(F.col("usd_amount")).alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # -------------------- write --------------------
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType


def pick(cols, keywords, exclude=()):
    """Return first column whose lowercased name contains a keyword (in keyword priority)."""
    low = [(c, c.lower()) for c in cols]
    for kw in keywords:
        for orig, cl in low:
            if kw in cl and not any(e in cl for e in exclude):
                return orig
    return None


def flatten(df):
    """Flatten one-level-nested structs (handles Debezium-style CDC with after/before)."""
    while True:
        struct_fields = [f.name for f in df.schema.fields if isinstance(f.dataType, StructType)]
        if not struct_fields:
            break
        exprs = []
        for f in df.schema.fields:
            if f.name in struct_fields:
                for sub in f.dataType.fields:
                    exprs.append(F.col(f.name + "." + sub.name).alias(f.name + "_" + sub.name))
            else:
                exprs.append(F.col(f.name))
        df = df.select(*exprs)
    return df


def parse_ts(df, name):
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(name)
    c = F.col(name)
    if dt and any(t in dt for t in ("int", "long", "double", "float", "decimal")):
        # numeric epoch: decide seconds vs milliseconds by magnitude
        cl = c.cast("long")
        return F.when(cl > F.lit(100000000000), F.timestamp_millis(cl)).otherwise(
            F.timestamp_seconds(cl)
        )
    if dt == "timestamp":
        return c
    # string (ISO-8601 or epoch-as-string)
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss[.SSS][XXX]"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson",
    )
    fx_path = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---- read ----
    pay = flatten(spark.read.json(input_path))
    fx = flatten(spark.read.json(fx_path))

    pcols = pay.columns
    fcols = fx.columns

    # ---- identify payment columns ----
    pay_id = pick(pcols, ["payment_id", "paymentid", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "id"])
    pay_ccy = pick(pcols, ["currency", "ccy"])
    pay_amt = pick(pcols, ["amount", "foreign", "value", "amt"], exclude=("currency", "ccy", "usd"))
    pay_ts = pick(
        pcols,
        ["event_time", "event_ts", "occur", "paid", "payment_time", "payment_ts",
         "created", "timestamp", "_ts", "ts", "time", "stamp", "date"],
    )

    # ---- identify fx columns ----
    fx_ccy = pick(fcols, ["currency", "ccy"])
    fx_rate = pick(fcols, ["rate", "fx", "price"], exclude=("ts", "time", "date", "stamp", "currency", "ccy"))
    fx_ts = pick(
        fcols,
        ["effective", "valid_from", "valid", "rate_ts", "rate_time", "as_of",
         "updated", "commit", "timestamp", "_ts", "ts", "time", "stamp", "date"],
        exclude=("op",),
    )
    fx_op = pick(fcols, ["op", "operation", "action", "cdc"], exclude=("stamp", "time"))

    # ---- normalize payments to distinct names ----
    if pay_id is None:
        pay = pay.withColumn("__pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        pay_id = "__pid"

    pay2 = pay.select(
        F.col(pay_id).alias("payment_id"),
        F.col(pay_ccy).alias("p_currency"),
        F.col(pay_amt).cast("double").alias("foreign_amount"),
        parse_ts(pay, pay_ts).alias("payment_ts"),
    )

    # ---- normalize fx rates to distinct names; drop CDC deletes ----
    if fx_op is not None:
        fx = fx.filter(
            ~F.lower(F.col(fx_op).cast("string")).isin("d", "delete", "del", "r_delete")
        )

    fx2 = fx.select(
        F.col(fx_ccy).alias("r_currency"),
        F.col(fx_rate).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        parse_ts(fx, fx_ts).alias("rate_ts"),
    ).filter(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull())

    # ---- as-of join: latest rate with rate_ts <= payment_ts, same currency ----
    cond = (F.col("p_currency") == F.col("r_currency")) & (F.col("rate_ts") <= F.col("payment_ts"))
    joined = pay2.join(fx2, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("payment_id").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc(), F.col("rate").desc())
    enriched = (
        joined.withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1)
        .drop("__rn", "r_currency")
        .select(
            F.col("payment_id"),
            F.col("p_currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("foreign_amount"),
            F.col("payment_ts"),
            F.col("rate").alias("applied_rate"),
            F.col("rate_ts").alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),
            (F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
            F.to_date(F.col("payment_ts")).alias("settlement_date"),
        )
    )

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_payments")

    # ---- gold: USD per UTC calendar day ----
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---- write ----
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output destination configured")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# helpers
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
def find_col(cols, candidates):
    """Case-insensitive exact-then-substring column resolver."""
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in low:
            return low[cand.lower()]
    for c in cols:
        cl = c.lower()
        for cand in candidates:
            if cand.lower() in cl:
                return c
    return None


def normalize_ts(df, colname):
    """Return a Column that is a proper timestamp regardless of epoch/string encoding."""
    dt = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    if dt.startswith(("int", "bigint", "long", "double", "float", "decimal", "short")):
        c = F.col(colname).cast("double")
        # infer epoch unit by magnitude: micros >=1e15, millis >=1e12, else seconds
        secs = (
            F.when(c >= 1e15, c / 1e6)
            .when(c >= 1e12, c / 1e3)
            .otherwise(c)
        )
        return secs.cast("timestamp")
    # string encodings (ISO8601 etc.)
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname)),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSX"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssX"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ paths
    default_payments = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed3141.ndjson"
    )
    fx_path = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed3141.ndjson"
    )
    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_payments)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ read
    payments_raw = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== payments schema ===")
    payments_raw.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===")
    fx_raw.printSchema()

    # --------------------------------------------------- flatten CDC envelope
    fx = fx_raw
    fx_cols_low = [c.lower() for c in fx_raw.columns]
    after_col = find_col(fx_raw.columns, ["after"])
    op_col = find_col(fx_raw.columns, ["op", "operation", "__op", "change_type"])
    if after_col is not None:
        after_dt = dict(fx_raw.dtypes)[after_col]
        if after_dt.startswith("struct"):
            sel = [F.col(after_col + ".*")]
            if op_col:
                sel.append(F.col(op_col).alias("__op"))
            # keep top-level cdc timestamp candidates too (renamed)
            for tcand in ["ts_ms", "ts", "commit_ts", "source_ts"]:
                tc = find_col(fx_raw.columns, [tcand])
                if tc and tc != after_col and tc != op_col:
                    sel.append(F.col(tc).alias("__cdc_" + tc.lower()))
            fx = fx_raw.select(*sel)
            if "__op" in fx.columns:
                fx = fx.filter(
                    F.col("__op").isNull()
                    | (~F.upper(F.col("__op").cast("string")).isin("D", "DELETE"))
                )
            print("=== fx flattened (from CDC 'after') schema ===")
            fx.printSchema()

    # ------------------------------------------------- resolve payment columns
    p_cols = payments_raw.columns
    p_cur = find_col(p_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "cur"])
    p_amt = find_col(
        p_cols,
        ["foreign_amount", "amount_foreign", "amount", "value", "foreign_value",
         "payment_amount", "amt"],
    )
    p_ts = find_col(
        p_cols,
        ["event_time", "event_ts", "payment_time", "payment_ts", "occurred_at",
         "txn_time", "transaction_time", "created_at", "timestamp", "ts", "time"],
    )
    p_settle = find_col(p_cols, ["settlement_date", "settlement_time", "settle_date"])

    print(f"payments -> currency={p_cur} amount={p_amt} ts={p_ts} settle={p_settle}")

    # ------------------------------------------------- resolve fx columns
    f_cols = fx.columns
    f_cur = find_col(f_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "cur"])
    f_rate = find_col(
        f_cols,
        ["rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "conversion_rate"],
    )
    f_ts = find_col(
        f_cols,
        ["effective_time", "effective_ts", "valid_from", "rate_ts", "as_of",
         "event_time", "event_ts", "updated_at", "timestamp", "ts", "time",
         "__cdc_ts_ms", "__cdc_ts"],
    )
    print(f"fx -> currency={f_cur} rate={f_rate} ts={f_ts}")

    if not all([p_cur, p_amt, p_ts, f_cur, f_rate, f_ts]):
        raise RuntimeError(
            f"Could not resolve required columns. "
            f"payments(cur={p_cur},amt={p_amt},ts={p_ts}) "
            f"fx(cur={f_cur},rate={f_rate},ts={f_ts})"
        )

    # ------------------------------------------------- build clean frames
    pay = (
        payments_raw.withColumn("__pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        .select(
            F.col("__pid"),
            F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_cur).cast("string"))).alias("currency"),
            F.col(p_amt).cast("double").alias("foreign_amount"),
            normalize_ts(payments_raw, p_ts).alias("pay_ts"),
            *([F.col(p_settle).alias("__settle_raw")] if p_settle else []),
        )
    )

    rate = (
        fx.select(
            F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_cur).cast("string"))).alias("r_currency"),
            F.col(f_rate).cast("double").alias("fx_rate"),
            normalize_ts(fx, f_ts).alias("rate_ts"),
        )
        .filter(F.col("fx_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull())
    )

    # ------------------------------------------------- AS-OF point-in-time join
    # A rate is eligible only if it was stamped at/before the payment moment.
    cond = (pay["currency"] == rate["r_currency"]) & (rate["rate_ts"] <= pay["pay_ts"])
    joined = pay.join(rate, cond, how="left")

    # pick the LATEST eligible rate per payment (never a future rate)
    w = Window.partitionBy("__pid").orderBy(
        F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("fx_rate").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    picked = (
        joined.withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1)
        .drop("__rn", "r_currency")
    )

    # USD needs no feed rate (rate = 1.0). Keep foreign value intact for others.
    eff_rate = F.when(
        F.col("currency") == "USD", F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"), F.lit(1.0))
    ).otherwise(F.col("fx_rate"))
    eff_rate_ts = F.when(
        (F.col("currency") == "USD") & F.col("rate_ts").isNull(), F.col("pay_ts")
    ).otherwise(F.col("rate_ts"))

    enriched = (
        picked.withColumn("as_applied_rate", eff_rate)
        .withColumn("as_applied_rate_ts", eff_rate_ts)
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("as_applied_rate"))
    )

    # settlement_date = UTC calendar day of the payment moment
    if p_settle:
        settle_col = F.coalesce(
            F.to_date(F.col("__settle_raw")),
            F.to_date(F.col("pay_ts")),
        )
    else:
        settle_col = F.to_date(F.col("pay_ts"))
    enriched = enriched.withColumn("settlement_date", settle_col.cast("date"))

    enriched_view = enriched.select(
        "__pid",
        "currency",
        "foreign_amount",
        "pay_ts",
        "as_applied_rate",
        "as_applied_rate_ts",
        "usd_amount",
        "settlement_date",
    )
    enriched_view.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    print("=== enriched sample ===")
    enriched_view.show(20, truncate=False)

    # ------------------------------------------------- GOLD: usd per UTC day
    usd_daily = (
        enriched_view.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"), F.col("usd_total"))
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    print("=== usd_daily ===")
    usd_daily.show(60, truncate=False)

    # ------------------------------------------------- materialize
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print(f"Wrote gold parquet to {out_path}")
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print(f"Wrote gold table {out_table}")
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output destination (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH / AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE)")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- point-in-time (as-of) stream-stream join of payments to FX rates.

Contract:
  usd_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC calendar day], usd_total)
  each enriched payment also carries the as-applied rate timestamp.

Rules honoured:
  - never use a rate stamped AFTER the payment (rate_ts <= payment_ts)
  - never drop foreign value (payments kept via left join)
  - idempotent: dedup CDC deterministically, deterministic tie-break
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def pick(df, candidates):
    """Return the actual column name matching (case-insensitive) the first hit."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def robust_ts(colname):
    """Parse a timestamp that may be an ISO string, epoch seconds, or epoch millis."""
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    num = c.cast("double")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),  # ISO / SQL string forms
        F.when(num > F.lit(1e11), F.timestamp_seconds(num / 1000.0))  # millis
         .when(num > F.lit(1e8), F.timestamp_seconds(num)),           # seconds
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # ---- input locations ---------------------------------------------------
    default_payments = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed5772.ndjson"
    )
    default_fx = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed5772.ndjson"
    )
    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_payments)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_fx)

    # ---- read --------------------------------------------------------------
    pay_raw = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- resolve payment columns ------------------------------------------
    p_ts = pick(pay_raw, ["event_time", "event_timestamp", "payment_time",
                          "payment_timestamp", "occurred_at", "payment_ts",
                          "ts", "timestamp", "created_at", "time"])
    p_amt = pick(pay_raw, ["amount", "foreign_amount", "amount_foreign",
                           "foreign_value", "value", "payment_amount", "amt"])
    p_ccy = pick(pay_raw, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code",
                           "foreign_currency", "curr", "iso_currency"])
    p_id = pick(pay_raw, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id",
                          "event_id"])

    if p_ts is None or p_amt is None or p_ccy is None:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not resolve payment columns from {pay_raw.columns} "
            f"(ts={p_ts}, amt={p_amt}, ccy={p_ccy})"
        )

    payments = (
        pay_raw
        .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        .withColumn("event_ts", robust_ts(p_ts))
        .withColumn("foreign_amount", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
    )
    if p_id is not None:
        payments = payments.withColumn("payment_id", F.col(p_id).cast("string"))
    else:
        payments = payments.withColumn("payment_id", F.col("_pid").cast("string"))

    payments = payments.select(
        "_pid", "payment_id", "event_ts", "foreign_amount", "currency"
    )

    # ---- resolve fx columns ------------------------------------------------
    f_ts = pick(fx_raw, ["rate_timestamp", "effective_time", "effective_timestamp",
                         "effective_ts", "valid_from", "as_of", "event_time",
                         "ts", "timestamp", "asof_ts"])
    f_rate = pick(fx_raw, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate",
                           "rate_to_usd", "usd_per_unit"])
    f_ccy = pick(fx_raw, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr",
                          "iso_currency", "from_currency"])
    f_op = pick(fx_raw, ["op", "operation", "_change_type", "__op",
                         "change_type", "cdc_op", "_op"])

    if f_ts is None or f_rate is None or f_ccy is None:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not resolve fx columns from {fx_raw.columns} "
            f"(ts={f_ts}, rate={f_rate}, ccy={f_ccy})"
        )

    fx = (
        fx_raw
        .withColumn("rate_ts", robust_ts(f_ts))
        .withColumn("rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
    )

    # Drop CDC delete records if an operation column is present.
    if f_op is not None:
        op = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(f_op).cast("string")))
        fx = fx.filter(~op.isin("d", "delete", "del", "remove"))

    # Keep only usable observations.
    fx = fx.filter(
        F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull()
        & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
    )

    # Deterministic dedup: one rate per (currency, rate_ts).  Same-timestamp
    # duplicates collapse to a stable value so reprocessing is idempotent.
    fx = fx.groupBy("currency", "rate_ts").agg(F.max("rate").alias("rate"))

    # ---- point-in-time (as-of) join ---------------------------------------
    # For each payment pick the latest rate with rate_ts <= event_ts, same ccy.
    p = payments.alias("p")
    r = fx.alias("r")
    cond = (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) & (
        F.col("r.rate_ts") <= F.col("p.event_ts")
    )
    joined = p.join(r, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("p._pid").orderBy(F.col("r.rate_ts").desc())
    enriched = (
        joined
        .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .select(
            F.col("p._pid").alias("_pid"),
            F.col("p.payment_id").alias("payment_id"),
            F.col("p.event_ts").alias("event_ts"),
            F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("p.foreign_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
            F.col("r.rate").alias("as_applied_rate"),
            F.col("r.rate_ts").alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),  # audit timestamp
        )
        .withColumn(
            "usd_amount",
            F.when(
                F.col("as_applied_rate").isNotNull(),
                F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("as_applied_rate"),
            ),
        )
        .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_ts")))
    )

    # enriched payments carry the as-applied rate timestamp (audit view)
    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    # ---- daily rollup ------------------------------------------------------
    usd_daily = (
        enriched
        .groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---- write GOLD --------------------------------------------------------
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- as-of (point-in-time) join of payments to FX rates.

Ticket: convert every payment to USD using the FX rate that was *in effect*
at the moment the payment occurred (rate_ts <= payment_ts), carry the rate's
timestamp through for audit, never use a rate stamped after the payment, and
report USD summed per UTC calendar day.

Standalone imperative PySpark. Deterministic / idempotent under reprocessing.
"""
import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# schema helpers -- upstream feeds are messy; discover columns robustly
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
def pick(cols_lower_map, candidates):
    """Return actual column name for the first candidate that exists."""
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in cols_lower_map:
            return cols_lower_map[cand]
    return None


def to_timestamp_col(df, colname):
    """Return a timestamp Column parsed from string/ISO or epoch (s or ms)."""
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dtype in ("bigint", "long", "int", "integer", "smallint",
                 "double", "float", "decimal"):
        cd = c.cast("double")
        # epoch seconds vs milliseconds heuristic
        return F.when(cd > F.lit(1e12), (cd / 1000.0).cast("timestamp")) \
                .otherwise(cd.cast("timestamp"))
    # string: try ISO timestamp, then numeric-string epoch
    cd = c.cast("double")
    epoch = F.when(cd.isNotNull() & (cd > F.lit(1e12)),
                   (cd / 1000.0).cast("timestamp")) \
             .when(cd.isNotNull(), cd.cast("timestamp"))
    return F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(c), epoch)


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")     # UTC calendar days
        .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "16")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ inputs
    default_payments = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed8675.ndjson"
    )
    default_rates = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed8675.ndjson"
    )
    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_payments)
    rates_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_rates)

    payments = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    rates = spark.read.json(rates_path)

    p_cols = {c.lower(): c for c in payments.columns}
    r_cols = {c.lower(): c for c in rates.columns}

    # ------------------------------------------------ resolve payment columns
    p_amount = pick(p_cols, ["amount", "amount_foreign", "foreign_amount",
                             "value", "payment_amount", "amt", "gross_amount"])
    p_ccy = pick(p_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr",
                          "iso_currency", "fx_currency"])
    p_ts = pick(p_cols, ["event_time", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "payment_ts",
                         "payment_time", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
                         "paid_at", "transaction_time", "event_timestamp"])
    p_id = pick(p_cols, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id",
                         "event_id"])

    # ------------------------------------------------ resolve rate columns
    r_rate = pick(r_cols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd",
                           "conversion_rate", "exchange_rate", "price"])
    r_ccy = pick(r_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr",
                          "iso_currency", "base_currency", "from_currency"])
    r_ts = pick(r_cols, ["rate_ts", "effective_ts", "effective_time",
                         "event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "valid_from",
                         "as_of", "updated_at", "event_timestamp"])
    r_op = pick(r_cols, ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op",
                         "action", "kind"])
    r_seq = pick(r_cols, ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "_seq", "lsn",
                          "version", "commit_ts", "_commit_version"])

    if not (p_amount and p_ccy and p_ts and r_rate and r_ccy and r_ts):
        raise RuntimeError(
            "Could not resolve required columns. "
            f"payments={payments.columns} rates={rates.columns}"
        )

    # ------------------------------------------------ normalize payments
    pay = (
        payments
        .withColumn("_pay_ts", to_timestamp_col(payments, p_ts))
        .withColumn("_amount", F.col(p_amount).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
    )
    if p_id:
        pay = pay.withColumn("_pay_key", F.col(p_id).cast("string"))
    else:
        pay = pay.withColumn("_pay_key",
                             F.concat_ws("|",
                                         F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string")))
    pay = pay.filter(F.col("_pay_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("_amount").isNotNull())

    # ------------------------------------------------ normalize rates (CDC)
    rt = (
        rates
        .withColumn("_rate_ts", to_timestamp_col(rates, r_ts))
        .withColumn("_rate", F.col(r_rate).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("_rccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(r_ccy).cast("string"))))
    )
    # honor CDC deletes: a delete retires the prior rate at that timestamp
    if r_op:
        op_norm = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(r_op).cast("string")))
        rt = rt.withColumn("_is_delete",
                           op_norm.isin("d", "delete", "deleted", "remove"))
    else:
        rt = rt.withColumn("_is_delete", F.lit(False))

    rt = rt.filter(F.col("_rate_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("_rccy").isNotNull())

    # deterministic tie-break within identical rate_ts
    if r_seq:
        seq_col = F.col(r_seq).cast("double")
    else:
        seq_col = F.lit(0.0)
    rt = rt.withColumn("_seq", seq_col)

    # ------------------------------------------------ AS-OF (point-in-time) join
    # each payment -> latest rate record with _rate_ts <= _pay_ts for same ccy.
    p_a = pay.alias("p")
    r_a = rt.select(
        F.col("_rccy"), F.col("_rate"), F.col("_rate_ts"),
        F.col("_seq"), F.col("_is_delete")
    ).alias("r")

    joined = p_a.join(
        r_a,
        (F.col("p._ccy") == F.col("r._rccy")) &
        (F.col("r._rate_ts") <= F.col("p._pay_ts")),
        how="left",
    )

    # rank candidate rates by recency (never after the payment), deterministic
    w = Window.partitionBy("p._pay_key").orderBy(
        F.col("r._rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r._seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r._rate").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    ranked = joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    # if the in-effect record is a delete, no valid rate applies
    enriched = ranked.withColumn(
        "as_applied_rate",
        F.when(F.col("r._is_delete") | F.col("r._rate").isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("double"))
         .otherwise(F.col("r._rate")),
    ).withColumn(
        "as_applied_rate_ts",
        F.when(F.col("r._is_delete") | F.col("r._rate").isNull(),
               F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
         .otherwise(F.col("r._rate_ts")),
    )

    # enriched payment grain: carry foreign value + as-applied rate + audit ts
    enriched_out = enriched.select(
        F.col("_pay_key").alias("payment_key"),
        F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"),
        F.col("_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
        F.col("_pay_ts").alias("payment_ts"),
        F.col("as_applied_rate"),
        F.col("as_applied_rate_ts"),
        (F.col("_amount") * F.col("as_applied_rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
        F.to_date(F.col("_pay_ts")).alias("settlement_date"),
    )
    enriched_out.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_payments")

    # ------------------------------------------------ GOLD: usd per UTC day
    usd_daily = (
        enriched_out
        .groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ------------------------------------------------ write contract output
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet("usd_daily.parquet")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- as-of (point-in-time) join of payments to FX rates.

Ticket: convert every payment to USD using the rate that was in effect at the
moment the payment occurred (never a rate stamped after the payment), carry the
rate timestamp through for audit, and report USD per UTC calendar day -- without
losing foreign value.

Contract:
  usd_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC], usd_total)
  each enriched payment also carries the as-applied rate timestamp.
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


# ---------- schema / column profiling helpers -------------------------------

def _is_num(dt: str) -> bool:
    return dt.startswith(("int", "bigint", "long", "double", "float",
                          "decimal", "smallint", "tinyint", "short"))


def find_col(dtypes, keywords, numeric=None, exclude=()):
    """dtypes: list of (name, type). Return first column whose lowercased name
    contains one of the keywords (in keyword priority order)."""
    for kw in keywords:
        for name, dt in dtypes:
            nl = name.lower()
            if kw not in nl:
                continue
            if any(e in nl for e in exclude):
                continue
            if numeric is True and not _is_num(dt):
                continue
            if numeric is False and _is_num(dt):
                continue
            return name
    return None


def ts_expr(name, dt):
    """Return a timestamp Column from a field that may be an ISO string or an
    epoch value (seconds or milliseconds)."""
    c = F.col(name)
    if _is_num(dt):
        # >1e11 => milliseconds, else seconds
        return F.when(F.abs(c) > F.lit(100000000000),
                      (c / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")).otherwise(
                      c.cast("timestamp"))
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS"),
    )


# ---------- main ------------------------------------------------------------

def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("stream_stream_asof_fx_join")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    default_pay = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                   ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed9001.ndjson")
    fx_path = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
               ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed9001.ndjson")

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_pay)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    pay = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== payments schema ===")
    pay.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===")
    fx.printSchema()

    pay_dtypes = pay.dtypes
    fx_dtypes = fx.dtypes

    # ---- identify payment columns ----
    pay_ts_col = find_col(pay_dtypes,
                          ["occurred", "event_time", "event_ts", "payment_time",
                           "paid_at", "txn_time", "created", "timestamp",
                           "_ts", "event", "time", "ts", "date"])
    pay_amt_col = find_col(pay_dtypes,
                           ["foreign_amount", "amount", "foreign_value", "foreign",
                            "value", "paid", "amt"],
                           numeric=True)
    pay_ccy_col = find_col(pay_dtypes, ["currency", "ccy", "curr"], numeric=False)

    # ---- identify fx columns ----
    fx_ts_col = find_col(fx_dtypes,
                         ["effective", "valid_from", "as_of", "rate_time",
                          "rate_ts", "quote_time", "timestamp", "_ts", "event",
                          "time", "ts", "date"])
    fx_ccy_col = find_col(fx_dtypes, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "symbol", "pair"],
                          numeric=False)
    fx_rate_col = find_col(fx_dtypes,
                           ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "usd", "price", "value"],
                           numeric=True)

    # optional CDC op column (to drop deletes/tombstones)
    fx_op_col = find_col(fx_dtypes, ["op", "operation", "action", "change_type",
                                     "_change", "cdc"], numeric=False)

    print(f"payments -> ts={pay_ts_col}, amount={pay_amt_col}, ccy={pay_ccy_col}")
    print(f"fx       -> ts={fx_ts_col}, ccy={fx_ccy_col}, rate={fx_rate_col}, op={fx_op_col}")

    if not (pay_ts_col and pay_amt_col and pay_ccy_col
            and fx_ts_col and fx_ccy_col and fx_rate_col):
        raise RuntimeError("Could not resolve required columns from inputs.")

    pay_ts_dt = dict(pay_dtypes)[pay_ts_col]
    fx_ts_dt = dict(fx_dtypes)[fx_ts_col]

    # ---- prepare payments ----
    pay2 = (pay
            .withColumn("__pay_ts", ts_expr(pay_ts_col, pay_ts_dt))
            .withColumn("__pay_amt", F.col(pay_amt_col).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("__pay_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(pay_ccy_col).cast("string"))))
            .withColumn("__pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))

    orig_pay_cols = pay.columns  # preserve original payment fields

    # ---- prepare fx (drop tombstones / null rates so we never apply a delete) ----
    fx2 = (fx
           .withColumn("__rate_ts", ts_expr(fx_ts_col, fx_ts_dt))
           .withColumn("__rate_val", F.col(fx_rate_col).cast("double"))
           .withColumn("__ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(fx_ccy_col).cast("string")))))
    if fx_op_col is not None:
        fx2 = fx2.filter(
            ~F.lower(F.trim(F.col(fx_op_col).cast("string")))
            .isin("delete", "d", "remove", "tombstone"))
    fx2 = (fx2
           .filter(F.col("__rate_val").isNotNull() & F.col("__rate_ts").isNotNull())
           .select("__ccy", "__rate_ts", "__rate_val"))

    # ---- as-of join: latest rate with rate_ts <= payment_ts (strict, no future rates) ----
    cond = ((F.col("p.__pay_ccy") == F.col("r.__ccy"))
            & (F.col("r.__rate_ts") <= F.col("p.__pay_ts")))

    joined = pay2.alias("p").join(fx2.alias("r"), cond, "left")

    # pick the newest eligible rate per payment (tie-break by rate value determinism)
    w = Window.partitionBy(F.col("p.__pid")).orderBy(
        F.col("r.__rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r.__rate_val").desc_nulls_last())

    enriched = (joined
                .withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1))

    select_cols = [F.col("p." + c).alias(c) for c in orig_pay_cols]
    select_cols += [
        F.col("r.__rate_val").alias("applied_rate"),
        F.col("r.__rate_ts").alias("applied_rate_ts"),   # audit: as-applied rate timestamp
        (F.col("p.__pay_amt") * F.col("r.__rate_val")).alias("usd_amount"),
        F.to_date(F.col("p.__pay_ts")).alias("settlement_date"),  # UTC calendar day
    ]
    enriched_final = enriched.select(*select_cols)
    enriched_final.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_payments")

    # Deterministic: reprocessing identical input yields identical result.
    usd_daily = (enriched_final
                 .groupBy("settlement_date")
                 .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                 .orderBy("settlement_date")
                 .select(
                     F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                     F.col("usd_total")))
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---- write GOLD ----
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").format("parquet").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output location provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH/TABLE).")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- point-in-time (as-of) stream-stream join of payments to FX rates.

Each payment is enriched with the FX rate that was *in effect at the moment the
payment occurred* (latest rate timestamp <= payment timestamp, same currency).
We never use a rate stamped after the payment, we never drop foreign value, and
reprocessing the same input is deterministic. Output: usd_daily(settlement_date,
usd_total) plus an enriched view carrying the as-applied rate timestamp.
"""

import os
import sys

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# column discovery helpers (feeds are messy; be defensive about names)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
def _find(cols, cands):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    for c in cols:
        cl = c.lower()
        for cand in cands:
            if cand in cl:
                return c
    return None


def _ts_expr(df, name):
    """Return a timestamp Column for `name`, handling string/epoch/timestamp."""
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes)[name]
    if dtype == "timestamp":
        return F.col(name)
    if dtype in ("string",):
        # cast('timestamp') handles ISO-8601 (with 'T' and 'Z') leniently
        return F.col(name).cast("timestamp")
    # numeric -> epoch seconds or millis
    c = F.col(name).cast("double")
    return F.when(c > F.lit(1e12), (c / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")).otherwise(
        c.cast("timestamp")
    )


CCY = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "curr"]
AMT = ["amount", "amt", "payment_amount", "value", "foreign_amount"]
PTS = ["event_time", "event_ts", "payment_time", "occurred_at", "timestamp",
       "created_at", "ts", "time"]
PID = ["payment_id", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "id"]

RATE = ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_rate", "conversion_rate", "price"]
RTS = ["rate_ts", "effective_ts", "valid_from", "as_of", "event_time", "event_ts",
       "timestamp", "updated_at", "ts", "time"]
OP = ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op", "__op"]


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("stream_stream_asof_fx_join")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson",
    )
    fx_path = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"
    )
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---- read ---------------------------------------------------------------
    payments = spark.read.json(input_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== payments schema ===")
    payments.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===")
    fx.printSchema()

    # ---- resolve payment columns -------------------------------------------
    p_ccy = _find(payments.columns, CCY)
    p_amt = _find(payments.columns, AMT)
    p_ts = _find(payments.columns, PTS)
    p_id = _find(payments.columns, PID)

    if not (p_ccy and p_amt and p_ts):
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not resolve payment columns: ccy={p_ccy} amt={p_amt} ts={p_ts} "
            f"from {payments.columns}"
        )

    pay = (
        payments.withColumn("pay_ts", _ts_expr(payments, p_ts))
        .withColumn("ccy", F.upper(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string")))
        .withColumn("foreign_amount", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
    )
    pay = pay.withColumn(
        "payment_id",
        F.col(p_id).cast("string") if p_id else F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"),
    )
    # stable per-row key for the as-of pick (payment_id may not be unique)
    pay = pay.withColumn("pay_uid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # ---- resolve fx columns -------------------------------------------------
    f_ccy = _find(fx.columns, CCY)
    f_rate = _find(fx.columns, RATE)
    f_ts = _find(fx.columns, RTS)
    f_op = _find(fx.columns, OP)

    if not (f_ccy and f_rate and f_ts):
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not resolve fx columns: ccy={f_ccy} rate={f_rate} ts={f_ts} "
            f"from {fx.columns}"
        )

    rates = (
        fx.withColumn("rate_ts", _ts_expr(fx, f_ts))
        .withColumn("rate_ccy", F.upper(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string")))
        .withColumn("rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
    )
    # drop CDC deletes if an op column exists; keep inserts/updates
    if f_op:
        rates = rates.filter(
            ~F.lower(F.col(f_op).cast("string")).isin("d", "delete", "del")
        )
    rates = rates.filter(F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    rates_sel = rates.select("rate_ccy", "rate", "rate_ts")

    # ---- point-in-time (as-of) join ----------------------------------------
    # keep every payment (left join) so foreign value is never lost; only match
    # rates stamped at or before the payment moment.
    joined = pay.alias("p").join(
        rates_sel.alias("r"),
        (F.col("p.ccy") == F.col("r.rate_ccy"))
        & (F.col("r.rate_ts") <= F.col("p.pay_ts")),
        "left",
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("pay_uid").orderBy(
        F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    asof = (
        joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .drop("rn")
    )

    # USD == USD: rate 1.0 even if the feed carries no explicit USD row
    rate_final = F.when(
        F.col("ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.lit(1.0))
    ).otherwise(F.col("rate"))

    enriched = asof.select(
        "payment_id",
        F.col("ccy").alias("currency"),
        F.col("foreign_amount"),
        "pay_ts",
        rate_final.alias("applied_rate"),
        # as-applied rate timestamp carried through for audit
        F.col("rate_ts").alias("applied_rate_ts"),
    ).withColumn(
        "usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("applied_rate")
    ).withColumn(
        "settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("pay_ts"))
    )

    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    # ---- daily USD total (UTC calendar day) --------------------------------
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    print("=== usd_daily preview ===")
    usd_daily.show(50, truncate=False)

    # ---- write GOLD ---------------------------------------------------------
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("Neither AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH nor AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE is set")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- point-in-time (as-of) FX enrichment of a payment stream.

For every payment, join to the FX rate that was in effect at the instant the
payment occurred (latest rate per currency with rate_ts <= payment_ts), carry
the rate's timestamp through for audit, and report USD totals per UTC day.

Runnable standalone:
  * owns its SparkSession
  * reads primary input from AGENT_INPUT_PATH (fallback to dataset path)
  * writes gold to AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH (parquet) or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE
  * prints 'Run is COMPLETED' on success
"""

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

# ---------------------------------------------------------------- fallbacks
DEFAULT_PAYMENTS = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"
DEFAULT_FX = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_stream_stream_join__A__seed27182/usd_daily.parquet"


def first_col(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def to_ts(df, colname):
    """Parse a column to timestamp, tolerating epoch (s/ms) or ISO strings."""
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dtype in ("bigint", "long", "int", "integer", "double", "float", "decimal"):
        # heuristics: > 1e12 => millis, else seconds
        return F.when(c.cast("double") > F.lit(1.0e12),
                      (c.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")
                      ).otherwise(c.cast("double").cast("timestamp"))
    else:
        return F.coalesce(
            F.to_timestamp(c),
            F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSX"),
            F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssX"),
            F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        )


def flatten_cdc(df):
    """CDC feeds often nest the record under 'after'/'before' or carry an op."""
    cols = df.columns
    if "after" in [c.lower() for c in cols]:
        after = first_col(cols, ["after"])
        # keep any top-level op/ts alongside the flattened payload
        payload = df.select("*", F.col(after + ".*"))
        df = payload
    return df


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_PAYMENTS)
    fx_path = DEFAULT_FX  # additional named input

    payments_raw = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)
    fx_raw = flatten_cdc(fx_raw)

    # ---------------- resolve payment columns
    pcols = payments_raw.columns
    p_ccy = first_col(pcols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "from_currency", "cur"])
    p_amt = first_col(pcols, ["amount", "value", "payment_amount", "amount_foreign",
                              "foreign_amount", "amt"])
    p_time = first_col(pcols, ["event_time", "payment_time", "occurred_at", "timestamp",
                               "ts", "created_at", "paid_at", "event_ts"])
    p_id = first_col(pcols, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id"])

    if p_ccy is None or p_amt is None or p_time is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not resolve payment columns from {pcols}")

    payments = (
        payments_raw
        .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        .withColumn("p_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("p_amt", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("p_ts", to_ts(payments_raw.withColumn("_pid", F.lit(0)), p_time))
    )
    # rebuild p_ts on the correct df (dtypes lookup needs the parent df)
    payments = payments.withColumn("p_ts", to_ts(payments_raw, p_time))

    # ---------------- resolve fx-rate columns
    fcols = fx_raw.columns
    f_ccy = first_col(fcols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "from_currency", "cur"])
    f_rate = first_col(fcols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price",
                               "conversion_rate"])
    f_time = first_col(fcols, ["effective_time", "valid_from", "timestamp", "ts",
                               "event_time", "updated_at", "rate_time", "as_of"])
    f_op = first_col(fcols, ["op", "operation", "__op", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op"])

    if f_ccy is None or f_rate is None or f_time is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not resolve fx columns from {fcols}")

    rates = (
        fx_raw
        .withColumn("r_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("r_rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
    )
    rates = rates.withColumn("r_ts", to_ts(fx_raw, f_time))

    # drop CDC deletes so we don't apply a retracted rate
    if f_op is not None:
        rates = rates.filter(
            ~F.lower(F.col(f_op).cast("string")).isin("d", "delete", "deleted", "remove")
        )

    rates = rates.filter(F.col("r_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("r_ts").isNotNull()) \
                 .select("r_ccy", "r_rate", "r_ts")

    # ---------------- as-of join: latest rate with r_ts <= p_ts per currency
    cond = (F.col("p_ccy") == F.col("r_ccy")) & (F.col("r_ts") <= F.col("p_ts"))
    joined = payments.join(rates, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(F.col("r_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    picked = (
        joined
        .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    enriched = (
        picked
        .withColumn("as_applied_rate_ts", F.col("r_ts"))
        .withColumn("applied_rate", F.col("r_rate"))
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("p_amt") * F.col("r_rate"))
        .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("p_ts")))
    )

    # each enriched payment carries the as-applied rate timestamp (audit view)
    enriched_out_cols = [c for c in payments_raw.columns] + [
        "p_ccy", "p_amt", "p_ts", "applied_rate", "as_applied_rate_ts",
        "usd_amount", "settlement_date",
    ]
    enriched_out_cols = [c for c in enriched_out_cols if c in enriched.columns]
    payments_enriched = enriched.select(*enriched_out_cols)
    payments_enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    # ---------------- gold: USD per UTC calendar day
    usd_daily = (
        enriched
        .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date"))
        .agg(F.sum(F.col("usd_amount")).alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---------------- write gold
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F


# ----------------------------- helpers --------------------------------------
def find_col(cols, candidates):
    """Find the first matching column name (exact, case-insensitive; then substring)."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for c in cols:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def to_ts(df, colname):
    """Parse a timestamp column that may be ISO-8601 string or epoch (sec / millis)."""
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    col = F.col(colname)
    if dtype in ("bigint", "int", "long", "smallint", "tinyint", "double", "float", "decimal"):
        d = col.cast("double")
        # heuristics: >1e12 => millis, else seconds
        return F.when(d > F.lit(1e12), F.to_timestamp(d / F.lit(1000.0))).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(d)
        )
    # string: try ISO first, then numeric epoch fallback
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(col),
        F.when(
            col.cast("double") > F.lit(1e12),
            F.to_timestamp(col.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)),
        ).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(col.cast("double"))),
    )


# ----------------------------- main pipeline ---------------------------------
def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # ---- resolve inputs --------------------------------------------------
    default_payments = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed31415.ndjson"
    )
    default_fx = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed31415.ndjson"
    )
    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_payments)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_fx)

    payments = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== payments schema ===")
    payments.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===")
    fx.printSchema()

    p_cols = payments.columns
    f_cols = fx.columns

    # ---- detect payment columns -----------------------------------------
    p_amount = find_col(
        p_cols,
        ["amount", "amt", "payment_amount", "foreign_amount", "value", "gross_amount"],
    )
    p_ccy = find_col(
        p_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code", "iso_currency"]
    )
    p_ts = find_col(
        p_cols,
        [
            "event_time",
            "event_ts",
            "payment_time",
            "payment_ts",
            "occurred_at",
            "txn_time",
            "transaction_time",
            "created_at",
            "timestamp",
            "ts",
        ],
    )
    p_id = find_col(p_cols, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "event_id"])

    # ---- detect fx columns ----------------------------------------------
    f_rate = find_col(
        f_cols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_rate", "price", "value"]
    )
    f_ccy = find_col(
        f_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code", "base", "from_currency"]
    )
    f_ts = find_col(
        f_cols,
        [
            "rate_ts",
            "effective_time",
            "effective_ts",
            "valid_from",
            "as_of",
            "event_time",
            "updated_at",
            "timestamp",
            "ts",
        ],
    )
    f_op = find_col(f_cols, ["op", "operation", "_op", "cdc_op", "change_type", "__op"])

    print(
        f"payments -> amount={p_amount} ccy={p_ccy} ts={p_ts} id={p_id}\n"
        f"fx       -> rate={f_rate} ccy={f_ccy} ts={f_ts} op={f_op}"
    )
    assert p_amount and p_ccy and p_ts, "could not resolve payment columns"
    assert f_rate and f_ccy and f_ts, "could not resolve fx columns"

    # ---- normalize payments ---------------------------------------------
    pay = payments.withColumn("payment_ts", to_ts(payments, p_ts))
    pay = pay.withColumn("foreign_amount", F.col(p_amount).cast("double"))
    pay = pay.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
    if p_id:
        pay = pay.withColumn("payment_key", F.col(p_id).cast("string"))
    else:
        pay = pay.withColumn("payment_key", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
    pay = pay.select("payment_key", "currency", "foreign_amount", "payment_ts")

    # ---- normalize fx CDC feed ------------------------------------------
    rates = fx.withColumn("rate_ts", to_ts(fx, f_ts))
    rates = rates.withColumn("rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
    rates = rates.withColumn("rate_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
    # drop CDC deletes (a deleted rate row is not an in-effect rate)
    if f_op:
        op_l = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(f_op).cast("string")))
        rates = rates.filter(~op_l.isin("d", "delete", "del", "remove"))
    rates = rates.filter(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull())
    rates = rates.select("rate_ccy", "rate", "rate_ts")

    # ---- as-of join: latest rate with rate_ts <= payment_ts -------------
    cand = pay.join(
        rates,
        (pay.currency == rates.rate_ccy) & (rates.rate_ts <= pay.payment_ts),
        "inner",
    )
    # deterministic tie-break: newest effective ts, then higher rate value
    w = Window.partitionBy("payment_key").orderBy(
        F.col("rate_ts").desc(), F.col("rate").desc()
    )
    best = (
        cand.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .select(
            "payment_key",
            F.col("rate").alias("applied_rate"),
            F.col("rate_ts").alias("applied_rate_ts"),
        )
    )

    # left join back to preserve every payment (never lose foreign value)
    enriched = pay.join(best, "payment_key", "left")

    # USD payments implicitly convert at 1.0 if no explicit rate exists
    enriched = enriched.withColumn(
        "applied_rate",
        F.when(
            F.col("applied_rate").isNull() & (F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD")),
            F.lit(1.0),
        ).otherwise(F.col("applied_rate")),
    ).withColumn(
        "applied_rate_ts",
        F.when(
            F.col("applied_rate_ts").isNull() & (F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD")),
            F.col("payment_ts"),
        ).otherwise(F.col("applied_rate_ts")),
    )

    enriched = enriched.withColumn(
        "usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("applied_rate")
    ).withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("payment_ts")))

    # each enriched payment carries the as-applied rate timestamp
    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    # ---- gold: USD per UTC calendar day ---------------------------------
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    print("=== usd_daily preview ===")
    usd_daily.show(50, truncate=False)

    # ---- write final gold output ----------------------------------------
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    default_out = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_stream_stream_join__A__seed31415/usd_daily.parquet"
    )
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(default_out)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def pick(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc:
                return orig
    return None


def to_ts(df, colname):
    dt = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    if dt == 'timestamp':
        return F.col(colname)
    if dt in ('int', 'bigint', 'long', 'smallint', 'double', 'float', 'decimal'):
        c = F.col(colname).cast('double')
        return F.when(c > 1e12, F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(c / 1000.0))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(c)))
    # string: try ISO / generic
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname)),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss[.SSS][XXX]"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(colname), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("stream_stream_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    default_pay = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed16180.ndjson"
    default_fx = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"
    default_out = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_stream_stream_join__A__seed16180/usd_daily.parquet"

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_pay)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_fx)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    payments = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("PAYMENTS schema:", payments.dtypes, file=sys.stderr)
    print("FX schema:", fx.dtypes, file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- detect payment columns ----
    p_amt = pick(payments.columns, ['amount', 'foreign_amount', 'amount_foreign',
                                     'payment_amount', 'value', 'amt', 'gross_amount'])
    p_ccy = pick(payments.columns, ['currency', 'currency_code', 'ccy', 'iso_currency'])
    p_ts = pick(payments.columns, ['event_time', 'payment_time', 'occurred_at',
                                    'event_ts', 'timestamp', 'payment_ts', 'created_at', 'ts', 'time'])
    p_id = pick(payments.columns, ['payment_id', 'id', 'txn_id', 'transaction_id'])

    # ---- detect fx cdc columns ----
    f_rate = pick(fx.columns, ['rate', 'fx_rate', 'usd_rate', 'conversion_rate',
                               'rate_to_usd', 'price'])
    f_ccy = pick(fx.columns, ['currency', 'currency_code', 'ccy', 'iso_currency', 'base_currency'])
    f_ts = pick(fx.columns, ['effective_time', 'valid_from', 'effective_ts',
                             'rate_ts', 'event_time', 'timestamp', 'as_of', 'ts', 'time'])

    if not all([p_amt, p_ccy, p_ts, f_rate, f_ccy, f_ts]):
        raise RuntimeError(
            f"Could not detect required columns. "
            f"pay(amt={p_amt},ccy={p_ccy},ts={p_ts}) "
            f"fx(rate={f_rate},ccy={f_ccy},ts={f_ts})"
        )

    # ---- normalize payments ----
    pay = payments
    pay = pay.withColumn("pay_ts", to_ts(pay, p_ts))
    pay = pay.withColumn("ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
    pay = pay.withColumn("amt", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
    if p_id:
        pay = pay.withColumn("payment_key", F.col(p_id).cast("string"))
    else:
        pay = pay.withColumn("payment_key", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    pay = pay.withColumn("pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    pay = pay.where(F.col("pay_ts").isNotNull())

    # ---- normalize fx rates (CDC) ----
    rates = fx
    rates = rates.withColumn("rate_ts", to_ts(rates, f_ts))
    rates = rates.withColumn("r_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
    rates = rates.withColumn("rate_val", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
    rates = rates.select("r_ccy", "rate_ts", "rate_val") \
                 .where(F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_val").isNotNull())
    # dedup identical (ccy, rate_ts) keeping one rate value
    rates = rates.dropDuplicates(["r_ccy", "rate_ts"])

    # ---- as-of join: latest rate with rate_ts <= pay_ts (never a future rate) ----
    cond = (pay["ccy"] == rates["r_ccy"]) & (rates["rate_ts"] <= pay["pay_ts"])
    joined = pay.join(rates, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    joined = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1).drop("rn")

    # USD converts 1:1 with its own payment timestamp; otherwise use matched rate
    enriched = joined \
        .withColumn(
            "applied_rate",
            F.when(F.col("rate_val").isNotNull(), F.col("rate_val"))
             .when(F.col("ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
             .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))
        ) \
        .withColumn(
            "rate_ts_applied",
            F.when(F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull(), F.col("rate_ts"))
             .when(F.col("ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.col("pay_ts"))
             .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
        ) \
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amt") * F.col("applied_rate")) \
        .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("pay_ts")))

    enriched_view = enriched.select(
        "payment_key",
        F.col("ccy").alias("currency"),
        F.col("amt").alias("foreign_amount"),
        "pay_ts",
        "applied_rate",
        F.col("rate_ts_applied").alias("rate_timestamp"),
        "usd_amount",
        "settlement_date",
    )
    enriched_view.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    # Report unmatched (audit): payments with no rate available at/ before event
    unmatched = enriched.where(F.col("applied_rate").isNull()).count()
    if unmatched > 0:
        print(f"WARNING: {unmatched} payments had no in-effect rate (excluded from USD total)",
              file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- gold aggregate: USD per UTC calendar day ----
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.where(F.col("usd_amount").isNotNull())
        .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"))
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---- write GOLD output ----
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(default_out)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- point-in-time (as-of) stream-stream join of payments to FX rates.

Contract:
  usd_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC calendar day], usd_total)
  + each enriched payment carries the as-applied rate timestamp.

Rule: join each payment to the FX rate that was IN EFFECT at the moment the
payment occurred (max rate_ts such that rate_ts <= payment_ts), never a rate
stamped after the payment; keep foreign value; deterministic on reprocessing.
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def pick(cols, *keywords):
    low = [(c, c.lower()) for c in cols]
    for kw in keywords:
        for orig, lc in low:
            if kw == lc:
                return orig
    for kw in keywords:
        for orig, lc in low:
            if kw in lc:
                return orig
    return None


def to_ts(col):
    # NDJSON timestamps are usually ISO-8601 strings; fall back to epoch ms/s.
    s = col.cast("string")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        (F.regexp_extract(s, r"^(\d+)$", 1).cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp"),
        F.regexp_extract(s, r"^(\d+)$", 1).cast("double").cast("timestamp"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("stream_stream_join_pit")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    default_in = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed14142.ndjson"
    )
    fx_in = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed14142.ndjson"
    )
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_in)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", fx_in)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---- Read raw feeds -------------------------------------------------
    pay_raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- Identify payment columns --------------------------------------
    pcols = pay_raw.columns
    p_amount = pick(pcols, "amount", "amt", "value", "foreign_amount")
    p_ccy = pick(pcols, "currency", "ccy", "curr")
    p_ts = pick(
        pcols,
        "payment_time", "event_time", "occurred_at", "occurred",
        "paid_at", "event_ts", "payment_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "time",
    )
    p_id = pick(pcols, "payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id")

    if p_amount is None or p_ccy is None or p_ts is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not identify payment columns from {pcols}")

    pay = pay_raw.withColumn("__pk", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    pay = pay.select(
        F.col("__pk"),
        (F.col(p_id).cast("string") if p_id else F.col("__pk").cast("string")).alias("payment_id"),
        F.upper(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string")).alias("currency"),
        F.col(p_amount).cast("double").alias("foreign_amount"),
        to_ts(F.col(p_ts)).alias("payment_ts"),
    ).where(F.col("payment_ts").isNotNull())

    # ---- Identify FX-rate (CDC) columns --------------------------------
    fcols = fx_raw.columns
    f_ccy = pick(fcols, "currency", "ccy", "curr")
    f_rate = pick(fcols, "rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "price", "value")
    f_ts = pick(
        fcols,
        "effective_ts", "effective_time", "effective_at", "valid_from",
        "rate_ts", "event_time", "event_ts", "as_of", "timestamp", "ts", "time",
    )
    f_op = pick(fcols, "op", "operation", "cdc_op", "change_type", "_op")

    if f_ccy is None or f_rate is None or f_ts is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not identify fx columns from {fcols}")

    rates = fx_raw.select(
        F.upper(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string")).alias("currency"),
        F.col(f_rate).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        to_ts(F.col(f_ts)).alias("rate_ts"),
        (F.upper(F.col(f_op).cast("string")) if f_op else F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("op"),
    ).where(F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull())

    # Drop CDC deletes; keep inserts/updates as rate observations.
    rates = rates.where(
        F.col("op").isNull()
        | (~F.col("op").isin("D", "DELETE", "DEL"))
    ).where(F.col("rate").isNotNull()).select("currency", "rate", "rate_ts")

    # ---- Point-in-time (as-of) join ------------------------------------
    # Only rates effective AT OR BEFORE the payment moment are eligible.
    cond = (pay.currency == rates.currency) & (rates.rate_ts <= pay.payment_ts)
    joined = pay.alias("p").join(
        rates.alias("r"),
        cond,
        "left",
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("__pk").orderBy(
        F.col("r.rate_ts").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    ranked = (
        joined.withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("__rn") == 1)
        .drop("__rn")
    )

    # USD identity fallback: a USD payment converts 1:1 if no prior rate row.
    is_usd = F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD")
    applied_rate = F.when(F.col("r.rate").isNotNull(), F.col("r.rate")).otherwise(
        F.when(is_usd, F.lit(1.0))
    )
    applied_rate_ts = F.when(F.col("r.rate").isNotNull(), F.col("r.rate_ts")).otherwise(
        F.when(is_usd, F.col("p.payment_ts"))
    )

    enriched = ranked.select(
        F.col("p.payment_id").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.foreign_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
        F.col("p.payment_ts").alias("payment_ts"),
        applied_rate.alias("applied_rate"),
        applied_rate_ts.alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),
    ).withColumn(
        "usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("applied_rate")
    ).withColumn(
        "settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("payment_ts"))
    )

    # Enriched payments (carries as-applied rate timestamp) as a temp view.
    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")

    # ---- GOLD: usd_daily ------------------------------------------------
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---- Materialize ----------------------------------------------------
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
