        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet("usd_daily.parquet")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PAYMENTS = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"
FX = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

# Explicit schemas enumerate candidate field names. Fields absent in the JSON
# resolve to NULL (no UNRESOLVED_COLUMN); we coalesce to canonical names.
PAY_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("payment_id", StringType()), StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("txn_id", StringType()), StructField("transaction_id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()), StructField("amt", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()), StructField("foreign_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()), StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("curr", StringType()), StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()), StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()), StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("payment_time", StringType()), StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()), StructField("payment_ts", StringType()),
])

FX_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("currency", StringType()), StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("curr", StringType()), StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()), StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()), StructField("exchange_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()), StructField("price", DoubleType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()), StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()), StructField("effective_time", StringType()),
    StructField("effective_at", StringType()), StructField("rate_time", StringType()),
    StructField("updated_at", StringType()), StructField("valid_from", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()), StructField("rate_ts", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_clean")
def payments_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(PAY_SCHEMA).json(PAYMENTS)
    return (
        df.select(
            F.coalesce("payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id").alias("payment_id"),
            F.coalesce("amount", "amt", "value", "foreign_amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
            F.upper(F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code")).alias("currency"),
            F.coalesce("event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "occurred_at",
                       "payment_time", "created_at", "event_ts", "payment_ts").alias("pay_ts_str"),
        )
        .withColumn("pay_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        .withColumn("pay_ts", F.to_timestamp("pay_ts_str"))
        .withColumn("settlement_date",
                    F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.substring("pay_ts_str", 1, 10)),
                               F.to_date("pay_ts")))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_clean")
def fx_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX)
    return df.select(
        F.upper(F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code")).alias("fx_currency"),
        F.coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate",
                   "rate_to_usd", "price").cast("double").alias("rate"),
        F.coalesce("event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "effective_time", "effective_at",
                   "rate_time", "updated_at", "valid_from", "event_ts", "rate_ts").alias("rate_ts_str"),
    ).withColumn("rate_ts", F.to_timestamp("rate_ts_str"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_payments")
def enriched_payments():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_clean")
    f = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_clean")

    # As-of join: only rates in effect AT OR BEFORE the payment moment.
    cond = (F.col("currency") == F.col("fx_currency")) & (F.col("rate_ts") <= F.col("pay_ts"))
    j = p.join(f, cond, "left")

    # Pick the most recent effective rate per payment (never one stamped after).
    w = Window.partitionBy("pay_id").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
                                             F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())
    ranked = j.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    return (
        ranked.select(
            "payment_id", "amount", "currency", "pay_ts", "settlement_date",
            F.col("rate").alias("applied_rate"),
            F.col("rate_ts").alias("rate_ts_applied"),
        )
        # USD==1 fallback so USD payments are never dropped; foreign value kept in `amount`.
        .withColumn("effective_rate",
                    F.coalesce(F.col("applied_rate"),
                               F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))))
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("effective_rate"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("enriched_payments")
    return (
        e.groupBy(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"))
         .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

PAY_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"


def _cols(path):
    try:
        spark = SparkSession.getActiveSession()
        if spark is None:
            return None
        return spark.read.json(path).columns
    except Exception:
        return None


def _pick(cols, candidates, default):
    if cols:
        lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
        for cand in candidates:
            if cand in lc:
                return lc[cand]
    return default


_pcols = _cols(PAY_PATH)
_fcols = _cols(FX_PATH)

PAY_TIME = _pick(_pcols, ["event_time", "occurred_at", "payment_time", "event_ts",
                          "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "time"], "event_time")
PAY_AMT  = _pick(_pcols, ["amount", "value", "payment_amount", "amt"], "amount")
PAY_CCY  = _pick(_pcols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur"], "currency")

FX_TIME  = _pick(_fcols, ["event_time", "rate_time", "valid_from", "effective_time",
                          "as_of", "ts", "timestamp", "time", "updated_at"], "event_time")
FX_RATE  = _pick(_fcols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd"], "rate")
FX_CCY   = _pick(_fcols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur"], "currency")


@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_payments")
def enriched_payments():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    pay = (spark.read.json(PAY_PATH)
           .select(
               F.col(PAY_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
               F.col(PAY_CCY).alias("currency"),
               F.col(PAY_TIME).cast("string").alias("payment_ts"))
           .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))

    fx = (spark.read.json(FX_PATH)
          .select(
              F.col(FX_CCY).alias("fx_currency"),
              F.col(FX_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
              F.col(FX_TIME).cast("string").alias("rate_ts")))

    # As-of join: only rates whose effective instant is at or before the payment
    # instant qualify (never a rate stamped after the payment). Instant comparison
    # via cast to timestamp is timezone-independent for ISO-8601 values.
    cond = (pay["currency"] == fx["fx_currency"]) & \
           (fx["rate_ts"].cast("timestamp") <= pay["payment_ts"].cast("timestamp"))

    j = pay.join(fx, cond, "left")  # left join => no payment (foreign value) is lost

    # Keep the latest qualifying rate per payment.
    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").cast("timestamp").desc_nulls_last())
    ranked = j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    return ranked.select(
        F.col("_pid").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("payment_ts"),
        F.col("rate"),
        F.col("rate_ts").alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),   # audit: rate timestamp carried through
        (F.col("amount") * F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.lit(1.0))).alias("usd_amount"),
        # UTC calendar day taken from the ISO date prefix (no session-timezone mutation)
        F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("payment_ts"), 1, 10)).alias("settlement_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.enriched_payments")
    return (e.groupBy(F.col("settlement_date"))
             .agg(F.sum(F.col("usd_amount")).alias("usd_total"))
             .select(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("usd_total")))

@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")

@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")

    cond = (p["ccy"] == r["rate_ccy"]) & (r["rate_ts"] <= p["pay_ts"])
    j = p.join(r, cond, "left")
    # For each payment keep the LATEST such rate.
    w = Window.partitionBy("_rid").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    ranked = j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return ranked.select(
        F.col("payment_id"),
        F.col("ccy"),
        F.col("foreign_amount"),
        F.col("pay_ts"),
        (F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
        F.col("rate").alias("applied_rate"),
        F.col("rate_ts").alias("applied_rate_ts"),   # rate timestamp carried through for audit
        F.to_date(F.col("pay_ts")).alias("settlement_date"),
    )

def usd_daily():

         .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
         .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                 F.col("usd_total"))
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PAYMENTS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"

# ---- Explicit schemas (avoid inference -> no analysis job at plan build time).
# Superset of plausible field names; missing fields simply read as NULL under
# the permissive JSON reader, and we coalesce to the one actually present.
PAYMENTS_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("payment_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("txn_id", StringType()),
    StructField("transaction_id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amt", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("foreign_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amount_foreign", DoubleType()),
    StructField("payment_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("curr", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("payment_time", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
])

FX_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("curr", StringType()),
    StructField("base_currency", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("price", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("rate_time", StringType()),
    StructField("effective_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("as_of_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("valid_from", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("op", StringType()),
    StructField("__op", StringType()),
    StructField("operation", StringType()),
    StructField("cdc_op", StringType()),
    StructField("action", StringType()),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_clean")
def payments_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(PAYMENTS_SCHEMA).json(PAYMENTS_PATH)
    pid = F.coalesce(F.col("payment_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("txn_id"), F.col("transaction_id"))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("amt"), F.col("value"),
                        F.col("foreign_amount"), F.col("amount_foreign"), F.col("payment_amount"))
    currency = F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code"), F.col("curr"))
    pay_ts_str = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("event_timestamp"),
                            F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("ts"),
                            F.col("payment_time"), F.col("created_at"))
    return (
        df.select(
            pid.alias("payment_id"),
            amount.cast("double").alias("foreign_amount"),
            currency.alias("currency"),
            pay_ts_str.alias("pay_ts_str"),
        )
        .withColumn("pay_ts", F.col("pay_ts_str").cast("timestamp"))
        # UTC calendar day taken directly from the ISO date prefix (UTC-stamped feed)
        .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("pay_ts_str"), 1, 10)))
        .withColumn("pay_row_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_clean")
def fx_rates_clean():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)
    currency = F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code"),
                          F.col("curr"), F.col("base_currency"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"),
                      F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("value"), F.col("price"))
    rate_ts_str = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_ts"), F.col("rate_time"), F.col("effective_ts"),
                             F.col("as_of_ts"), F.col("valid_from"), F.col("ts"),
                             F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"))
    op = F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("__op"), F.col("operation"), F.col("cdc_op"), F.col("action"))
    cleaned = (
        df.select(
            currency.alias("fx_currency"),
            rate.cast("double").alias("fx_rate"),
            rate_ts_str.alias("fx_rate_ts_str"),
            op.alias("fx_op"),
        )
        .withColumn("fx_rate_ts", F.col("fx_rate_ts_str").cast("timestamp"))
    )
    # Drop CDC deletes; keep everything else (incl. rows with no op field).
    return cleaned.where(
        F.col("fx_rate_ts_str").isNotNull()
        & F.col("fx_rate").isNotNull()
        & (F.col("fx_op").isNull() | (~F.lower(F.col("fx_op")).startswith("d")))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")
def payments_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_clean")
    r = spark.read.table("fx_rates_clean")

    # As-of join: only rates in effect AT OR BEFORE the payment instant.
    cond = (p["currency"] == r["fx_currency"]) & (r["fx_rate_ts"] <= p["pay_ts"])
    joined = p.join(r, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("pay_row_id").orderBy(
        F.col("fx_rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("fx_rate_ts_str").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    ranked = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    return ranked.select(
        F.col("payment_id"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("foreign_amount"),
        F.col("pay_ts"),
        F.col("settlement_date"),
        F.col("fx_rate").alias("applied_rate"),
        F.col("fx_rate_ts_str").alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),
        (F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("fx_rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    enriched = SparkSession.active().read.table("payments_enriched")
    return (
        enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), "usd_total")
    )

"""
pipeline.py -- SCD2 bitemporal "as-of" FX valuation.

Rule (from ticket): value each payment with the FX rate VERSION that was
officially in effect on the payment's own date -- i.e.:
  * effective (valid-time) date of the rate <= payment date   (as-of on business time)
  * knowledge (transaction-time) of the rate row <= payment date  (exclude LATER corrections)
Then take, per payment, the most-recent effective rate, tie-broken by most-recent
knowledge time that is still <= payment date.

Output contract: usd_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC], usd_total)
"""

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    # exact
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    # substring
    for cand in candidates:
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc:
                return orig
    return None


def _to_ts(df, colname):
    """Return a timestamp Column from a possibly-messy source column."""
    dt = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dt.startswith("timestamp"):
        return c
    if dt.startswith("date"):
        return c.cast("timestamp")
    if dt in ("int", "bigint", "long", "smallint", "tinyint", "double", "float", "decimal"):
        # epoch seconds vs millis
        return F.when(c > F.lit(100000000000), F.to_timestamp(c / F.lit(1000.0))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(c))
    # string: try common formats
    s = c.cast("string")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("scd2_as_of_join")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    default_payments = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson"
    fx_path = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed42.ndjson"

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_payments)

    payments = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    rates = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- profiling to stderr ----
    print("== payments schema ==", file=sys.stderr)
    payments.printSchema()
    for r in payments.limit(5).collect():
        print("PAY:", r.asDict(), file=sys.stderr)
    print("== fx_rates_cdc schema ==", file=sys.stderr)
    rates.printSchema()
    for r in rates.limit(8).collect():
        print("FX:", r.asDict(), file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- resolve payment columns ----
    p_cols = payments.columns
    p_amount = _pick(p_cols, ["amount", "payment_amount", "amt", "gross_amount",
                              "net_amount", "amount_local", "local_amount", "notional", "value"])
    p_ccy = _pick(p_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr",
                            "from_currency", "local_currency"])
    p_time = _pick(p_cols, ["event_time", "event_timestamp", "event_ts", "payment_time",
                            "payment_date", "payment_ts", "created_at", "occurred_at",
                            "transaction_time", "txn_time", "timestamp", "ts", "date", "time"])
    print(f"resolved payments: amount={p_amount} ccy={p_ccy} time={p_time}", file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- resolve rate columns ----
    r_cols = rates.columns
    r_ccy = _pick(r_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr",
                           "from_currency", "base_currency", "fx_currency"])
    r_rate = _pick(r_cols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "conversion_rate",
                            "exchange_rate", "price", "value"])
    r_eff = _pick(r_cols, ["effective_date", "valid_from", "effective_from", "rate_date",
                           "fx_date", "as_of_date", "business_date", "effective",
                           "start_date", "valid_from_date"])
    r_txn = _pick(r_cols, ["ingested_at", "ingest_ts", "recorded_at", "recorded_ts",
                           "commit_ts", "commit_timestamp", "change_ts", "changed_at",
                           "updated_at", "update_ts", "system_time", "sys_ts", "cdc_ts",
                           "emitted_at", "load_ts", "op_ts", "knowledge_ts", "asof_ts",
                           "version_ts"])
    r_ver = _pick(r_cols, ["version", "revision", "row_version", "_version", "seq_num", "seq"])
    print(f"resolved rates: ccy={r_ccy} rate={r_rate} eff={r_eff} txn={r_txn} ver={r_ver}",
          file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- build normalized payments ----
    p = (payments
         .withColumn("pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
         .withColumn("p_ts", _to_ts(payments, p_time))
         .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("p_ts")))
         .withColumn("p_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
         .withColumn("p_amt", F.col(p_amount).cast("double"))
         .select("pid", "settlement_date", "p_ccy", "p_amt"))

    # ---- build normalized rates ----
    r = rates
    r = r.withColumn("r_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(r_ccy).cast("string"))))
    r = r.withColumn("r_rate", F.col(r_rate).cast("double"))
    r = r.withColumn("eff_date", F.to_date(_to_ts(rates, r_eff)))

    has_txn = r_txn is not None
    if has_txn:
        r = r.withColumn("txn_ts", _to_ts(rates, r_txn))
        r = r.withColumn("txn_date", F.to_date(F.col("txn_ts")))
    else:
        r = r.withColumn("txn_ts", F.col("eff_date").cast("timestamp"))
        r = r.withColumn("txn_date", F.col("eff_date"))
        # No transaction time: drop later corrections by keeping the ORIGINAL
        # (lowest version) row per (currency, effective date).
        if r_ver is not None:
            r = r.withColumn("_v", F.col(r_ver).cast("long"))
            wv = Window.partitionBy("r_ccy", "eff_date").orderBy(F.col("_v").asc_nulls_last())
            r = (r.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wv))
                   .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn", "_v"))

    r = r.select("r_ccy", "r_rate", "eff_date", "txn_ts", "txn_date")

    # ---- bitemporal as-of join ----
    # candidate rate rows: effective on/before payment date AND known on/before payment date
    cond = (
        (p["p_ccy"] == r["r_ccy"])
        & (r["eff_date"] <= p["settlement_date"])
        & (r["txn_date"] <= p["settlement_date"])
    )
    joined = p.join(r, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(
        F.col("eff_date").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("txn_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    picked = (joined
              .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
              .drop("rn"))

    # USD as 1.0 for USD payments if not otherwise supplied
    picked = picked.withColumn(
        "eff_rate",
        F.when(F.col("r_rate").isNotNull(), F.col("r_rate"))
         .when(F.col("p_ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double")),
    )

    valued = picked.withColumn("usd_value", F.col("p_amt") * F.col("eff_rate"))

    usd_daily = (valued
                 .groupBy("settlement_date")
                 .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
                 .filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
                 .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    usd_daily = usd_daily.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    print("== usd_daily preview ==", file=sys.stderr)
    for row in usd_daily.limit(20).collect():
        print("OUT:", row.asDict(), file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- write GOLD ----
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        fallback = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed42/usd_daily.parquet"
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(fallback)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def pick(cols, cands):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand.lower() in low:
            return low[cand.lower()]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("new_scd2_as_of_join").getOrCreate()
    )
    # Force UTC so calendar-day derivation is deterministic and reproducible.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    payments_default = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"
    )
    fx_default = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"
    )

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", payments_default)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", fx_default)

    payments = spark.read.json(in_path)
    rates = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== payments schema ===")
    payments.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===")
    rates.printSchema()

    # ---- detect payment columns ----
    pcols = payments.columns
    p_ccy = pick(pcols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "iso_currency"])
    p_amt = pick(pcols, ["amount", "amount_original", "payment_amount", "original_amount",
                         "gross_amount", "value", "amt"])
    p_date_col = pick(pcols, ["settlement_date", "payment_date", "event_ts", "event_time",
                              "payment_ts", "payment_time", "paid_at", "occurred_at",
                              "created_at", "txn_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "date"])
    if not (p_ccy and p_amt and p_date_col):
        raise ValueError(f"Could not resolve payment columns from {pcols}")

    payments2 = payments.select(
        F.col(p_ccy).alias("currency"),
        F.col(p_amt).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.to_date(F.col(p_date_col)).alias("pdate"),
    ).withColumn("pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # ---- detect fx_rates_cdc columns ----
    rcols = rates.columns
    r_ccy = pick(rcols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "from_currency",
                         "base_currency", "iso_currency"])
    r_rate = pick(rcols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd",
                          "usd_per_unit", "mid", "close", "price", "value"])
    # business/valid date the rate applies TO
    r_biz = pick(rcols, ["rate_date", "as_of_date", "value_date", "quote_date", "fx_date",
                         "business_date", "effective_date", "rate_as_of", "valid_from", "date"])
    # knowledge/transaction time: when this version became known (corrections are later)
    r_know = pick(rcols, ["recorded_at", "ingested_at", "updated_at", "change_ts", "commit_ts",
                          "system_time", "transaction_time", "knowledge_time", "loaded_at",
                          "correction_ts", "revised_at", "version_ts", "cdc_ts", "op_ts",
                          "sys_ts", "created_at", "effective_from"])
    if not (r_ccy and r_rate and r_biz):
        raise ValueError(f"Could not resolve fx rate columns from {rcols}")

    print(f"detected payments: ccy={p_ccy} amt={p_amt} date={p_date_col}")
    print(f"detected rates: ccy={r_ccy} rate={r_rate} biz={r_biz} know={r_know}")

    biz = F.to_date(F.col(r_biz))
    if r_know is not None:
        know_ts = F.col(r_know).cast("timestamp")
        know_date = F.to_date(F.col(r_know))
    else:
        # No explicit knowledge axis; degrade to valid-time only.
        know_ts = biz.cast("timestamp")
        know_date = biz

    rates2 = rates.select(
        F.col(r_ccy).alias("currency"),
        F.col(r_rate).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        biz.alias("eff_date"),
        know_ts.alias("know_ts"),
        know_date.alias("know_date"),
    )

    # ---- bitemporal as-of join ----
    # keep only rate versions that (a) apply to a date on/before the payment date, and
    # (b) were already known (recorded) on/before the payment's own date.
    joined = payments2.join(rates2, on="currency", how="inner").filter(
        (F.col("eff_date") <= F.col("pdate")) & (F.col("know_date") <= F.col("pdate"))
    )

    # For each payment: greatest eff_date (valid as-of), then latest version known by then.
    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(
        F.col("eff_date").desc(), F.col("know_ts").desc(), F.col("rate").desc()
    )
    picked = (
        joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .select("pid", "rate")
    )

    # Re-attach to all payments so unmatched (e.g. USD-denominated) rows survive.
    valued = payments2.join(picked, on="pid", how="left")
    valued = valued.withColumn(
        "rate",
        F.when(
            F.col("rate").isNull() & (F.upper(F.col("currency")) == F.lit("USD")),
            F.lit(1.0),
        ).otherwise(F.col("rate")),
    )
    valued = valued.withColumn("usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("rate"))

    usd_daily = (
        valued.groupBy("pdate")
        .agg(F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("pdate").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output destination provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH/AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE)")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def pick(cols, cands):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


NUM_INT = ('bigint', 'int', 'tinyint', 'smallint', 'long')
NUM_FLT = ('double', 'float', 'decimal')


def to_date_expr(colname, dtype):
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dtype in NUM_INT:
        return F.to_date((F.when(c > F.lit(100000000000), (c / F.lit(1000))).otherwise(c)).cast('timestamp'))
    if any(dtype.startswith(t) for t in NUM_FLT):
        return F.to_date(c.cast('timestamp'))
    return F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(c)), F.to_date(c))


def to_ts_expr(colname, dtype):
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dtype in NUM_INT:
        return (F.when(c > F.lit(100000000000), (c / F.lit(1000))).otherwise(c)).cast('timestamp')
    if any(dtype.startswith(t) for t in NUM_FLT):
        return c.cast('timestamp')
    return F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(c), F.to_timestamp(c, 'yyyy-MM-dd'))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    default_input = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
    fx_path = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    pay = spark.read.json(input_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- profile payments ----
    pdt = dict(pay.dtypes)
    pcols = pay.columns
    p_ccy = pick(pcols, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr', 'iso_currency'])
    p_amt = pick(pcols, ['amount', 'amount_original', 'local_amount', 'original_amount',
                         'value', 'amt', 'payment_amount', 'gross_amount'])
    p_ts = pick(pcols, ['event_time', 'event_ts', 'payment_ts', 'payment_time', 'timestamp',
                        'ts', 'occurred_at', 'created_at', 'settlement_ts', 'txn_time',
                        'transaction_time', 'booked_at', 'event_timestamp'])
    p_date = pick(pcols, ['payment_date', 'settlement_date', 'business_date', 'date', 'value_date'])

    if p_ts is not None:
        pdate = to_date_expr(p_ts, pdt.get(p_ts, 'string'))
    elif p_date is not None:
        pdate = to_date_expr(p_date, pdt.get(p_date, 'string'))
    else:
        raise ValueError("No payment date/timestamp column found: %s" % pcols)

    pay2 = (
        pay
        .withColumn('_pid', F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        .withColumn('_pccy', F.upper(F.col(p_ccy).cast('string')) if p_ccy else F.lit('USD'))
        .withColumn('_amt', F.col(p_amt).cast('double') if p_amt else F.lit(0.0))
        .withColumn('_pdate', pdate)
        .select('_pid', '_pccy', '_amt', '_pdate')
    )

    # ---- profile fx cdc ----
    fdt = dict(fx.dtypes)
    fcols = fx.columns
    f_ccy = pick(fcols, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr', 'iso_currency'])
    f_rate = pick(fcols, ['rate', 'fx_rate', 'usd_rate', 'rate_to_usd', 'usd_per_unit',
                          'conversion_rate', 'price', 'exchange_rate', 'value'])
    f_eff = pick(fcols, ['effective_date', 'rate_date', 'as_of_date', 'value_date',
                        'business_date', 'valid_from', 'effective_from', 'date'])
    f_vto = pick(fcols, ['valid_to', 'valid_until', 'effective_to', 'end_date', 'expiry_date'])
    f_ct = pick(fcols, ['updated_at', 'recorded_at', 'change_ts', 'system_ts', 'ingested_at',
                       'commit_ts', 'op_ts', 'knowledge_ts', 'change_time', 'version_ts',
                       'loaded_at', 'ingest_ts', 'cdc_ts', 'change_timestamp', 'recorded_ts',
                       'created_at', 'ts'])
    f_ver = pick(fcols, ['version', 'ver', 'rev', 'revision', 'version_no', 'seq',
                        'sequence', '_version', 'change_seq'])

    interval_mode = (f_vto is not None) or (f_eff in ('valid_from', 'effective_from'))

    eff_expr = to_date_expr(f_eff, fdt.get(f_eff, 'string')) if f_eff else F.lit(None).cast('date')
    vto_expr = to_date_expr(f_vto, fdt.get(f_vto, 'string')) if f_vto else F.lit(None).cast('date')
    cts_expr = to_ts_expr(f_ct, fdt.get(f_ct, 'string')) if f_ct else F.lit(None).cast('timestamp')
    ver_expr = F.col(f_ver).cast('long') if f_ver else F.lit(None).cast('long')

    fx2 = fx.select(
        (F.upper(F.col(f_ccy).cast('string')) if f_ccy else F.lit('USD')).alias('_fccy'),
        F.col(f_rate).cast('double').alias('_rate') if f_rate else F.lit(None).cast('double').alias('_rate'),
        eff_expr.alias('_eff'),
        vto_expr.alias('_vto'),
        cts_expr.alias('_cts'),
        ver_expr.alias('_ver'),
    )

    # ---- as-of join: business validity match ----
    cond = (pay2['_pccy'] == fx2['_fccy'])
    if f_eff is not None:
        if interval_mode:
            cond = cond & (fx2['_eff'] <= pay2['_pdate']) & (
                fx2['_vto'].isNull() | (pay2['_pdate'] < fx2['_vto'])
            )
        else:
            cond = cond & (fx2['_eff'] == pay2['_pdate'])

    j = pay2.join(F.broadcast(fx2), cond, 'left')

    # "known as of the payment's own date": correction time already in effect on that date.
    if f_ct is not None:
        j = j.withColumn('_known', F.when(F.to_date(F.col('_cts')) <= F.col('_pdate'), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)))
    else:
        # no correction axis: everything matched is considered in effect
        j = j.withColumn('_known', F.when(F.col('_rate').isNotNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)))

    j = j.cache()

    # Among versions in effect on the payment date, take the most recent (latest correction
    # that predates/equals the payment date). Later corrections are excluded.
    w_known = Window.partitionBy('_pid').orderBy(
        F.col('_cts').desc_nulls_last(), F.col('_ver').desc_nulls_last()
    )
    best_known = (
        j.filter(F.col('_known') == 1)
        .withColumn('_rn', F.row_number().over(w_known))
        .filter(F.col('_rn') == 1)
        .drop('_rn')
    )

    # Fallback for payments with no version known-by-date: use the earliest recorded version.
    pids_known = best_known.select('_pid').distinct()
    remaining = j.join(pids_known, '_pid', 'left_anti')
    w_any = Window.partitionBy('_pid').orderBy(
        F.col('_cts').asc_nulls_last(), F.col('_ver').asc_nulls_last()
    )
    best_fallback = (
        remaining
        .withColumn('_rn', F.row_number().over(w_any))
        .filter(F.col('_rn') == 1)
        .drop('_rn')
    )

    best = best_known.unionByName(best_fallback)

    # USD valuation. USD legs default to 1.0 when no explicit rate row exists.
    best = best.withColumn(
        '_rate2',
        F.when(F.col('_rate').isNotNull(), F.col('_rate'))
         .when(F.col('_pccy') == F.lit('USD'), F.lit(1.0))
         .otherwise(F.col('_rate'))
    )
    best = best.withColumn('_usd', F.col('_amt') * F.col('_rate2'))

    result = (
        best.groupBy(F.col('_pdate').alias('settlement_date'))
            .agg(F.sum('_usd').alias('usd_total'))
            .select(
                F.col('settlement_date').cast('date').alias('settlement_date'),
                F.col('usd_total').cast('double').alias('usd_total'),
            )
            .orderBy('settlement_date')
    )

    result.createOrReplaceTempView('usd_daily')

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode('overwrite').parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode('overwrite').saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode('overwrite').parquet(
            "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed2718/usd_daily.parquet"
        )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql import types as T


def pick(cols, candidates, exclude=None):
    exclude = set(exclude or [])
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower and lower[cand] not in exclude:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Contract: settlement_date is a UTC calendar day.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    default_payments = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed3141.ndjson")
    default_rates = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                     ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed3141.ndjson")

    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_payments)
    rates_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_rates)

    payments_raw = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    rates_raw = spark.read.json(rates_path)

    print("PAYMENTS SCHEMA:", payments_raw.schema.simpleString(), file=sys.stderr)
    print("RATES SCHEMA:", rates_raw.schema.simpleString(), file=sys.stderr)

    pcols = payments_raw.columns
    rcols = rates_raw.columns

    # ---- Payment column detection ----
    p_ccy = pick(pcols, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr', 'iso_currency',
                         'currencycode', 'native_currency'])
    p_amt = pick(pcols, ['amount', 'amount_native', 'native_amount', 'value', 'amt',
                         'payment_amount', 'gross_amount', 'amount_orig', 'orig_amount'])
    p_time = pick(pcols, ['event_time', 'event_timestamp', 'payment_time', 'payment_ts',
                          'timestamp', 'ts', 'occurred_at', 'payment_date', 'settlement_date',
                          'date', 'event_date', 'created_at', 'booked_at', 'booking_date'])

    if p_ccy is None or p_amt is None or p_time is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Could not detect payment columns: ccy=%s amt=%s time=%s from %s"
                           % (p_ccy, p_amt, p_time, pcols))

    payments = (
        payments_raw
        .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("amount", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("settlement_date",
                    F.to_date(F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(F.col(p_time)),
                                         F.to_timestamp(F.col(p_time), "yyyy-MM-dd"))))
        .select("currency", "amount", "settlement_date")
        .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    ).cache()
    payments.count()

    # ---- Rate column detection ----
    r_ccy = pick(rcols, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr', 'iso_currency',
                         'currencycode'])
    r_rate = pick(rcols, ['rate', 'fx_rate', 'usd_rate', 'rate_to_usd', 'rate_usd',
                          'exchange_rate', 'fx', 'conversion_rate', 'price', 'usd_per_unit'])
    r_eff = pick(rcols, ['effective_date', 'rate_date', 'as_of_date', 'effective_from',
                         'effective_on', 'business_date', 'fx_date', 'valid_from', 'date'])
    r_know = pick(rcols, ['commit_ts', 'committed_at', 'commit_timestamp', 'ingested_at',
                          'ingest_ts', 'recorded_at', 'updated_at', 'update_ts', 'change_ts',
                          'changed_at', 'version_ts', 'knowledge_ts', 'system_time', 'load_ts',
                          '_commit_timestamp', 'sys_time', 'processed_at', 'received_at',
                          'valid_from_ts', 'created_at'],
                  exclude=[r_eff] if r_eff else None)
    r_ver = pick(rcols, ['version', 'rev', 'revision', 'seq', 'sequence', '_version', 'ver'])

    if r_ccy is None or r_rate is None or r_eff is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Could not detect rate columns: ccy=%s rate=%s eff=%s from %s"
                           % (r_ccy, r_rate, r_eff, rcols))

    rates = (
        rates_raw
        .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(r_ccy).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("rate", F.col(r_rate).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("eff_date",
                    F.to_date(F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(F.col(r_eff)),
                                         F.to_timestamp(F.col(r_eff), "yyyy-MM-dd"))))
    )

    use_bitemporal = r_know is not None
    use_version = r_ver is not None

    if use_bitemporal:
        rates = rates.withColumn("know_ts", F.to_timestamp(F.col(r_know)))
        rates = rates.withColumn("know_date", F.to_date(F.col("know_ts")))
        rates_norm = rates.select("currency", "rate", "eff_date", "know_ts", "know_date")
    elif use_version:
        rates = rates.withColumn("version", F.col(r_ver).cast("double"))
        rates_norm = rates.select("currency", "rate", "eff_date", "version")
    else:
        rates_norm = rates.select("currency", "rate", "eff_date")

    # ---- As-of join: pick the version effective on the payment's OWN date ----
    joined = (
        payments.select("_pid", "currency", "settlement_date")
        .join(rates_norm, on="currency", how="inner")
        .where(F.col("eff_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
    )

    if use_bitemporal:
        # "known as of the payment date" = correction was recorded on/before that day.
        joined = joined.withColumn(
            "known", (F.col("know_date") <= F.col("settlement_date")).cast("int"))
        w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(
            F.col("known").desc(),          # prefer versions in effect by the payment date
            F.col("eff_date").desc(),       # most recent effective rate slice
            F.col("know_ts").desc(),        # latest truth known as of that date
        )
    elif use_version:
        # No knowledge timestamp -> corrections are later versions; use the original.
        w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(
            F.col("eff_date").desc(),
            F.col("version").asc(),         # original version, not a later correction
        )
    else:
        w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(
            F.col("eff_date").desc(),
            F.col("rate").asc(),
        )

    best = (
        joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .select("_pid", F.col("rate").alias("fx_rate"))
    )

    valued = (
        payments.join(best, on="_pid", how="left")
        .withColumn("fx_rate",
                    F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"),
                               F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))))
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("fx_rate"))
    )

    usd_daily = (
        valued.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").cast("double").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast(T.DateType()).alias("settlement_date"),
                F.col("usd_total").cast(T.DoubleType()).alias("usd_total"))
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "usd_daily.parquet"))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# ---- defaults from the task manifest ----
DEF_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed5772.ndjson"
DEF_FX = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed5772.ndjson"
DEF_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed5772/usd_daily.parquet"

# ---- candidate column names ----
PAY_AMOUNT = ['amount', 'amount_original', 'original_amount', 'value', 'payment_amount', 'amt']
PAY_CCY = ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'from_currency', 'curr']
PAY_TIME = ['payment_ts', 'payment_time', 'event_time', 'event_ts', 'ts', 'timestamp',
            'created_at', 'payment_date', 'event_date', 'date']

FX_CCY = ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'from_currency', 'curr']
FX_RATE = ['rate', 'usd_rate', 'rate_to_usd', 'fx_rate', 'usd_per_unit', 'rate_usd',
           'conversion_rate', 'rate_value']
FX_EFF = ['effective_date', 'rate_date', 'as_of_date', 'rate_day', 'effective', 'date']
FX_KNOW = ['change_ts', 'recorded_at', 'recorded_date', 'updated_at', 'ingested_at',
           'version_ts', 'commit_ts', 'system_time', 'valid_from', 'change_time',
           'change_date', 'cdc_ts', 'op_ts', 'load_ts']
FX_VER = ['version', '_version', 'seq', 'sequence', 'change_seq', 'scn', 'lsn', 'offset', 'rev']


def pick(cols, cands):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


def parse_ts(df, name):
    """Return a timestamp Column parsed from a field of unknown type."""
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(name)
    c = F.col(name)
    if dt in ('bigint', 'long', 'int', 'integer'):
        cl = c.cast('long')
        return F.when(cl > F.lit(100000000000), F.timestamp_millis(cl)).otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(cl))
    if dt in ('double', 'float'):
        return F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast('long'))
    if dt == 'timestamp':
        return c
    if dt == 'date':
        return F.to_timestamp(c)
    # string
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )


def main():
    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEF_INPUT)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", DEF_FX)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEF_OUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .config("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
             .getOrCreate())

    pay = spark.read.json(in_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== payments schema ===", file=sys.stderr)
    pay.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===", file=sys.stderr)
    fx.printSchema()

    # ---- resolve payment columns ----
    p_amt = pick(pay.columns, PAY_AMOUNT)
    p_ccy = pick(pay.columns, PAY_CCY)
    p_time = pick(pay.columns, PAY_TIME)
    if not (p_amt and p_ccy and p_time):
        raise ValueError(f"payment cols amt={p_amt} ccy={p_ccy} time={p_time} from {pay.columns}")

    # ---- resolve fx columns ----
    f_ccy = pick(fx.columns, FX_CCY)
    f_rate = pick(fx.columns, FX_RATE)
    f_eff = pick(fx.columns, FX_EFF)
    f_know = pick(fx.columns, FX_KNOW)
    f_ver = pick(fx.columns, FX_VER)
    if not (f_ccy and f_rate and f_eff):
        raise ValueError(f"fx cols ccy={f_ccy} rate={f_rate} eff={f_eff} from {fx.columns}")

    print(f"payments -> amount={p_amt} ccy={p_ccy} time={p_time}", file=sys.stderr)
    print(f"fx -> ccy={f_ccy} rate={f_rate} eff={f_eff} know={f_know} ver={f_ver}", file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- payments base ----
    pay_base = (pay
                .withColumn("pay_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
                .withColumn("ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
                .withColumn("amount", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
                .withColumn("pdate", F.to_date(parse_ts(pay, p_time)))
                .select("pay_id", "ccy", "amount", "pdate")
                .where(F.col("pdate").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNotNull()))

    # ---- fx prepared (bitemporal: effective/business date + knowledge/system time) ----
    fx_prep = (fx
               .withColumn("ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
               .withColumn("rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
               .withColumn("eff_date", F.to_date(parse_ts(fx, f_eff))))
    if f_know:
        fx_prep = fx_prep.withColumn("know_ts", parse_ts(fx, f_know))
    else:
        # no separate system-time column: fall back to effective date as knowledge proxy
        fx_prep = fx_prep.withColumn("know_ts", parse_ts(fx, f_eff))
    fx_prep = fx_prep.withColumn("know_ts", F.coalesce(F.col("know_ts"), F.to_timestamp(F.col("eff_date"))))
    fx_prep = fx_prep.withColumn("know_date", F.to_date(F.col("know_ts")))
    if f_ver:
        fx_prep = fx_prep.withColumn("ver", F.col(f_ver).cast("double"))
    else:
        fx_prep = fx_prep.withColumn("ver", F.unix_timestamp(F.col("know_ts")).cast("double"))
    fx_prep = (fx_prep
               .select("ccy", "rate", "eff_date", "know_ts", "know_date", "ver")
               .where(F.col("eff_date").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull()))

    # ---- USD payments value 1:1 (guard against missing USD rate rows) ----
    usd_pay = (pay_base.where(F.col("ccy") == "USD")
               .select("pay_id", "pdate", F.col("amount").alias("usd_amount")))
    fx_pay = pay_base.where(F.col("ccy") != "USD")

    # ---- as-of join: only rate versions effective on/before D AND known on/before D ----
    cand = (fx_pay.join(fx_prep, on="ccy", how="inner")
            .where((F.col("eff_date") <= F.col("pdate")) &
                   (F.col("know_date") <= F.col("pdate"))))

    # latest effective period, then latest version known as of the payment date
    w = Window.partitionBy("pay_id").orderBy(
        F.col("eff_date").desc(),
        F.col("know_ts").desc(),
        F.col("ver").desc(),
        F.col("rate").desc(),
    )
    best = (cand.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
            .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
            .select("pay_id", "pdate", (F.col("amount") * F.col("rate")).alias("usd_amount")))

    valued = best.unionByName(usd_pay)

    usd_daily = (valued.groupBy(F.col("pdate").alias("settlement_date"))
                 .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                 .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
                         F.col("usd_total").cast("double"))
                 .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    if out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").format("parquet").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

BASE = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2"
PAY_DEFAULT = f"{BASE}/_data/gen_payments_seed8675.ndjson"
FX_DEFAULT  = f"{BASE}/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed8675.ndjson"
OUT_DEFAULT = f"{BASE}/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed8675/usd_daily.parquet"


def pick(cols, cands, exclude=None):
    exclude = set(exclude or [])
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in low and low[cand] not in exclude:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in cands:
        for c in cols:
            if c in exclude:
                continue
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def main():
    spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("new_scd2_as_of_join").getOrCreate()
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", PAY_DEFAULT)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", FX_DEFAULT)

    payments = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== PAYMENTS schema ==="); payments.printSchema()
    print("=== FX_RATES_CDC schema ==="); fx.printSchema()

    pcols, fcols = payments.columns, fx.columns

    # ---- column detection ----
    p_amount = pick(pcols, ['amount', 'amount_original', 'original_amount', 'payment_amount',
                            'pay_amount', 'gross_amount', 'amt', 'value'])
    p_cur = pick(pcols, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr', 'cur', 'iso_currency'])
    p_date = pick(pcols, ['payment_ts', 'payment_time', 'payment_date', 'event_ts', 'event_time',
                          'occurred_at', 'created_at', 'settlement_ts', 'txn_ts', 'timestamp', 'ts', 'date'])

    f_cur = pick(fcols, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr', 'cur', 'iso_currency'])
    f_rate = pick(fcols, ['rate', 'usd_rate', 'fx_rate', 'rate_usd', 'rate_to_usd', 'exchange_rate',
                          'conversion_rate', 'usd_per_unit', 'price', 'value'])
    f_bus = pick(fcols, ['effective_date', 'rate_date', 'as_of_date', 'value_date', 'business_date',
                         'valid_from', 'fx_date', 'quote_date', 'effective_from', 'date'])
    f_know = pick(fcols, ['recorded_at', 'change_ts', 'system_ts', 'cdc_ts', 'ingested_at', 'ingest_ts',
                          'load_ts', 'op_ts', 'commit_ts', 'updated_at', 'known_from', 'correction_ts',
                          'version_ts', 'event_ts', '_ingested_at', 'ts', 'timestamp'],
                  exclude=[f_bus] if f_bus else None)
    f_ver = pick(fcols, ['version', 'ver', 'revision', 'rev', 'seq', 'version_no', 'seq_no'])

    print(f"detected payments: amount={p_amount} cur={p_cur} date={p_date}")
    print(f"detected fx: cur={f_cur} rate={f_rate} business_date={f_bus} knowledge={f_know} version={f_ver}")

    # ---- normalize payments ----
    D = F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(p_date)))
    pay = payments.select(
        F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("pid"),
        F.col(p_amount).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_cur))).alias("cur"),
        D.alias("D"),
    )

    # ---- normalize fx CDC ----
    E = F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(f_bus)))
    sel = [
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_cur))).alias("fcur"),
        F.col(f_rate).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        E.alias("E"),
    ]
    if f_know:
        sel.append(F.to_timestamp(F.col(f_know)).alias("K"))
    if f_ver:
        sel.append(F.col(f_ver).cast("double").alias("V"))
    fxd = fx.select(*sel)
    if f_know:
        fxd = fxd.withColumn("Kd", F.to_date(F.col("K")))

    # ---- bitemporal as-of join ----
    # candidates: same currency, effective on/before D, and KNOWN on/before D
    cond = (pay.cur == fxd.fcur) & (fxd.E <= pay.D)
    if f_know:
        cond = cond & (fxd.Kd <= pay.D)
    j = pay.join(fxd, cond, "left")

    order = [F.col("E").desc_nulls_last()]
    if f_know:
        order.append(F.col("K").desc_nulls_last())
    if f_ver:
        order.append(F.col("V").desc_nulls_last())
    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(*order)
    j = j.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).filter(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # USD is its own base rate if not present in the feed
    rate_final = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.when(F.col("cur") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)))
    j = j.withColumn("usd_value", F.col("amount") * rate_final)

    daily = (
        j.groupBy(F.col("D").alias("settlement_date"))
         .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total"))
         .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"), F.col("usd_total").cast("double"))
         .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    daily.show(50, truncate=False)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(OUT_DEFAULT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DEFAULT_PRIMARY = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed9001.ndjson"
DEFAULT_FX = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed9001.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed9001/usd_daily.parquet"


def find_col(cols, patterns):
    lc = [(c, c.lower()) for c in cols]
    for p in patterns:            # exact match first
        for c, cl in lc:
            if cl == p:
                return c
    for p in patterns:            # then substring
        for c, cl in lc:
            if p in cl:
                return c
    return None


def to_date_expr(colname):
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
    )
    return F.coalesce(F.to_date(ts), F.to_date(s), F.to_date(s, "yyyy-MM-dd"))


def main():
    spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("new_scd2_as_of_join").getOrCreate()
    # UTC calendar day is required by the contract.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    primary = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_PRIMARY)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", DEFAULT_FX)

    payments = spark.read.json(primary)
    rates = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("PAYMENTS SCHEMA:", payments.schema.simpleString(), file=sys.stderr)
    print("RATES SCHEMA:", rates.schema.simpleString(), file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- Column detection: payments ----
    p_cols = payments.columns
    ccy_p = find_col(p_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "ccy_code", "code"])
    amt_c = find_col(p_cols, ["amount", "amt", "notional", "local_amount", "gross", "net", "value"])
    pdate_c = find_col(p_cols, ["payment_date", "settlement_date", "payment_ts", "event_ts",
                                "event_time", "booked_at", "trade_date", "pay_date",
                                "value_date", "date", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at"])
    print("PAYMENT COLS -> ccy=%s amount=%s pdate=%s" % (ccy_p, amt_c, pdate_c), file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- Column detection: fx_rates_cdc ----
    r_cols = rates.columns
    ccy_r = find_col(r_cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "ccy_code", "code"])
    recorded_c = find_col(r_cols, ["recorded_at", "changed_at", "change_ts", "updated_at",
                                   "ingested_at", "captured_at", "commit_ts", "op_ts",
                                   "system_time", "sys_time", "transaction_time", "tx_ts",
                                   "load_ts", "cdc_ts", "knowledge", "as_of_ts", "__ts"])
    eff_c = find_col([c for c in r_cols if c != recorded_c],
                     ["effective_date", "eff_date", "rate_date", "business_date",
                      "as_of_date", "valid_from", "effective", "value_date",
                      "quote_date", "date", "valid"])
    ver_c = find_col(r_cols, ["version", "revision"])
    used = {ccy_r, recorded_c, eff_c, ver_c}
    rate_v = find_col([c for c in r_cols if c not in used],
                      ["rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate",
                       "conversion_rate", "rate", "fx", "multiplier", "factor", "price", "value"])
    print("RATE COLS -> ccy=%s rate=%s eff=%s recorded=%s ver=%s"
          % (ccy_r, rate_v, eff_c, recorded_c, ver_c), file=sys.stderr)

    # ---- Normalize payments ----
    p = payments.withColumn("amount", F.col(amt_c).cast("double")) \
                .withColumn("pdate", to_date_expr(pdate_c))
    if ccy_p:
        p = p.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.col(ccy_p).cast("string")))
    else:
        p = p.withColumn("currency", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    p = p.select("currency", "amount", "pdate") \
         .withColumn("pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # ---- Normalize rate versions ----
    r = rates.withColumn("rate", F.col(rate_v).cast("double")) \
             .withColumn("r_ccy", F.upper(F.col(ccy_r).cast("string")) if ccy_r else F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    r = r.withColumn("eff_date", to_date_expr(eff_c) if eff_c else F.lit(None).cast("date"))
    r = r.withColumn("rec_date", to_date_expr(recorded_c) if recorded_c else F.lit(None).cast("date"))
    r = r.withColumn("ver", (F.col(ver_c).cast("double") if ver_c else F.lit(None).cast("double")))
    r = r.select("r_ccy", "rate", "eff_date", "rec_date", "ver")

    # ---- Bitemporal as-of join ----
    # effective business date must be on/before the payment date (latest such wins),
    # and the version must have been RECORDED on/before the payment date, so that
    # later corrections cannot re-value an already-booked payment.
    cond = (r.eff_date.isNull() | (r.eff_date <= p.pdate))
    if ccy_p and ccy_r:
        cond = (p.currency == r.r_ccy) & cond
    if recorded_c:
        cond = cond & (r.rec_date.isNull() | (r.rec_date <= p.pdate))

    joined = p.join(r, cond, "left")

    order_cols = [F.col("eff_date").desc_nulls_last()]
    if recorded_c:
        order_cols.append(F.col("rec_date").desc_nulls_last())
    if ver_c:
        order_cols.append(F.col("ver").desc_nulls_last())
    order_cols.append(F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())  # deterministic tiebreak

    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(*order_cols)
    picked = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).filter(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # USD conversion: amount * rate; USD payments default to a rate of 1.0.
    final_rate = F.when(F.col("rate").isNotNull(), F.col("rate")) \
                  .when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)) \
                  .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))
    picked = picked.withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * final_rate)

    missing = picked.filter(F.col("usd_amount").isNull()).count()
    if missing:
        print("WARNING: %d payments had no in-effect rate as of their date" % missing, file=sys.stderr)

    result = (picked
              .groupBy(F.col("pdate").alias("settlement_date"))
              .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
              .withColumn("settlement_date", F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"))
              .withColumn("usd_total", F.col("usd_total").cast("double"))
              .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    # Register contract-named temp view in the same session.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

PAY_FALLBACK = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson"
FX_FALLBACK  = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"


def get_col(df, cands):
    m = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for c in cands:
        if c.lower() in m:
            return m[c.lower()]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", PAY_FALLBACK)
    fx_path  = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_FX_RATES_CDC", FX_FALLBACK)

    payments = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("PAY SCHEMA:")
    payments.printSchema()
    print("FX SCHEMA:")
    fx.printSchema()

    # ---------- payments ----------
    amt_col = get_col(payments, ['amount', 'amount_original', 'original_amount',
                                 'value', 'payment_amount', 'amt', 'gross_amount'])
    pccy_col = get_col(payments, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'cur',
                                  'payment_currency'])
    pts_col = get_col(payments, ['event_time', 'event_ts', 'event_timestamp',
                                 'payment_time', 'payment_ts', 'payment_timestamp',
                                 'timestamp', 'ts', 'created_at', 'occurred_at',
                                 'txn_time', 'transaction_time', 'datetime', 'time',
                                 'paid_at', 'booked_at', 'settled_at'])
    pdate_col = get_col(payments, ['payment_date', 'settlement_date', 'txn_date',
                                   'transaction_date', 'date', 'booking_date',
                                   'value_date'])
    if pts_col:
        sd = F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(pts_col))),
                        F.to_date(F.col(pts_col)))
    elif pdate_col:
        sd = F.to_date(F.col(pdate_col))
    else:
        raise ValueError("No payment date/timestamp column found: %s" % payments.columns)

    if amt_col is None or pccy_col is None:
        raise ValueError("Missing amount/currency in payments: %s" % payments.columns)

    pay = (payments
           .withColumn("_sd", sd)
           .withColumn("_amt", F.col(amt_col).cast("double"))
           .withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.col(pccy_col).cast("string")))
           .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
           .select("_pid", "_sd", "_amt", "_ccy"))

    # ---------- fx rates (SCD2 / CDC) ----------
    rccy = get_col(fx, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'from_currency',
                        'base_currency', 'cur'])
    rate_col = get_col(fx, ['rate', 'fx_rate', 'usd_rate', 'rate_to_usd',
                            'usd_per_unit', 'conversion_rate', 'exchange_rate', 'price'])
    rd_col = get_col(fx, ['rate_date', 'effective_date', 'as_of_date', 'asof_date',
                          'value_date', 'fx_date', 'quote_date', 'business_date',
                          'valid_date', 'date'])
    vf_col = get_col(fx, ['valid_from', 'effective_from', 'sys_from', 'system_from',
                          'vfrom'])
    vt_col = get_col(fx, ['valid_to', 'effective_to', 'sys_to', 'system_to', 'vto'])
    know_col = get_col(fx, ['recorded_at', 'ingested_at', 'ingest_ts', 'ingest_time',
                            'commit_ts', 'committed_at', 'cdc_ts', 'change_ts',
                            'changed_at', 'updated_at', 'update_ts', 'op_ts',
                            'ts_ms', 'load_ts', 'system_ts', 'knowledge_ts',
                            'correction_ts', 'revision_ts', 'as_of_ts', 'created_at'])
    ver_col = get_col(fx, ['version', 'rev', 'revision', 'seq', 'sequence',
                           'version_no', 'ver'])

    if rccy is None or rate_col is None:
        raise ValueError("Missing currency/rate in fx feed: %s" % fx.columns)

    r = (fx
         .withColumn("rt_ccy", F.upper(F.col(rccy).cast("string")))
         .withColumn("rate", F.col(rate_col).cast("double")))

    use_window = False
    if rd_col:
        r = r.withColumn("r_rd",
                         F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.col(rd_col)),
                                    F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(rd_col)))))
    elif vf_col:
        use_window = True
        r = r.withColumn("r_bf", F.to_date(F.col(vf_col)))
        if vt_col:
            r = r.withColumn("r_bt", F.to_date(F.col(vt_col)))
        else:
            r = r.withColumn("r_bt", F.lit(None).cast("date"))
    else:
        raise ValueError("No business-date/validity column in fx feed: %s" % fx.columns)

    # knowledge (system) time
    dtypes = dict(fx.dtypes)
    know_ts = None
    if know_col:
        dt = dtypes.get(know_col, "string")
        name = know_col.lower()
        if dt.startswith("timestamp"):
            know_ts = F.col(know_col)
        elif dt.startswith("date"):
            know_ts = F.col(know_col).cast("timestamp")
        elif dt == "string":
            know_ts = F.to_timestamp(F.col(know_col))
        elif dt in ("bigint", "long", "int", "smallint", "double", "float"):
            if "ms" in name:
                know_ts = (F.col(know_col) / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")
            else:
                know_ts = F.col(know_col).cast("timestamp")
    if know_ts is not None:
        r = r.withColumn("r_kts", know_ts)

    ts_mode = False
    if "r_kts" in r.columns:
        if r.where(F.col("r_kts").isNotNull()).limit(1).count() > 0:
            ts_mode = True
    if not ts_mode and ver_col:
        r = r.withColumn("r_ver", F.col(ver_col).cast("double"))

    sel = ["rt_ccy", "rate"]
    sel += (["r_bf", "r_bt"] if use_window else ["r_rd"])
    if ts_mode:
        sel.append("r_kts")
    elif ver_col:
        sel.append("r_ver")
    rates = r.select(*sel)

    print("MODE window=%s ts_knowledge=%s version=%s" %
          (use_window, ts_mode, (ver_col is not None)))

    # ---------- as-of join ----------
    cond = [pay["_ccy"] == rates["rt_ccy"]]
    if use_window:
        cond.append(rates["r_bf"] <= pay["_sd"])
        cond.append(rates["r_bt"].isNull() | (pay["_sd"] < rates["r_bt"]))
    else:
        cond.append(rates["r_rd"] <= pay["_sd"])
    if ts_mode:
        # only versions KNOWN as of the payment's own date -> excludes later corrections
        cond.append(F.to_date(rates["r_kts"]) <= pay["_sd"])

    j = pay.join(rates, cond, "left")

    order = []
    order.append(F.col("r_bf").desc_nulls_last() if use_window
                 else F.col("r_rd").desc_nulls_last())
    if ts_mode:
        order.append(F.col("r_kts").desc_nulls_last())   # latest version known by then
    elif ver_col:
        order.append(F.col("r_ver").asc_nulls_last())     # original version (pre-correction)
    order.append(F.col("rate").asc_nulls_last())          # deterministic tiebreak

    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(*order)
    best = (j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
             .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    best = best.withColumn(
        "rate_final",
        F.when(F.col("rate").isNotNull(), F.col("rate"))
         .when(F.col("_ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double")))
    best = best.withColumn("usd_amt", F.col("_amt") * F.col("rate_final"))

    missing = best.filter(F.col("usd_amt").isNull()).count()
    if missing:
        print("WARNING: %d payments had no resolvable rate" % missing)

    final = best.filter(F.col("usd_amt").isNotNull())

    result = (final
              .groupBy(F.col("_sd").alias("settlement_date"))
              .agg(F.sum("usd_amt").alias("usd_total"))
              .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
                      F.col("usd_total").cast("double"))
              .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    result.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    result.show(50, truncate=False)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    else:
        out_tbl = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
        if not out_tbl:
            raise ValueError("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_tbl)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

# ---- defaults (used only if env vars are unset) -------------------------------
DEF_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"
DEF_FX    = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"
DEF_OUT   = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed27182/usd_daily.parquet"


def log(*a):
    print(*a, file=sys.stderr, flush=True)


def pick(cols, candidates):
    """case-insensitive: exact match by candidate priority, then substring."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for c in cols:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Contract requires UTC calendar day semantics.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEF_INPUT)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
                             os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", DEF_FX))

    payments = spark.read.json(in_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    log("payments schema:", payments.schema.simpleString())
    log("fx schema:", fx.schema.simpleString())

    # ---------------- payment column detection ----------------
    pcols = payments.columns
    p_cur = pick(pcols, ["currency", "ccy", "cur", "iso_currency", "code"])
    p_amt = pick(pcols, ["amount", "amount_original", "original_amount",
                         "payment_amount", "amt", "value"])
    p_ts = pick(pcols, ["event_time", "event_ts", "payment_ts", "payment_time",
                        "occurred_at", "created_at", "transaction_time",
                        "txn_time", "timestamp", "ts", "payment_date",
                        "event_date", "transaction_date", "date"])
    log(f"payment cols -> cur={p_cur} amt={p_amt} ts={p_ts}")

    P = (
        payments
        .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        .withColumn("_cur", F.upper(F.col(p_cur).cast("string")))
        .withColumn("_amt", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("_pdate", F.to_date(F.col(p_ts)))
        .select("_pid", "_cur", "_amt", "_pdate")
    )

    # ---------------- fx column detection ----------------
    fcols = fx.columns
    f_cur = pick(fcols, ["currency", "ccy", "cur", "from_currency",
                         "base_currency", "iso_currency", "code"])
    f_rate = pick(fcols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate",
                          "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd", "conversion_rate", "price"])

    # knowledge-time (correction) columns
    ts_cands = ["updated_at", "update_ts", "changed_at", "change_ts",
                "system_time", "system_ts", "ingested_at", "ingest_ts",
                "recorded_at", "record_ts", "commit_ts", "load_ts", "op_ts",
                "as_of_ts", "created_at", "version_ts", "cdc_ts", "change_time"]
    ver_cands = ["version", "ver", "revision", "seq", "change_seq",
                 "scd_version", "_version", "rev"]

    # business/effective-date columns (must NOT be a knowledge column)
    bdate_cands = ["effective_date", "rate_date", "valid_from", "as_of_date",
                   "business_date", "valuation_date", "fx_date", "quote_date",
                   "date"]

    k_ts = pick([c for c in fcols], ts_cands)
    k_ver = None if k_ts else pick(fcols, ver_cands)

    exclude = {c for c in [k_ts, k_ver, f_cur, f_rate] if c}
    b_date = pick([c for c in fcols if c not in exclude], bdate_cands)
    if b_date is None:
        b_date = pick([c for c in fcols if c not in exclude], ["date"])

    log(f"fx cols -> cur={f_cur} rate={f_rate} bdate={b_date} "
        f"k_ts={k_ts} k_ver={k_ver}")

    FX = (
        fx
        .withColumn("_fcur", F.upper(F.col(f_cur).cast("string")))
        .withColumn("_rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("_bdate", F.to_date(F.col(b_date)))
    )

    if k_ts is not None:
        FX = (FX
              .withColumn("_kts", F.coalesce(
