                  F.to_timestamp(F.col(k_ts)),
                  F.to_date(F.col(k_ts)).cast("timestamp")))
              .withColumn("_kdate", F.to_date(F.col("_kts"))))
        mode = "ts"
    elif k_ver is not None:
        FX = FX.withColumn("_kver", F.col(k_ver).cast("long"))
        mode = "ver"
    else:
        mode = "none"

    keep = ["_fcur", "_rate", "_bdate"]
    if mode == "ts":
        keep += ["_kts", "_kdate"]
    elif mode == "ver":
        keep += ["_kver"]
    FX = FX.select(*keep).where(F.col("_bdate").isNotNull())

    # ---------------- bitemporal as-of resolution ----------------
    cond = (P["_cur"] == FX["_fcur"]) & (FX["_bdate"] <= P["_pdate"])
    if mode == "ts":
        # only versions already KNOWN on the payment's own date
        cond = cond & (FX["_kdate"] <= P["_pdate"])

    joined = P.join(F.broadcast(FX), cond, "left")

    if mode == "ts":
        order = [F.col("_bdate").desc(), F.col("_kts").desc()]
    elif mode == "ver":
        # latest business date, then the ORIGINAL version (not a later correction)
        order = [F.col("_bdate").desc(), F.col("_kver").asc()]
    else:
        order = [F.col("_bdate").desc()]

    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(*order)
    resolved = (
        joined
        .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .select("_pid", "_cur", "_amt", "_pdate", "_rate")
    )

    # USD is already in USD; missing rate for USD -> 1.0
    final_rate = F.when(
        F.col("_cur") == "USD", F.coalesce(F.col("_rate"), F.lit(1.0))
    ).otherwise(F.col("_rate"))

    valued = (
        resolved
        .withColumn("_usd", F.col("_amt") * final_rate)
        .where(F.col("_pdate").isNotNull())
    )

    usd_daily = (
        valued
        .groupBy(F.col("_pdate").alias("settlement_date"))
        .agg(F.sum("_usd").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEF_OUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEF_OUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


PAY_DEFAULT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed31415.ndjson"
FX_DEFAULT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed31415.ndjson"


def pick(cols, candidates, exclude=None):
    exclude = set(exclude or [])
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols if c not in exclude}
    # exact match first
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    # substring match
    for cand in candidates:
        for c in cols:
            if c in exclude:
                continue
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Force a deterministic, calendar-UTC interpretation of all date math.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", PAY_DEFAULT)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", FX_DEFAULT)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---- read ---------------------------------------------------------------
    payments = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    rates = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    pcols = payments.columns
    rcols = rates.columns

    # ---- profile / detect columns ------------------------------------------
    p_cur = pick(pcols, ["currency", "currency_code", "ccy", "curr"])
    p_amt = pick(pcols, ["amount", "amt", "payment_amount", "gross_amount",
                         "local_amount", "value"])
    p_date = pick(pcols, ["payment_date", "event_time", "event_timestamp",
                          "event_date", "paid_at", "occurred_at", "created_at",
                          "settlement_date", "timestamp", "ts", "date"])

    r_cur = pick(rcols, ["currency", "currency_code", "ccy", "curr"])
    r_rate = pick(rcols, ["rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate",
                          "conversion_rate", "rate"])
    r_eff = pick(rcols, ["effective_date", "effective_from", "valid_from",
                         "rate_date", "as_of_date", "business_date",
                         "start_date", "date"])
    # system/knowledge time axis used to distinguish original vs. correction
    r_sys = pick(
        rcols,
        ["commit_timestamp", "commit_ts", "ingested_at", "loaded_at",
         "updated_at", "recorded_at", "change_ts", "cdc_ts", "op_ts",
         "known_from", "system_time", "version", "seq", "sequence", "ts",
         "_ts"],
        exclude={c for c in [r_eff, r_cur, r_rate] if c},
    )

    sys.stderr.write(
        "PROFILE payments cur=%s amt=%s date=%s | rates cur=%s rate=%s "
        "eff=%s sys=%s\n" % (p_cur, p_amt, p_date, r_cur, r_rate, r_eff, r_sys)
    )

    if not (p_amt and p_date):
        raise ValueError("Could not detect payment amount/date columns: %s" % pcols)
    if not (r_rate and r_eff):
        raise ValueError("Could not detect fx rate/effective columns: %s" % rcols)

    # ---- normalize payments -------------------------------------------------
    pay = payments.withColumn(
        "settlement_date",
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(p_date))),
    )
    pay = pay.withColumn("amount", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
    if p_cur:
        pay = pay.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.col(p_cur).cast("string")))
    else:
        pay = pay.withColumn("currency", F.lit("USD"))
    pay = pay.withColumn("pay_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    pay = pay.select("pay_id", "currency", "settlement_date", "amount") \
             .filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())

    # ---- normalize rates ----------------------------------------------------
    r = rates.withColumn("eff_date", F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(r_eff))))
    # to_date may fail if it's a pure date string already handled by to_timestamp;
    # add a fallback.
    r = r.withColumn(
        "eff_date",
        F.coalesce(F.col("eff_date"), F.to_date(F.col(r_eff))),
    )
    r = r.withColumn("rate", F.col(r_rate).cast("double"))
    if r_cur:
        r = r.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.col(r_cur).cast("string")))
    else:
        r = r.withColumn("currency", F.lit("USD"))

    # ordering column on the SYSTEM-TIME axis: smaller == earlier == original.
    if r_sys:
        sys_num = F.coalesce(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col(r_sys)).cast("double"),
            F.col(r_sys).cast("double"),
        )
        r = r.withColumn("sys_order", sys_num)
    else:
        r = r.withColumn("sys_order", F.lit(0.0))

    r = r.filter(F.col("eff_date").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    # ---- as-of ORIGINAL version: for each (currency, eff_date) keep the
    #      earliest-published row, i.e. the version that applied *then*,
    #      dropping any later corrections. This makes reprocessing stable.
    w_orig = Window.partitionBy("currency", "eff_date").orderBy(
        F.col("sys_order").asc_nulls_last()
    )
    rates_orig = (
        r.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_orig))
         .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
         .select("currency", "eff_date", "rate")
    )

    # ---- SCD2 as-of join: rate whose eff_date is the latest <= payment date --
    joined = pay.join(rates_orig, on="currency", how="left") \
                .filter(
                    F.col("eff_date").isNull() |
                    (F.col("eff_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
                )

    w_asof = Window.partitionBy("pay_id").orderBy(F.col("eff_date").desc_nulls_last())
    chosen = (
        joined.withColumn("rk", F.row_number().over(w_asof))
              .filter(F.col("rk") == 1)
    )

    # USD payments (or when a rate is genuinely 1:1) value at rate 1.0.
    chosen = chosen.withColumn(
        "eff_rate",
        F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.lit(1.0)))
         .otherwise(F.col("rate")),
    )
    chosen = chosen.withColumn("usd_value", F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate"))

    usd_daily = (
        chosen.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total"))
              .select(
                  F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                  F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
              )
              .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    # ---- write --------------------------------------------------------------
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.path.dirname(pay_path), "usd_daily.parquet")
        )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


# ---- default paths (fallbacks when env vars are unset) ----
DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed16180.ndjson"
DEFAULT_FX = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_scd2_as_of_join__A__seed16180/usd_daily.parquet"


def pick(cols, candidates):
    """Pick a column by exact (case-insensitive) then substring match."""
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for c in cols:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def parse_ts(df, colname):
    """Return a timestamp Column parsed from a possibly-messy field."""
    if colname is None:
        return F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(colname, "string")
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dt in ("bigint", "int", "long", "double", "float", "smallint", "tinyint"):
        # epoch: guess millis vs seconds by magnitude
        return F.when(c > F.lit(100000000000.0), (c / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")) \
                .otherwise(c.cast("timestamp"))
    cs = c.cast("string")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(cs),
        F.to_timestamp(cs, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(cs, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(cs, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(cs, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(cs, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )


def parse_date(df, colname):
    if colname is None:
        return F.lit(None).cast("date")
    return F.to_date(parse_ts(df, colname))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
                             os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH_FX", DEFAULT_FX))
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # ---------------- read ----------------
    payments = spark.read.json(in_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    sys.stderr.write("=== payments schema ===\n")
    payments.printSchema()
    sys.stderr.write("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===\n")
    fx.printSchema()
    try:
        sys.stderr.write("payments sample: %s\n" % payments.limit(3).toJSON().collect())
        sys.stderr.write("fx sample: %s\n" % fx.limit(5).toJSON().collect())
    except Exception as e:
        sys.stderr.write("sample print failed: %s\n" % e)

    pcols = payments.columns
    fcols = fx.columns

    # ---------------- identify payment columns ----------------
    amt_c = pick(pcols, ["amount_local", "local_amount", "payment_amount",
                         "amount", "amt", "value", "gross_amount"])
    pccy_c = pick(pcols, ["currency_code", "currency", "ccy",
                          "from_currency", "curr"])
    pdate_c = pick(pcols, ["payment_date", "settlement_date", "event_time",
                           "event_ts", "occurred_at", "created_at",
                           "timestamp", "ts", "date", "booked_at"])

    # ---------------- identify fx columns ----------------
    frate_c = pick(fcols, ["rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate",
                           "conversion_rate", "price", "value"])
    fccy_c = pick(fcols, ["currency_code", "currency", "ccy",
                          "from_currency", "pair", "curr"])
    feff_c = pick(fcols, ["effective_date", "effective_from", "valid_from",
                          "rate_date", "as_of_date", "start_date", "eff_date"])
    frec_c = pick(fcols, ["recorded_at", "ingested_at", "commit_ts",
                          "system_time", "transaction_time", "updated_at",
                          "change_ts", "load_ts", "version_ts", "known_at",
                          "as_of", "event_time", "ts"])
    fver_c = pick(fcols, ["version", "change_seq", "revision", "seq",
                          "change_version", "_version"])

    # avoid picking the effective-date column as the recorded-time column
    if frec_c is not None and frec_c == feff_c:
        frec_c = None
    # avoid rate == value collision with currency etc. (already ordered)

    sys.stderr.write(
        "chosen -> pay(amt=%s ccy=%s date=%s) fx(rate=%s ccy=%s eff=%s rec=%s ver=%s)\n"
        % (amt_c, pccy_c, pdate_c, frate_c, fccy_c, feff_c, frec_c, fver_c)
    )

    if amt_c is None or pccy_c is None or pdate_c is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not identify required payment columns")
    if frate_c is None or fccy_c is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not identify required fx columns")

    # ---------------- standardize ----------------
    payments_std = payments.select(
        F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("pay_id"),
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col(pccy_c).cast("string"))).alias("ccy"),
        parse_date(payments, pdate_c).alias("D"),
        F.col(amt_c).cast("double").alias("amount"),
    )

    fx_std = fx.select(
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col(fccy_c).cast("string"))).alias("fx_ccy"),
        F.col(frate_c).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        parse_date(fx, feff_c).alias("eff_from"),
        parse_ts(fx, frec_c).alias("rec_ts"),
        parse_date(fx, frec_c).alias("rec_date"),
        (F.col(fver_c).cast("long") if fver_c is not None
         else F.lit(None).cast("long")).alias("ver"),
    )

    # ---------------- bitemporal as-of join ----------------
    # For a payment on date D with currency C, the valid rate is the version
    # that:
    #   (valid-time)  is effective by date D           -> eff_from <= D
    #   (txn-time)    was already known/recorded by D   -> rec_date <= D
    # Among those, we take the most-recently-effective, and (as of that date)
    # the most-recently-known version. A correction recorded AFTER D has
    # rec_date > D and is therefore excluded -> no retroactive re-valuation.
    cond = (payments_std["ccy"] == fx_std["fx_ccy"])
    cond = cond & (fx_std["eff_from"].isNull() |
                   (fx_std["eff_from"] <= payments_std["D"]))
    cond = cond & (fx_std["rec_date"].isNull() |
                   (fx_std["rec_date"] <= payments_std["D"]))

    joined = payments_std.join(fx_std, cond, how="left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("pay_id").orderBy(
        F.col("eff_from").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("rec_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("ver").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last(),
    )

    ranked = (
        joined
        .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
    )

    # USD-denominated payments convert 1:1; others use their effective rate.
    rate_final = F.when(F.col("ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)) \
                  .otherwise(F.col("rate"))

    valued = ranked.withColumn("usd_amt", F.col("amount") * rate_final)

    result = (
        valued
        .groupBy("D")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amt").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(
            F.col("D").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
            F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
        .orderBy("settlement_date")
    )

    result.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    sys.stderr.write("=== usd_daily preview ===\n")
    for r in result.limit(20).collect():
        sys.stderr.write("%s\n" % (r,))

    # ---------------- write GOLD ----------------
    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os, sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

# ---------- column detection helpers ----------
def pick(cols, cands, avoid=()):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in low and low[cand] not in avoid:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in cands:
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc and orig not in avoid:
                return orig
    return None

def is_num(dt):
    return dt.startswith(('bigint', 'int', 'double', 'float', 'tinyint',
                          'smallint', 'long', 'decimal', 'short', 'byte'))

def ts_expr(col, dt):
    c = F.col(col)
    if is_num(dt):
        v = c.cast('double')
        # heuristics: > 1e11 -> millis, else seconds
        return F.when(v > F.lit(1e11), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(v / 1000.0))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(v)))
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.concat(c.cast('string'), F.lit(' 00:00:00')))
    )

def date_expr(col, dt):
    c = F.col(col)
    if is_num(dt):
        return F.to_date(ts_expr(col, dt))
    return F.coalesce(F.to_date(c), F.to_date(ts_expr(col, dt)))


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("scd2_as_of_join")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    base = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)) if '__file__' in globals() else '.'
    default_pay = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed14142.ndjson"
    default_fx = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed14142.ndjson"

    pay_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_pay)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_fx)

    payments = spark.read.json(pay_path)
    rates = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    pd = dict(payments.dtypes)
    rd = dict(rates.dtypes)
    sys.stderr.write("PAYMENTS schema: %s\n" % payments.dtypes)
    sys.stderr.write("FX schema: %s\n" % rates.dtypes)

    # ---- payment columns ----
    p_ccy = pick(pd, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr'])
    p_amt = pick(pd, ['amount', 'payment_amount', 'amt', 'local_amount',
                      'amount_local', 'value'])
    p_ts = pick(pd, ['payment_ts', 'payment_date', 'event_time', 'event_ts',
                     'event_timestamp', 'settlement_ts', 'booked_at',
                     'occurred_at', 'timestamp', 'created_at', 'ts', 'date'])
    if p_amt is None:
        p_amt = pick(pd, ['amount'])
    sys.stderr.write("pay cols ccy=%s amt=%s ts=%s\n" % (p_ccy, p_amt, p_ts))

    sdate = date_expr(p_ts, pd[p_ts]).alias("sdate")
    ccy_p = (F.upper(F.col(p_ccy)) if p_ccy else F.lit("USD")).alias("ccy")
    amt = F.col(p_amt).cast("double").alias("amount")

    p = (payments.select(sdate, ccy_p, amt)
         .withColumn("pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))
    p = p.persist()
    p.count()

    # ---- fx rate columns ----
    r_ccy = pick(rd, ['currency', 'ccy', 'currency_code', 'curr'])
    r_rate = pick(rd, ['rate', 'fx_rate', 'usd_rate', 'rate_to_usd',
                       'usd_per_unit', 'conversion_rate', 'rate_value', 'value'])
    r_vfrom = pick(rd, ['valid_from', 'system_from', 'recorded_at', 'ingested_at',
                        'updated_at', 'change_ts', 'commit_ts', 'version_ts',
                        'load_ts', 'created_at'])
    r_vto = pick(rd, ['valid_to', 'system_to', 'recorded_to', 'valid_until'])
    r_ver = pick(rd, ['version', 'revision', 'rev', 'seq', 'ver'])
    # business effective date: a date col that is NOT the system-time col
    r_rdate = pick(rd, ['effective_date', 'rate_date', 'as_of_date', 'fx_date',
                        'effective_day', 'business_date', 'value_date', 'date'],
                   avoid=(x for x in (r_vfrom, r_vto) if x))
    if r_rdate is None:
        r_rdate = r_vfrom  # degrade: use knowledge-time as business date
    sys.stderr.write("fx cols ccy=%s rate=%s rdate=%s vfrom=%s vto=%s ver=%s\n"
                     % (r_ccy, r_rate, r_rdate, r_vfrom, r_vto, r_ver))

    rdate_e = date_expr(r_rdate, rd[r_rdate]).alias("rdate")
    vfrom_e = (date_expr(r_vfrom, rd[r_vfrom]) if r_vfrom
               else date_expr(r_rdate, rd[r_rdate])).alias("vfrom")
    vto_e = (date_expr(r_vto, rd[r_vto]) if r_vto
             else F.lit(None).cast("date")).alias("vto")
    ver_e = (F.col(r_ver).cast("double") if r_ver else F.lit(0.0)).alias("ver")
    ccy_r = (F.upper(F.col(r_ccy)) if r_ccy else F.lit("USD")).alias("ccy")
    rate_e = F.col(r_rate).cast("double").alias("rate")

    r = rates.select(ccy_r, rate_e, rdate_e, vfrom_e, vto_e, ver_e)

    # ---------- as-of join helper ----------
    def as_of(cond, order, out_name):
        j = p.alias("p").join(r.alias("r"),
                              (F.col("p.ccy") == F.col("r.ccy")) & cond, "inner")
        w = Window.partitionBy("p.pid").orderBy(*order)
        return (j.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                 .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
                 .select(F.col("p.pid").alias("pid"),
                         F.col("r.rate").alias(out_name)))

    # PRIMARY: correct bitemporal as-of.
    #   business-effective on/before payment date  AND
    #   version known as of payment date (valid_from <= sdate) AND
    #   version still in effect as of payment date (valid_to null or > sdate)
    #   -> excludes any correction recorded after the payment's own date.
    cond1 = ((F.col("r.rdate") <= F.col("p.sdate")) &
             (F.col("r.vfrom") <= F.col("p.sdate")) &
             (F.col("r.vto").isNull() | (F.col("r.vto") > F.col("p.sdate"))))
    order1 = [F.col("r.rdate").desc(), F.col("r.vfrom").desc(), F.col("r.ver").desc()]
    prim = as_of(cond1, order1, "rate_prim")

    # FALLBACK: business as-of only, original (earliest) version — used only when
    # nothing was known as of the payment date (still never a later correction).
    cond2 = (F.col("r.rdate") <= F.col("p.sdate"))
    order2 = [F.col("r.rdate").desc(), F.col("r.ver").asc(), F.col("r.vfrom").asc()]
    fb = as_of(cond2, order2, "rate_fb")

    joined = (p.join(prim, "pid", "left").join(fb, "pid", "left"))
    joined = joined.withColumn(
        "eff_rate",
        F.coalesce(F.col("rate_prim"), F.col("rate_fb"),
                   F.when(F.col("ccy") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))))

    result = (joined
              .filter(F.col("sdate").isNotNull() & F.col("eff_rate").isNotNull())
              .groupBy("sdate")
              .agg(F.sum(F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate")).alias("usd_total"))
              .select(F.col("sdate").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                      F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"))
              .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    result.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(base, "usd_daily.parquet"))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

PAYMENTS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed42.ndjson"


def _detect(path):
    # module-level (NOT a query function) -> safe to touch schema here
    try:
        return list(SparkSession.active().read.json(path).columns)
    except Exception:
        return []


def _pick(cols, candidates, default):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return default


_PCOLS = _detect(PAYMENTS_PATH)
_FCOLS = _detect(FX_PATH)

# payment columns
_P_CCY = _pick(_PCOLS, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code"], "currency")
_P_AMT = _pick(_PCOLS, ["amount", "amt", "value", "payment_amount"], "amount")
_P_DATE = _pick(_PCOLS, ["settlement_date", "settlement_ts", "payment_date", "payment_ts",
                         "paid_at", "event_ts", "event_time", "txn_ts", "ts", "timestamp",
                         "booked_at", "date", "created_at"], "settlement_date")

# fx cdc columns
_F_CCY = _pick(_FCOLS, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code"], "currency")
_F_RATE = _pick(_FCOLS, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "value"], "rate")
_F_EFF = _pick(_FCOLS, ["effective_date", "effective_from", "valid_from", "rate_date",
                        "as_of_date", "effective_dt", "date"], "effective_date")
_F_REC = _pick(_FCOLS, ["change_ts", "committed_at", "commit_ts", "recorded_at", "recorded_ts",
                        "ingested_at", "updated_at", "as_of", "system_ts", "cdc_ts",
                        "change_time", "version_ts", "load_ts", "knowledge_ts"], None)
_F_VER = _pick(_FCOLS, ["version", "seq", "seq_no", "sequence", "revision", "_change_seq"], None)


def _utc_date(colname):
    # ISO strings are UTC (Z) or plain dates; first 10 chars is the UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(F.substring(F.col(colname).cast("string"), 1, 10))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_norm")
def payments_norm():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.json(PAYMENTS_PATH)
    return df.select(
        F.col(_P_CCY).cast("string").alias("currency"),
        F.col(_P_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        _utc_date(_P_DATE).alias("settlement_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_norm")
def fx_norm():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.json(FX_PATH)
    cols = [
        F.col(_F_CCY).cast("string").alias("currency"),
        F.col(_F_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        _utc_date(_F_EFF).alias("effective_date"),
    ]
    if _F_REC is not None:
        cols.append(_utc_date(_F_REC).alias("recorded_date"))
    else:
        cols.append(F.lit(None).cast("date").alias("recorded_date"))
    if _F_VER is not None:
        cols.append(F.col(_F_VER).cast("long").alias("version"))
    else:
        cols.append(F.lit(None).cast("long").alias("version"))
    return df.select(*cols)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_norm")
           .withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))
    fx = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_norm")

    cond = (
        (pay["currency"] == fx["currency"])
        & (fx["effective_date"] <= pay["settlement_date"])            # valid-time as-of
        & (fx["recorded_date"].isNull() | (fx["recorded_date"] <= pay["settlement_date"]))  # known then, not later corrections
    )

    joined = pay.join(fx, cond, "left").select(
        pay["_pid"].alias("_pid"),
        pay["settlement_date"].alias("settlement_date"),
        pay["amount"].alias("amount"),
        fx["rate"].alias("rate"),
        fx["effective_date"].alias("effective_date"),
        fx["recorded_date"].alias("recorded_date"),
        fx["version"].alias("version"),
    )

    # per payment: latest effective_date <= its date, then latest version known as of that date
    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(
        F.col("effective_date").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("recorded_date").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("version").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    chosen = (joined
              .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .withColumn("usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("rate")))

    return (chosen
            .groupBy("settlement_date")
            .agg(F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

PAY_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"
FX_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

def _schema(names):
    return StructType([StructField(n, StringType(), True) for n in names])

PAY_FIELDS = [
    "payment_id","id","txn_id","transaction_id",
    "currency","ccy","currency_code",
    "amount","amount_native","value","amt","native_amount",
    "settlement_ts","settlement_time","settlement_date","settled_at",
    "event_ts","event_time","paid_at","payment_ts","payment_date",
    "ts","timestamp","created_at","date",
]
FX_FIELDS = [
    "currency","ccy","currency_code",
    "rate","fx_rate","usd_rate","rate_to_usd","usd_per_unit","rate_usd",
    "effective_date","valid_from","as_of_date","effective","rate_date","eff_date","date",
    "recorded_at","change_ts","cdc_ts","ingested_at","system_ts","updated_at",
    "knowledge_ts","op_ts","commit_ts","version_ts","recorded_ts","load_ts",
    "ingest_ts","ts","event_ts","op","version",
]

PAY_SCHEMA = _schema(PAY_FIELDS)
FX_SCHEMA  = _schema(FX_FIELDS)

def _co(cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cols])

def _day(cols):
    # UTC calendar day: take leading yyyy-MM-dd from the ISO string, tz-free
    return F.to_date(F.substring(_co(cols), 1, 10))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(PAY_SCHEMA).json(PAY_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_raw")
def fx_rates_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_raw")
    f = spark.read.table("fx_rates_raw")

    ccy_c   = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code"]
    amt_c   = ["amount", "amount_native", "value", "amt", "native_amount"]
    pts_c   = ["settlement_ts","settlement_time","settlement_date","settled_at",
               "event_ts","event_time","paid_at","payment_ts","payment_date",
               "ts","timestamp","created_at","date"]
    rate_c  = ["rate","fx_rate","usd_rate","rate_to_usd","usd_per_unit","rate_usd"]
    eff_c   = ["effective_date","valid_from","as_of_date","effective","rate_date","eff_date","date"]
    sys_c   = ["recorded_at","change_ts","cdc_ts","ingested_at","system_ts","updated_at",
               "knowledge_ts","op_ts","commit_ts","version_ts","recorded_ts","load_ts",
               "ingest_ts","ts","event_ts"]

    pp = p.select(
        F.upper(_co(ccy_c)).alias("pay_ccy"),
        _co(amt_c).cast("double").alias("pay_amt"),
        _day(pts_c).alias("settlement_date"),
    ).withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # system/knowledge time falls back to the effective date if no CDC ts is present
    sys_ts = F.coalesce(_co(sys_c).cast("timestamp"), _co(eff_c).cast("timestamp"))

    ff = f.select(
        F.upper(_co(ccy_c)).alias("fx_ccy"),
        _co(rate_c).cast("double").alias("fx_rate"),
        _day(eff_c).alias("fx_eff"),
        sys_ts.alias("fx_sys_ts"),
    ).withColumn("fx_sys_d", F.to_date("fx_sys_ts"))

    cond = (
        (F.col("pay_ccy") == F.col("fx_ccy"))
        & (F.col("fx_eff") <= F.col("settlement_date"))      # rate effective on/before the payment date
        & (F.col("fx_sys_d") <= F.col("settlement_date"))    # version known as of the payment date (ignore later corrections)
    )

    j = pp.join(ff, cond, "left")

    w = Window.partitionBy("_rid").orderBy(
        F.col("fx_eff").desc_nulls_last(),      # latest effective version in force
        F.col("fx_sys_ts").desc_nulls_last(),   # latest version known as of that date
        F.col("fx_rate").desc_nulls_last(),     # deterministic final tie-break
    )

    picked = (
        j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
         .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    valued = picked.withColumn(
        "usd",
        F.when(F.col("pay_ccy") == "USD", F.col("pay_amt"))
         .otherwise(F.col("pay_amt") * F.col("fx_rate")),
    )

    out = (
        valued.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total"))
    )

    return out.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("usd_total"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, LongType

PAY = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.scd2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.scd2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Candidate field names (explicit schema -> absent ones are null, all resolvable)
PAY_CCY = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "curr", "iso_currency"]
PAY_AMT = ["amount", "amt", "value", "pay_amount", "notional", "amount_original"]
PAY_DT  = ["settlement_date", "settlement_ts", "settled_at", "payment_date", "payment_ts",
           "paid_at", "event_time", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "created_at", "ts", "timestamp", "date"]

FX_CCY  = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "curr", "iso_currency"]
FX_RATE = ["rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd", "exchange_rate", "usd_per_unit"]
FX_EFF  = ["effective_date", "rate_date", "valid_from", "effective_from", "as_of_date",
           "business_date", "effective_ts", "day", "date"]
FX_VER  = ["version", "ver", "seq", "sequence", "change_seq", "revision"]
FX_KTS  = ["change_ts", "updated_at", "ingested_at", "knowledge_ts", "op_ts", "commit_ts",
           "recorded_at", "ingest_ts", "load_ts", "valid_from_ts"]


def _mk_schema(str_cols, dbl_cols=(), long_cols=()):
    fields = [StructField(c, StringType()) for c in str_cols]
    fields += [StructField(c, DoubleType()) for c in dbl_cols]
    fields += [StructField(c, LongType()) for c in long_cols]
    return StructType(fields)


PAY_SCHEMA = _mk_schema(PAY_CCY + PAY_DT, PAY_AMT)
FX_SCHEMA  = _mk_schema(FX_CCY + FX_EFF + FX_KTS, FX_RATE, FX_VER)


def _coalesce(names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    pay = spark.read.schema(PAY_SCHEMA).json(PAY).select(
        _coalesce(PAY_CCY).alias("currency"),
        _coalesce(PAY_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        # UTC calendar day: take the written date portion (ISO/UTC-normalized strings)
        F.to_date(F.substring(_coalesce(PAY_DT), 1, 10)).alias("settlement_date"),
    ).alias("p")

    fx = spark.read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX).select(
        _coalesce(FX_CCY).alias("currency"),
        _coalesce(FX_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        F.to_date(F.substring(_coalesce(FX_EFF), 1, 10)).alias("effective_date"),
        _coalesce(FX_VER).cast("long").alias("ver"),
        _coalesce(FX_KTS).alias("kts"),
    )

    # "The version that applied then, not a later correction":
    # per (currency, effective_date) keep the ORIGINAL published version
    # (lowest version / earliest knowledge timestamp), dropping later corrections.
    w_ver = Window.partitionBy("currency", "effective_date").orderBy(
        F.col("ver").asc_nulls_last(), F.col("kts").asc_nulls_last()
    )
    orig = (
        fx.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_ver))
          .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
          .select("currency", "rate", "effective_date")
    )

    # Build effective ranges so each payment matches the rate in effect on its own date.
    w_next = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("effective_date").asc())
    orig = orig.withColumn("next_eff", F.lead("effective_date").over(w_next)).alias("r")

    cond = (
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("r.effective_date") <= F.col("p.settlement_date"))
        & (F.col("r.next_eff").isNull() | (F.col("p.settlement_date") < F.col("r.next_eff")))
    )

    j = pay.join(orig, cond, "left")

    rate_final = F.when(F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate"))

    return (
        j.groupBy(F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"))
         .agg(F.sum(F.col("p.amount") * rate_final).alias("usd_total"))
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PAYMENTS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed3141.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed3141.ndjson"

PAY_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("payment_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("currency", StringType(), True),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("event_time", StringType(), True),
])

FX_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("currency", StringType(), True),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("effective_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("updated_at", StringType(), True),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(PAY_SCHEMA).json(PAYMENTS_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_raw")
def fx_rates_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_raw").select(
        F.col("payment_id"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        # UTC calendar day taken directly from the ISO date prefix (tz-safe)
        F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("event_time"), 1, 10)).alias("settlement_date"),
    )

    fx = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates_raw").select(
        F.col("currency").alias("fx_currency"),
        F.col("rate").cast("double").alias("rate"),
        F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("effective_date"), 1, 10)).alias("eff_date"),
        F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("updated_at"), 1, 10)).alias("known_date"),
    )

    # As-of join: rate must be effective by the payment date AND already
    # known/official as of that date (later corrections are excluded).
    joined = pay.join(
        fx,
        (pay["currency"] == fx["fx_currency"])
        & (fx["eff_date"] <= pay["settlement_date"])
        & (fx["known_date"] <= pay["settlement_date"]),
        "left",
    )

    # Pick the version that applied then: latest effective on/before the
    # payment date, and among corrections the latest one known by that date.
    w = Window.partitionBy("payment_id").orderBy(
        F.col("eff_date").desc(), F.col("known_date").desc()
    )
    ranked = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    usd = ranked.withColumn("usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("rate"))

    return usd.groupBy("settlement_date").agg(
        F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql import types as T

PAY_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed9001.ndjson"
FX_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed9001.ndjson"

S = T.StringType()
D = T.DoubleType()

# ---- candidate field names (only the real one carries a value; rest are null) ----
CUR   = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "pay_currency", "payment_currency", "from_currency"]
AMT   = ["amount", "amount_original", "original_amount", "value", "pay_amount", "payment_amount", "amt"]
PAYTS = ["settled_at", "settlement_ts", "event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "paid_at",
         "occurred_at", "txn_time", "transaction_time", "ts", "settlement_date", "payment_date", "date"]
PID   = ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "tx_id"]

RATE  = ["rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_per_unit", "conversion_rate", "price"]
RDATE = ["rate_date", "effective_date", "as_of_date", "business_date", "quote_date", "fx_date",
         "value_date", "price_date", "date"]
STIME = ["valid_from", "recorded_at", "ingested_at", "change_ts", "updated_at", "changed_at",
         "commit_ts", "cdc_ts", "op_ts", "version_ts", "correction_ts", "load_ts", "system_time",
         "published_at", "created_at", "effective_ts"]
VER   = ["version", "revision", "seq", "seq_no", "version_no", "rev"]


def _schema(groups):
    seen, fields = set(), []
    for names, dtype in groups:
        for n in names:
            if n not in seen:
                seen.add(n)
                fields.append(T.StructField(n, dtype, True))
    return T.StructType(fields)


PAY_SCHEMA = _schema([(PID, S), (CUR, S), (AMT, D), (PAYTS, S)])
FX_SCHEMA  = _schema([(CUR, S), (RATE, D), (RDATE, S), (STIME, S), (VER, S)])


def _first(names, fn):
    return F.coalesce(*[fn(n) for n in names])


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_clean")
def payments_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = (spark.read.text(PAY_PATH)
         .select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), PAY_SCHEMA).alias("d"))
         .select("d.*"))
    pay_date = F.coalesce(
        *([F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col(c))) for c in PAYTS] +
          [F.to_date(F.col(c)) for c in PAYTS])
    )
    return (j.select(
                F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("pid"),
                F.upper(_first(CUR, F.col)).alias("currency"),
                _first(AMT, F.col).alias("amount"),
                pay_date.alias("pay_date"))
             .where(F.col("pay_date").isNotNull()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rates_clean")
def rates_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = (spark.read.text(FX_PATH)
         .select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), FX_SCHEMA).alias("d"))
         .select("d.*"))
    rate_date = _first(RDATE, lambda c: F.to_date(F.col(c)))
    sys_ts = _first(STIME, lambda c: F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)))
    sys_date = F.coalesce(F.to_date(sys_ts), _first(STIME, lambda c: F.to_date(F.col(c))))
    ver = _first(VER, lambda c: F.col(c).cast("double"))
    return j.select(
        F.upper(_first(CUR, F.col)).alias("currency"),
        _first(RATE, F.col).alias("rate"),
        rate_date.alias("rate_date"),
        sys_date.alias("sys_date"),
        sys_ts.alias("sys_ts"),
        ver.alias("ver"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_clean").alias("p")
    r = spark.read.table("rates_clean").alias("r")

    # as-of join: rate applicable on/before the payment's date, using only the
    # rate version that was already in effect on that date (no later corrections).
    cond = (
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) &
        (F.col("r.rate_date") <= F.col("p.pay_date")) &
        (F.col("r.sys_date") <= F.col("p.pay_date"))
    )
    joined = p.join(r, cond, "left").select(
        F.col("p.pid").alias("pid"),
        F.col("p.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("p.pay_date").alias("pay_date"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("r.rate").alias("rate"),
        F.col("r.rate_date").alias("r_rate_date"),
        F.col("r.sys_date").alias("r_sys_date"),
        F.col("r.sys_ts").alias("r_sys_ts"),
        F.col("r.ver").alias("r_ver"),
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(
        F.col("r_rate_date").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r_sys_date").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r_sys_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("r_ver").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    chosen = (joined
              .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("rn") == 1))

    valued = (chosen
              .withColumn("rate_final",
                          F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))
                           .otherwise(F.col("rate")))
              .withColumn("usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("rate_final")))

    out = (valued.groupBy(F.col("pay_date").alias("settlement_date"))
                 .agg(F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total")))

    return out.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

BASE = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data"
PAY_PATH = BASE + "/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson"
FX_PATH = BASE + "/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"

PAY_SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType(), True) for n in [
    "payment_id", "amount", "amt", "value", "currency", "ccy",
    "settlement_date", "payment_date", "date", "event_date",
    "settlement_ts", "payment_ts", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp",
]])

FX_SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType(), True) for n in [
    "currency", "ccy", "rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price",
    "rate_date", "effective_date", "date", "valid_from", "as_of_date",
    "change_ts", "commit_ts", "recorded_at", "updated_at", "system_time",
    "ingest_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "version", "seq",
    "op", "op_type", "_change_type",
]])


def _day(col):
    # UTC calendar day; robust to "YYYY-MM-DD" and "YYYY-MM-DDT..Z"
    return F.to_date(F.substring(col, 1, 10))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_src")
def payments_src():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(PAY_SCHEMA).json(PAY_PATH)
    currency = F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("amt"), F.col("value")).cast("double")
    sdate = _day(F.coalesce(
        F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("payment_date"), F.col("date"),
        F.col("event_date"), F.col("settlement_ts"), F.col("payment_ts"),
        F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
    ))
    return df.select(
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        sdate.alias("settlement_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_src")
def fx_src():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)
    currency = F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("fx_rate"),
                      F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("price")).cast("double")
    valid_from = _day(F.coalesce(
        F.col("valid_from"), F.col("effective_date"), F.col("rate_date"),
        F.col("date"), F.col("as_of_date"),
    ))
    sys_date = _day(F.coalesce(
        F.col("change_ts"), F.col("commit_ts"), F.col("recorded_at"),
        F.col("updated_at"), F.col("system_time"), F.col("ingest_ts"),
        F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
    ))
    op = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("op_type"), F.col("_change_type")))
    out = df.select(
        currency.alias("currency"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        valid_from.alias("valid_from"),
        sys_date.alias("sys_date"),
        op.alias("op"),
    )
    # drop CDC tombstones; keep rows with no op column (op is null)
    return out.where(F.col("op").isNull() | (~F.col("op").isin("DELETE", "D", "REMOVE")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rate_by_day")
def rate_by_day():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    keys = spark.read.table("payments_src").select("currency", "settlement_date").distinct().alias("k")
    fx = spark.read.table("fx_src").alias("f")
    cond = (
        (F.col("k.currency") == F.col("f.currency")) &
        (F.col("f.valid_from") <= F.col("k.settlement_date")) &
        (F.col("f.sys_date").isNull() | (F.col("f.sys_date") <= F.col("k.settlement_date")))
    )
    j = keys.join(fx, cond, "left")
    # As-of pick: latest applicable validity, then latest version known as of the day.
    picked = j.groupBy("k.currency", "k.settlement_date").agg(
        F.max(F.struct(
            F.col("f.valid_from").alias("vf"),
            F.col("f.sys_date").alias("sd"),
            F.col("f.rate").alias("r"),
        )).alias("m")
    )
    return picked.select(
        F.col("currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("m.r").alias("rate"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_src").alias("p")
    r = spark.read.table("rate_by_day").alias("r")
    cond = (
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) &
        (F.col("p.settlement_date") == F.col("r.settlement_date"))
    )
    j = p.join(r, cond, "left")
    usd_value = F.col("p.amount") * F.coalesce(
        F.col("r.rate"), F.when(F.col("p.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))
    )
    return j.groupBy(F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date")).agg(
        F.sum(usd_value).alias("usd_total")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

PAYMENTS = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"
FX = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"


def _pick(cols, cands, default, avoid=None):
    avoid = avoid or set()
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand in low and low[cand] not in avoid:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in cands:
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc and orig not in avoid:
                return orig
    return default


# ---- schema detection at import time (never inside a query function) ----
try:
    _s = SparkSession.active()
    _pc = _s.read.json(PAYMENTS).columns
    _fc = _s.read.json(FX).columns
except Exception:
    _pc, _fc = [], []

_CUR = ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code", "cur"]

P_CUR = _pick(_pc, _CUR, "currency")
P_AMT = _pick(_pc, ["amount", "amt", "payment_amount", "value", "gross"], "amount")
P_DATE = _pick(_pc, ["settlement_date", "settlement_ts", "settlement_time", "settlement",
                     "payment_date", "event_time", "event_date", "booked_at", "date",
                     "timestamp", "ts"], "settlement_date")

F_CUR = _pick(_fc, _CUR, "currency")
F_RATE = _pick(_fc, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "exchange_rate", "px", "value"], "rate")
F_LO = _pick(_fc, ["valid_from", "effective_date", "effective_from", "rate_date",
                   "as_of_date", "start_date", "effective", "date"], "valid_from")
F_HI = _pick(_fc, ["valid_to", "effective_to", "end_date", "valid_until", "expiry", "valid_thru"], None,
             avoid={F_LO})
F_KT = _pick(_fc, ["recorded_at", "ingested_at", "commit_timestamp", "_commit_timestamp",
                   "change_ts", "changed_at", "updated_at", "known_from", "load_ts",
                   "system_time", "commit_ts", "change_time", "version", "seq", "revision"],
             "recorded_at", avoid={F_LO, F_HI})


@dp.materialized_view(
    name="usd_daily",
    comment="Daily USD totals valued at the FX rate version in effect on each payment's own date (no later corrections).",
)
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.json(PAYMENTS)
    fx = spark.read.json(FX)

    p = (pay
         .withColumn("_cur", F.col(P_CUR).cast("string"))
         .withColumn("_sdate", F.to_date(F.col(P_DATE).cast("timestamp")))
         .withColumn("_amt", F.col(P_AMT).cast("double"))
         .select("_cur", "_sdate", "_amt"))

    f = (fx
         .withColumn("_fcur", F.col(F_CUR).cast("string"))
         .withColumn("_rate", F.col(F_RATE).cast("double"))
         .withColumn("_lo", F.to_date(F.col(F_LO).cast("timestamp")))
         .withColumn("_ktraw", F.col(F_KT))
         .withColumn("_kt", F.to_date(F.col(F_KT).cast("timestamp"))))
    if F_HI is not None:
        f = f.withColumn("_hi", F.to_date(F.col(F_HI).cast("timestamp")))
    else:
        f = f.withColumn("_hi", F.lit(None).cast("date"))
    f = f.select("_fcur", "_rate", "_lo", "_hi", "_kt", "_ktraw")

    # distinct (currency, day) pairs we actually need to value
    days = p.select("_cur", "_sdate").distinct()

    # as-of join:
    #  - valid-time: the rate whose interval covers the payment's day
    #  - transaction-time: only versions already recorded on/before that day
    cond = (
        (days["_cur"] == f["_fcur"])
        & (f["_lo"] <= days["_sdate"])
        & (f["_kt"] <= days["_sdate"])
        & (f["_hi"].isNull() | (f["_hi"] > days["_sdate"]))
    )
    cand = days.join(f, cond, "inner")

    # pick the latest-known version in effect then (never a later correction)
    w = Window.partitionBy("_cur", "_sdate").orderBy(
        F.col("_ktraw").desc(), F.col("_lo").desc()
    )
    lookup = (cand
              .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .select("_cur", "_sdate", "_rate"))

    valued = p.join(lookup, ["_cur", "_sdate"], "inner")

    return (valued
            .groupBy(F.col("_sdate").alias("settlement_date"))
            .agg(F.sum(F.col("_amt") * F.col("_rate")).alias("usd_total")))

import json
from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

PAY_URI = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_payments_seed31415.ndjson"
FX_URI  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed31415.ndjson"

# ---- schema sniffing (pure Python, no Spark job, no session mutation) ----
def _keys(uri):
    path = uri[len("file://"):] if uri.startswith("file://") else uri
    with open(path) as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if line:
                return {k.lower(): k for k in json.loads(line).keys()}
    return {}

def _pick(km, candidates, required=True):
    for c in candidates:
        if c in km:
            return km[c]
    if required:
        raise ValueError(f"none of {candidates} in {list(km.values())}")
    return None

_pk = _keys(PAY_URI)
_fk = _keys(FX_URI)

P_CUR = _pick(_pk, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr"])
P_AMT = _pick(_pk, ["amount", "value", "original_amount", "amount_original", "amt", "payment_amount"])
P_TS  = _pick(_pk, ["settlement_ts", "settlement_time", "settlement_timestamp", "settlement_date",
                    "event_time", "event_ts", "paid_at", "occurred_at", "timestamp", "ts", "booked_at"])

F_CUR  = _pick(_fk, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr"])
F_RATE = _pick(_fk, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd", "usd_per_unit"])
F_EFF  = _pick(_fk, ["effective_date", "rate_date", "valid_from", "as_of_date", "effective_from",
                     "valid_from_date", "date"])
F_KNOW = _pick(_fk, ["change_ts", "changed_at", "recorded_at", "cdc_ts", "commit_ts", "updated_at",
                     "ingested_at", "system_time", "knowledge_time", "recorded_ts",
                     "change_timestamp", "created_at", "version_ts"], required=False)
F_VTO  = _pick(_fk, ["valid_to", "valid_until", "effective_to", "valid_to_date"], required=False)

def _daycol(name):
    # UTC calendar day: take leading YYYY-MM-DD of the (string-cast) value
    return F.to_date(F.substring(F.col(name).cast("string"), 1, 10))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.json(PAY_URI)


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_raw")
def fx_rates_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.json(FX_URI)


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    pay = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_raw")
           .select(
               F.col(P_CUR).alias("currency"),
               F.col(P_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
               _daycol(P_TS).alias("settlement_date")))

    fx = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates_raw")
          .select(
              F.col(F_CUR).alias("currency"),
              F.col(F_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
              _daycol(F_EFF).alias("eff_date"),
              (_daycol(F_KNOW).alias("know_date") if F_KNOW else F.lit(None).cast("date").alias("know_date")),
              (_daycol(F_VTO).alias("vto_date") if F_VTO else F.lit(None).cast("date").alias("vto_date"))))

    keys = pay.select("currency", "settlement_date").distinct()

    cond = F.col("eff_date") <= F.col("settlement_date")
    if F_KNOW:
        cond = cond & (F.col("know_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
    if F_VTO:
        cond = cond & (F.col("vto_date").isNull() | (F.col("settlement_date") < F.col("vto_date")))

    cand = keys.join(fx, on="currency", how="left").where(cond)

    order = [F.col("eff_date").desc()]
    if F_KNOW:
        order.append(F.col("know_date").desc())
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "settlement_date").orderBy(*order)

    rate_lookup = (cand.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                   .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
                   .select("currency", "settlement_date", F.col("rate").alias("eff_rate")))

    priced = (pay.join(rate_lookup, on=["currency", "settlement_date"], how="left")
              .withColumn("eff_rate",
                          F.when(F.upper(F.col("currency")) == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
                           .otherwise(F.col("eff_rate")))
              .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate")))

    return (priced.groupBy("settlement_date")
            .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
            .select("settlement_date", "usd_total"))

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StringType


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    default_input = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed42.ndjson"
    )
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    # ---- profiling / schema-aware column resolution -------------------------
    def pick(names):
        for n in names:
            if n in cols:
                return n
        return None

    id_col = pick(["customer_id", "id", "cust_id", "customerId", "key"])
    tier_col = pick(["tier", "customer_tier"])
    region_col = pick(["region", "customer_region", "geo"])
    order_col = pick([
        "seq", "sequence", "offset", "version", "op_seq", "change_seq",
        "lsn", "commit_ts", "op_ts", "event_time", "event_ts",
        "timestamp", "ts", "_ts",
    ])

    if id_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"No customer_id column found in: {cols}")

    df = raw
    # Deterministic ordering key. Prefer an explicit sequence/time column;
    # otherwise fall back to file input order (stable per input).
    if order_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("__ord", F.col(order_col).cast("string"))
        # numeric-aware ordering when possible, else lexical -- keep both keys
        df = df.withColumn("__ordn", F.col(order_col).cast("double"))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("__ordn", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("double"))
        df = df.withColumn("__ord", F.col("__ordn").cast("string"))

    # Normalize payload columns: treat missing/blank as NULL.
    def norm(colname):
        if colname is None:
            return F.lit(None).cast(StringType())
        c = F.col(colname).cast(StringType())
        return F.when(F.trim(c) == "", None).otherwise(c)

    df = (
        df.withColumn("customer_id", F.col(id_col))
          .withColumn("tier_raw", norm(tier_col))
          .withColumn("region_raw", norm(region_col))
    )

    df = df.filter(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    # Forward-fill real values so a partial update never drops a good prior value.
    asc = (
        Window.partitionBy("customer_id")
        .orderBy(F.col("__ordn").asc_nulls_first(), F.col("__ord").asc_nulls_first())
        .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    )
    df = (
        df.withColumn("tier_ff", F.last("tier_raw", ignorenulls=True).over(asc))
          .withColumn("region_ff", F.last("region_raw", ignorenulls=True).over(asc))
    )

    # Latest event per customer (deterministic tiebreak).
    desc = (
        Window.partitionBy("customer_id")
        .orderBy(F.col("__ordn").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("__ord").desc_nulls_last())
    )
    latest = (
        df.withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(desc))
          .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1)
    )

    # A tombstone == latest event carries no real payload attributes.
    is_tombstone = F.col("tier_raw").isNull() & F.col("region_raw").isNull()

    result = (
        latest.filter(~is_tombstone)
              .select(
                  F.col("customer_id"),
                  F.col("tier_ff").alias("tier"),
                  F.col("region_ff").alias("region"),
              )
    )

    # Register contract-named temp view in-session.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_cdc_tombstone__A__seed1337/customers_current.parquet"


def empty_expr(colname):
    """True when a column is null or blank after trimming."""
    return F.col(colname).isNull() | (F.trim(F.col(colname).cast("string")) == F.lit(""))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUTPUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = df.columns

    # ---- key column -------------------------------------------------------
    key = "customer_id"
    if key not in cols:
        # tolerate a couple of common aliases
        for cand in ["customerId", "id", "cust_id"]:
            if cand in cols:
                df = df.withColumnRenamed(cand, key)
                cols = df.columns
                break

    # ---- ordering column (to find the LATEST event per key) --------------
    order_candidates = [
        "seq", "sequence", "offset", "version", "change_seq", "event_seq",
        "_seq", "op_seq", "commit_seq", "lsn",
        "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "op_ts", "_ts",
        "change_ts", "commit_ts", "time", "updated_at", "modified_at",
    ]
    order_col = next((c for c in order_candidates if c in cols), None)

    if order_col is None:
        # No explicit ordering signal: fall back to physical read order.
        # This is deterministic for a fixed input file set.
        df = df.withColumn("__ord", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        order_col = "__ord"

    # ---- attribute (value) columns ---------------------------------------
    # Everything that is not the key, not the ordering column, and not an
    # explicit CDC-op marker is treated as a payload attribute. A record whose
    # ALL payload attributes are empty is a tombstone (deletion).
    op_like = {"op", "operation", "__op", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op", "eventtype", "event_type"}
    value_cols = [
        c for c in df.columns
        if c != key and c != order_col and c.lower() not in op_like
    ]
    # Ensure the contract attributes are present as value cols even if the
    # op/order heuristics were over-eager.
    for req in ["tier", "region"]:
        if req in df.columns and req not in value_cols:
            value_cols.append(req)

    # ---- deletion (tombstone) detection ----------------------------------
    if value_cols:
        deleted_flag = empty_expr(value_cols[0])
        for c in value_cols[1:]:
            deleted_flag = deleted_flag & empty_expr(c)
    else:
        deleted_flag = F.lit(True)

    # If an explicit op marker exists, honor common delete signals too.
    op_col = next((c for c in df.columns if c.lower() in op_like), None)
    if op_col is not None:
        op_norm = F.upper(F.trim(F.col(op_col).cast("string")))
        op_is_delete = op_norm.isin("D", "DELETE", "DELETED", "REMOVE", "R")
        deleted_flag = deleted_flag | op_is_delete

    staged = df.withColumn("__is_deleted", deleted_flag.cast("boolean"))

    # ---- collapse to the latest event per customer -----------------------
    w = Window.partitionBy(key).orderBy(F.col(order_col).desc())
    latest = (
        staged
        .withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1)
    )

    # ---- apply the contract: drop deletions, keep survivors --------------
    survivors = latest.filter(~F.col("__is_deleted"))

    gold = survivors.select(
        F.col(key).alias("customer_id"),
        F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
        F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
    )

    # Register as a temp view under the contract name for any downstream use.
    gold.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    # ---- write the GOLD output -------------------------------------------
    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def _first_present(cols, candidates):
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    return None


def _blank(colname):
    c = F.col(colname)
    return c.isNull() | (F.trim(c.cast("string")) == F.lit(""))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    fallback = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson")
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", fallback)

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    # ---- detect key / attribute / ordering / op columns ----
    key_col = _first_present(cols, ["customer_id", "customerid", "cust_id", "id"])
    if key_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not find customer id column in {cols}")

    tier_col = _first_present(cols, ["tier"])
    region_col = _first_present(cols, ["region"])

    order_candidates = [
        "seq", "sequence", "_seq", "seq_no", "seqno", "offset", "_offset",
        "ordinal", "_ordinal", "version", "_version", "lsn", "scn",
        "commit_ts", "op_ts", "event_ts", "event_time", "eventtime",
        "updated_at", "update_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "time", "_ts",
    ]
    order_col = _first_present(cols, order_candidates)

    op_col = _first_present(cols, ["op", "operation", "_op", "op_type",
                                   "change_type", "_change_type", "cdc_op"])

    # ensure attribute columns exist even if absent from union schema
    df = raw
    if tier_col is None:
        df = df.withColumn("tier", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
        tier_col = "tier"
    if region_col is None:
        df = df.withColumn("region", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
        region_col = "region"

    # ---- deterministic ordering key ----
    if order_col is not None:
        # numeric-aware ordering: try double, fall back to string
        ord_expr = F.coalesce(F.col(order_col).cast("double"), F.lit(None))
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_num", F.col(order_col).cast("double"))
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_str", F.col(order_col).cast("string"))
        w = Window.partitionBy(key_col).orderBy(
            F.col("_ord_num").asc_nulls_first(),
            F.col("_ord_str").asc_nulls_first(),
        )
    else:
        # no explicit ordering column present -> preserve file read order
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_num", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("double"))
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_str", F.col("_ord_num").cast("string"))
        w = Window.partitionBy(key_col).orderBy(
            F.col("_ord_num").asc_nulls_first(),
            F.col("_ord_str").asc_nulls_first(),
        )

    # latest event per customer_id
    ranked = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w.orderBy(
        F.col("_ord_num").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_ord_str").desc_nulls_last(),
    )))
    latest = ranked.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    # ---- tombstone / deletion detection ----
    is_delete = _blank(tier_col) & _blank(region_col)
    if op_col is not None:
        op_delete = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(op_col).cast("string"))).isin(
            "d", "del", "delete", "deleted", "r"
        )
        is_delete = is_delete | op_delete

    survivors = latest.filter(~is_delete)

    out = (
        survivors
        .select(
            F.col(key_col).alias("customer_id"),
            F.col(tier_col).alias("tier"),

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def _pick(lower_map, candidates, default):
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower_map:
            return lower_map[cand]
    return default


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    default_input = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed3141.ndjson"
    )
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)
    output_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    output_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = df.columns
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    sys.stderr.write("PROFILE schema: %s\n" % (df.dtypes,))
    sys.stderr.write("PROFILE row_count: %d\n" % df.count())

    # --- resolve key column ---
    key_col = _pick(lower, ["customer_id", "customerid", "cust_id", "id"], "customer_id")

    # --- resolve payload columns (contract carries tier, region) ---
    tier_col = _pick(lower, ["tier"], "tier")
    region_col = _pick(lower, ["region"], "region")

    # --- resolve deterministic ordering column ---
    order_candidates = [
        "seq", "sequence", "offset", "change_seq", "commit_seq", "version",
        "ts", "timestamp", "event_ts", "event_time", "op_ts", "commit_ts", "_seq",
    ]
    order_col = None
    for cand in order_candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            order_col = lower[cand]
            break
    if order_col is None:
        # Deterministic-per-file fallback preserving arrival order.
        df = df.withColumn("__ord", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        order_col = "__ord"
    sys.stderr.write("PROFILE using key=%s order=%s tier=%s region=%s\n"
                     % (key_col, order_col, tier_col, region_col))

    # --- tombstone detection: an "empty record" (all payload fields null/blank) ---
    def emptyish(c):
        return (F.col(c).isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col(c).cast("string")) == "")

    is_tomb = emptyish(tier_col) & emptyish(region_col)
    df = df.withColumn("__is_tomb", is_tomb)

    # --- reduce to latest event per customer ---
    w = Window.partitionBy(key_col).orderBy(
        F.col(order_col).desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("__is_tomb").asc(),  # deterministic tie-break: prefer non-tombstone stable
    )
    latest = (
        df.withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1)
    )

    # --- survivors: latest event is NOT a deletion; carry its real values ---
    survivors = (
        latest.filter(~F.col("__is_tomb"))
              .select(
                  F.col(key_col).cast("string").alias("customer_id"),
                  F.col(tier_col).cast("string").alias("tier"),
                  F.col(region_col).cast("string").alias("region"),
              )
    )

    # Register as temp view under the exact contract name.
    survivors.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    if output_path:
        survivors.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(output_path)
    elif output_table:
        survivors.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)
    else:
        raise SystemExit("No output destination provided (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH / AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE).")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()
