import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed5772.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_cdc_tombstone__A__seed5772/customers_current.parquet"


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if not out_path and not out_table:
        out_path = DEFAULT_OUTPUT

    # ---- Read raw change feed ----
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns
    print("=== PROFILE: schema ===")
    for name, dtype in raw.dtypes:
        print(f"   {name}: {dtype}")
    print("=== PROFILE: sample rows ===")
    raw.show(25, truncate=False)
    print("=== PROFILE: total events ===", raw.count())

    # ---- Determine the id column ----
    id_col = "customer_id"
    if id_col not in cols:
        # tolerate slight naming variants
        for cand in ["customerId", "id", "cust_id"]:
            if cand in cols:
                id_col = cand
                break

    # ---- Determine an ordering column (CDC event order) ----
    order_candidates = [
        "seq", "sequence", "seq_num", "seqnum", "offset", "change_seq",
        "changeseq", "version", "ver", "op_seq", "_seq",
        "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp",
        "op_ts", "ingest_ts", "commit_ts", "updated_at", "change_ts",
    ]
    order_col = next((c for c in order_candidates if c in cols), None)
    print("=== PROFILE: chosen order column ===", order_col)

    # Stable file-order id for tie-breaking / fallback ordering.
    df = raw.withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    if order_col is None:
        order_col = "_rid"

    # ---- Payload columns that define a "real" record ----
    payload_cols = [c for c in ["tier", "region"] if c in cols]

    # "empty record" => deletion tombstone: every payload field missing
    def missing(c):
        col = F.col(c)
        return col.isNull() | (F.trim(col.cast("string")) == F.lit(""))

    is_del = None
    for c in payload_cols:
        cond = missing(c)
        is_del = cond if is_del is None else (is_del & cond)
    if is_del is None:
        is_del = F.lit(False)
    df = df.withColumn("_is_del", is_del)

    # Only keyed events are meaningful
    df = df.filter(F.col(id_col).isNotNull())

    # ---- Pick the latest event per customer (deterministic) ----
    w = Window.partitionBy(id_col).orderBy(
        F.col(order_col).desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_rid").desc(),
    )
    latest = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    # ---- Deletion removes; surviving customers reflect latest real values ----
    result = (
        latest.filter(~F.col("_is_del"))
              .select(
                  F.col(id_col).alias("customer_id"),
                  F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
                  F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
              )
    )

    result = result.dropDuplicates(["customer_id"])

    print("=== RESULT: surviving customers ===", result.count())
    result.show(50, truncate=False)

    # Register the contract table as a temp view in this session.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    # ---- Write GOLD output ----
    if out_path:
        result.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("Wrote parquet to", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print("Wrote table", out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed9001.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_cdc_tombstone__A__seed9001/customers_current.parquet"

ID_CANDS = ["customer_id", "customerId", "cust_id", "custid", "id", "key", "customer"]
SEQ_CANDS = ["seq", "sequence", "seq_no", "seqno", "seqnum", "offset", "version",
             "_version", "change_seq", "changeseq", "lsn", "scn",
             "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp",
             "op_ts", "ts_ms", "_ts", "time", "updated_at", "commit_ts"]


def pick(cols, cands):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUTPUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(input_path)

    print("=== INPUT SCHEMA ===")
    df.printSchema()
    print("=== SAMPLE ROWS ===")
    df.show(25, truncate=False)
    print("=== ROW COUNT ===", df.count())

    cols = df.columns
    cid = pick(cols, ID_CANDS)
    if cid is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate a customer id column in {cols}")

    tier = pick(cols, ["tier"])
    region = pick(cols, ["region"])
    if tier is None or region is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Contract columns tier/region not found in {cols}")

    seq = pick(cols, SEQ_CANDS)
    if seq is not None:
        print(f"Using ordering column: {seq}")
        seq_col = F.col(seq)
    else:
        # No explicit ordering column: fall back to file arrival order.
        # Deterministic for a single-file replay of the same input.
        print("WARNING: no ordering column found; falling back to input order.")
        df = df.withColumn("_row_order", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
        seq = "_row_order"
        seq_col = F.col(seq)

    tier_val = F.col(tier)
    region_val = F.col(region)

    # Normalize blank strings to NULL for value + emptiness detection.
    tier_empty = tier_val.isNull() | (F.trim(tier_val.cast("string")) == F.lit(""))
    region_empty = region_val.isNull() | (F.trim(region_val.cast("string")) == F.lit(""))

    # An upstream deletion is published as an EMPTY record: both attributes blank.
    is_delete = tier_empty & region_empty

    prepped = (df
               .withColumn("_seq", seq_col)
               .withColumn("_is_delete", is_delete)
               .withColumn("_tier", F.when(tier_empty, F.lit(None)).otherwise(tier_val))
               .withColumn("_region", F.when(region_empty, F.lit(None)).otherwise(region_val)))

    # Per-customer: find the sequence of the LAST deletion event (if any).
    w_cust = Window.partitionBy(F.col(cid))
    last_delete_seq = F.max(F.when(F.col("_is_delete"), F.col("_seq"))).over(w_cust)
    tagged = prepped.withColumn("_last_delete_seq", last_delete_seq)

    # Alive segment = events AFTER the last deletion (or all events if never deleted).
    # A customer whose final event is the deletion has no alive rows -> excluded.
    alive = tagged.filter(
        F.col("_last_delete_seq").isNull() | (F.col("_seq") > F.col("_last_delete_seq"))
    )

    # Within the alive segment, carry the latest REAL (non-null) value per field.
    w_full = (Window.partitionBy(F.col(cid))
              .orderBy(F.col("_seq"))
              .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.unboundedFollowing))
    w_last = Window.partitionBy(F.col(cid)).orderBy(F.col("_seq").desc())

    resolved = (alive
                .withColumn("tier", F.last("_tier", ignorenulls=True).over(w_full))
                .withColumn("region", F.last("_region", ignorenulls=True).over(w_full))
                .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_last))
                .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .select(F.col(cid).alias("customer_id"), "tier", "region"))

    result = resolved.dropDuplicates(["customer_id"])

    print("=== OUTPUT SCHEMA ===")
    result.printSchema()
    print("=== OUTPUT SAMPLE ===")
    result.show(25, truncate=False)
    print("=== SURVIVING CUSTOMERS ===", result.count())

    # Register the contract table as a temp view in this session.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    # Materialize the GOLD output.
    if os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH") is not None or not out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print(f"Wrote parquet to {out_path}")
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print(f"Wrote table {out_table}")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- CDC tombstone -> customers_current (imperative pyspark.sql)

Standard CDC "current table" semantics:
  * each change event carries the row's latest full state
  * the newest event per customer_id wins (deterministic ordering => reprocess-stable)
  * a DELETE is published as a tombstone: an empty record (tier & region null/empty)
  * tombstone as the latest event  => customer removed
  * non-empty latest event         => surviving customer, use its tier/region
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


# Fallback dataset path for this seed (used only when AGENT_INPUT_PATH is unset).
DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"
)


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    # ---- detect the contract / ordering columns defensively -------------------
    key_col = _pick(cols, ["customer_id", "cust_id", "customerid", "id", "key"])
    tier_col = _pick(cols, ["tier"])
    region_col = _pick(cols, ["region"])
    order_col = _pick(
        cols,
        ["seq", "sequence", "change_seq", "offset", "lsn", "version",
         "commit_seq", "event_seq", "_seq",
         "event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "_ts", "commit_ts", "updated_at"],
    )
    op_col = _pick(cols, ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "event_type", "action"])

    if key_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"could not locate customer_id key column in {cols}")

    df = raw.withColumnRenamed(key_col, "customer_id")
    if tier_col and tier_col != "tier":
        df = df.withColumnRenamed(tier_col, "tier")
    if region_col and region_col != "region":
        df = df.withColumnRenamed(region_col, "region")

    if "tier" not in df.columns:
        df = df.withColumn("tier", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    if "region" not in df.columns:
        df = df.withColumn("region", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    # normalize attributes: empty/whitespace strings -> null
    df = df.withColumn(
        "tier",
        F.when(F.trim(F.col("tier").cast("string")) == "", None)
         .otherwise(F.col("tier").cast("string")),
    ).withColumn(
        "region",
        F.when(F.trim(F.col("region").cast("string")) == "", None)
         .otherwise(F.col("region").cast("string")),
    )

    # deterministic ordering: prefer an explicit ordering column
    if order_col is not None:
        ord_expr = F.col(order_col)
    else:
        # last-resort stable-ish ordering; a real feed should carry an order key
        ord_expr = F.monotonically_increasing_id()
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_fallback", ord_expr)
        ord_expr = F.col("_ord_fallback")

    # tombstone / delete detection
    if op_col is not None:
        is_delete = (
            F.upper(F.col(op_col).cast("string")).isin("D", "DELETE", "DEL", "TOMBSTONE")
            | (F.col("tier").isNull() & F.col("region").isNull())
        )
    else:
        # empty record => deletion
        is_delete = F.col("tier").isNull() & F.col("region").isNull()

    df = df.withColumn("_is_delete", is_delete)

    # keep the newest event per customer (latest change wins)
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(ord_expr.desc())
    latest = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    # drop deleted customers; emit surviving customers' latest real values
    result = (
        latest.filter(~F.col("_is_delete"))
              .select(
                  F.col("customer_id"),
                  F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
                  F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
              )
    )

    # register the contract-named temp view in this session
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("no AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import NumericType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_cdc_tombstone__A__seed27182/customers_current.parquet"


def pick(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    # --- infer schema first so we can parse with a stable, per-line row number ---
    inferred = spark.read.json(input_path)
    schema = inferred.schema
    cols = inferred.columns
    print("Inferred columns:", cols)
    for f in schema.fields:
        print("   field:", f.name, "->", f.dataType.simpleString())

    # --- re-read as text to attach a deterministic file-order index, then parse ---
    raw = spark.read.text(input_path).withColumn("_rn", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    parsed = (raw
              .select("_rn", F.from_json(F.col("value"), schema).alias("j"))
              .filter(F.col("j").isNotNull())
              .select("_rn", "j.*"))

    # --- identify key column ---
    key = pick(cols, ["customer_id", "cust_id", "customerid", "id"])
    if key is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not locate a customer key column among: %s" % cols)
    if key != "customer_id":
        parsed = parsed.withColumnRenamed(key, "customer_id")

    # --- ensure contract payload columns exist ---
    for c in ["tier", "region"]:
        if c not in parsed.columns:
            parsed = parsed.withColumn(c, F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    # --- choose an ordering signal: prefer an explicit numeric sequence/offset/version,
    #     else fall back to deterministic file order (_rn). Tie-break always by _rn. ---
    numeric_names = {f.name for f in schema.fields if isinstance(f.dataType, NumericType)}
    order_col = None
    for cand in ["seq", "sequence", "event_seq", "change_seq", "offset",
                 "version", "lsn", "commit_seq", "_ts", "ts", "event_ts",
                 "event_time", "event_timestamp", "timestamp", "updated_at",
                 "commit_ts", "change_ts"]:
        real = pick(cols, [cand])
        if real is not None and real in numeric_names:
            order_col = real
            break

    if order_col is not None:
        print("Ordering events by explicit column:", order_col)
        w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
            F.col(order_col).cast("double").desc_nulls_last(),
            F.col("_rn").desc())
    else:
        print("Ordering events by file arrival order (_rn)")
        w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("_rn").desc())

    latest = (parsed
              .filter(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
              .withColumn("_r", F.row_number().over(w))
              .filter(F.col("_r") == 1))

    # --- a tombstone/deletion is an "empty record": no real payload values.
    #     Treat null OR empty-string tier/region as absent. ---
    tier_present = F.col("tier").isNotNull() & (F.trim(F.col("tier").cast("string")) != F.lit(""))
    region_present = F.col("region").isNotNull() & (F.trim(F.col("region").cast("string")) != F.lit(""))
    is_deletion = (~tier_present) & (~region_present)

    survivors = latest.filter(~is_deletion)

    out = survivors.select(
        F.col("customer_id"),
        F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
        F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
    )

    out.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    total_keys = parsed.select("customer_id").distinct().count()
    surviving = out.count()
    print("Distinct customer_ids seen:", total_keys)
    print("Surviving (non-deleted) customers:", surviving)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed31415.ndjson"


def pick(cols, names):

    for n in names:
        if n in low:
            return low[n]
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    df = spark.read.json(inp)
    cols = df.columns

    # --- profile / resolve columns defensively ---
    id_col = pick(cols, ['customer_id', 'customerid', 'cust_id', 'custid', 'id', 'key'])
    tier_col = pick(cols, ['tier'])
    region_col = pick(cols, ['region'])
    order_col = pick(cols, [
        'seq', 'sequence', 'seq_num', 'seqnum', 'sequence_number', 'seqno',
        'offset', 'version', '_version', 'lsn', 'change_seq',
        'ts', 'timestamp', 'event_time', 'event_ts', 'event_timestamp',
        'ingest_ts', 'updated_at', 'update_ts', 'change_ts', '_ts', 'time',
    ])

    if id_col is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not locate a customer_id column in input schema: %s" % cols)

    # stable per-row read order for deterministic tiebreak (single-file NDJSON -> file order)
    df = df.withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # normalize attribute values: treat missing/blank as NULL so an "empty record" is a tombstone
    tier_expr = F.col(tier_col).cast("string") if tier_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    region_expr = F.col(region_col).cast("string") if region_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    df = df.withColumn(
        "__tier",
        F.when(F.trim(tier_expr) == "", None).otherwise(tier_expr),
    ).withColumn(
        "__region",
        F.when(F.trim(region_expr) == "", None).otherwise(region_expr),
    )

    # --- pick latest event per customer ---
    if order_col:
        order_spec = [F.col(order_col).desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_rid").desc()]
    else:
        # no explicit ordering column -> fall back to read order
        order_spec = [F.col("_rid").desc()]

    w = Window.partitionBy(F.col(id_col)).orderBy(*order_spec)
    latest = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    # --- a deletion is an empty record: drop customers whose latest event has no real attributes ---
    survivors = latest.filter(~(F.col("__tier").isNull() & F.col("__region").isNull()))

    result = survivors.select(
        F.col(id_col).cast("string").alias("customer_id"),
        F.col("__tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
        F.col("__region").cast("string").alias("region"),
    )

    # register the contract view in this SparkSession
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "customers_current.parquet")
        )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def is_empty(colname):
    """A value column is 'empty' if it's null or a blank string."""
    c = F.col(colname)
    return c.isNull() | (F.trim(c.cast("string")) == F.lit(""))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    default_input = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"
    )
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)

    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = df.columns

    # ---- Profiling ----
    print("=== SCHEMA ===")
    print(df.schema.simpleString())
    print("=== SAMPLE ===")
    df.show(30, truncate=False)
    print("=== ROW COUNT ===", df.count())

    key = "customer_id"
    if key not in cols:
        raise ValueError(f"Expected key column '{key}' in input; got {cols}")

    # Preserve original file read order as a stable tiebreaker.
    df = df.withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # Identify a CDC ordering / sequence column (envelope metadata that is
    # present even on a tombstone). This is what tells us the *latest* event.
    order_candidates = [
        "seq", "sequence", "seq_no", "seqno", "offset", "version",
        "change_seq", "commit_seq", "lsn", "event_ts", "event_time",
        "ts", "timestamp", "op_ts", "commit_ts", "_ts",
    ]
    order_col = next((c for c in order_candidates if c in cols), None)
    print("=== ORDER COLUMN ===", order_col)

    # Latest event per customer_id.
    if order_col is not None:
        w = Window.partitionBy(key).orderBy(
            F.col(order_col).desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_rid").desc()
        )
    else:
        # No explicit sequence -> fall back to read order.
        w = Window.partitionBy(key).orderBy(F.col("_rid").desc())

    latest = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
          .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    # Payload/value columns = everything that is NOT the key, NOT the ordering
    # metadata, and NOT our internal helpers. An "empty record" (tombstone /
    # deletion) has ALL payload columns absent/null.
    internal = {key, order_col, "_rid", "_rn"}
    payload_cols = [c for c in cols if c not in internal]
    print("=== PAYLOAD COLUMNS ===", payload_cols)

    if payload_cols:
        tombstone_cond = None
        for c in payload_cols:
            e = is_empty(c)
            tombstone_cond = e if tombstone_cond is None else (tombstone_cond & e)
        survivors = latest.filter(~tombstone_cond)
    else:
        survivors = latest

    # ---- Build contract output: customers_current(customer_id, tier, region) ----
    for req in ("tier", "region"):
        if req not in survivors.columns:
            raise ValueError(f"Contract column '{req}' missing from input schema {cols}")

    out = survivors.select(
        F.col("customer_id"),
        F.col("tier"),
        F.col("region"),
    )

    # Register as temp view under the exact contract name.
    out.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    print("=== FINAL customers_current ===")
    out.orderBy("customer_id").show(50, truncate=False)
    print("=== SURVIVING CUSTOMER COUNT ===", out.count())

    # ---- Materialize GOLD ----
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        print("Wrote parquet to", out_path)
    elif out_table:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        print("Wrote table", out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("Neither AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH nor AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE set")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                 ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed14142.ndjson")
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                  ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_cdc_tombstone__A__seed14142/"
                  "customers_current.parquet")

CONTRACT_ATTRS = ["tier", "region"]
KEY = "customer_id"


def pick_order_col(cols):
    """Detect the CDC ordering column (sequence/offset/version/timestamp)."""
    exclude = {KEY, "tier", "region"}
    prefs = ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "lsn", "version", "commit",
             "change", "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp",
             "updated_at", "update_ts", "updated", "timestamp", "ts", "time"]
    for p in prefs:
        for c in cols:
            if c.lower() in exclude:
                continue
            if p in c.lower():
                return c
    # fallback: first non-contract column
    for c in cols:
        if c.lower() not in exclude:
            return c
    return None


def emptyish(colname):
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    return c.isNull() | (F.trim(c) == F.lit(""))


def main():
    spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("new_cdc_tombstone").getOrCreate()

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(in_path)
    print("=== Input schema ===")
    df.printSchema()

    orig_cols = df.columns

    # Guarantee contract attribute columns exist.
    for c in CONTRACT_ATTRS:
        if c not in df.columns:
            df = df.withColumn(c, F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    if KEY not in df.columns:
        raise ValueError("Input feed is missing the '%s' key column" % KEY)

    # Only events that carry a key can be meaningfully applied.
    df = df.filter(F.col(KEY).isNotNull())

    order_col = pick_order_col(orig_cols)
    print("=== Detected ordering column:", order_col, "===")

    if order_col is None:
        # No ordering signal at all: fall back to a stable derived order.
        df = df.withColumn("_ord", F.lit(0))
        order_col = "_ord"

    # Tombstone = deletion event = empty payload (all attributes empty).
    tomb_pred = emptyish(CONTRACT_ATTRS[0])
    for c in CONTRACT_ATTRS[1:]:
        tomb_pred = tomb_pred & emptyish(c)
    df = df.withColumn("_is_tomb", tomb_pred)

    # Deterministic fold: latest event per customer wins.
    tie_cols = [F.col(c).cast("string") for c in orig_cols]
    w = Window.partitionBy(KEY).orderBy(
        F.col(order_col).desc_nulls_last(),
        F.hash(*tie_cols).desc(),
    )
    ranked = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    latest = ranked.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    # Surviving customers = those whose most recent event is NOT a tombstone.
    survivors = latest.filter(~F.col("_is_tomb"))

    out = survivors.select(
        F.col(KEY).alias(KEY),
        F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
        F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
    )

    # Register as a temp view under the exact contract name.
    out.createOrReplaceTempView("customers_current")

    if out_path:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed3141.ndjson")


@dp.materialized_view(name="customer_changes")
def customer_changes():
    # Raw CDC change feed (batch read of the NDJSON stream snapshot).
    return SparkSession.active().read.json(DATA)


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("customer_changes")

    # Latest event per customer. Order by the ordering column (seq) so the
    # result is deterministic under reprocessing of the same input.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("seq").desc())
    latest = (
        src.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
           .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    )

    # A deletion is published as an empty record: its attribute payload is
    # null (missing key) or blank. Such customers must be excluded entirely.
    tier_present = F.col("tier").isNotNull() & (F.trim(F.col("tier").cast("string")) != F.lit(""))
    region_present = F.col("region").isNotNull() & (F.trim(F.col("region").cast("string")) != F.lit(""))

    surviving = latest.where(tier_present & region_present)

    return surviving.select("customer_id", "tier", "region")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed5772.ndjson"


@dp.materialized_view(name="customer_cdc_raw")
def customer_cdc_raw():
    # Raw change feed: batch relation -> materialized_view (not @dp.table).
    return SparkSession.active().read.json(DATA)


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("customer_cdc_raw")

    # Full-partition window (all events for a customer, ordered by CDC seq).
    w_all = (
        Window.partitionBy("customer_id")
        .orderBy(F.col("seq").asc_nulls_first())
        .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.unboundedFollowing)
    )
    # Ordering window to pick a single representative row per customer.
    w_pick = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("seq").asc_nulls_first())

    enriched = (
        df
        # latest *real* value per attribute (ignore null-carrying tombstones)
        .withColumn("tier_f", F.last("tier", True).over(w_all))
        .withColumn("region_f", F.last("region", True).over(w_all))
        # value exactly at max seq (nulls kept) -> used to detect a trailing deletion
        .withColumn("last_tier", F.last("tier", False).over(w_all))
        .withColumn("last_region", F.last("region", False).over(w_all))
        .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_pick))
    )

    one_per_customer = enriched.where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # A deletion tombstone = latest event is an empty record (all attrs null).
    surviving = one_per_customer.where(
        ~(F.col("last_tier").isNull() & F.col("last_region").isNull())
    )

    return surviving.select(
        F.col("customer_id"),
        F.col("tier_f").alias("tier"),
        F.col("region_f").alias("region"),
    )

@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")

    # Latest change per customer. `seq` is the monotonic CDC ordering key, so the

    surviving = latest.where(~(is_blank("tier") & is_blank("region")))

        F.col("customer_id"),

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"

# Explicit schema => no inference scan (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS); only contract cols referenced.
SCHEMA = "customer_id STRING, tier STRING, region STRING"


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_cdc_raw")
def customers_cdc_raw():
    # Read the change feed in file order and stamp a deterministic ordering id.
    # A deletion tombstone is an "empty record": customer_id present, tier/region null.
    return (
        SparkSession.active()
        .read.schema(SCHEMA)
        .json(DATA)
        .withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("customers_cdc_raw")

    # Latest event per customer.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("_rid").desc())
    latest = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    # Tombstone = empty record (both attributes null/blank).
    is_deleted = (
        (F.col("tier").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("tier")) == F.lit(""))) &
        (F.col("region").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("region")) == F.lit("")))
    )

    # Exclude deleted customers; keep survivors' latest real values.
    return (
        latest
        .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())
        .where(~is_deleted)
        .select("customer_id", "tier", "region")
    )

import os
import unicodedata
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StringType

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Multilingual keyword banks. Keys are compared against an accent-stripped,
# lowercased subject, so we store the accent-stripped normalized forms.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
SPAM = [
    # english
    "free", "winner", "you won", "you have won", "prize", "lottery",

    "lotterie", "geld", "angebot", "rabatt", "jetzt klicken",

    "gratuito", "vencedor", "premio", "loteria", "dinheiro", "oferta",
    "vincitore", "denaro", "offerta", "sconto",
]

URGENT = [
    # english
    "urgent", "asap", "immediately", "emergency", "critical", "right now",
    "as soon as possible", "act immediately", "important", "time sensitive",
    "high priority", "escalate", "outage", "down", "failure", "breach",

    "urgente", "inmediatamente", "emergencia", "critico", "importante",

    # french
    "urgent", "immediatement", "urgence", "critique", "important",
    "des que possible", "priorite haute",
    # german
    "dringend", "sofort", "notfall", "kritisch", "wichtig", "eilig",
    "hohe prioritat",
    # portuguese / italian
    "urgente", "imediatamente", "emergencia", "critico", "importante",
    "urgentemente", "emergenza",
]

ROUTING = [
    # english
    "please forward", "forward to", "route to", "reroute", "transfer to",
    "assign to", "redirect", "please route", "send to", "handoff", "hand off",
    "escalate to", "cc", "loop in", "for the attention of", "attn",
    "department", "ticket", "case number", "reassign", "on behalf of",
    # spanish
    "reenviar", "reenvie", "transferir", "redirigir", "asignar", "enviar a",
    "departamento", "remitir",
    # french
    "transferer", "faire suivre", "rediriger", "assigner", "envoyer a",
    "acheminer", "departement", "veuillez transferer",
    # german
    "weiterleiten", "weiterleitung", "umleiten", "zuweisen", "senden an",
    "abteilung", "bitte weiterleiten",
    # portuguese / italian
    "encaminhar", "transferir", "redirecionar", "atribuir", "inoltrare",
    "trasferire", "reindirizzare", "assegnare",
]


def _normalize(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # Unicode canonical decomposition, drop combining marks (accents),
    # collapse whitespace, lowercase. Handles non-English Latin subjects.
    s = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", s)
    s = "".join(c for c in s if not unicodedata.combining(c))
    s = " ".join(s.split())
    return s.strip().lower()


def _classify(subject):
    text = _normalize(subject)
    if not text:            # blank / null / whitespace-only subject
        return "info"
    if any(k in text for k in SPAM):
        return "spam"
    if any(k in text for k in URGENT):
        return "urgent"
    if any(k in text for k in ROUTING):
        return "routing"
    return "info"


def build_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_udf_classifier")
        .master(os.environ.get("SPARK_MASTER", "local[*]"))
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def main():
    spark = build_spark()

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUTPUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    raw = spark.read.json(in_path)

    cols = set(raw.columns)

    # Resolve email_id column defensively across likely feed spellings.
    id_col = None
    for cand in ["email_id", "id", "emailId", "message_id", "messageId", "msg_id"]:
        if cand in cols:
            id_col = cand
            break
    if id_col is None:
        raw = raw.withColumn("email_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
        id_col = "email_id"

    subj_col = None
    for cand in ["subject", "subj", "title", "email_subject"]:
        if cand in cols:
            subj_col = cand
            break
    if subj_col is None:
        raw = raw.withColumn("subject", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
        subj_col = "subject"

    staged = raw.select(
        F.col(id_col).cast("string").alias("email_id"),
        F.col(subj_col).cast("string").alias("subject"),
    )
    staged.createOrReplaceTempView("staged_emails")

    classify_udf = F.udf(_classify, StringType())

    classified = staged.select(
        F.col("email_id"),
        F.col("subject"),
        classify_udf(F.col("subject")).alias("category"),
    )

    # Enforce the contract's category domain deterministically.
    valid = ["urgent", "spam", "routing", "info"]
    classified = classified.withColumn(
        "category",
        F.when(F.col("category").isin(valid), F.col("category")).otherwise(F.lit("info")),
    )

    classified.createOrReplaceTempView("classified_emails")

    if out_table:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""pipeline.py — subject tagger for inbound email triage.

Reads the raw email feed (NDJSON), classifies each subject into exactly one of
{urgent, spam, routing, info} using a deterministic, language-agnostic,
accent-insensitive keyword UDF, and writes the GOLD contract output:

    classified_emails(email_id, subject, category)

Deterministic & idempotent: the UDF is pure (no I/O, no randomness), so
reprocessing identical input always yields identical output.
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import unicodedata

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, udf
from pyspark.sql.types import StringType


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Config
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_emails_seed1337.ndjson"
)
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.powered.AB.n12.part2/new_udf_classifier__A__seed1337/"
    "classified_emails.parquet"
)

VALID_CATEGORIES = {"urgent", "spam", "routing", "info"}
DEFAULT_CATEGORY = "info"  # blank / unscored subjects land in the general queue


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Multilingual keyword lexicons (normalized: lowercase, diacritics stripped).
# Priority order is fixed: urgent > spam > routing > info.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
URGENT_KEYWORDS = [
    # English
    "urgent", "asap", "immediately", "immediate", "emergency", "critical",
    "important", "deadline", "escalation urgent", "act now", "right away",
    "time sensitive", "high priority", "priority", "alert", "outage", "down",
    # Spanish
    "urgente", "inmediatamente", "inmediato", "emergencia", "critico",
    "importante", "ahora", "prioridad", "cuanto antes",
    # French
    "immediatement", "urgence", "critique", "delai", "prioritaire",
    "des maintenant", "tres important",
    # German
    "dringend", "sofort", "notfall", "kritisch", "wichtig", "eilig",
    "hohe prioritat",
    # Italian
    "urgente", "immediatamente", "emergenza", "importante", "priorita",
    # Portuguese
    "urgente", "imediatamente", "emergencia", "importante", "prioridade",
]

SPAM_KEYWORDS = [
    # English
    "free", "winner", "won", "prize", "congratulations", "congrats", "click here",
    "click now", "offer", "special offer", "discount", "buy now", "cheap",
    "cash", "money", "million", "lottery", "viagra", "casino", "credit",
    "guaranteed", "risk free", "act now free", "limited time", "unsubscribe",
    "earn money", "make money", "bitcoin", "crypto deal", "loan", "$$$",
    "100% free", "no cost",
    # Spanish
    "gratis", "ganador", "ganaste", "premio", "felicidades", "oferta",
    "descuento", "dinero", "loteria", "gratuito", "gana dinero", "haz clic",
    # French
    "gratuit", "gagnant", "gagne", "prix", "felicitations", "offre",
    "remise", "argent", "loterie", "cliquez ici", "gagnez",
    # German
    "kostenlos", "gewinner", "gewonnen", "preis", "gluckwunsch", "angebot",
    "rabatt", "geld", "lotterie", "gratis geld", "jetzt klicken",
    # Italian
    "gratis", "vincitore", "premio", "congratulazioni", "offerta", "sconto",
    "denaro", "lotteria",
    # Portuguese
    "gratis", "vencedor", "premio", "parabens", "oferta", "desconto",
    "dinheiro", "loteria",
]

ROUTING_KEYWORDS = [
    # English
    "forward", "route", "routing", "reroute", "assign", "assigned",
    "transfer", "escalate", "escalated", "ticket", "case", "case number",
    "department", "queue", "handoff", "hand off", "please forward",
    "redirect", "reassign", "dispatch", "ref number", "ref:", "case #",
    # Spanish
    "reenviar", "transferir", "asignar", "asignado", "departamento",
    "escalar", "caso", "redirigir", "reasignar",
    # French
    "transferer", "reacheminer", "assigner", "service", "escalader",
    "rediriger", "reaffecter", "dossier",
    # German
    "weiterleiten", "zuweisen", "abteilung", "eskalieren", "umleiten",
    "vorgang", "ticket weiterleiten",
    # Italian
    "inoltrare", "instradare", "assegnare", "reparto", "trasferire",
    "caso", "reindirizzare",
    # Portuguese
    "encaminhar", "rotear", "atribuir", "departamento", "transferir",
    "redirecionar", "caso",
]


def _normalize(text):
    """Lowercase and strip diacritics so multilingual/accented subjects match."""
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Unicode canonical decomposition, then drop combining marks (accents).
    decomposed = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", text)
    stripped = "".join(c for c in decomposed if not unicodedata.combining(c))
    return stripped.lower().strip()


def _build_pattern(keywords):
    """Word/phrase-boundary regex for a keyword set (deterministic)."""
    parts = []
    for kw in sorted(set(keywords), key=len, reverse=True):
        esc = re.escape(kw)
        # boundaries that also work around punctuation like $$$ / case #
        parts.append(r"(?<![a-z0-9])" + esc + r"(?![a-z0-9])")
    return re.compile("|".join(parts))


_URGENT_RE = _build_pattern(URGENT_KEYWORDS)
_SPAM_RE = _build_pattern(SPAM_KEYWORDS)
_ROUTING_RE = _build_pattern(ROUTING_KEYWORDS)


def classify_subject(subject):
    """Pure, deterministic classifier. Returns one of VALID_CATEGORIES."""
    s = _normalize(subject)
    if not s:
        # Blank / whitespace-only / null -> deterministic default queue.
        return DEFAULT_CATEGORY
    if _URGENT_RE.search(s):
        return "urgent"
    if _SPAM_RE.search(s):
        return "spam"
    if _ROUTING_RE.search(s):
        return "routing"
    return DEFAULT_CATEGORY


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Spark job
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_udf_classifier")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)

    # Defensive: ensure the columns the contract needs exist.
    cols = set(raw.columns)
    if "email_id" not in cols:
        raise ValueError("input feed is missing required column 'email_id'")
    if "subject" not in cols:
        # tolerate feeds that carry no subject at all -> all blank
        from pyspark.sql.functions import lit
        raw = raw.withColumn("subject", lit(None).cast("string"))

    classify_udf = udf(classify_subject, StringType())

    classified = (
        raw
        .select(
            col("email_id"),
            col("subject").cast("string").alias("subject"),
        )
        .withColumn("category", classify_udf(col("subject")))
        .select("email_id", "subject", "category")
    )

    # Register the contract-named temp view in this SparkSession.
    classified.createOrReplaceTempView("classified_emails")

    # Write GOLD output to the contract location.
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py — subject triage tagger for inbound support email.

Reads a messy NDJSON email feed, classifies each subject into one of
{urgent, spam, routing, info} — correctly handling blank subjects and
non-English (multilingual) subjects — and writes the gold contract table
classified_emails(email_id, subject, category).
"""

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Keyword banks span common languages (EN/ES/FR/DE/IT/PT + a few others).
# Each phrase is matched against a normalized (accent-stripped, lowercased)
# subject so that non-English subjects route to the same bucket as their
# English equivalents.

_URGENT = [
    # English

]

_SPAM = [
    # English

]

    "route", "routing", "forward", "forwarded", "please forward", "transfer",

    # French

    "weiterleiten", "weitergeleitet", "umleiten", "zuweisen", "eskalieren",

]


def _normalize(text):
    """Lowercase + strip accents/diacritics so multilingual subjects match."""
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Unicode normalize and drop combining marks (accents).
    nfkd = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", text)
    no_accents = "".join(c for c in nfkd if not unicodedata.combining(c))
    lowered = no_accents.lower()
    # Collapse whitespace.
    return re.sub(r"\s+", " ", lowered).strip()


def _contains_any(normalized, phrases):
    for p in phrases:
        # word-ish boundary containment: substring match is robust across
        # languages that don't use whitespace word boundaries.
        if p in normalized:
            return True
    return False


def classify_subject(subject):
    """
    Deterministically tag a subject as urgent / spam / routing / info.

    - Blank / whitespace-only / null subjects -> 'info' (nothing actionable;
      default queue rather than a mis-tag).
    - Non-English subjects handled via accent-stripping + multilingual banks.
    """
    normalized = _normalize(subject)

    if normalized == "":
        return "info"

    # Precedence: spam bait often disguises as urgent, so screen spam first,
    # then genuine urgency, then routing directives, else informational.
    if _contains_any(normalized, _SPAM):
        return "spam"
    if _contains_any(normalized, _URGENT):
        return "urgent"
    if _contains_any(normalized, _ROUTING):
        return "routing"
    return "info"

    # Resolve the id column defensively (feed is not controlled by us).
    id_candidates = ["email_id", "id", "message_id", "msg_id", "emailId"]
    id_col = next((c for c in id_candidates if c in cols), None)
    if id_col is None:
        raw = raw.withColumn("email_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
        id_col = "email_id"

    subj_candidates = ["subject", "subj", "title", "email_subject", "Subject"]
    subj_col = next((c for c in subj_candidates if c in cols), None)
    if subj_col is None:
        raw = raw.withColumn("subject", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
        subj_col = "subject"

    base = raw.select(
        F.col(id_col).cast("string").alias("email_id"),
        F.col(subj_col).cast("string").alias("subject"),
    )
    base.createOrReplaceTempView("emails_raw")

    # ---- TRANSFORM (UDF classifier) --------------------------------------
    classify_udf = F.udf(classify_subject, StringType())

    classified = base.withColumn("category", classify_udf(F.col("subject")))

    # Contract: exact columns, exact grain (one row per email_id).
    gold = classified.select("email_id", "subject", "category")

    gold.createOrReplaceTempView("classified_emails")

    # ---- WRITE (gold contract output) ------------------------------------
    if output_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(output_path)
    elif output_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)
    else:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()

def _normalize(subject):

    if subject is None:

    decomposed = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", s)
    stripped = "".join(ch for ch in decomposed if not unicodedata.combining(ch))

    if _contains_any(norm, URGENT_KW):

    if _contains_any(norm, SPAM_KW):

    classified = staged.withColumn("category", classify_udf(F.col("subject")))
    classified = classified.select("email_id", "subject", "category")
    classified.createOrReplaceTempView("classified_emails")

    # ---- WRITE (GOLD) -------------------------------------------------------
    if output_path:

    elif output_table:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)

        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    # pt
    "informacao", "boletim", "atualizacao", "notificacao", "lembrete",
    "resumo", "relatorio", "bem vindo",
]

# Priority order for tie-breaking (most severe / most actionable first).
CATEGORY_ORDER = ["urgent", "spam", "routing", "info"]
LEXICONS = {
    "urgent": URGENT,
    "spam": SPAM,
    "routing": ROUTING,
    "info": INFO,
}


def _normalize(text):
    """Lowercase, strip diacritics, collapse whitespace -> language-agnostic."""
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Unicode decompose and drop combining marks (accents) so non-English
    # subjects match their normalized keyword forms.
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", str(text))
    text = "".join(c for c in text if not unicodedata.combining(c))
    text = text.lower()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9\s]", " ", text)
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text


def _score(norm_text):
    scores = {c: 0 for c in CATEGORY_ORDER}
    if not norm_text:
        return scores
    padded = " " + norm_text + " "
    for cat, words in LEXICONS.items():
        for kw in words:
            # word/phrase boundary match against padded normalized text
            if " " + kw + " " in padded or padded.find(" " + kw) == 0:
                scores[cat] += 1
            elif " " in kw and kw in norm_text:
                scores[cat] += 1
    return scores


def classify(subject, body):
    """Return one of urgent/spam/routing/info.

    Blank subjects fall back to the body text so they are no longer mis-tagged.
    Non-English text is normalized and matched against multilingual lexicons.
    """
    subj_norm = _normalize(subject)

    # Blank / whitespace-only subject -> use body signal instead of defaulting
    # everything into the wrong queue.
    if not subj_norm:
        body_norm = _normalize(body)
        scores = _score(body_norm)
    else:
        scores = _score(subj_norm)
        # If the subject yields no signal at all, try the body as a backstop.
        if sum(scores.values()) == 0:
            scores = _score(_normalize(body))

    best_cat = "info"
    best_score = 0
    for cat in CATEGORY_ORDER:
        if scores.get(cat, 0) > best_score:
            best_score = scores[cat]
            best_cat = cat
    # No signal anywhere -> informational default (safe, non-actionable queue).
    if best_score == 0:
        return "info"
    return best_cat


def build_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_udf_classifier")
        .master(os.environ.get("SPARK_MASTER", "local[*]"))
        .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def main():
    spark = build_spark()

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = set(raw.columns)

    # Resolve the email_id column defensively across common feed spellings.
    if "email_id" in cols:
        id_col = F.col("email_id")

        id_col = F.col("id").cast(StringType())
    elif "message_id" in cols:
        id_col = F.col("message_id").cast(StringType())
    else:
        id_col = F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast(StringType())

    subject_col = F.col("subject") if "subject" in cols else F.lit(None).cast(StringType())

    if "body" in cols:
        body_col = F.col("body")
    elif "text" in cols:
        body_col = F.col("text")
    elif "content" in cols:
        body_col = F.col("content")
    else:
        body_col = F.lit(None).cast(StringType())

    staged = raw.select(
        id_col.alias("email_id"),
        subject_col.cast(StringType()).alias("subject"),
        body_col.cast(StringType()).alias("body"),
    )
    staged.createOrReplaceTempView("staged_emails")

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------
    # TRANSFORM: UDF classifier over subject (+ body fallback)
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------
    classify_udf = F.udf(classify, StringType())

    classified = staged.select(
        F.col("email_id"),
        # Preserve the original subject exactly (including blanks) for contract.
        F.col("subject"),
        classify_udf(F.col("subject"), F.col("body")).alias("category"),
    )

    # Enforce contract grain / columns exactly.
    classified = classified.select("email_id", "subject", "category")
    classified.createOrReplaceTempView("classified_emails")

    # -------------------------------------------------------------------
    # WRITE: GOLD output
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------
    if out_path:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""pipeline.py — Subject tagger for inbound support email triage.

Reads a messy NDJSON email feed and classifies each email's subject into one of
{urgent, spam, routing, info}. Robust to blank subjects and non-English subjects
(the two failure modes called out in the ticket).

Runnable standalone:
  * acquires its own SparkSession
  * reads AGENT_INPUT_PATH (fallback to hard-coded seed dataset)
  * writes gold to AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH (parquet) or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE
  * prints 'Run is COMPLETED' on success
"""

import os

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

from pyspark.sql.types import StringType


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
# Multilingual keyword lexicons.
#
# Every subject is normalized (accents stripped, lower-cased) before matching,
# so we store the ASCII-folded forms here. Matching is word-boundary aware to
# avoid spurious substring hits (e.g. "winner" should not fire on "win" alone
# unless the token is present).
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #

URGENT_TERMS = {
    # English
    "urgent", "asap", "emergency", "immediately", "immediate", "critical",
    "important", "deadline", "now", "priority", "act now", "action required",

    "urgente", "emergenza", "immediato", "critico", "importante", "urgentissimo",

    "911", "sos",
}

SPAM_TERMS = {
    # English
    "free", "win", "winner", "won", "prize", "congratulations", "congrats",
    "offer", "discount", "deal", "cheap", "click", "click here", "buy now",
    "lottery", "viagra", "cash", "money", "cash prize", "credit", "loan",

    "gratis", "gewinner", "gewonnen", "preis", "gluckwunsch", "angebot",

    "gratuito", "vincitore", "premio", "sconto", "denaro", "gratuito",

}

ROUTING_TERMS = {
    # English
    "fwd", "fw", "forward", "forwarded", "re", "reply", "ticket", "case",
    "assign", "assigned", "assignment", "transfer", "route", "routing",
    "reroute", "department", "queue", "escalated to", "please handle",
    "handoff", "hand off", "for review", "cc", "loop in", "redirect",
    # Spanish
    "reenviar", "reenviado", "ticket", "caso", "asignar", "asignado",
    "transferir", "departamento", "cola", "redirigir", "revision",
    # French
    "transferer", "transfere", "ticket", "cas", "assigner", "assigne",
    "departement", "file", "rediriger", "reexpedier", "suivi",
    # German
    "weiterleiten", "weitergeleitet", "ticket", "fall", "zuweisen",
    "zugewiesen", "abteilung", "warteschlange", "umleiten", "bearbeiten",
    # Italian / Portuguese
    "inoltrare", "inoltrato", "biglietto", "assegnare", "reparto",
    "encaminhar", "encaminhado", "bilhete", "atribuir", "departamento",
}


def _normalize(text):
    """Accent-fold and lower-case; return '' for None."""
    if text is None:
        return ""
    t = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", str(text))
    t = "".join(c for c in t if not unicodedata.combining(c))
    return t.lower()


def _tokenize(norm_text):
    """Split normalized text into word tokens for boundary-aware matching."""
    return set(re.findall(r"[a-z0-9]+", norm_text))


def _has_term(norm_text, tokens, terms):
    """True if any lexicon term appears as a whole token or exact phrase."""
    for term in terms:
        if " " in term:
            # multi-word phrase: substring match on normalized text
            if term in norm_text:
                return True
        else:
            if term in tokens:
                return True
    return False


def classify_subject(subject):
    """Deterministic multilingual classifier.

    Precedence (highest first): urgent > spam > routing > info.
      * Blank / whitespace-only subjects -> 'info' (deterministic, no fall-through).
      * Non-English subjects are handled via multilingual lexicons above.
    """
    norm = _normalize(subject).strip()

    # Blank-subject failure mode: explicit deterministic tag.
    if norm == "":
        return "info"

    tokens = _tokenize(norm)

    if _has_term(norm, tokens, URGENT_TERMS):
        return "urgent"
    if _has_term(norm, tokens, SPAM_TERMS):
        return "spam"
    if _has_term(norm, tokens, ROUTING_TERMS):
        return "routing"
    return "info"


def build_spark():
    return (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("subject_tagger")
        .getOrCreate()
    )


def main():
    spark = build_spark()

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    # --- READ: messy NDJSON email feed ------------------------------------ #
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)

    # --- PROFILE (logged, does not affect output) ------------------------- #
    cols = set(raw.columns)
    print("INPUT COLUMNS:", sorted(cols), file=sys.stderr)

    # Defensive column resolution: guarantee email_id + subject exist.
    id_col = "email_id" if "email_id" in cols else (
        "id" if "id" in cols else None
    )
    subj_col = "subject" if "subject" in cols else None

    if id_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate an email id column in {sorted(cols)}")

    staged = raw
    if id_col != "email_id":
        staged = staged.withColumnRenamed(id_col, "email_id")
    if subj_col is None:
        # No subject field at all -> treat every subject as blank.
        staged = staged.withColumn("subject", lit(None).cast(StringType()))
    elif subj_col != "subject":
        staged = staged.withColumnRenamed(subj_col, "subject")

    staged.createOrReplaceTempView("raw_emails")

    # --- TRANSFORM: apply the UDF classifier ------------------------------ #
    classify_udf = udf(classify_subject, StringType())

    classified = (
        staged
        .select(
            col("email_id"),
            col("subject").cast(StringType()).alias("subject"),
        )
        .withColumn("category", classify_udf(col("subject")))
        .select("email_id", "subject", "category")
    )

    # Register the contract-named temp view in this SparkSession.
    classified.createOrReplaceTempView("classified_emails")

    # --- WRITE: gold output ---------------------------------------------- #
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        classified.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("Neither AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH nor AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE is set")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
