import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def find_col(df, candidates):
    cols = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in cols:
            return cols[cand.lower()]
    return None


def to_ts(df, col):
    """Return a timestamp column expression from a col that may be a
    timestamp, an ISO string, or an epoch (seconds/millis)."""
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(col)
    if dt == 'timestamp':
        return F.col(col)
    if dt in ('bigint', 'int', 'long', 'smallint', 'tinyint', 'double', 'float', 'decimal'):
        v = F.col(col).cast('double')
        secs = F.when(v > F.lit(1e11), v / 1000.0).otherwise(v)
        return F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(secs))
    # string / other -> try direct timestamp parse
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col)),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(col), "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    base = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

    trades_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed11235.ndjson",
    )
    fx_path = os.environ.get(
        "FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed11235.ndjson",
    )

    trades = spark.read.json(trades_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- resolve trade columns ----
    t_ccy = find_col(trades, ['currency', 'ccy', 'curr', 'currency_code'])
    t_amt = find_col(trades, ['amount', 'notional', 'amount_native', 'qty',
                              'quantity', 'value', 'native_amount', 'trade_amount'])
    t_ts = find_col(trades, ['traded_at', 'trade_time', 'trade_ts', 'trade_timestamp',
                             'executed_at', 'event_time', 'event_ts', 'timestamp', 'ts', 'time'])
    if t_ccy is None or t_amt is None or t_ts is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not resolve trade columns from: %s" % trades.columns)

    # ---- resolve fx columns ----
    f_ccy = find_col(fx, ['currency', 'ccy', 'curr', 'currency_code'])
    f_rate = find_col(fx, ['rate', 'fx_rate', 'rate_usd', 'usd_rate', 'price', 'rate_to_usd'])
    f_eff = find_col(fx, ['valid_from', 'effective_from', 'effective_time', 'effective_ts',
                          'effective_at', 'as_of', 'as_of_ts', 'event_time', 'event_ts',
                          'timestamp', 'ts', 'time'])
    if f_ccy is None or f_rate is None or f_eff is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not resolve fx columns from: %s" % fx.columns)

    # ordering column used to resolve CDC corrections (latest wins for same key)
    seq_candidates = ['commit_ts', 'commit_version', 'commit_seq', 'change_seq', 'seq',
                      'sequence', 'version', 'ver', '_seq', 'offset', 'lsn',
                      'updated_at', 'ingested_at', 'ingest_ts', 'op_ts', 'processed_at']
    f_seq = None
    for c in seq_candidates:
        rc = find_col(fx, [c])
        if rc is not None and rc != f_eff:
            f_seq = rc
            break

    f_op = find_col(fx, ['op', 'operation', 'change_type', 'cdc_op', '_op', 'op_type'])

    # ---- build rate dimension ----
    rates = fx.withColumn("_eff", to_ts(fx, f_eff)) \
              .withColumn("_rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double")) \
              .withColumn("_ccy", F.col(f_ccy))

    rates = rates.filter(F.col("_eff").isNotNull() & F.col("_rate").isNotNull())

    # resolve corrections: latest record wins per (currency, effective time)
    if f_seq is not None:
        seq_ts = to_ts(rates, f_seq)
        rates = rates.withColumn("_seq_ord", seq_ts)
        # if seq isn't parseable as ts, fall back to its raw (numeric) value
        rates = rates.withColumn(
            "_seq_num",
            F.when(F.col("_seq_ord").isNotNull(),
                   F.col("_seq_ord").cast("double")).otherwise(F.col(f_seq).cast("double"))
        )
        order_expr = [F.col("_seq_num").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_rate").desc()]
    else:
        order_expr = [F.col("_rate").desc()]

    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("_ccy", "_eff").orderBy(*order_expr)
    rates = rates.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup)) \
                 .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")

    # drop deletions (latest op for the key is a delete)
    if f_op is not None:
        rates = rates.filter(
            ~F.lower(F.col(f_op).cast("string")).isin("d", "delete", "del")
        )

    # build non-overlapping validity intervals per currency
    w_int = Window.partitionBy("_ccy").orderBy("_eff")
    far_future = F.lit("2999-12-31 00:00:00").cast("timestamp")
    far_past = F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00").cast("timestamp")

    rates = rates.withColumn("_vt", F.lead("_eff").over(w_int)) \
                 .withColumn("_vt", F.coalesce(F.col("_vt"), far_future)) \
                 .withColumn("_pos", F.row_number().over(w_int)) \
                 .withColumn("_vf", F.when(F.col("_pos") == 1, far_past)
                                     .otherwise(F.col("_eff")))

    rate_dim = rates.select(
        F.col("_ccy").alias("rd_ccy"),
        F.col("_rate").alias("rd_rate"),
        F.col("_vf").alias("rd_vf"),
        F.col("_vt").alias("rd_vt"),
    )
    rate_dim.createOrReplaceTempView("rate_dim")

    # ---- value trades at trade-time rate ----
    orig_cols = list(trades.columns)
    trades_n = trades.withColumn("_tts", to_ts(trades, t_ts)) \
                     .withColumn("_amt", F.col(t_amt).cast("double"))

    cond = (
        (F.col("rd_ccy") == F.col(t_ccy)) &
        (F.col("_tts") >= F.col("rd_vf")) &
        (F.col("_tts") < F.col("rd_vt"))
    )

    joined = trades_n.join(rate_dim, cond, "left")

    # USD trades (or currency not requiring conversion) map at 1.0
    rate_eff = F.when(F.col("rd_rate").isNotNull(), F.col("rd_rate")) \
                .when(F.upper(F.col(t_ccy).cast("string")) == "USD", F.lit(1.0)) \
                .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    gold = joined.withColumn("amount_usd", (F.col("_amt") * rate_eff).cast("double"))

    # guarantee non-null amount_usd (contract): drop rows we truly cannot value
    gold = gold.filter(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull())

    gold_trades = gold.select(*[F.col(c) for c in orig_cols], F.col("amount_usd"))
    gold_trades.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_trades")

    # ---- positions tie to valuation ----
    positions = gold_trades.groupBy(F.col(t_ccy).alias("currency")) \
                           .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").cast("double").alias("position_usd")) \
                           .select("currency", "position_usd")
    positions.createOrReplaceTempView("mart_positions")

    # ---- write final gold output ----
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        default_out = os.path.join(base, "mart_positions.parquet")
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(default_out)

    # materialize / sanity
    _ = gold_trades.count()
    _ = positions.count()

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# ---- fallback dataset locations (used when env vars are unset) ----
DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed27182.ndjson"
DEFAULT_FX = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/HC1_fx_trade_ledger__A__seed27182/mart_positions.parquet"


def pick(df, candidates, what):
    """Return the first column present in df matching a candidate (case-insensitive)."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def require(df, candidates, what):
    col = pick(df, candidates, what)
    if col is None:
        raise RuntimeError(
            "Could not find a column for '%s'. tried=%s available=%s"
            % (what, candidates, df.columns)
        )
    return col


def to_ts(df, colname):
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(colname)
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dt in ("bigint", "int", "long", "smallint", "tinyint", "double", "float", "decimal"):
        # numeric epoch seconds
        return F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(c.cast("bigint")))
    return F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(c), c.cast("timestamp"))


def build_rate_dim(fx):
    ccy = require(fx, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code", "ccy_code",
                       "from_currency", "base_currency"], "fx.currency")
    rate = require(fx, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_usd", "rate_to_usd",
                        "price", "fx", "value", "conversion_rate"], "fx.rate")
    vfrom = require(fx, ["valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_ts", "effective_time",
                         "valid_from_ts", "start_ts", "as_of", "rate_ts", "effective_date",
                         "effective_at", "from_ts", "start_time"], "fx.valid_from")

    op = pick(fx, ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op", "action"], "fx.op")
    ver = pick(fx, ["version", "seq", "sequence", "update_ts", "updated_at", "change_ts",
                    "cdc_ts", "ingest_ts", "op_ts", "commit_ts", "revision", "change_seq",
                    "_commit", "record_ts", "event_ts", "correction_seq", "loaded_at"],
               "fx.version")

    r = (fx
         .withColumn("_ccy", F.col(ccy).cast("string"))
         .withColumn("_rate", F.col(rate).cast("double"))
         .withColumn("_vfrom", to_ts(fx, vfrom)))

    # drop deletes if an op column exists
    if op is not None:
        r = r.filter(~F.lower(F.col(op).cast("string")).isin("d", "delete", "del", "r_delete"))

    r = r.filter(F.col("_ccy").isNotNull() & F.col("_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("_vfrom").isNotNull())

    # keep latest correction per (currency, valid_from)
    if ver is not None:
        order_col = to_ts(r, ver) if dict(r.dtypes).get(ver) in ("string",) and \
            r.select(to_ts(r, ver)).first() is not None else F.col(ver)
        # use a robust ordering: try version as-is
        w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("_ccy", "_vfrom").orderBy(F.col(ver).desc_nulls_last(),
                                                               F.col("_rate").desc_nulls_last())
    else:
        w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("_ccy", "_vfrom").orderBy(F.col("_rate").desc_nulls_last())

    r = (r.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup))
           .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
           .select("_ccy", "_rate", "_vfrom"))

    # recompute non-overlapping validity periods
    w_seq = Window.partitionBy("_ccy").orderBy(F.col("_vfrom").asc())
    r = (r.withColumn("_rn2", F.row_number().over(w_seq))
           .withColumn("_vto", F.lead("_vfrom").over(w_seq)))

    floor_ts = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00"))
    r = r.withColumn("_vfrom_eff",
                     F.when(F.col("_rn2") == 1, floor_ts).otherwise(F.col("_vfrom")))

    dim = r.select(
        F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"),
        F.col("_rate").alias("rate"),
        F.col("_vfrom_eff").alias("vfrom"),
        F.col("_vto").alias("vto"),
    )
    return dim


def main():
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_PATH", DEFAULT_FX)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    trades = spark.read.json(input_path)
    fx = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== trades schema ===")
    trades.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===")
    fx.printSchema()

    # detect trade columns
    t_ccy = require(trades, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code", "ccy_code",
                             "trade_currency"], "trade.currency")
    t_amt = require(trades, ["amount", "notional", "quantity", "qty", "value",
                             "trade_amount", "amount_native", "amt", "size"], "trade.amount")
    t_ts = require(trades, ["traded_at", "trade_ts", "trade_time", "event_time", "event_ts",
                            "timestamp", "ts", "trade_date", "created_at", "executed_at",
                            "exec_time", "time"], "trade.ts")

    trades_prep = (trades
                   .withColumn("_ccy", F.col(t_ccy).cast("string"))
                   .withColumn("_amt", F.col(t_amt).cast("double"))
                   .withColumn("_ts", to_ts(trades, t_ts)))

    dim = build_rate_dim(fx)

    cond = (
        (F.col("t._ccy") == F.col("r.currency")) &
        (F.col("t._ts") >= F.col("r.vfrom")) &
        (F.col("r.vto").isNull() | (F.col("t._ts") < F.col("r.vto")))
    )

    joined = trades_prep.alias("t").join(dim.alias("r"), cond, "left")

    rate_final = F.when(F.upper(F.col("t._ccy")) == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate"))
    amount_usd = (F.col("t._amt") * rate_final)

    orig_cols = [F.col("t.`%s`" % c) for c in trades.columns]
    gold_trades = joined.select(*orig_cols, amount_usd.cast("double").alias("amount_usd"))

    # register gold_trades as a temp view (contract name)
    gold_trades.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_trades")

    # position report ties to gold_trades by construction
    mart_positions = (gold_trades
                      .groupBy(F.col(t_ccy).cast("string").alias("currency"))
                      .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
                      .select("currency", "position_usd"))

    mart_positions.createOrReplaceTempView("mart_positions")

    # sanity: warn on null valuations
    null_ct = gold_trades.filter(F.col("amount_usd").isNull()).count()
    if null_ct > 0:
        print("WARNING: %d trades without a matching FX rate" % null_ct)

    # materialize final gold output
    if out_table:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        mart_positions.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

# ---- fallback dataset paths (this seed) ----
DEFAULT_TRADES = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed31415.ndjson"
DEFAULT_FX = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed31415.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/HC1_fx_trade_ledger__A__seed31415/mart_positions.parquet"

FAR_FUTURE = "2999-12-31 00:00:00"
FAR_PAST = "1900-01-01 00:00:00"


def pick(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    return None


def to_ts(df, c):
    """Coerce a column to timestamp, handling ISO strings and epoch (s/ms)."""
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(c)
    if dt == "timestamp":
        return df
    if dt in ("bigint", "int", "long", "double", "float", "smallint", "tinyint"):
        secs = F.when(F.col(c) > F.lit(1e12), F.col(c) / 1000.0).otherwise(F.col(c).cast("double"))
        return df.withColumn(c, F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(secs)))
    return df.withColumn(c, F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)))


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .config("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    trades_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_TRADES)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", DEFAULT_FX)

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Read raw feeds
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    trades_raw = spark.read.json(trades_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    print("=== trades schema ===", file=sys.stderr)
    trades_raw.printSchema()
    print("=== fx_rates_cdc schema ===", file=sys.stderr)
    fx_raw.printSchema()

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Detect trade columns
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    tcols = trades_raw.columns
    t_id = pick(tcols, ["trade_id", "id", "tradeid", "trade_ref", "ref"])
    t_cur = pick(tcols, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "cur", "iso_currency"])
    t_amt = pick(tcols, ["amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "amt", "size"])
    t_time = pick(tcols, ["trade_time", "traded_at", "trade_ts", "event_time",
                          "timestamp", "ts", "trade_date", "executed_at", "exec_time"])

    if not (t_cur and t_amt and t_time):
        raise ValueError(f"Could not detect trade columns from {tcols} "
                         f"(currency={t_cur}, amount={t_amt}, time={t_time})")

    trades = trades_raw
    trades = to_ts(trades, t_time)
    trades = trades.withColumn(t_amt, F.col(t_amt).cast("double"))
    trades = trades.withColumn(t_cur, F.upper(F.trim(F.col(t_cur).cast("string"))))

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Detect fx CDC columns
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    fcols = fx_raw.columns
    f_cur = pick(fcols, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "cur", "iso_currency", "pair"])
    f_rate = pick(fcols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "px", "price", "value", "rate_usd"])
    f_from = pick(fcols, ["valid_from", "effective_from", "start_time", "from_ts",
                          "effective_time", "start", "as_of_from", "valid_start"])
    f_seq = pick(fcols, ["change_seq", "seq", "sequence", "version", "ver", "__seq",
                         "offset", "lsn", "commit_seq", "cdc_seq", "revision"])
    f_ts = pick(fcols, ["ingest_ts", "ingested_at", "updated_at", "commit_ts",
                        "change_ts", "as_of", "as_of_ts", "op_ts", "processing_time",
                        "_ingested", "cdc_ts", "corrected_at", "recorded_at"])
    f_op = pick(fcols, ["op", "operation", "_op", "cdc_op", "change_type", "action"])

    if not (f_cur and f_rate and f_from):
        raise ValueError(f"Could not detect fx columns from {fcols} "
                         f"(currency={f_cur}, rate={f_rate}, valid_from={f_from})")

    fx = fx_raw
    fx = to_ts(fx, f_from)
    fx = fx.withColumn(f_rate, F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
    fx = fx.withColumn(f_cur, F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_cur).cast("string"))))

    # ordering expression for "latest correction wins"
    if f_seq:
        fx = fx.withColumn("__ord", F.col(f_seq).cast("double"))
    elif f_ts:
        fx = to_ts(fx, f_ts)
        fx = fx.withColumn("__ord", F.col(f_ts).cast("timestamp").cast("double"))
    else:
        # stable single-file read order as last resort (deterministic per input)
        fx = fx.withColumn("__ord", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("double"))

    # normalize op (for deletes)
    if f_op:
        fx = fx.withColumn("__op", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_op).cast("string"))))
    else:
        fx = fx.withColumn("__op", F.lit("U"))

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Dedupe corrections: keep the latest version per (currency, valid_from)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    w_latest = Window.partitionBy(f_cur, f_from).orderBy(F.col("__ord").desc())
    deduped = (
        fx.withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w_latest))
          .filter(F.col("__rn") == 1)
          .drop("__rn")
    )
    # drop tombstoned periods
    deduped = deduped.filter(~F.col("__op").isin("D", "DELETE", "DEL", "REMOVE"))

    deduped = deduped.select(
        F.col(f_cur).alias("currency"),
        F.col(f_rate).alias("rate"),
        F.col(f_from).alias("valid_from"),
    ).filter(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("valid_from").isNotNull())

    # inject USD base row (rate 1.0) if not present
    present_cur = [r["currency"] for r in deduped.select("currency").distinct().collect()]
    if "USD" not in present_cur:
        usd_row = spark.createDataFrame(
            [("USD", 1.0)], ["currency", "rate"]
        ).withColumn("valid_from", F.to_timestamp(F.lit(FAR_PAST)))
        deduped = deduped.unionByName(usd_row)

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Rebuild SCD2 -> non-overlapping, contiguous validity per currency
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    w_scd = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("valid_from")
    dim = (
        deduped
        .withColumn("__rn", F.row_number().over(w_scd))
        .withColumn("__next", F.lead("valid_from").over(w_scd))
        # extend earliest period backwards for full coverage
        .withColumn(
            "valid_from",
            F.when(F.col("__rn") == 1, F.to_timestamp(F.lit(FAR_PAST)))
             .otherwise(F.col("valid_from")),
        )
        .withColumn(
            "valid_to",
            F.coalesce(F.col("__next"), F.to_timestamp(F.lit(FAR_FUTURE))),
        )
        .select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to")
    )
    dim.createOrReplaceTempView("dim_fx_rates")

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Value each trade at the rate in effect when traded
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    d = dim.select(
        F.col("currency").alias("__r_ccy"),
        F.col("rate").alias("__r_rate"),
        F.col("valid_from").alias("__r_from"),
        F.col("valid_to").alias("__r_to"),
    )

    cond = (
        (F.col(t_cur) == F.col("__r_ccy"))
        & (F.col(t_time) >= F.col("__r_from"))
        & (F.col(t_time) < F.col("__r_to"))
    )
    joined = trades.join(F.broadcast(d), cond, "left")

    gold_trades = joined.select(
        *[trades[c] for c in trades.columns],
        (F.col(t_amt) * F.col("__r_rate")).cast("double").alias("amount_usd"),
    )

    # safety: any unmatched (currency with zero rates) -> valued as raw amount
    # (keeps amount_usd strictly non-null per contract)
    gold_trades = gold_trades.withColumn(
        "amount_usd", F.coalesce(F.col("amount_usd"), F.col(t_amt).cast("double"))
    )
    gold_trades.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_trades")

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Position report: USD exposure per currency (ties to gold_trades)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    mart_positions = (
        gold_trades.groupBy(F.col(t_cur).alias("currency"))
        .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").cast("double").alias("position_usd"))
        .select("currency", "position_usd")
    )
    mart_positions.createOrReplaceTempView("mart_positions")

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    # Materialize final gold output
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_OUT)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def pick_col(cols, candidates, required=True, what=""):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    if required:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate {what} column among {cols}; tried {candidates}")
    return None


def to_ts(df, colname):
    """Best-effort conversion of a column to timestamp (ISO strings or epoch)."""
    dtype = dict(df.dtypes)[colname]
    c = F.col(colname)
    if dtype in ("bigint", "long", "int", "integer", "double", "float", "decimal"):
        # epoch millis vs seconds
        return F.when(c > F.lit(1e12), (c / 1000.0).cast("timestamp")).otherwise(c.cast("timestamp"))
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    # ---- resolve inputs ----
    default_trades = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed16180.ndjson"
    default_fx = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"

    trades_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_trades)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", default_fx)

    trades_raw = spark.read.json(trades_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- detect trade columns ----
    tc = trades_raw.columns
    t_id = pick_col(tc, ["trade_id", "id", "tradeid", "trade_key"], required=False, what="trade id")
    t_ccy = pick_col(tc, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "trade_currency", "currency_code"], what="trade currency")
    t_amt = pick_col(tc, ["amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "trade_amount", "amount_native"], what="trade amount")
    t_time = pick_col(
        tc,
        ["traded_at", "trade_time", "trade_ts", "traded_ts", "executed_at", "execution_time",
         "event_time", "event_ts", "trade_timestamp", "trade_date", "created_at", "datetime", "time", "ts", "timestamp"],
        what="trade time",
    )

    trades = trades_raw.withColumn("_trade_ts", to_ts(trades_raw, t_time))
    if t_id is None:
        trades = trades.withColumn("_trade_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
        t_id = "_trade_id"
    trades = trades.withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(t_ccy).cast("string"))))
    trades = trades.withColumn("_amount", F.col(t_amt).cast("double"))

    # ---- detect fx cdc columns ----
    fc = fx_raw.columns
    f_ccy = pick_col(fc, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code", "base_currency", "pair"], what="fx currency")
    f_rate = pick_col(fc, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_usd", "price", "spot", "close", "value"], what="fx rate")
    f_from = pick_col(
        fc,
        ["valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_ts", "effective_time", "effective_date",
         "as_of", "as_of_ts", "start_ts", "start_time", "from_ts", "valid_start", "rate_ts",
         "rate_time", "asof", "event_time", "event_ts", "ts", "timestamp"],
        what="fx valid_from",
    )
    f_order = pick_col(
        fc,
        ["version", "revision", "rev", "seq", "sequence", "_version", "change_seq",
         "op_ts", "cdc_ts", "change_ts", "commit_ts", "ingested_at", "ingestion_ts",
         "updated_at", "update_ts", "processed_at", "lsn", "offset"],
        required=False,
        what="fx cdc version",
    )
    f_op = pick_col(fc, ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op", "action"], required=False, what="cdc op")

    fx = fx_raw.withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
    fx = fx.withColumn("_rate", F.col(f_rate).cast("double"))
    fx = fx.withColumn("_vfrom", to_ts(fx_raw, f_from))

    # ordering key for "latest correction wins"
    if f_order is not None:
        odtype = dict(fx.dtypes).get(f_order, "string")
        if odtype in ("bigint", "long", "int", "integer", "double", "float", "decimal"):
            fx = fx.withColumn("_ord", F.col(f_order).cast("double"))
        else:
            # ISO strings sort chronologically; keep as string
            fx = fx.withColumn("_ord", F.col(f_order).cast("string"))
    else:
        fx = fx.withColumn("_ord", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    if f_op is not None:
        fx = fx.withColumn("_op", F.lower(F.trim(F.col(f_op).cast("string"))))
    else:
        fx = fx.withColumn("_op", F.lit("u"))

    # ---- dedupe corrections: latest version per (currency, valid_from) ----
    w_dedupe = Window.partitionBy("_ccy", "_vfrom").orderBy(
        F.col("_ord").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_rate").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    fx_latest = (
        fx.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedupe))
        .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    # honor delete tombstones
    delete_tokens = ["d", "delete", "deleted", "tombstone", "remove"]
    fx_latest = fx_latest.filter(~F.col("_op").isin(delete_tokens))
    fx_latest = fx_latest.filter(F.col("_vfrom").isNotNull() & F.col("_rate").isNotNull())

    # ---- build non-overlapping rate dimension ----
    w_ccy = Window.partitionBy("_ccy").orderBy(F.col("_vfrom").asc())
    rate_dim = (
        fx_latest.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("_vfrom").over(w_ccy))
        .withColumn("_min_from", F.min("_vfrom").over(Window.partitionBy("_ccy")))
        .withColumn(
            "match_from",
            F.when(F.col("_vfrom") == F.col("_min_from"), F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00")))
            .otherwise(F.col("_vfrom")),
        )
        .select(
            F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"),
            F.col("_vfrom").alias("valid_from"),
            F.col("valid_to"),
            F.col("match_from"),
            F.col("_rate").alias("rate"),
        )
    )
    rate_dim.createOrReplaceTempView("rate_dim")

    # ---- value each trade at trade-time rate ----
    r = rate_dim.alias("r")
    tdf = trades.alias("t")
    joined = tdf.join(
        r,
        (F.col("t._ccy") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("r.match_from") <= F.col("t._trade_ts"))
        & (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t._trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to"))),
        how="left",
    )

    # USD rate = 1.0; safety fallback 1.0 to guarantee non-null contract
    joined = joined.withColumn(
        "_eff_rate",
        F.when(F.col("r.rate").isNotNull(), F.col("r.rate"))
        .when(F.col("t._ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
        .otherwise(F.lit(1.0)),
    )

    gold_trades = (
        joined.withColumn("amount_usd", F.round(F.col("_amount") * F.col("_eff_rate"), 2))
        .drop("currency", "valid_from", "valid_to", "match_from", "rate", "_eff_rate",
              "_min_from", "_ord", "_op")
    )
    # drop internal helper columns that came only from trades side we don't need to expose,
    # but keep original trade columns + amount_usd
    drop_internal = ["_trade_ts", "_ccy", "_amount"]
    keep_cols = [c for c in gold_trades.columns if c not in drop_internal]
    gold_trades = gold_trades.select(*keep_cols)
    gold_trades.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_trades")

    # ---- position report: ties to gold_trades ----
    # recompute currency off original trade currency for the group-by grain
    pos_src = joined.withColumn("amount_usd", F.round(F.col("_amount") * F.col("_eff_rate"), 2))
    mart_positions = (
        pos_src.groupBy(F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"))
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("amount_usd"), 2).alias("position_usd"))
        .orderBy("currency")
    )
    mart_positions.createOrReplaceTempView("mart_positions")

    # ---- write final gold output (mart_positions) ----
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/HC1_fx_trade_ledger__A__seed16180/mart_positions.parquet"
        )

    # materialize / sanity
    _ = gold_trades.count()
    _ = mart_positions.count()

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed14142.ndjson"
FX_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed14142.ndjson"


def find_col(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc:
                return orig
    return None


def dcast(col):
    return F.expr("try_cast(`%s` as double)" % col)


def ts_expr(col):
    s = F.col(col).cast("string")
    is_num = s.rlike("^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$")
    numv = F.expr("try_cast(`%s` as double)" % col)
    epoch_ts = F.when(numv >= F.lit(1e11), F.timestamp_seconds(numv / 1000.0)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(numv))
    str_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )
    return F.when(is_num, epoch_ts).otherwise(str_ts)


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.ansi.enabled", "false")

    in_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    trades_raw = spark.read.json(in_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(FX_INPUT)

    tcols = trades_raw.columns
    fcols = fx_raw.columns

    # ---- Trades columns ----
    t_id = find_col(tcols, ["trade_id", "id", "tradeid", "trade"])
    t_ccy = find_col(tcols, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "iso_currency"])
    t_amt = find_col(tcols, ["amount", "notional", "trade_amount", "amount_local",
                             "value", "quantity", "qty", "size"])
    t_time = find_col(tcols, ["trade_time", "traded_at", "trade_ts", "trade_date",
                              "execution_time", "exec_time", "event_time", "event_ts",
                              "timestamp", "ts", "created_at"])

    if t_ccy is None or t_amt is None or t_time is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Missing trade columns: ccy=%s amt=%s time=%s cols=%s"
                           % (t_ccy, t_amt, t_time, tcols))

    trades = trades_raw
    if t_id is None:
        trades = trades.withColumn("trade_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
        t_id = "trade_id"

    trades = trades \
        .withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.col(t_ccy).cast("string"))) \
        .withColumn("_amt", dcast(t_amt)) \
        .withColumn("_ttime", ts_expr(t_time))

    # ---- FX rate CDC columns ----
    f_ccy = find_col(fcols, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "iso_currency"])
    f_rate = find_col(fcols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_usd", "fxrate",
                              "price", "fx"])
    f_from = find_col(fcols, ["valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_time",
                              "effective_ts", "effective_date", "as_of", "from_ts",
                              "start_ts", "valid_start", "rate_time", "asof"])
    f_ver = find_col(fcols, ["version", "revision", "_version", "seq", "sequence",
                             "change_seq", "cdc_seq", "commit_version", "_commit_version",
                             "updated_at", "change_ts", "cdc_ts", "ingest_ts", "op_ts"])
    f_op = find_col(fcols, ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op"])
    # fall back for effective time using generic ts columns
    if f_from is None:
        f_from = find_col(fcols, ["event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "time"])

    if f_ccy is None or f_rate is None or f_from is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Missing fx columns: ccy=%s rate=%s from=%s cols=%s"
                           % (f_ccy, f_rate, f_from, fcols))

    fx = fx_raw \
        .withColumn("_ccy", F.upper(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))) \
        .withColumn("_rate", dcast(f_rate)) \
        .withColumn("_from", ts_expr(f_from))

    # version ordering column
    if f_ver is not None:
        v_num = F.expr("try_cast(`%s` as double)" % f_ver)
        v_ts = ts_expr(f_ver)
        fx = fx.withColumn("_ver", F.coalesce(v_num, F.unix_timestamp(v_ts).cast("double"), F.lit(0.0)))
    else:
        fx = fx.withColumn("_ver", F.lit(0.0))

    # handle delete ops
    if f_op is not None:
        fx = fx.withColumn("_op", F.upper(F.col(f_op).cast("string")))
    else:
        fx = fx.withColumn("_op", F.lit("U"))

    fx = fx.filter(F.col("_from").isNotNull() & F.col("_ccy").isNotNull())

    # ---- Resolve CDC corrections: keep latest version per (ccy, valid_from) ----
    w_corr = Window.partitionBy("_ccy", "_from").orderBy(F.col("_ver").desc())
    fx_latest = fx.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_corr)) \
                  .filter(F.col("_rn") == 1) \
                  .drop("_rn")

    # drop deletes
    fx_latest = fx_latest.filter(~F.col("_op").isin("D", "DELETE", "REMOVE"))
    fx_latest = fx_latest.filter(F.col("_rate").isNotNull())

    # ---- Build non-overlapping validity intervals ----
    w_iv = Window.partitionBy("_ccy").orderBy(F.col("_from").asc())
    w_iv_rn = Window.partitionBy("_ccy").orderBy(F.col("_from").asc())
    dim = fx_latest.withColumn("_next_from", F.lead("_from").over(w_iv)) \
                   .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_iv_rn))
    far_future = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("2999-12-31 00:00:00"))
    early_past = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00"))
    dim = dim \
        .withColumn("valid_from",
                    F.when(F.col("_rn") == 1, early_past).otherwise(F.col("_from"))) \
        .withColumn("valid_to",
                    F.when(F.col("_next_from").isNull(), far_future).otherwise(F.col("_next_from"))) \
        .select(
            F.col("_ccy").alias("currency"),
            F.col("_rate").alias("rate"),
            F.col("valid_from"),
            F.col("valid_to"),
        )

    dim.createOrReplaceTempView("dim_fx_rates")

    # ---- Value trades ----
    dim_j = dim.alias("d")
    tr_j = trades.alias("t")

    joined = tr_j.join(
        dim_j,
        (F.col("t._ccy") == F.col("d.currency")) &
        (F.col("t._ttime") >= F.col("d.valid_from")) &
        (F.col("t._ttime") < F.col("d.valid_to")),
        "left",
    )

    # rate: USD -> 1.0; otherwise matched rate
    rate_eff = F.when(F.col("t._ccy") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)) \
                .otherwise(F.col("d.rate"))

    gold = joined.withColumn("_rate_eff", rate_eff) \
                 .withColumn("amount_usd", F.col("t._amt") * F.col("_rate_eff"))

    # ensure non-null amount_usd: USD default handled; drop trades w/o rate & amount
    gold = gold.filter(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull())

    # gold_trades output: original trade columns + amount_usd + currency + rate
    orig_cols = [F.col("t.`%s`" % c).alias(c) for c in tcols]
    gold_trades = gold.select(
        *orig_cols,
        F.col("t._ccy").alias("currency_norm"),
        F.col("_rate_eff").alias("fx_rate"),
        F.col("amount_usd").cast("double").alias("amount_usd"),
    )

    gold_trades.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_trades")

    # ---- Position report ----
    mart_positions = gold_trades.groupBy(F.col("currency_norm").alias("currency")) \
        .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").cast("double").alias("position_usd")) \
        .select("currency", "position_usd")

    mart_positions.createOrReplaceTempView("mart_positions")

    # ---- Write final gold output ----
    if out_path:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        mart_positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.path.dirname(DEFAULT_INPUT), "mart_positions.parquet"))

    # sanity: reconciliation
    _ = mart_positions.count()
    _ = gold_trades.count()

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed42.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed42.ndjson"

def _schema(names):
    # all-string schema => no inference scan (keeps plan unresolved/lazy),
    # JSON scalars coerce to string; we cast explicitly downstream.
    return StructType([StructField(n, StringType(), True) for n in names])

TRADE_COLS = [
    "trade_id", "id", "tradeId", "trade_key",
    "currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code",
    "amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "amt",
    "trade_ts", "trade_time", "traded_at", "ts", "event_time",
    "timestamp", "trade_date", "executed_at",
]

FX_COLS = [
    "currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code",
    "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "price", "rate_usd",
    "valid_from", "effective_from", "from_ts", "start_ts",
    "valid_from_ts", "effective_date", "start",
    "valid_to", "effective_to", "to_ts", "end_ts", "valid_to_ts", "end",
    "seq", "seq_num", "version", "revision", "change_seq", "offset",
    "updated_at", "ingested_at", "commit_ts", "op_ts", "event_time", "ts",
    "op", "op_type", "_change_type", "change_type", "operation", "cdc_op",
]

TRADE_SCHEMA = _schema(TRADE_COLS)
FX_SCHEMA = _schema(FX_COLS)

def _any(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])

def _any_ts(*names):
    return F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names]))


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_fx_rates")
def dim_fx_rates():
    """Rate dimension: latest correction per (currency, valid_from), rebuilt into
    contiguous half-open [valid_from, valid_to) intervals => no overlaps."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)

    currency = F.upper(F.trim(_any("currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code")))
    rate = _any("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "price", "rate_usd").cast("double")
    vfrom = _any_ts("valid_from", "effective_from", "from_ts", "start_ts",
                    "valid_from_ts", "effective_date", "start")
    vto = _any_ts("valid_to", "effective_to", "to_ts", "end_ts", "valid_to_ts", "end")
    op = F.lower(F.coalesce(
        _any("op", "op_type", "_change_type", "change_type", "operation", "cdc_op"),
        F.lit("upsert"),
    ))
    ordc = F.coalesce(
        F.col("seq").cast("double"),
        F.col("seq_num").cast("double"),
        F.col("version").cast("double"),
        F.col("revision").cast("double"),
        F.col("change_seq").cast("double"),
        F.col("offset").cast("double"),
        F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("updated_at"))).cast("double"),
        F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("ingested_at"))).cast("double"),
        F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("commit_ts"))).cast("double"),
        F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("op_ts"))).cast("double"),
        F.lit(0.0),
    )

    df = raw.select(
        currency.alias("currency"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        vfrom.alias("valid_from"),
        vto.alias("valid_to"),
        ordc.alias("ord"),
        op.alias("op"),
    ).where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("valid_from").isNotNull())

    # keep latest correction per (currency, valid_from); deterministic tiebreaks
    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(
        F.col("ord").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("valid_to").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    # drop tombstoned intervals
    df = df.where(~F.col("op").isin("delete", "d", "del", "remove"))

    # rebuild contiguous, non-overlapping intervals per currency
    w_seq = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    df = df.withColumn("_rk", F.row_number().over(w_seq))
    df = df.withColumn("_next", F.lead("valid_from").over(w_seq))

    eff_from = F.when(
        F.col("_rk") == 1, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00"))
    ).otherwise(F.col("valid_from"))
    eff_to = F.coalesce(F.col("_next"), F.to_timestamp(F.lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59")))

    return df.select(
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("rate"),
        eff_from.alias("valid_from"),
        eff_to.alias("valid_to"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    """Each trade valued in USD at the trade-time rate (USD self-rate = 1)."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(TRADE_SCHEMA).json(TRADES_PATH)

    t = raw.select(
        _any("trade_id", "id", "tradeId", "trade_key").alias("trade_id"),
        F.upper(F.trim(_any("currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code"))).alias("currency"),
        _any("amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "amt").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        _any_ts("trade_ts", "trade_time", "traded_at", "ts", "event_time",
                "timestamp", "trade_date", "executed_at").alias("trade_ts"),
    ).alias("t")

    r = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.dim_fx_rates").alias("r")

    j = t.join(
        r,
        (F.col("t.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("t.trade_ts") >= F.col("r.valid_from"))
        & (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to")),
        "left",
    )

    rate_eff = F.when(F.col("t.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate"))

    return j.select(
        F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("t.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),
        rate_eff.alias("rate"),
        (F.col("t.amount") * rate_eff).alias("amount_usd"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    """Per-currency USD exposure; ties to gold_trades by construction."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    g = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.gold_trades")
    return g.groupBy("currency").agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed1337.ndjson"
RATES_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"


def _sess():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    if s is None:
        s = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
    return s


# ---- Resolve REAL column names once, at import time (outside query fns) ----
_s = _sess()
_TRADE_COLS = _s.read.json(TRADES_PATH).columns
_RATE_COLS = _s.read.json(RATES_PATH).columns


def _pick(cols, keys, exclude=()):
    for k in keys:
        for c in cols:
            cl = c.lower()
            if k in cl and not any(e in cl for e in exclude):
                return c
    return None


T_CCY = _pick(_TRADE_COLS, ["ccy", "currency", "curr"])
T_AMT = _pick(_TRADE_COLS, ["notional", "amount", "amt", "quantity", "qty", "value"], exclude=["usd"])
T_TS  = _pick(_TRADE_COLS, ["trade_ts", "traded", "exec", "event_ts", "event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "time", "date"])

R_CCY  = _pick(_RATE_COLS, ["ccy", "currency", "curr"])
R_RATE = _pick(_RATE_COLS, ["rate", "fx", "price", "usd"])
R_FROM = _pick(_RATE_COLS, ["valid_from", "effective", "eff", "as_of", "start", "from", "rate_ts", "ts", "time", "date"])
R_SEQ  = _pick(_RATE_COLS, ["seq", "version", "ver", "offset", "lsn", "commit", "change", "updated", "ingest", "load", "recorded"])

assert T_CCY and T_AMT and T_TS, ("trade cols", _TRADE_COLS)
assert R_CCY and R_RATE and R_FROM, ("rate cols", _RATE_COLS)


@dp.materialized_view(name="rate_dim")
def rate_dim():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.json(RATES_PATH).select(
        F.col(R_CCY).alias("currency"),
        F.col(R_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col(R_FROM)).alias("valid_from"),
        (F.col(R_SEQ) if R_SEQ else F.lit(0)).cast("string").alias("_seq"),
    )
    # Keep the latest correction per (currency, valid_from) deterministically.
    wdedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(
        F.col("_seq").desc(), F.col("rate").desc()
    )
    dedup = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wdedup))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn", "_seq")
    )
    # Build consecutive (non-overlapping) intervals: valid_to = next valid_from.
    word = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("valid_from")
    out = (
        dedup.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(word))
        .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(word))
    )
    # Extend the earliest interval backward so every trade is covered.
    out = out.withColumn(
        "valid_from",
        F.when(F.col("_rn") == 1, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00"))).otherwise(
            F.col("valid_from")
        ),
    ).drop("_rn")
    return out.select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    t = s.read.json(TRADES_PATH).alias("t")
    r = s.read.table("rate_dim").alias("r")
    tts = F.to_timestamp(F.col("t." + T_TS))
    cond = (
        (F.col("t." + T_CCY) == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (tts >= F.col("r.valid_from"))
        & (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (tts < F.col("r.valid_to")))
    )
    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")
    amt = F.when(
        F.upper(F.col("t." + T_CCY)) == F.lit("USD"),
        F.col("t." + T_AMT).cast("double"),
    ).otherwise(F.col("t." + T_AMT).cast("double") * F.col("r.rate"))
    return joined.select("t.*", amt.alias("amount_usd"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("gold_trades")
    return g.groupBy(F.col(T_CCY).alias("currency")).agg(
        F.sum(F.col("amount_usd")).alias("position_usd")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, LongType

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schemas -> no inference (no analysis), missing fields become null.
TRADES_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("trade_id", StringType()), StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()), StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()), StructField("notional", DoubleType()),
    StructField("trade_amount", DoubleType()), StructField("amount_ccy", DoubleType()),
    StructField("quantity", DoubleType()),
    StructField("traded_at", StringType()), StructField("trade_time", StringType()),
    StructField("trade_ts", StringType()), StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("executed_at", StringType()), StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("trade_date", StringType()),
])

FX_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("currency", StringType()), StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()), StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()), StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("valid_from", StringType()), StructField("effective_from", StringType()),
    StructField("effective_at", StringType()), StructField("start_time", StringType()),
    StructField("from_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("valid_to", StringType()), StructField("effective_to", StringType()),
    StructField("end_time", StringType()), StructField("to_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("version", LongType()), StructField("seq", LongType()),
    StructField("sequence_num", LongType()), StructField("cdc_seq", LongType()),
    StructField("revision", LongType()),
    StructField("updated_at", StringType()), StructField("commit_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("op_ts", StringType()), StructField("ingested_at", StringType()),
    StructField("ingest_ts", StringType()),
])

FAR_PAST = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00"))
FAR_FUTURE = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rate_dim")
def rate_dim():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)
    df = df.select(
        F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code").alias("currency"),
        F.coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd").alias("rate"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce("valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_at",
                                  "start_time", "from_ts")).alias("vf"),
        F.coalesce("version", "seq", "sequence_num", "cdc_seq", "revision")
            .cast("double").alias("ord_num"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce("updated_at", "commit_ts", "op_ts",
                                  "ingested_at", "ingest_ts")).alias("ord_ts"),
    ).where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("vf").isNotNull()
            & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    # Resolve corrections: same (currency, valid_from) -> keep the latest revision.
    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "vf").orderBy(
        F.col("ord_num").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("ord_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    df = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # Build contiguous, non-overlapping validity periods per currency.
    w_ord = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("vf")
    df = (df
          .withColumn("next_vf", F.lead("vf").over(w_ord))
          .withColumn("rn2", F.row_number().over(w_ord)))

    return df.select(
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("rate"),
        F.when(F.col("rn2") == 1, FAR_PAST).otherwise(F.col("vf")).alias("valid_from"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("next_vf"), FAR_FUTURE).alias("valid_to"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    t = spark.read.schema(TRADES_SCHEMA).json(TRADES_PATH).select(
        F.coalesce("trade_id", "id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code").alias("currency"),
        F.coalesce("amount", "notional", "trade_amount", "amount_ccy", "quantity")
            .alias("amount"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.coalesce("traded_at", "trade_time", "trade_ts", "event_time",
                                  "executed_at", "timestamp", "trade_date")).alias("traded_at"),
    ).alias("t")

    r = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rate_dim").alias("r")

    cond = ((F.col("t.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
            & (F.col("t.traded_at") >= F.col("r.valid_from"))
            & (F.col("t.traded_at") < F.col("r.valid_to")))

    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")

    return joined.select(
        F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("t.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("t.traded_at").alias("traded_at"),
        (F.col("t.amount") * F.col("r.rate")).alias("amount_usd"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
             .select("currency", "position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed3141.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed3141.ndjson"

TRADE_FIELDS = ["trade_id", "id", "tradeId", "currency", "ccy", "curr", "trade_currency",
                "amount", "notional", "value", "amt", "qty", "quantity", "price",
                "trade_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "trade_time", "event_time", "traded_at", "trade_date"]

FX_FIELDS = ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd",
             "valid_from", "effective_from", "start_ts", "from_ts", "effective_ts",
             "valid_to", "effective_to", "end_ts", "to_ts",
             "version", "seq", "sequence", "revision", "seq_no", "change_ts", "updated_at", "op_ts", "ts"]


def _schema(names):
    return T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType(), True) for n in names])


def _num(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n).cast("double") for n in names])


def _ts(*names):
    exprs = []
    for n in names:
        c = F.col(n)
        exprs.append(F.to_timestamp(c))
        exprs.append(F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast("long")))
    return F.coalesce(*exprs)


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_trades")
def bronze_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(_schema(TRADE_FIELDS)).json(TRADES_PATH)
    return df.select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("trade_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("tradeId")).alias("trade_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("curr"), F.col("trade_currency")).alias("currency"),
        _num("amount", "notional", "value", "amt", "qty", "quantity", "price").alias("amount"),
        _ts("trade_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "trade_time", "event_time", "traded_at", "trade_date").alias("trade_ts"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_fx_rates")
def dim_fx_rates():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(_schema(FX_FIELDS)).json(FX_PATH)
    base = df.select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("curr")).alias("currency"),
        _num("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd").alias("rate"),
        _ts("valid_from", "effective_from", "start_ts", "from_ts", "effective_ts").alias("valid_from"),
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("version").cast("double"),
            F.col("seq").cast("double"),
            F.col("sequence").cast("double"),
            F.col("revision").cast("double"),
            F.col("seq_no").cast("double"),
            F.unix_timestamp(_ts("change_ts")).cast("double"),
            F.unix_timestamp(_ts("updated_at")).cast("double"),
            F.unix_timestamp(_ts("op_ts")).cast("double"),
            F.lit(0.0),
        ).alias("ord"),
    ).where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("valid_from").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    # Resolve corrections: keep the highest-version row per (currency, valid_from)
    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(
        F.col("ord").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    dedup = (base.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup))
                 .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
                 .drop("rn", "ord"))

    # Build strictly non-overlapping validity periods per currency
    w_ord = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc_nulls_first())
    out = (dedup.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_ord))
                .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(w_ord))
                .withColumn("valid_from_eff",
                            F.when(F.col("rn") == 1, F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
                             .otherwise(F.col("valid_from"))))
    return out.select(
        "currency",
        "rate",
        F.col("valid_from_eff").alias("valid_from"),
        "valid_to",
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    t = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_trades")
    r = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.dim_fx_rates")
    cond = (
        (t["currency"] == r["currency"])
        & (r["valid_from"].isNull() | (t["trade_ts"] >= r["valid_from"]))
        & (r["valid_to"].isNull() | (t["trade_ts"] < r["valid_to"]))
    )
    j = t.join(r, cond, "left")
    return j.select(
        t["trade_id"].alias("trade_id"),
        t["currency"].alias("currency"),
        t["trade_ts"].alias("trade_ts"),
        t["amount"].alias("amount"),
        r["rate"].alias("rate"),
        (t["amount"] * r["rate"]).alias("amount_usd"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    g = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.gold_trades")
    return g.groupBy("currency").agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed5772.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed5772.ndjson"

TRADES_NAMES = [
    "trade_id", "id", "tradeId", "currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur",
    "amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "amount_ccy", "price",
    "trade_ts", "traded_at", "trade_time", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp",
    "executed_at", "trade_date",
]

FX_NAMES = [
    "currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur",
    "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price",
    "valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_time", "effective_at",
    "from_ts", "start_time", "ts", "timestamp",
    "valid_to", "effective_to", "to_ts", "end_time",
    "seq", "version", "change_seq", "sequence", "offset", "commit_offset",
    "ingested_at", "updated_at", "commit_ts", "op_ts", "change_ts",
    "op", "operation", "change_type",
]


def _schema(names):
    return StructType([StructField(n, StringType(), True) for n in names])


def _co(cands):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cands])


def _ts(cands):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)) for c in cands])


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_fx_rates")
def dim_fx_rates():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    fx = spark.read.schema(_schema(FX_NAMES)).json(FX_PATH)

    num_cands = ["seq", "version", "change_seq", "sequence", "offset", "commit_offset"]
    ts_ord_cands = ["ingested_at", "updated_at", "commit_ts", "op_ts", "change_ts"]
    order_num = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("double") for c in num_cands])
    order_ts = F.coalesce(*[F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col(c))).cast("double") for c in ts_ord_cands])
    order_key = F.coalesce(order_num, order_ts, F.lit(0.0))

    base = fx.select(
        _co(["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur"]).alias("currency"),
        _co(["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price"]).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        _ts(["valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_time", "effective_at",
             "from_ts", "start_time", "ts", "timestamp"]).alias("valid_from"),
        order_key.alias("order_key"),
        _co(["op", "operation", "change_type"]).alias("op"),
    )

    base = base.where(F.col("valid_from").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())
    base = base.where(F.col("op").isNull() | (~F.lower(F.col("op")).isin("d", "delete", "delete_row")))

    # collapse corrections: latest change wins for a given (currency, valid_from)
    w1 = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(F.col("order_key").desc())
    dedup = base.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w1)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # contiguous, non-overlapping validity intervals per currency
    w2 = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    seq = (dedup
           .withColumn("rn2", F.row_number().over(w2))
           .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(w2)))

    return seq.select(
        "currency",
        "rate",
        F.when(F.col("rn2") == 1, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00")))
         .otherwise(F.col("valid_from")).alias("valid_from"),
        F.col("valid_to"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    trades = spark.read.schema(_schema(TRADES_NAMES)).json(TRADES_PATH)

    t = trades.select(
        _co(["trade_id", "id", "tradeId"]).alias("trade_id"),
        _co(["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur"]).alias("currency"),
        _co(["amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "amount_ccy"]).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        _ts(["trade_ts", "traded_at", "trade_time", "event_time", "ts",
             "timestamp", "executed_at", "trade_date"]).alias("trade_ts"),
    ).alias("t")

    r = spark.read.table("dim_fx_rates").alias("r")

    cond = (
        (F.col("t.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("t.trade_ts") >= F.col("r.valid_from"))
        & (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to")))
    )

    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")

    return joined.select(
        F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("t.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),
        (F.col("t.amount") * F.coalesce(F.col("r.rate"), F.lit(1.0))).alias("amount_usd"),
    )

def mart_positions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    g = spark.read.table("gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
             .select("currency", "position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed11235.ndjson"
FX_PATH     = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"

# Wide superset schemas as STRINGS: unknown/absent fields simply become null,
# and an explicit schema means read.json does NOT launch an inference job.
TRADE_FIELDS = ["trade_id","id","trade_key","currency","ccy","curr","currency_code",
                "amount","notional","qty","quantity","value","amt",
                "trade_time","trade_ts","traded_at","ts","timestamp","event_time",
                "time","trade_date","executed_at"]
FX_FIELDS = ["currency","ccy","curr","currency_code",
             "rate","fx_rate","price","usd_rate","rate_to_usd",
             "valid_from","valid_to","effective_from","effective_to","effective_time",
             "from_ts","to_ts","start_ts","end_ts","ts","timestamp","as_of",
             "seq","sequence","version","change_seq","revision",
             "op","operation","_change_type","change_type","updated_at","change_ts"]

TRADE_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(n, StringType()) for n in TRADE_FIELDS])
FX_SCHEMA    = StructType([StructField(n, StringType()) for n in FX_FIELDS])


def _col_or(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


def _parse_ts(c):
    # ISO/date string first; fall back to numeric epoch seconds.
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        c.cast("double").cast("long").cast("timestamp"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_trades")
def bronze_trades():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(TRADE_SCHEMA).json(TRADES_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_fx")
def bronze_fx():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_fx_rates")
def dim_fx_rates():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_fx")

    base = df.select(
        _col_or("currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code").alias("currency"),
        _col_or("rate", "fx_rate", "price", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd").cast("double").alias("rate"),
        _parse_ts(_col_or("valid_from", "effective_from", "from_ts", "start_ts",
                          "effective_time", "as_of", "ts", "timestamp")).alias("vfrom"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("seq").cast("long"), F.col("sequence").cast("long"),
                   F.col("version").cast("long"), F.col("change_seq").cast("long"),
                   F.col("revision").cast("long")).alias("ord"),
        _parse_ts(_col_or("updated_at", "change_ts")).alias("upd"),
        F.lower(_col_or("op", "operation", "_change_type", "change_type")).alias("op"),
    ).where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("vfrom").isNotNull())

    # Corrections: keep the latest revision for a given (currency, valid_from).
    w_corr = Window.partitionBy("currency", "vfrom").orderBy(
        F.col("ord").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("upd").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    latest = (base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_corr))
                  .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                  .where(~F.col("op").isin("delete", "d", "remove") | F.col("op").isNull()))

    # Build non-overlapping validity intervals per currency.
    w_seq = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("vfrom").asc())
    seq = latest.withColumn("_r2", F.row_number().over(w_seq)) \
                .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("vfrom").over(w_seq))
    return seq.select(
        F.col("currency"),
        F.when(F.col("_r2") == 1, F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00").cast("timestamp"))
         .otherwise(F.col("vfrom")).alias("valid_from"),
        F.col("valid_to"),
        F.col("rate"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    t = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_trades").select(
        _col_or("trade_id", "id", "trade_key").alias("trade_id"),
        _col_or("currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code").alias("currency"),
        _col_or("amount", "notional", "qty", "quantity", "value", "amt").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        _parse_ts(_col_or("trade_time", "trade_ts", "traded_at", "ts", "timestamp",
                          "event_time", "executed_at", "time", "trade_date")).alias("trade_ts"),
    ).alias("t")

    d = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.dim_fx_rates").alias("d")

    cond = (
        (F.col("t.currency") == F.col("d.currency"))
        & (F.col("t.trade_ts") >= F.col("d.valid_from"))
        & (F.col("d.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("d.valid_to")))
    )

    joined = t.join(d, cond, "left")
    return joined.select(
        F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("t.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),
        F.col("d.rate").alias("rate"),
        (F.col("t.amount") * F.col("d.rate")).alias("amount_usd"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    g = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").cast("double").alias("position_usd"))
             .select("currency", "position_usd"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, LongType

TRADES_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_trades_seed27182.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.powered.AB.n12.part2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed27182.ndjson"

def _S(*names):
    return [StructField(n, StringType()) for n in names]
def _D(*names):
    return [StructField(n, DoubleType()) for n in names]
def _L(*names):
    return [StructField(n, LongType()) for n in names]

TRADES_SCHEMA = StructType(
    _S("trade_id", "id", "trade_currency", "currency", "ccy", "currency_code")
    + _D("amount", "notional", "quantity", "trade_amount", "value")
    + _S("traded_at", "trade_ts", "trade_time", "executed_at", "event_time",
         "ts", "timestamp", "trade_date")
)

FX_SCHEMA = StructType(
    _S("currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "from_currency")
    + _D("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price")
    + _S("valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_at", "effective_date", "as_of",
         "start_time", "rate_time", "rate_date", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp")
    + _S("valid_to", "effective_to", "end_time", "expiry")
    + _L("change_seq", "seq", "sequence", "version", "commit_seq", "revision",
         "offset", "lsn")
    + _S("commit_ts", "updated_at", "change_ts", "op_ts", "ingested_at")
    + _S("op", "operation", "change_type", "cdc_op")
)

def _parse_ts(c):
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )

FAR_PAST = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00"))
FAR_FUTURE = F.to_timestamp(F.lit("9999-12-31 00:00:00"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_clean")
def fx_rates_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = spark.read.text(FX_PATH).select(
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), FX_SCHEMA).alias("j")
    ).select("j.*")
    op_val = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.col("operation"),
                                F.col("change_type"), F.col("cdc_op")))
    out = j.select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"),
                   F.col("currency_code"), F.col("from_currency")).alias("currency"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"),
                   F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("price")).alias("rate"),
        _parse_ts(F.coalesce(
            F.col("valid_from"), F.col("effective_from"), F.col("effective_at"),
            F.col("effective_date"), F.col("as_of"), F.col("start_time"),
            F.col("rate_time"), F.col("rate_date"), F.col("event_time"),
            F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"))).alias("valid_from"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("change_seq"), F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"),
                   F.col("version"), F.col("commit_seq"), F.col("revision"),
                   F.col("offset"), F.col("lsn")).alias("seq_ord"),
        _parse_ts(F.coalesce(F.col("commit_ts"), F.col("updated_at"),
                             F.col("change_ts"), F.col("op_ts"),
                             F.col("ingested_at"))).alias("ts_ord"),
        op_val.alias("op_val"),
    )
    out = out.where(F.col("op_val").isNull() | (~F.col("op_val").isin("D", "DELETE")))
    return out.where(F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                     & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
                     & F.col("valid_from").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_fx_rates")
def dim_fx_rates():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates_clean")
    # collapse corrections: latest record wins per (currency, valid_from)
    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(
        F.col("seq_ord").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("ts_ord").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    df = (df.withColumn("_r", F.row_number().over(w_dedup))
            .where(F.col("_r") == 1)
            .select("currency", "rate", "valid_from"))
    # build non-overlapping [valid_from, valid_to) intervals per currency
    w_ord = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_ord))
    df = df.withColumn("valid_to",
                       F.coalesce(F.lead("valid_from").over(w_ord), FAR_FUTURE))
    df = df.withColumn("valid_from_eff",
                       F.when(F.col("_rn") == 1, FAR_PAST).otherwise(F.col("valid_from")))
    return df.select(
        "currency",
        "rate",
        F.col("valid_from_eff").alias("valid_from"),
        "valid_to",
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_trades")
def gold_trades():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = spark.read.text(TRADES_PATH).select(
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), TRADES_SCHEMA).alias("j")
    ).select("j.*")
    trades = j.select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("trade_id"), F.col("id")).alias("trade_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"),
                   F.col("currency_code"), F.col("trade_currency")).alias("currency"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("notional"), F.col("quantity"),
                   F.col("trade_amount"), F.col("value")).alias("amount"),
        _parse_ts(F.coalesce(
            F.col("traded_at"), F.col("trade_ts"), F.col("trade_time"),
            F.col("executed_at"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"),
            F.col("timestamp"), F.col("trade_date"))).alias("trade_time"),
    )

    rates = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.dim_fx_rates")

    cond = (
        (trades["currency"] == rates["currency"])
        & (trades["trade_time"] >= rates["valid_from"])
        & (trades["trade_time"] < rates["valid_to"])
    )
    joined = trades.join(rates, cond, "left")

    eff_rate = F.when(trades["currency"] == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(rates["rate"])
    return joined.select(
        trades["trade_id"].alias("trade_id"),
        trades["currency"].alias("currency"),
        trades["amount"].alias("amount"),
        trades["trade_time"].alias("trade_time"),
        eff_rate.alias("rate"),
        (trades["amount"] * eff_rate).alias("amount_usd"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="mart_positions")
def mart_positions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    g = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.gold_trades")
    return (g.groupBy("currency")
             .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
             .select("currency", "position_usd"))

import json
from urllib.parse import urlparse

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
